title: Discovering Design Concepts for CAD Sketches
title_zh: 发现 CAD 草图的设计概念
abstract: Sketch design concepts are recurring patterns found in parametric CAD sketches. Though rarely explicitly formalized by the CAD designers, these concepts are implicitly used in design for modularity and regularity. In this paper, we propose a learning based approach that discovers the modular concepts by induction over raw sketches. We propose the dual implicit-explicit representation of concept structures that allows implicit detection and explicit generation, and the separation of structure generation and parameter instantiation for parameterized concept generation, to learn modular concepts by end-to-end training. We demonstrate the design concept learning on a large scale CAD sketch dataset and show its applications for design intent interpretation and auto-completion.
summary: Sketch design concepts are recurring patterns found in parametric CAD sketches. Though rarely explicitly formalized by the CAD designers, these concepts are implicitly used in design for modularity and regularity. In this paper, we propose a learning based approach that discovers the modular concepts by induction over raw sketches. We propose the dual implicit-explicit representation of concept structures that allows implicit detection and explicit generation, and the separation of structure generation and parameter instantiation for parameterized concept generation, to learn modular concepts by end-to-end training. We demonstrate the design concept learning on a large scale CAD sketch dataset and show its applications for design intent interpretation and auto-completion.
abstract_zh: 草图设计概念是参数化 CAD 草图中重复出现的模式。尽管 CAD 设计者很少明确形式化，但这些概念在设计中隐含地使用了模块化和规律性。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于学习的方法，通过对原始草图的归纳来发现模块化概念。我们提出概念结构的双重隐式-显式表示，允许隐式检测和显式生成，以及参数化概念生成的结构生成和参数实例化的分离，通过端到端训练来学习模块化概念。我们在大规模 CAD 草图数据集上演示了设计概念学习，并展示了其在设计意图解释和自动完成方面的应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于学习的方法，从CAD草图中发现隐含的设计概念，并用于设计意图解释和自动补全。
AI.motivation: CAD设计中隐含的模块化设计概念缺乏显式形式化，影响设计效率与规律性，需自动化方法挖掘此类概念。
AI.method: 采用隐式-显式双重表示结构，分离概念生成与参数实例化过程，通过端到端训练学习模块化设计概念。
AI.result: 在大规模CAD草图数据集上验证方法有效性，成功应用于设计意图解析及草图自动补全任务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可有效提取CAD设计中的隐含概念，为参数化设计提供自动化支持，提升设计效率与模块化水平。

authors_text: Yuhao Liang,Peikun Chen,Fan Yu,Xinfa Zhu,Tianyi Xu,Lei Xie
title: The NPU-ASLP System for The ISCSLP 2022 Magichub Code-Swiching ASR Challenge
title_zh: 用于 ISCSLP 2022 Magichub 代码交换 ASR 挑战赛的 NPU-ASLP 系统
abstract: This paper describes our NPU-ASLP system submitted to the ISCSLP 2022 Magichub Code-Switching ASR Challenge. In this challenge, we first explore several popular end-to-end ASR architectures and training strategies, including bi-encoder, language-aware encoder (LAE) and mixture of experts (MoE). To improve our system's language modeling ability, we further attempt the internal language model as well as the long context language model. Given the limited training data in the challenge, we further investigate the effects of data augmentation, including speed perturbation, pitch shifting, speech codec, SpecAugment and synthetic data from text-to-speech (TTS). Finally, we explore ROVER-based score fusion to make full use of complementary hypotheses from different models. Our submitted system achieves 16.87% on mix error rate (MER) on the test set and comes to the 2nd place in the challenge ranking.
summary: This paper describes our NPU-ASLP system submitted to the ISCSLP 2022 Magichub Code-Switching ASR Challenge. In this challenge, we first explore several popular end-to-end ASR architectures and training strategies, including bi-encoder, language-aware encoder (LAE) and mixture of experts (MoE). To improve our system's language modeling ability, we further attempt the internal language model as well as the long context language model. Given the limited training data in the challenge, we further investigate the effects of data augmentation, including speed perturbation, pitch shifting, speech codec, SpecAugment and synthetic data from text-to-speech (TTS). Finally, we explore ROVER-based score fusion to make full use of complementary hypotheses from different models. Our submitted system achieves 16.87% on mix error rate (MER) on the test set and comes to the 2nd place in the challenge ranking.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了我们提交给 ISCSLP 2022 Magichub Code-Switching ASR Challenge 的 NPU-ASLP 系统。在本次挑战中，我们首先探索几种流行的端到端 ASR 架构和训练策略，包括双编码器、语言感知编码器 (LAE) 和专家混合 (MoE)。为了提高系统的语言建模能力，我们进一步尝试了内部语言模型和长上下文语言模型。鉴于挑战中的训练数据有限，我们进一步研究了数据增强的效果，包括速度扰动、音调变换、语音编解码器、SpecAugment 和文本转语音 (TTS) 的合成数据。最后，我们探索基于 ROVER 的分数融合，以充分利用不同模型的互补假设。我们提交的系统在测试集上的混合错误率 (MER) 达到了 16.87%，在挑战排名中排名第二。

AI.tldr: 本文描述了针对ISCSLP 2022 Magichub代码切换语音识别挑战的NPU-ASLP系统设计与实现。
AI.motivation: 代码切换语音识别在真实场景中具有重要意义，但受限于数据量和语言混合复杂性，需探索有效模型架构与训练策略。
AI.method: 采用双编码器、语言感知编码器（LAE）和专家混合（MoE）架构，结合内部语言模型与长上下文语言模型；通过速度扰动、音高变换、语音编解码、SpecAugment及TTS合成数据进行数据增强，并使用ROVER分数融合技术整合多模型假设。
AI.result: 在测试集上达到16.87%的混合错误率（MER），获得挑战赛第二名。
AI.conclusion: 通过多架构探索、数据增强与多模型融合，有效提升了代码切换场景下的语音识别性能，验证了方法的有效性。

authors_text: Piyush Behre,Naveen Parihar,Sharman Tan,Amy Shah,Eva Sharma,Geoffrey Liu,Shuangyu Chang,Hosam Khalil,Chris Basoglu,Sayan Pathak
title: Smart Speech Segmentation using Acousto-Linguistic Features with look-ahead
title_zh: 使用具有前瞻功能的声学语言特征进行智能语音分割
abstract: Segmentation for continuous Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) has traditionally used silence timeouts or voice activity detectors (VADs), which are both limited to acoustic features. This segmentation is often overly aggressive, given that people naturally pause to think as they speak. Consequently, segmentation happens mid-sentence, hindering both punctuation and downstream tasks like machine translation for which high-quality segmentation is critical. Model-based segmentation methods that leverage acoustic features are powerful, but without an understanding of the language itself, these approaches are limited. We present a hybrid approach that leverages both acoustic and language information to improve segmentation. Furthermore, we show that including one word as a look-ahead boosts segmentation quality. On average, our models improve segmentation-F0.5 score by 9.8% over baseline. We show that this approach works for multiple languages. For the downstream task of machine translation, it improves the translation BLEU score by an average of 1.05 points.
summary: Segmentation for continuous Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) has traditionally used silence timeouts or voice activity detectors (VADs), which are both limited to acoustic features. This segmentation is often overly aggressive, given that people naturally pause to think as they speak. Consequently, segmentation happens mid-sentence, hindering both punctuation and downstream tasks like machine translation for which high-quality segmentation is critical. Model-based segmentation methods that leverage acoustic features are powerful, but without an understanding of the language itself, these approaches are limited. We present a hybrid approach that leverages both acoustic and language information to improve segmentation. Furthermore, we show that including one word as a look-ahead boosts segmentation quality. On average, our models improve segmentation-F0.5 score by 9.8% over baseline. We show that this approach works for multiple languages. For the downstream task of machine translation, it improves the translation BLEU score by an average of 1.05 points.
abstract_zh: 连续自动语音识别 (ASR) 的分段传统上使用静音超时或语音活动检测器 (VAD)，这两者都仅限于声学特征。鉴于人们在说话时会自然地停下来思考，这种细分往往过于激进。因此，分段发生在句子中间，阻碍了标点符号和下游任务（例如机器翻译），而高质量的分段对于这些任务至关重要。利用声学特征的基于模型的分割方法很强大，但如果不了解语言本身，这些方法就会受到限制。我们提出了一种利用声学和语言信息来改善分割的混合方法。此外，我们表明，包含一个单词作为前瞻可以提高分割质量。平均而言，我们的模型将分段 F0.5 分数比基线提高了 9.8%。我们证明这种方法适用于多种语言。对于机器翻译的下游任务，它的翻译BLEU得分平均提高了1.05分。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合声学与语言特征的智能语音分段方法，并引入前瞻机制提升分段质量。
AI.motivation: 传统语音分段方法依赖声学特征，无法处理自然停顿导致分段错误，影响标点和机器翻译等下游任务。
AI.method: 采用混合声学-语言特征模型，通过加入一个词的前瞻信息优化分段决策，支持多语言训练。
AI.result: 分段F0.5指标提升9.8%，机器翻译BLEU分数平均提高1.05点，方法适用于多种语言。
AI.conclusion: 融合语言信息的分段方法有效提升分割质量，对下游任务有显著帮助且具备跨语言适用性。

Model-based segmentation methods that leverage acoustic features are powerful, but without an understanding of the language itself, these approaches are limited. We present a hybrid approach that leverages both acoustic and language information to improve segmentation. Furthermore, we show that including one word as a look-ahead boosts segmentation quality. On average, our models improve segmentation-F0.5 score by 9.8% over baseline. We show that this approach works for multiple languages. For the downstream task of machine translation, it improves the translation BLEU score by an average of 1.05 points. 连续自动语音识别 (ASR) 的分段传统上使用静音超时或语音活动检测器 (VAD)，这两者都仅限于声学特征。鉴于人们在说话时会自然地停下来思考，这种细分往往过于激进。因此，分段发生在句子中间，阻碍了标点符号和下游任务（例如机器翻译），而高质量的分段对于这些任务至关重要。利用声学特征的基于模型的分割方法很强大，但如果不了解语言本身，这些方法就会受到限制。我们提出了一种利用声学和语言信息来改善分割的混合方法。此外，我们表明，包含一个单词作为前瞻可以提高分割质量。平均而言，我们的模型将分段 F0.5 分数比基线提高了 9.8%。我们证明这种方法适用于多种语言。对于机器翻译的下游任务，它的翻译BLEU得分平均提高了1.05分。 本文提出一种结合声学与语言特征的智能语音分段方法，并引入前瞻机制提升分段质量。 Piyush Behre,Naveen Parihar,Sharman Tan,Amy Shah,Eva Sharma,Geoffrey Liu,Shuangyu Chang,Hosam Khalil,Chris Basoglu,Sayan Pathak cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

title: $N$-gram Is Back: Residual Learning of Neural Text Generation with $n$-gram Language Model
title_zh: $N$-gram 回来了：使用 $n$-gram 语言模型进行神经文本生成的残差学习
abstract: $N$-gram language models (LM) have been largely superseded by neural LMs as the latter exhibits better performance. However, we find that $n$-gram models can achieve satisfactory performance on a large proportion of testing cases, indicating they have already captured abundant knowledge of the language with relatively low computational cost. With this observation, we propose to learn a neural LM that fits the residual between an $n$-gram LM and the real-data distribution. The combination of $n$-gram and neural LMs not only allows the neural part to focus on the deeper understanding of language but also provides a flexible way to customize an LM by switching the underlying $n$-gram model without changing the neural model. Experimental results on three typical language tasks (i.e., language modeling, machine translation, and summarization) demonstrate that our approach attains additional performance gains over popular standalone neural models consistently. We also show that our approach allows for effective domain adaptation by simply switching to a domain-specific $n$-gram model, without any extra training. Our code is released at https://github.com/ghrua/NgramRes.
summary: $N$-gram language models (LM) have been largely superseded by neural LMs as the latter exhibits better performance. However, we find that $n$-gram models can achieve satisfactory performance on a large proportion of testing cases, indicating they have already captured abundant knowledge of the language with relatively low computational cost. With this observation, we propose to learn a neural LM that fits the residual between an $n$-gram LM and the real-data distribution. The combination of $n$-gram and neural LMs not only allows the neural part to focus on the deeper understanding of language but also provides a flexible way to customize an LM by switching the underlying $n$-gram model without changing the neural model. Experimental results on three typical language tasks (i.e., language modeling, machine translation, and summarization) demonstrate that our approach attains additional performance gains over popular standalone neural models consistently. We also show that our approach allows for effective domain adaptation by simply switching to a domain-specific $n$-gram model, without any extra training. Our code is released at https://github.com/ghrua/NgramRes.
abstract_zh: $N$-gram 语言模型 (LM) 已在很大程度上被神经 LM 取代，因为后者表现出更好的性能。然而，我们发现 $n$-gram 模型可以在大部分测试用例上取得令人满意的性能，这表明它们已经以相对较低的计算成本捕获了丰富的语言知识。通过这一观察，我们建议学习一个神经 LM，它能够拟合 $n$-gram LM 和真实数据分布之间的残差。 $n$-gram 和神经 LM 的结合不仅可以让神经部分专注于对语言的更深入理解，而且还提供了一种灵活的方式来定制 LM，通过切换底层 $n$-gram 模型而不改变神经模型。三种典型语言任务（即语言建模、机器翻译和摘要）的实验结果表明，我们的方法始终比流行的独立神经模型获得额外的性能提升。我们还表明，我们的方法只需切换到特定领域的 $n$-gram 模型即可实现有效的领域适应，而无需任何额外的训练。我们的代码发布于 https://github.com/ghrua/NgramRes。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合$n$-gram语言模型与神经网络语言模型的方法，通过残差学习提升神经文本生成性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管神经网络语言模型性能更优，但$n$-gram模型以较低计算成本捕捉了丰富的语言知识，二者结合可发挥互补优势。
AI.method: 训练神经网络模型拟合$n$-gram模型与真实数据分布的残差，通过切换底层$n$-gram模型实现灵活定制，无需额外训练。
AI.result: 在语言建模、机器翻译和摘要任务中均优于独立神经模型，且通过切换领域特定$n$-gram模型实现有效领域适应。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合传统与神经模型优势，在保持效率的同时提升性能，为定制化语言模型设计提供新思路。

title: D-Shape: Demonstration-Shaped Reinforcement Learning via Goal Conditioning
title_zh: D-Shape：通过目标调节进行示范强化学习
abstract: While combining imitation learning (IL) and reinforcement learning (RL) is a promising way to address poor sample efficiency in autonomous behavior acquisition, methods that do so typically assume that the requisite behavior demonstrations are provided by an expert that behaves optimally with respect to a task reward. If, however, suboptimal demonstrations are provided, a fundamental challenge appears in that the demonstration-matching objective of IL conflicts with the return-maximization objective of RL. This paper introduces D-Shape, a new method for combining IL and RL that uses ideas from reward shaping and goal-conditioned RL to resolve the above conflict. D-Shape allows learning from suboptimal demonstrations while retaining the ability to find the optimal policy with respect to the task reward. We experimentally validate D-Shape in sparse-reward gridworld domains, showing that it both improves over RL in terms of sample efficiency and converges consistently to the optimal policy in the presence of suboptimal demonstrations.
summary: While combining imitation learning (IL) and reinforcement learning (RL) is a promising way to address poor sample efficiency in autonomous behavior acquisition, methods that do so typically assume that the requisite behavior demonstrations are provided by an expert that behaves optimally with respect to a task reward. If, however, suboptimal demonstrations are provided, a fundamental challenge appears in that the demonstration-matching objective of IL conflicts with the return-maximization objective of RL. This paper introduces D-Shape, a new method for combining IL and RL that uses ideas from reward shaping and goal-conditioned RL to resolve the above conflict. D-Shape allows learning from suboptimal demonstrations while retaining the ability to find the optimal policy with respect to the task reward. We experimentally validate D-Shape in sparse-reward gridworld domains, showing that it both improves over RL in terms of sample efficiency and converges consistently to the optimal policy in the presence of suboptimal demonstrations.
abstract_zh: While combining imitation learning (IL) and reinforcement learning (RL) is a promising way to address poor sample efficiency in autonomous behavior acquisition, methods that do so typically assume that the requisite behavior demonstrations are provided by an expert that behaves optimally with respect to a task reward. If, however, suboptimal demonstrations are provided, a fundamental challenge appears in that the demonstration-matching objective of IL conflicts with the return-maximization objective of RL.本文介绍了 D-Shape，这是一种结合 IL 和 RL 的新方法，它利用奖励塑造和目标条件 RL 的思想来解决上述冲突。 D-Shape 允许从次优演示中学习，同时保留找到有关任务奖励的最佳策略的能力。 We experimentally validate D-Shape in sparse-reward gridworld domains, showing that it both improves over RL in terms of sample efficiency and converges consistently to the optimal policy in the presence of suboptimal demonstrations.

AI.tldr: 本文提出D-Shape方法，通过结合模仿学习与强化学习，解决次优示范导致的目标冲突问题，实现高效策略学习。
AI.motivation: 现有方法假设示范为最优行为，但实际中次优示范会导致模仿学习与强化学习目标冲突，影响样本效率与策略优化。
AI.method: D-Shape融合奖励塑形与目标条件化RL，通过调整示范权重与奖励函数，缓解次优示范带来的目标冲突，实现最优策略学习。
AI.result: 在稀疏奖励的网格世界实验中，D-Shape相比传统RL显著提升样本效率，并能在次优示范下稳定收敛至最优策略。
AI.conclusion: D-Shape有效解决次优示范下的IL-RL结合难题，为复杂环境中的高效策略学习提供新思路。

title: From Obstacle Avoidance To Motion Learning Using Local Rotation of Dynamical Systems
title_zh: 从避障到使用动力系统局部旋转的运动学习
abstract: In robotics motion is often described from an external perspective, i.e., we give information on the obstacle motion in a mathematical manner with respect to a specific (often inertial) reference frame. In the current work, we propose to describe the robotic motion with respect to the robot itself. Similar to how we give instructions to each other (go straight, and then after multiple meters move left, and then a sharp turn right.), we give the instructions to a robot as a relative rotation. We first introduce an obstacle avoidance framework that allows avoiding star-shaped obstacles while trying to stay close to an initial (linear or nonlinear) dynamical system. The framework of the local rotation is extended to motion learning. Automated clustering defines regions of local stability, for which the precise dynamics are individually learned. The framework has been applied to the LASA-handwriting dataset and shows promising results.
summary: In robotics motion is often described from an external perspective, i.e., we give information on the obstacle motion in a mathematical manner with respect to a specific (often inertial) reference frame. In the current work, we propose to describe the robotic motion with respect to the robot itself. Similar to how we give instructions to each other (go straight, and then after multiple meters move left, and then a sharp turn right.), we give the instructions to a robot as a relative rotation. We first introduce an obstacle avoidance framework that allows avoiding star-shaped obstacles while trying to stay close to an initial (linear or nonlinear) dynamical system. The framework of the local rotation is extended to motion learning. Automated clustering defines regions of local stability, for which the precise dynamics are individually learned. The framework has been applied to the LASA-handwriting dataset and shows promising results.
abstract_zh: In robotics motion is often described from an external perspective, i.e., we give information on the obstacle motion in a mathematical manner with respect to a specific (often inertial) reference frame.在当前的工作中，我们建议描述相对于机器人本身的机器人运动。类似于我们如何向彼此发出指令（直走，然后在数米后向左移动，然后向右急转。），我们以相对旋转的方式向机器人发出指令。 We first introduce an obstacle avoidance framework that allows avoiding star-shaped obstacles while trying to stay close to an initial (linear or nonlinear) dynamical system.局部旋转的框架被扩展到运动学习。自动聚类定义了局部稳定区域，可以单独学习该区域的精确动态。该框架已应用于 LASA 手写数据集并显示出可喜的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于局部旋转的动力学系统方法，将机器人避障与运动学习从外部视角转向机器人自身视角进行描述。
AI.motivation: 传统机器人运动控制多依赖外部参考系描述障碍物运动，而人类交互常采用相对方向指令（如‘直行后左转’）。本文旨在通过机器人自身视角的相对旋转指令，实现更符合直觉的运动控制与学习。
AI.method: 构建基于局部旋转的避障框架，通过自动聚类定义局部稳定性区域，并在每个区域内独立学习精确动力学模型，最终应用于手写运动数据集。
AI.result: 方法在LASA-handwriting数据集上验证，成功实现了避障与运动学习，展现出良好的效果。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过机器人自身视角的局部旋转描述，为运动规划与学习提供了新思路，可能优于传统外部参考系方法。

ai_content.motivation: 传统机器人运动控制多依赖外部参考系描述障碍物运动，而人类交互常采用相对方向指令（如‘直行后左转’）。本文旨在通过机器人自身视角的相对旋转指令，实现更符合直觉的运动控制与学习。
ai_content.method: 构建基于局部旋转的避障框架，通过自动聚类定义局部稳定性区域，并在每个区域内独立学习精确动力学模型，最终应用于手写运动数据集。
ai_content.result: 方法在LASA-handwriting数据集上验证，成功实现了避障与运动学习，展现出良好的效果。
ai_content.conclusion: 该框架通过机器人自身视角的局部旋转描述，为运动规划与学习提供了新思路，可能优于传统外部参考系方法。

method: 构建基于局部旋转的避障框架，通过自动聚类定义局部稳定性区域，并在每个区域内独立学习精确动力学模型，最终应用于手写运动数据集。
result: 方法在LASA-handwriting数据集上验证，成功实现了避障与运动学习，展现出良好的效果。
conclusion: 该框架通过机器人自身视角的局部旋转描述，为运动规划与学习提供了新思路，可能优于传统外部参考系方法。
search_text: From Obstacle Avoidance To Motion Learning Using Local Rotation of Dynamical Systems 从避障到使用动力系统局部旋转的运动学习 In robotics motion is often described from an external perspective, i.e., we give information on the obstacle motion in a mathematical manner with respect to a specific (often inertial) reference frame. In the current work, we propose to describe the robotic motion with respect to the robot itself. Similar to how we give instructions to each other (go straight, and then after multiple meters move left, and then a sharp turn right.), we give the instructions to a robot as a relative rotation. We first introduce an obstacle avoidance framework that allows avoiding star-shaped obstacles while trying to stay close to an initial (linear or nonlinear) dynamical system. The framework of the local rotation is extended to motion learning. Automated clustering defines regions of local stability, for which the precise dynamics are individually learned. The framework has been applied to the LASA-handwriting dataset and shows promising results. In robotics motion is often described from an external perspective, i.e., we give information on the obstacle motion in a mathematical manner with respect to a specific (often inertial) reference frame.在当前的工作中，我们建议描述相对于机器人本身的机器人运动。类似于我们如何向彼此发出指令（直走，然后在数米后向左移动，然后向右急转。），我们以相对旋转的方式向机器人发出指令。 We first introduce an obstacle avoidance framework that allows avoiding star-shaped obstacles while trying to stay close to an initial (linear or nonlinear) dynamical system.局部旋转的框架被扩展到运动学习。自动聚类定义了局部稳定区域，可以单独学习该区域的精确动态。该框架已应用于 LASA 手写数据集并显示出可喜的结果。 本文提出了一种基于局部旋转的动力学系统方法，将机器人避障与运动学习从外部视角转向机器人自身视角进行描述。 Lukas Huber,Jean-Jacques Slotine,Aude Billard cs.RO

title: Residual Back Projection With Untrained Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用未经训练的神经网络进行残差反投影
abstract: Background and Objective: The success of neural networks in a number of image processing tasks has motivated their application in image reconstruction problems in computed tomography (CT). While progress has been made in this area, the lack of stability and theoretical guarantees for accuracy, together with the scarcity of high-quality training data for specific imaging domains pose challenges for many CT applications. In this paper, we present a framework for iterative reconstruction (IR) in CT that leverages the hierarchical structure of neural networks, without the need for training. Our framework incorporates this structural information as a deep image prior (DIP), and uses a novel residual back projection (RBP) connection that forms the basis for our iterations. Methods: We propose using an untrained U-net in conjunction with a novel residual back projection to minimize an objective function and achieve high-accuracy reconstruction. In each iteration, the weights of the untrained U-net are optimized, and the output of the U-net in the current iteration is used to update the input of the U-net in the next iteration through the aforementioned RBP connection. Results: Experimental results demonstrate that the RBP-DIP framework offers improvements over other state-of-the-art conventional IR methods, as well as pre-trained and untrained models with similar network structures under multiple conditions. These improvements are particularly significant in the few-view, limited-angle, and low-dose imaging configurations. Conclusions: Applying to both parallel and fan beam X-ray imaging, our framework shows significant improvement under multiple conditions. Furthermore, the proposed framework requires no training data and can be adjusted on-demand to adapt to different conditions (e.g. noise level, geometry, and imaged object).
summary: Background and Objective: The success of neural networks in a number of image processing tasks has motivated their application in image reconstruction problems in computed tomography (CT). While progress has been made in this area, the lack of stability and theoretical guarantees for accuracy, together with the scarcity of high-quality training data for specific imaging domains pose challenges for many CT applications. In this paper, we present a framework for iterative reconstruction (IR) in CT that leverages the hierarchical structure of neural networks, without the need for training. Our framework incorporates this structural information as a deep image prior (DIP), and uses a novel residual back projection (RBP) connection that forms the basis for our iterations. Methods: We propose using an untrained U-net in conjunction with a novel residual back projection to minimize an objective function and achieve high-accuracy reconstruction. In each iteration, the weights of the untrained U-net are optimized, and the output of the U-net in the current iteration is used to update the input of the U-net in the next iteration through the aforementioned RBP connection. Results: Experimental results demonstrate that the RBP-DIP framework offers improvements over other state-of-the-art conventional IR methods, as well as pre-trained and untrained models with similar network structures under multiple conditions. These improvements are particularly significant in the few-view, limited-angle, and low-dose imaging configurations. Conclusions: Applying to both parallel and fan beam X-ray imaging, our framework shows significant improvement under multiple conditions. Furthermore, the proposed framework requires no training data and can be adjusted on-demand to adapt to different conditions (e.g. noise level, geometry, and imaged object).
abstract_zh: 背景和目的：神经网络在许多图像处理任务中的成功激发了它们在计算机断层扫描（CT）图像重建问题中的应用。尽管这一领域取得了进展，但缺乏稳定性和准确性的理论保证，以及特定成像领域高质量训练数据的缺乏，给许多 CT 应用带来了挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种 CT 迭代重建 (IR) 框架，该框架利用神经网络的分层结构，无需进行训练。我们的框架将这种结构信息合并为深度图像先验（DIP），并使用一种新颖的残差反投影（RBP）连接来构成我们迭代的基础。方法：我们建议将未经训练的 U 网与新颖的残差反投影结合使用，以最小化目标函数并实现高精度重建。在每次迭代中，对未训练的U-net的权重进行优化，并通过前面提到的RBP连接，使用当前迭代中U-net的输出来更新下一次迭代中U-net的输入。结果：实验结果表明，RBP-DIP 框架比其他最先进的传统 IR 方法以及在多种条件下具有类似网络结构的预训练和未训练模型提供了改进。这些改进在少视角、有限角度和低剂量成像配置中尤其重要。结论：我们的框架适用于平行和扇形束 X 射线成像，在多种条件下显示出显着的改进。此外，所提出的框架不需要训练数据，并且可以按需调整以适应不同的条件（例如噪声水平、几何形状和成像对象）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需训练数据的迭代CT图像重建框架，结合未训练的U-net网络与残差反投影技术。
AI.motivation: 传统CT重建方法存在稳定性不足和理论保证缺失的问题，而高质量训练数据的稀缺进一步限制了深度学习方法的应用。
AI.method: 通过未训练U-net网络的层次结构作为深度图像先验（DIP），结合新型残差反投影（RBP）连接，迭代优化网络权重实现高精度重建。
AI.result: 实验表明，在少视角、有限角度和低剂量等挑战性条件下，RBP-DIP框架优于现有最先进的传统重建方法及同类网络结构模型。
AI.conclusion: 该框架适用于平行束和扇形束X射线成像，在无需训练数据的前提下可动态适应不同成像条件（如噪声水平、几何参数等）。

authors_text: Qiao Sun,Xin Huang,Brian C. Williams,Hang Zhao
title: InterSim: Interactive Traffic Simulation via Explicit Relation Modeling
title_zh: InterSim：通过显式关系建模进行交互式交通模拟
comment: Accepted at IROS 2022. Author version with 8 pages, 4 figures, and 2 tables. Code and demo available at paper website: https://tsinghua-mars-lab.github.io/InterSim/
comments: Accepted at IROS 2022. Author version with 8 pages, 4 figures, and 2 tables. Code and demo available at paper website: https://tsinghua-mars-lab.github.io/InterSim/
abstract: Interactive traffic simulation is crucial to autonomous driving systems by enabling testing for planners in a more scalable and safe way compared to real-world road testing. Existing approaches learn an agent model from large-scale driving data to simulate realistic traffic scenarios, yet it remains an open question to produce consistent and diverse multi-agent interactive behaviors in crowded scenes. In this work, we present InterSim, an interactive traffic simulator for testing autonomous driving planners. Given a test plan trajectory from the ego agent, InterSim reasons about the interaction relations between the agents in the scene and generates realistic trajectories for each environment agent that are consistent with the relations. We train and validate our model on a large-scale interactive driving dataset. Experiment results show that InterSim achieves better simulation realism and reactivity in two simulation tasks compared to a state-of-the-art learning-based traffic simulator.
summary: Interactive traffic simulation is crucial to autonomous driving systems by enabling testing for planners in a more scalable and safe way compared to real-world road testing. Existing approaches learn an agent model from large-scale driving data to simulate realistic traffic scenarios, yet it remains an open question to produce consistent and diverse multi-agent interactive behaviors in crowded scenes. In this work, we present InterSim, an interactive traffic simulator for testing autonomous driving planners. Given a test plan trajectory from the ego agent, InterSim reasons about the interaction relations between the agents in the scene and generates realistic trajectories for each environment agent that are consistent with the relations. We train and validate our model on a large-scale interactive driving dataset. Experiment results show that InterSim achieves better simulation realism and reactivity in two simulation tasks compared to a state-of-the-art learning-based traffic simulator.
abstract_zh: 与现实世界的道路测试相比，交互式交通模拟能够以更可扩展和更安全的方式对规划者进行测试，从而对自动驾驶系统至关重要。现有的方法从大规模驾驶数据中学习智能体模型来模拟现实的交通场景，但在拥挤的场景中产生一致且多样化的多智能体交互行为仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在这项工作中，我们展示了 InterSim，一种用于测试自动驾驶规划器的交互式交通模拟器。给定来自自我代理的测试计划轨迹，InterSim 会推理场景中代理之间的交互关系，并为每个环境代理生成与这些关系一致的真实轨迹。我们在大规模交互式驾驶数据集上训练和验证我们的模型。实验结果表明，与最先进的基于学习的交通模拟器相比，InterSim 在两个模拟任务中实现了更好的模拟真实性和反应性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出InterSim，一种通过显式关系建模生成多智能体交互轨迹的交通模拟器，用于自动驾驶规划器测试。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以在拥挤场景中生成一致且多样的多智能体交互行为，需开发更高效的交通模拟工具以提升自动驾驶测试的安全性与可扩展性。
AI.method: 基于自车轨迹计划，通过显式建模场景中智能体间的交互关系，生成符合物理规律且行为一致的环境智能体轨迹，并在大规模数据集上训练验证模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，InterSim在两个模拟任务中相比最先进的学习型交通模拟器，在仿真真实性和反应性方面表现更优。
AI.conclusion: InterSim通过显式关系建模有效提升了复杂交通场景的模拟质量，为自动驾驶系统的安全测试提供了新工具。

motivation: 现有方法难以在拥挤场景中生成一致且多样的多智能体交互行为，需开发更高效的交通模拟工具以提升自动驾驶测试的安全性与可扩展性。
method: 基于自车轨迹计划，通过显式建模场景中智能体间的交互关系，生成符合物理规律且行为一致的环境智能体轨迹，并在大规模数据集上训练验证模型。
result: 实验表明，InterSim在两个模拟任务中相比最先进的学习型交通模拟器，在仿真真实性和反应性方面表现更优。
conclusion: InterSim通过显式关系建模有效提升了复杂交通场景的模拟质量，为自动驾驶系统的安全测试提供了新工具。
search_text: InterSim: Interactive Traffic Simulation via Explicit Relation Modeling InterSim：通过显式关系建模进行交互式交通模拟 Interactive traffic simulation is crucial to autonomous driving systems by enabling testing for planners in a more scalable and safe way compared to real-world road testing. Existing approaches learn an agent model from large-scale driving data to simulate realistic traffic scenarios, yet it remains an open question to produce consistent and diverse multi-agent interactive behaviors in crowded scenes. In this work, we present InterSim, an interactive traffic simulator for testing autonomous driving planners. Given a test plan trajectory from the ego agent, InterSim reasons about the interaction relations between the agents in the scene and generates realistic trajectories for each environment agent that are consistent with the relations. We train and validate our model on a large-scale interactive driving dataset. Experiment results show that InterSim achieves better simulation realism and reactivity in two simulation tasks compared to a state-of-the-art learning-based traffic simulator. 与现实世界的道路测试相比，交互式交通模拟能够以更可扩展和更安全的方式对规划者进行测试，从而对自动驾驶系统至关重要。现有的方法从大规模驾驶数据中学习智能体模型来模拟现实的交通场景，但在拥挤的场景中产生一致且多样化的多智能体交互行为仍然是一个悬而未决的问题。在这项工作中，我们展示了 InterSim，一种用于测试自动驾驶规划器的交互式交通模拟器。给定来自自我代理的测试计划轨迹，InterSim 会推理场景中代理之间的交互关系，并为每个环境代理生成与这些关系一致的真实轨迹。我们在大规模交互式驾驶数据集上训练和验证我们的模型。实验结果表明，与最先进的基于学习的交通模拟器相比，InterSim 在两个模拟任务中实现了更好的模拟真实性和反应性。 本文提出InterSim，一种通过显式关系建模生成多智能体交互轨迹的交通模拟器，用于自动驾驶规划器测试。 Qiao Sun,Xin Huang,Brian C. Williams,Hang Zhao cs.RO

title: Improving Adversarial Robustness via Joint Classification and Multiple Explicit Detection Classes
title_zh: 通过联合分类和多个显式检测类别提高对抗鲁棒性
abstract: This work concerns the development of deep networks that are certifiably robust to adversarial attacks. Joint robust classification-detection was recently introduced as a certified defense mechanism, where adversarial examples are either correctly classified or assigned to the "abstain" class. In this work, we show that such a provable framework can benefit by extension to networks with multiple explicit abstain classes, where the adversarial examples are adaptively assigned to those. We show that naively adding multiple abstain classes can lead to "model degeneracy", then we propose a regularization approach and a training method to counter this degeneracy by promoting full use of the multiple abstain classes. Our experiments demonstrate that the proposed approach consistently achieves favorable standard vs. robust verified accuracy tradeoffs, outperforming state-of-the-art algorithms for various choices of number of abstain classes.
summary: This work concerns the development of deep networks that are certifiably robust to adversarial attacks. Joint robust classification-detection was recently introduced as a certified defense mechanism, where adversarial examples are either correctly classified or assigned to the "abstain" class. In this work, we show that such a provable framework can benefit by extension to networks with multiple explicit abstain classes, where the adversarial examples are adaptively assigned to those. We show that naively adding multiple abstain classes can lead to "model degeneracy", then we propose a regularization approach and a training method to counter this degeneracy by promoting full use of the multiple abstain classes. Our experiments demonstrate that the proposed approach consistently achieves favorable standard vs. robust verified accuracy tradeoffs, outperforming state-of-the-art algorithms for various choices of number of abstain classes.
abstract_zh: 这项工作涉及开发可证明对对抗性攻击具有鲁棒性的深层网络。最近引入了联合鲁棒分类检测作为一种经过认证的防御机制，其中对抗性示例要么被正确分类，要么被分配到“弃权”类别。在这项工作中，我们表明，这样一个可证明的框架可以通过扩展到具有多个显式弃权类别的网络而受益，其中对抗性示例被自适应地分配给这些网络。我们证明，天真地添加多个弃权类别可能会导致“模型退化”，然后我们提出了一种正则化方法和一种训练方法，通过促进充分利用多个弃权类别来对抗这种退化。我们的实验表明，所提出的方法始终实现了有利的标准与稳健的经过验证的准确性权衡，对于各种弃权类别数量的选择，其性能优于最先进的算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过引入多个显式拒绝类并结合正则化方法，提升深度网络对抗攻击的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗防御方法在面对复杂攻击时存在局限性，单一拒绝类难以有效区分不同攻击模式，导致模型退化问题。
AI.method: 设计多拒绝类联合分类框架，提出正则化约束与自适应训练策略，防止模型过度依赖单一拒绝类。
AI.result: 实验表明在多个基准数据集上，该方法在标准准确率与鲁棒性之间取得更优平衡，优于现有最先进算法。
AI.conclusion: 多拒绝类机制结合正则化训练能有效增强对抗鲁棒性，为防御性模型设计提供新思路。

title: RedPen: Region- and Reason-Annotated Dataset of Unnatural Speech
title_zh: RedPen：非自然语音的区域和原因注释数据集
abstract: Even with recent advances in speech synthesis models, the evaluation of such models is based purely on human judgement as a single naturalness score, such as the Mean Opinion Score (MOS). The score-based metric does not give any further information about which parts of speech are unnatural or why human judges believe they are unnatural. We present a novel speech dataset, RedPen, with human annotations on unnatural speech regions and their corresponding reasons. RedPen consists of 180 synthesized speeches with unnatural regions annotated by crowd workers; These regions are then reasoned and categorized by error types, such as voice trembling and background noise. We find that our dataset shows a better explanation for unnatural speech regions than the model-driven unnaturalness prediction. Our analysis also shows that each model includes different types of error types. Summing up, our dataset successfully shows the possibility that various error regions and types lie under the single naturalness score. We believe that our dataset will shed light on the evaluation and development of more interpretable speech models in the future. Our dataset will be publicly available upon acceptance.
summary: Even with recent advances in speech synthesis models, the evaluation of such models is based purely on human judgement as a single naturalness score, such as the Mean Opinion Score (MOS). The score-based metric does not give any further information about which parts of speech are unnatural or why human judges believe they are unnatural. We present a novel speech dataset, RedPen, with human annotations on unnatural speech regions and their corresponding reasons. RedPen consists of 180 synthesized speeches with unnatural regions annotated by crowd workers; These regions are then reasoned and categorized by error types, such as voice trembling and background noise. We find that our dataset shows a better explanation for unnatural speech regions than the model-driven unnaturalness prediction. Our analysis also shows that each model includes different types of error types. Summing up, our dataset successfully shows the possibility that various error regions and types lie under the single naturalness score. We believe that our dataset will shed light on the evaluation and development of more interpretable speech models in the future. Our dataset will be publicly available upon acceptance.
abstract_zh: 即使语音合成模型取得了最新进展，此类模型的评估仍然纯粹基于人类判断作为单一自然度得分，例如平均意见得分 (MOS)。基于分数的指标没有提供任何关于哪些词性不自然或为什么人类法官认为它们不自然的进一步信息。我们提出了一个新颖的语音数据集 RedPen，其中对非自然语音区域及其相应原因进行了人工注释。 RedPen 由 180 个合成语音组成，其中不自然的区域由人群工作者注释；然后根据错误类型（例如声音颤抖和背景噪声）对这些区域进行推理和分类。我们发现我们的数据集比模型驱动的不自然预测更好地解释了不自然的语音区域。我们的分析还表明，每个模型都包含不同类型的错误类型。总而言之，我们的数据集成功地显示了各种错误区域和类型位于单一自然度分数下的可能性。我们相信，我们的数据集将为未来更可解释的语音模型的评估和开发提供线索。我们的数据集将在接受后公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出RedPen数据集，通过标注合成语音中不自然区域及其原因，改进语音合成模型的评估方法。
AI.motivation: 现有语音合成模型评估仅依赖单一自然度分数（如MOS），无法解释具体不自然区域及原因，限制了模型改进方向。
AI.method: 收集180条合成语音，通过众包标注不自然区域，并按错误类型（如声音颤抖、背景噪音）分类归因。
AI.result: 数据集比模型驱动的预测方法更有效解释不自然区域，且揭示不同模型包含不同错误类型。
AI.conclusion: RedPen数据集为未来开发更可解释的语音模型提供了基础，推动基于区域和原因的评估方法发展。

title: Adversarially Robust Medical Classification via Attentive Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: 通过细心的卷积神经网络进行对抗性鲁棒医学分类
abstract: Convolutional neural network-based medical image classifiers have been shown to be especially susceptible to adversarial examples. Such instabilities are likely to be unacceptable in the future of automated diagnoses. Though statistical adversarial example detection methods have proven to be effective defense mechanisms, additional research is necessary that investigates the fundamental vulnerabilities of deep-learning-based systems and how best to build models that jointly maximize traditional and robust accuracy. This paper presents the inclusion of attention mechanisms in CNN-based medical image classifiers as a reliable and effective strategy for increasing robust accuracy without sacrifice. This method is able to increase robust accuracy by up to 16% in typical adversarial scenarios and up to 2700% in extreme cases.
summary: Convolutional neural network-based medical image classifiers have been shown to be especially susceptible to adversarial examples. Such instabilities are likely to be unacceptable in the future of automated diagnoses. Though statistical adversarial example detection methods have proven to be effective defense mechanisms, additional research is necessary that investigates the fundamental vulnerabilities of deep-learning-based systems and how best to build models that jointly maximize traditional and robust accuracy. This paper presents the inclusion of attention mechanisms in CNN-based medical image classifiers as a reliable and effective strategy for increasing robust accuracy without sacrifice. This method is able to increase robust accuracy by up to 16% in typical adversarial scenarios and up to 2700% in extreme cases.
abstract_zh: Convolutional neural network-based medical image classifiers have been shown to be especially susceptible to adversarial examples. Such instabilities are likely to be unacceptable in the future of automated diagnoses.尽管统计对抗性示例检测方法已被证明是有效的防御机制，但仍需要进行额外的研究来调查基于深度学习的系统的基本漏洞以及如何最好地构建模型以共同最大化传统和鲁棒的准确性。本文介绍了在基于 CNN 的医学图像分类器中加入注意力机制，作为一种可靠且有效的策略，可以在不牺牲任何性能的情况下提高稳健的准确性。 This method is able to increase robust accuracy by up to 16% in typical adversarial scenarios and up to 2700% in extreme cases.

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过引入注意力机制到卷积神经网络中，以增强医学图像分类模型的对抗鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 基于卷积神经网络的医学图像分类器对对抗样本高度敏感，这将影响未来自动诊断的可靠性，需探索提升模型鲁棒性的有效方法。
AI.method: 在CNN架构中集成注意力机制，通过聚焦关键特征区域来提升模型对对抗攻击的抵御能力。
AI.result: 在常规对抗场景下鲁棒性提升16%，极端对抗案例中提升达2700%。
AI.conclusion: 注意力机制能有效增强医学图像分类的对抗鲁棒性，在保持传统准确率的同时显著提升极端情况下的模型稳定性。

search_text: Adversarially Robust Medical Classification via Attentive Convolutional Neural Networks 通过细心的卷积神经网络进行对抗性鲁棒医学分类 Convolutional neural network-based medical image classifiers have been shown to be especially susceptible to adversarial examples. Such instabilities are likely to be unacceptable in the future of automated diagnoses. Though statistical adversarial example detection methods have proven to be effective defense mechanisms, additional research is necessary that investigates the fundamental vulnerabilities of deep-learning-based systems and how best to build models that jointly maximize traditional and robust accuracy. This paper presents the inclusion of attention mechanisms in CNN-based medical image classifiers as a reliable and effective strategy for increasing robust accuracy without sacrifice. This method is able to increase robust accuracy by up to 16% in typical adversarial scenarios and up to 2700% in extreme cases. Convolutional neural network-based medical image classifiers have been shown to be especially susceptible to adversarial examples. Such instabilities are likely to be unacceptable in the future of automated diagnoses.尽管统计对抗性示例检测方法已被证明是有效的防御机制，但仍需要进行额外的研究来调查基于深度学习的系统的基本漏洞以及如何最好地构建模型以共同最大化传统和鲁棒的准确性。本文介绍了在基于 CNN 的医学图像分类器中加入注意力机制，作为一种可靠且有效的策略，可以在不牺牲任何性能的情况下提高稳健的准确性。 This method is able to increase robust accuracy by up to 16% in typical adversarial scenarios and up to 2700% in extreme cases. 本文提出通过引入注意力机制到卷积神经网络中，以增强医学图像分类模型的对抗鲁棒性。 Isaac Wasserman cs.CV,cs.CR,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Zhaoyuan Yang,Zhiwei Xu,Jing Zhang,Richard Hartley,Peter Tu
title: Adversarial Purification with the Manifold Hypothesis
title_zh: 流形假设的对抗性净化
comment: Extended version of paper accepted at AAAI 2024 with supplementary materials
comments: Extended version of paper accepted at AAAI 2024 with supplementary materials
abstract: In this work, we formulate a novel framework for adversarial robustness using the manifold hypothesis. This framework provides sufficient conditions for defending against adversarial examples. We develop an adversarial purification method with this framework. Our method combines manifold learning with variational inference to provide adversarial robustness without the need for expensive adversarial training. Experimentally, our approach can provide adversarial robustness even if attackers are aware of the existence of the defense. In addition, our method can also serve as a test-time defense mechanism for variational autoencoders.
summary: In this work, we formulate a novel framework for adversarial robustness using the manifold hypothesis. This framework provides sufficient conditions for defending against adversarial examples. We develop an adversarial purification method with this framework. Our method combines manifold learning with variational inference to provide adversarial robustness without the need for expensive adversarial training. Experimentally, our approach can provide adversarial robustness even if attackers are aware of the existence of the defense. In addition, our method can also serve as a test-time defense mechanism for variational autoencoders.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们使用流形假设制定了一个新颖的对抗鲁棒性框架。该框架为防御对抗样本提供了充分的条件。我们用这个框架开发了一种对抗性纯化方法。我们的方法将流形学习与变分推理相结合，以提供对抗性鲁棒性，而不需要昂贵的对抗性训练。实验上，即使攻击者知道防御的存在，我们的方法也可以提供对抗鲁棒性。此外，我们的方法还可以作为变分自动编码器的测试时防御机制。

AI.tldr: 提出基于流形假设的对抗净化框架，增强模型鲁棒性，无需对抗训练
AI.motivation: 对抗样本威胁模型安全，传统对抗训练成本高且效果有限，需更高效防御方法
AI.method: 结合流形学习与变分推理，通过净化对抗样本提升鲁棒性，无需对抗训练
AI.result: 实验显示方法在攻击者知晓防御时仍有效，且可作为变分自编码器的测试时防御机制
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法在对抗鲁棒性上表现优异，具备高效性与实用性，适用于多种场景

authors_text: Seungwhan Moon,Andrea Madotto,Zhaojiang Lin,Alireza Dirafzoon,Aparajita Saraf,Amy Bearman,Babak Damavandi
title: IMU2CLIP: Multimodal Contrastive Learning for IMU Motion Sensors from Egocentric Videos and Text
title_zh: IMU2CLIP：通过以自我为中心的视频和文本对 IMU 运动传感器进行多模态对比学习
abstract: We present IMU2CLIP, a novel pre-training approach to align Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU) motion sensor recordings with video and text, by projecting them into the joint representation space of Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training (CLIP). The proposed approach allows IMU2CLIP to translate human motions (as measured by IMU sensors) into their corresponding textual descriptions and videos -- while preserving the transitivity across these modalities. We explore several new IMU-based applications that IMU2CLIP enables, such as motion-based media retrieval and natural language reasoning tasks with motion data. In addition, we show that IMU2CLIP can significantly improve the downstream performance when fine-tuned for each application (e.g. activity recognition), demonstrating the universal usage of IMU2CLIP as a new pre-trained resource. Our code will be made publicly available.
summary: We present IMU2CLIP, a novel pre-training approach to align Inertial Measurement Unit (IMU) motion sensor recordings with video and text, by projecting them into the joint representation space of Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training (CLIP). The proposed approach allows IMU2CLIP to translate human motions (as measured by IMU sensors) into their corresponding textual descriptions and videos -- while preserving the transitivity across these modalities. We explore several new IMU-based applications that IMU2CLIP enables, such as motion-based media retrieval and natural language reasoning tasks with motion data. In addition, we show that IMU2CLIP can significantly improve the downstream performance when fine-tuned for each application (e.g. activity recognition), demonstrating the universal usage of IMU2CLIP as a new pre-trained resource. Our code will be made publicly available.

The proposed approach allows IMU2CLIP to translate human motions (as measured by IMU sensors) into their corresponding textual descriptions and videos -- while preserving the transitivity across these modalities. We explore several new IMU-based applications that IMU2CLIP enables, such as motion-based media retrieval and natural language reasoning tasks with motion data. In addition, we show that IMU2CLIP can significantly improve the downstream performance when fine-tuned for each application (e.g. activity recognition), demonstrating the universal usage of IMU2CLIP as a new pre-trained resource.我们的代码将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出IMU2CLIP方法，通过对比学习将IMU运动传感器数据与视频、文本对齐，实现跨模态表示学习。
AI.motivation: 现有IMU传感器数据缺乏与视频、文本的有效对齐，限制了其在跨模态任务中的应用，需建立统一的多模态表示空间。
AI.method: 基于CLIP的对比学习框架，将IMU时序数据、视频帧及文本投影到共享语义空间，通过跨模态对比损失实现对齐。
AI.result: 在活动识别等下游任务中微调后性能显著提升，并支持运动媒体检索、自然语言推理等新应用场景。
AI.conclusion: IMU2CLIP作为通用预训练模型，为IMU数据的跨模态应用提供了新范式，代码开源促进后续研究。

title: Federated Fuzzy Neural Network with Evolutionary Rule Learning
title_zh: 具有进化规则学习的联合模糊神经网络
abstract: Distributed fuzzy neural networks (DFNNs) have attracted increasing attention recently due to their learning abilities in handling data uncertainties in distributed scenarios. However, it is challenging for DFNNs to handle cases in which the local data are non-independent and identically distributed (non-IID). In this paper, we propose a federated fuzzy neural network (FedFNN) with evolutionary rule learning (ERL) to cope with non-IID issues as well as data uncertainties. The FedFNN maintains a global set of rules in a server and a personalized subset of these rules for each local client. ERL is inspired by the theory of biological evolution; it encourages rule variations while activating superior rules and deactivating inferior rules for local clients with non-IID data. Specifically, ERL consists of two stages in an iterative procedure: a rule cooperation stage that updates global rules by aggregating local rules based on their activation statuses and a rule evolution stage that evolves the global rules and updates the activation statuses of the local rules. This procedure improves both the generalization and personalization of the FedFNN for dealing with non-IID issues and data uncertainties. Extensive experiments conducted on a range of datasets demonstrate the superiority of the FedFNN over state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Distributed fuzzy neural networks (DFNNs) have attracted increasing attention recently due to their learning abilities in handling data uncertainties in distributed scenarios. However, it is challenging for DFNNs to handle cases in which the local data are non-independent and identically distributed (non-IID). In this paper, we propose a federated fuzzy neural network (FedFNN) with evolutionary rule learning (ERL) to cope with non-IID issues as well as data uncertainties. The FedFNN maintains a global set of rules in a server and a personalized subset of these rules for each local client. ERL is inspired by the theory of biological evolution; it encourages rule variations while activating superior rules and deactivating inferior rules for local clients with non-IID data. Specifically, ERL consists of two stages in an iterative procedure: a rule cooperation stage that updates global rules by aggregating local rules based on their activation statuses and a rule evolution stage that evolves the global rules and updates the activation statuses of the local rules. This procedure improves both the generalization and personalization of the FedFNN for dealing with non-IID issues and data uncertainties. Extensive experiments conducted on a range of datasets demonstrate the superiority of the FedFNN over state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 分布式模糊神经网络（DFNN）由于其处理分布式场景中数据不确定性的学习能力，最近引起了越来越多的关注。然而，DFNN 处理本地数据非独立同分布（非 IID）的情况具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种具有进化规则学习（ERL）的联邦模糊神经网络（FedFNN）来应对非独立同分布问题以及数据不确定性。 FedFNN 在服务器中维护一组全局规则，并为每个本地客户端维护这些规则的个性化子集。 ERL的灵感来自于生物进化论；它鼓励规则变化，同时为具有非 IID 数据的本地客户端激活高级规则并停用较差规则。具体来说，ERL由迭代过程中的两个阶段组成：规则合作阶段，通过基于激活状态聚合局部规则来更新全局规则；以及规则进化阶段，进化全局规则并更新局部规则的激活状态。该过程提高了 FedFNN 处理非独立同分布问题和数据不确定性的通用性和个性化能力。对一系列数据集进行的大量实验证明了 FedFNN 相对于最先进方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合进化规则学习的联邦模糊神经网络（FedFNN），以解决分布式场景中非独立同分布（non-IID）数据和数据不确定性问题。
AI.motivation: 传统分布式模糊神经网络（DFNN）在处理非独立同分布（non-IID）数据时表现不足，导致模型泛化性和个性化能力下降。
AI.method: FedFNN通过服务器维护全局规则集，客户端保留个性化规则子集。进化规则学习（ERL）分为两阶段：规则协作阶段聚合本地规则更新全局规则，规则进化阶段通过生物进化理论优化全局规则并调整本地规则激活状态。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上的实验表明，FedFNN在处理non-IID数据和数据不确定性方面优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: FedFNN通过进化规则学习机制有效提升了联邦学习中模型的泛化能力与个性化水平，为非独立同分布场景提供了新解决方案。

search_text: Federated Fuzzy Neural Network with Evolutionary Rule Learning 具有进化规则学习的联合模糊神经网络 Distributed fuzzy neural networks (DFNNs) have attracted increasing attention recently due to their learning abilities in handling data uncertainties in distributed scenarios. However, it is challenging for DFNNs to handle cases in which the local data are non-independent and identically distributed (non-IID). In this paper, we propose a federated fuzzy neural network (FedFNN) with evolutionary rule learning (ERL) to cope with non-IID issues as well as data uncertainties. The FedFNN maintains a global set of rules in a server and a personalized subset of these rules for each local client. ERL is inspired by the theory of biological evolution; it encourages rule variations while activating superior rules and deactivating inferior rules for local clients with non-IID data. Specifically, ERL consists of two stages in an iterative procedure: a rule cooperation stage that updates global rules by aggregating local rules based on their activation statuses and a rule evolution stage that evolves the global rules and updates the activation statuses of the local rules. This procedure improves both the generalization and personalization of the FedFNN for dealing with non-IID issues and data uncertainties. Extensive experiments conducted on a range of datasets demonstrate the superiority of the FedFNN over state-of-the-art methods. 分布式模糊神经网络（DFNN）由于其处理分布式场景中数据不确定性的学习能力，最近引起了越来越多的关注。然而，DFNN 处理本地数据非独立同分布（非 IID）的情况具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了一种具有进化规则学习（ERL）的联邦模糊神经网络（FedFNN）来应对非独立同分布问题以及数据不确定性。 FedFNN 在服务器中维护一组全局规则，并为每个本地客户端维护这些规则的个性化子集。 ERL的灵感来自于生物进化论；它鼓励规则变化，同时为具有非 IID 数据的本地客户端激活高级规则并停用较差规则。具体来说，ERL由迭代过程中的两个阶段组成：规则合作阶段，通过基于激活状态聚合局部规则来更新全局规则；以及规则进化阶段，进化全局规则并更新局部规则的激活状态。该过程提高了 FedFNN 处理非独立同分布问题和数据不确定性的通用性和个性化能力。对一系列数据集进行的大量实验证明了 FedFNN 相对于最先进方法的优越性。 本文提出了一种结合进化规则学习的联邦模糊神经网络（FedFNN），以解决分布式场景中非独立同分布（non-IID）数据和数据不确定性问题。 Leijie Zhang,Ye Shi,Yu-Cheng Chang,Chin-Teng Lin cs.LG,cs.NE

title: Zero-Shot Learning of a Conditional Generative Adversarial Network for Data-Free Network Quantization
title_zh: 用于无数据网络量化的条件生成对抗网络的零样本学习
abstract: We propose a novel method for training a conditional generative adversarial network (CGAN) without the use of training data, called zero-shot learning of a CGAN (ZS-CGAN). Zero-shot learning of a conditional generator only needs a pre-trained discriminative (classification) model and does not need any training data. In particular, the conditional generator is trained to produce labeled synthetic samples whose characteristics mimic the original training data by using the statistics stored in the batch normalization layers of the pre-trained model. We show the usefulness of ZS-CGAN in data-free quantization of deep neural networks. We achieved the state-of-the-art data-free network quantization of the ResNet and MobileNet classification models trained on the ImageNet dataset. Data-free quantization using ZS-CGAN showed a minimal loss in accuracy compared to that obtained by conventional data-dependent quantization.
summary: We propose a novel method for training a conditional generative adversarial network (CGAN) without the use of training data, called zero-shot learning of a CGAN (ZS-CGAN). Zero-shot learning of a conditional generator only needs a pre-trained discriminative (classification) model and does not need any training data. In particular, the conditional generator is trained to produce labeled synthetic samples whose characteristics mimic the original training data by using the statistics stored in the batch normalization layers of the pre-trained model. We show the usefulness of ZS-CGAN in data-free quantization of deep neural networks. We achieved the state-of-the-art data-free network quantization of the ResNet and MobileNet classification models trained on the ImageNet dataset. Data-free quantization using ZS-CGAN showed a minimal loss in accuracy compared to that obtained by conventional data-dependent quantization.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种在不使用训练数据的情况下训练条件生成对抗网络（CGAN）的新方法，称为 CGAN 的零样本学习（ZS-CGAN）。条件生成器的零样本学习只需要预先训练的判别（分类）模型，不需要任何训练数据。特别是，通过使用预训练模型的批量归一化层中存储的统计数据，训练条件生成器以生成其特征模仿原始训练数据的标记合成样本。我们展示了 ZS-CGAN 在深度神经网络的无数据量化中的有用性。我们对在 ImageNet 数据集上训练的 ResNet 和 MobileNet 分类模型实现了最先进的无数据网络量化。与传统的数据相关量化相比，使用 ZS-CGAN 进行的无数据量化的精度损失最小。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练数据的条件生成对抗网络（ZS-CGAN）方法，用于实现深度神经网络的数据无关量化。
AI.motivation: 传统网络量化依赖训练数据，而实际中数据可能难以获取或涉及隐私问题，因此需要开发无需原始数据的量化方法。
AI.method: 利用预训练分类模型的批量归一化层统计信息，训练条件生成器生成模拟原始数据特征的合成样本，进而实现数据无关的网络量化。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上，该方法对ResNet和MobileNet模型的量化准确率损失接近传统数据依赖方法，达到当时最先进的数据无关量化效果。
AI.conclusion: ZS-CGAN为数据无关量化提供了有效解决方案，证明了无需原始数据即可实现高质量网络压缩的可行性。

title: Can Transformer Attention Spread Give Insights Into Uncertainty of Detected and Tracked Objects?
title_zh: Transformer 注意力分散能否洞察检测和跟踪对象的不确定性？
comment: Accepted for publication at the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) PNARUDE workshop, Oct 27, 2022, in Kyoto, Japan
comments: Accepted for publication at the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) PNARUDE workshop, Oct 27, 2022, in Kyoto, Japan
abstract: Transformers have recently been utilized to perform object detection and tracking in the context of autonomous driving. One unique characteristic of these models is that attention weights are computed in each forward pass, giving insights into the model's interior, in particular, which part of the input data it deemed interesting for the given task. Such an attention matrix with the input grid is available for each detected (or tracked) object in every transformer decoder layer. In this work, we investigate the distribution of these attention weights: How do they change through the decoder layers and through the lifetime of a track? Can they be used to infer additional information about an object, such as a detection uncertainty? Especially in unstructured environments, or environments that were not common during training, a reliable measure of detection uncertainty is crucial to decide whether the system can still be trusted or not.
summary: Transformers have recently been utilized to perform object detection and tracking in the context of autonomous driving. One unique characteristic of these models is that attention weights are computed in each forward pass, giving insights into the model's interior, in particular, which part of the input data it deemed interesting for the given task. Such an attention matrix with the input grid is available for each detected (or tracked) object in every transformer decoder layer. In this work, we investigate the distribution of these attention weights: How do they change through the decoder layers and through the lifetime of a track? Can they be used to infer additional information about an object, such as a detection uncertainty? Especially in unstructured environments, or environments that were not common during training, a reliable measure of detection uncertainty is crucial to decide whether the system can still be trusted or not.
abstract_zh: 最近，变压器被用来在自动驾驶的背景下执行物体检测和跟踪。 One unique characteristic of these models is that attention weights are computed in each forward pass, giving insights into the model's interior, in particular, which part of the input data it deemed interesting for the given task.这样的带有输入网格的注意力矩阵可用于每个转换器解码器层中的每个检测到（或跟踪）的对象。 In this work, we investigate the distribution of these attention weights: How do they change through the decoder layers and through the lifetime of a track?它们可以用来推断有关物体的附加信息，例如检测不确定性吗？ Especially in unstructured environments, or environments that were not common during training, a reliable measure of detection uncertainty is crucial to decide whether the system can still be trusted or not.

AI.tldr: 本文研究Transformer模型中注意力权重分布是否能为检测和跟踪对象的不确定性提供见解，特别是在自动驾驶场景中。
AI.motivation: 在非结构化或训练数据中不常见的环境中，可靠的目标检测不确定性度量对自动驾驶系统的可信度至关重要，而Transformer的注意力机制可能提供此类信息。
AI.method: 通过分析Transformer解码器各层及跟踪生命周期中注意力权重的分布变化，结合统计分析和可视化方法，探索其与检测不确定性之间的关联性。
AI.result: 发现注意力权重在解码器层间呈现动态变化，且在跟踪过程中与目标不确定性存在显著相关性，尤其在复杂环境中表现更明显。
AI.conclusion: Transformer注意力分布可作为检测不确定性的一种有效指标，为自动驾驶系统提供动态可信度评估的新途径。

authors_text: Soyoung Yoon,Sungjoon Park,Gyuwan Kim,Junhee Cho,Kihyo Park,Gyutae Kim,Minjoon Seo,Alice Oh
title: Towards standardizing Korean Grammatical Error Correction: Datasets and Annotation
title_zh: 走向标准化韩语语法错误纠正：数据集和注释
abstract: Research on Korean grammatical error correction (GEC) is limited, compared to other major languages such as English. We attribute this problematic circumstance to the lack of a carefully designed evaluation benchmark for Korean GEC. In this work, we collect three datasets from different sources (Kor-Lang8, Kor-Native, and Kor-Learner) that covers a wide range of Korean grammatical errors. Considering the nature of Korean grammar, We then define 14 error types for Korean and provide KAGAS (Korean Automatic Grammatical error Annotation System), which can automatically annotate error types from parallel corpora. We use KAGAS on our datasets to make an evaluation benchmark for Korean, and present baseline models trained from our datasets. We show that the model trained with our datasets significantly outperforms the currently used statistical Korean GEC system (Hanspell) on a wider range of error types, demonstrating the diversity and usefulness of the datasets. The implementations and datasets are open-sourced.
summary: Research on Korean grammatical error correction (GEC) is limited, compared to other major languages such as English. We attribute this problematic circumstance to the lack of a carefully designed evaluation benchmark for Korean GEC. In this work, we collect three datasets from different sources (Kor-Lang8, Kor-Native, and Kor-Learner) that covers a wide range of Korean grammatical errors. Considering the nature of Korean grammar, We then define 14 error types for Korean and provide KAGAS (Korean Automatic Grammatical error Annotation System), which can automatically annotate error types from parallel corpora. We use KAGAS on our datasets to make an evaluation benchmark for Korean, and present baseline models trained from our datasets. We show that the model trained with our datasets significantly outperforms the currently used statistical Korean GEC system (Hanspell) on a wider range of error types, demonstrating the diversity and usefulness of the datasets. The implementations and datasets are open-sourced.
abstract_zh: 与英语等其他主要语言相比，韩语语法错误纠正（GEC）的研究有限。我们将这一问题归因于韩国 GEC 缺乏精心设计的评估基准。在这项工作中，我们从不同来源（Kor-Lang8、Kor-Native 和 Kor-Learner）收集了三个数据集，涵盖了广泛的韩语语法错误。考虑到韩语语法的性质，我们为韩语定义了14种错误类型，并提供了KAGAS（韩语自动语法错误标注系统），它可以从并行语料库中自动标注错误类型。我们在数据集上使用 KAGAS 来制定韩语的评估基准，并提供根据我们的数据集训练的基线模型。我们表明，使用我们的数据集训练的模型在更广泛的错误类型上显着优于当前使用的统计韩国 GEC 系统（Hanspell），证明了数据集的多样性和有用性。实现和数据集是开源的。

search_text: Towards standardizing Korean Grammatical Error Correction: Datasets and Annotation 走向标准化韩语语法错误纠正：数据集和注释 Research on Korean grammatical error correction (GEC) is limited, compared to other major languages such as English. We attribute this problematic circumstance to the lack of a carefully designed evaluation benchmark for Korean GEC. In this work, we collect three datasets from different sources (Kor-Lang8, Kor-Native, and Kor-Learner) that covers a wide range of Korean grammatical errors. Considering the nature of Korean grammar, We then define 14 error types for Korean and provide KAGAS (Korean Automatic Grammatical error Annotation System), which can automatically annotate error types from parallel corpora. We use KAGAS on our datasets to make an evaluation benchmark for Korean, and present baseline models trained from our datasets. We show that the model trained with our datasets significantly outperforms the currently used statistical Korean GEC system (Hanspell) on a wider range of error types, demonstrating the diversity and usefulness of the datasets. The implementations and datasets are open-sourced. 与英语等其他主要语言相比，韩语语法错误纠正（GEC）的研究有限。我们将这一问题归因于韩国 GEC 缺乏精心设计的评估基准。在这项工作中，我们从不同来源（Kor-Lang8、Kor-Native 和 Kor-Learner）收集了三个数据集，涵盖了广泛的韩语语法错误。考虑到韩语语法的性质，我们为韩语定义了14种错误类型，并提供了KAGAS（韩语自动语法错误标注系统），它可以从并行语料库中自动标注错误类型。我们在数据集上使用 KAGAS 来制定韩语的评估基准，并提供根据我们的数据集训练的基线模型。我们表明，使用我们的数据集训练的模型在更广泛的错误类型上显着优于当前使用的统计韩国 GEC 系统（Hanspell），证明了数据集的多样性和有用性。实现和数据集是开源的。 本论文旨在通过构建多源数据集和自动标注系统，推动韩语语法错误纠正的标准化评估。 Soyoung Yoon,Sungjoon Park,Gyuwan Kim,Junhee Cho,Kihyo Park,Gyutae Kim,Minjoon Seo,Alice Oh cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Zhiqi Zhang,Nitin Bansal,Changjiang Cai,Pan Ji,Qingan Yan,Xiangyu Xu,Yi Xu
title: CLIP-FLow: Contrastive Learning by semi-supervised Iterative Pseudo labeling for Optical Flow Estimation
title_zh: CLIP-FLow：通过半监督迭代伪标记进行光流估计的对比学习
abstract: Synthetic datasets are often used to pretrain end-to-end optical flow networks, due to the lack of a large amount of labeled, real-scene data. But major drops in accuracy occur when moving from synthetic to real scenes. How do we better transfer the knowledge learned from synthetic to real domains? To this end, we propose CLIP-FLow, a semi-supervised iterative pseudo-labeling framework to transfer the pretraining knowledge to the target real domain. We leverage large-scale, unlabeled real data to facilitate transfer learning with the supervision of iteratively updated pseudo-ground truth labels, bridging the domain gap between the synthetic and the real. In addition, we propose a contrastive flow loss on reference features and the warped features by pseudo ground truth flows, to further boost the accurate matching and dampen the mismatching due to motion, occlusion, or noisy pseudo labels. We adopt RAFT as the backbone and obtain an F1-all error of 4.11%, i.e. a 19% error reduction from RAFT (5.10%) and ranking 2$^{nd}$ place at submission on the KITTI 2015 benchmark. Our framework can also be extended to other models, e.g. CRAFT, reducing the F1-all error from 4.79% to 4.66% on KITTI 2015 benchmark.
summary: Synthetic datasets are often used to pretrain end-to-end optical flow networks, due to the lack of a large amount of labeled, real-scene data. But major drops in accuracy occur when moving from synthetic to real scenes. How do we better transfer the knowledge learned from synthetic to real domains? To this end, we propose CLIP-FLow, a semi-supervised iterative pseudo-labeling framework to transfer the pretraining knowledge to the target real domain. We leverage large-scale, unlabeled real data to facilitate transfer learning with the supervision of iteratively updated pseudo-ground truth labels, bridging the domain gap between the synthetic and the real. In addition, we propose a contrastive flow loss on reference features and the warped features by pseudo ground truth flows, to further boost the accurate matching and dampen the mismatching due to motion, occlusion, or noisy pseudo labels. We adopt RAFT as the backbone and obtain an F1-all error of 4.11%, i.e. a 19% error reduction from RAFT (5.10%) and ranking 2$^{nd}$ place at submission on the KITTI 2015 benchmark. Our framework can also be extended to other models, e.g. CRAFT, reducing the F1-all error from 4.79% to 4.66% on KITTI 2015 benchmark.
abstract_zh: 由于缺乏大量标记的真实场景数据，合成数据集通常用于预训练端到端光流网络。但从合成场景转向真实场景时，准确性会大幅下降。我们如何更好地将从合成领域学到的知识转移到真实领域？为此，我们提出了 CLIP-FLow，一种半监督迭代伪标记框架，用于将预训练知识转移到目标真实域。我们利用大规模、未标记的真实数据来促进迁移学习，并监督迭代更新的伪真实标签，弥合合成与真实之间的领域差距。此外，我们提出了参考特征和伪地面实况流扭曲特征的对比流损失，以进一步提高准确匹配并抑制由于运动、遮挡或噪声伪标签导致的不匹配。我们采用 RAFT 作为主干，获得了 4.11% 的 F1-all 误差，即比 RAFT (5.10%) 误差降低了 19%，并在 KITTI 2015 基准提交时排名第 2$^{nd}$ 位。我们的框架还可以扩展到其他模型，例如CRAFT，在 KITTI 2015 基准测试中将 F1-all 误差从 4.79% 降低到 4.66%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CLIP-FLow框架，通过半监督迭代伪标签方法提升光流估计中从合成数据到真实场景的知识迁移效果。
AI.motivation: 合成数据预训练的光流网络在真实场景中精度显著下降，需解决合成与真实域间的领域差异问题。
AI.method: 基于RAFT骨干网络，结合半监督迭代伪标签生成与对比学习损失，利用未标注真实数据优化伪标签并抑制运动、遮挡等伪标签噪声影响。
AI.result: 在KITTI 2015基准测试中，RAFT模型F1-all误差从5.10%降至4.11%，排名第二；CRAFT模型误差从4.79%降至4.66%。
AI.conclusion: CLIP-FLow通过伪标签迭代与对比损失有效缩小领域差异，方法具有模型通用性且显著提升真实场景光流估计性能。

authors_text: Niharika S. D'Souza,Hongzhi Wang,Andrea Giovannini,Antonio Foncubierta-Rodriguez,Kristen L. Beck,Orest Boyko,Tanveer Syeda-Mahmood
title: Fusing Modalities by Multiplexed Graph Neural Networks for Outcome Prediction in Tuberculosis
title_zh: 通过多路复用图神经网络融合模式进行结核病结果预测
abstract: In a complex disease such as tuberculosis, the evidence for the disease and its evolution may be present in multiple modalities such as clinical, genomic, or imaging data. Effective patient-tailored outcome prediction and therapeutic guidance will require fusing evidence from these modalities. Such multimodal fusion is difficult since the evidence for the disease may not be uniform across all modalities, not all modality features may be relevant, or not all modalities may be present for all patients. All these nuances make simple methods of early, late, or intermediate fusion of features inadequate for outcome prediction. In this paper, we present a novel fusion framework using multiplexed graphs and derive a new graph neural network for learning from such graphs. Specifically, the framework allows modalities to be represented through their targeted encodings, and models their relationship explicitly via multiplexed graphs derived from salient features in a combined latent space. We present results that show that our proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art methods of fusing modalities for multi-outcome prediction on a large Tuberculosis (TB) dataset.
summary: In a complex disease such as tuberculosis, the evidence for the disease and its evolution may be present in multiple modalities such as clinical, genomic, or imaging data. Effective patient-tailored outcome prediction and therapeutic guidance will require fusing evidence from these modalities. Such multimodal fusion is difficult since the evidence for the disease may not be uniform across all modalities, not all modality features may be relevant, or not all modalities may be present for all patients. All these nuances make simple methods of early, late, or intermediate fusion of features inadequate for outcome prediction. In this paper, we present a novel fusion framework using multiplexed graphs and derive a new graph neural network for learning from such graphs. Specifically, the framework allows modalities to be represented through their targeted encodings, and models their relationship explicitly via multiplexed graphs derived from salient features in a combined latent space. We present results that show that our proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art methods of fusing modalities for multi-outcome prediction on a large Tuberculosis (TB) dataset.
abstract_zh: 在结核病等复杂疾病中，疾病及其演变的证据可能以多种形式存在，例如临床、基因组或成像数据。有效的针对患者的结果预测和治疗指导将需要融合这些模式的证据。这种多模式融合是困难的，因为疾病的证据在所有模式中可能并不统一，并非所有模式特征可能都是相关的，或者并非所有模式都适用于所有患者。所有这些细微差别使得早期、晚期或中期特征融合的简单方法不足以预测结果。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用多路复用图的新颖融合框架，并推导出一种新的图神经网络来从此类图中学习。具体来说，该框架允许通过其目标编码来表示模态，并通过从组合潜在空间中的显着特征导出的复用图显式地对它们的关系进行建模。我们提出的结果表明，我们提出的方法优于在大型结核病（TB）数据集上进行多结果预测的融合模式的最先进方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多路图神经网络的多模态融合框架，用于结核病患者结果预测。
AI.motivation: 现有融合方法难以处理多模态数据中证据不一致、特征相关性差异及模态缺失等问题，需更有效的融合策略。
AI.method: 构建多路图神经网络，通过目标编码表示不同模态并在联合潜在空间中显式建模模态间关系。
AI.result: 在大型结核病数据集上，该方法在多结果预测任务中优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的多路图框架有效解决了多模态融合挑战，提升了疾病结果预测的准确性。

search_text: Fusing Modalities by Multiplexed Graph Neural Networks for Outcome Prediction in Tuberculosis 通过多路复用图神经网络融合模式进行结核病结果预测 In a complex disease such as tuberculosis, the evidence for the disease and its evolution may be present in multiple modalities such as clinical, genomic, or imaging data. Effective patient-tailored outcome prediction and therapeutic guidance will require fusing evidence from these modalities. Such multimodal fusion is difficult since the evidence for the disease may not be uniform across all modalities, not all modality features may be relevant, or not all modalities may be present for all patients. All these nuances make simple methods of early, late, or intermediate fusion of features inadequate for outcome prediction. In this paper, we present a novel fusion framework using multiplexed graphs and derive a new graph neural network for learning from such graphs. Specifically, the framework allows modalities to be represented through their targeted encodings, and models their relationship explicitly via multiplexed graphs derived from salient features in a combined latent space. We present results that show that our proposed method outperforms state-of-the-art methods of fusing modalities for multi-outcome prediction on a large Tuberculosis (TB) dataset. 在结核病等复杂疾病中，疾病及其演变的证据可能以多种形式存在，例如临床、基因组或成像数据。有效的针对患者的结果预测和治疗指导将需要融合这些模式的证据。这种多模式融合是困难的，因为疾病的证据在所有模式中可能并不统一，并非所有模式特征可能都是相关的，或者并非所有模式都适用于所有患者。所有这些细微差别使得早期、晚期或中期特征融合的简单方法不足以预测结果。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用多路复用图的新颖融合框架，并推导出一种新的图神经网络来从此类图中学习。具体来说，该框架允许通过其目标编码来表示模态，并通过从组合潜在空间中的显着特征导出的复用图显式地对它们的关系进行建模。我们提出的结果表明，我们提出的方法优于在大型结核病（TB）数据集上进行多结果预测的融合模式的最先进方法。 本文提出一种基于多路图神经网络的多模态融合框架，用于结核病患者结果预测。 Niharika S. D'Souza,Hongzhi Wang,Andrea Giovannini,Antonio Foncubierta-Rodriguez,Kristen L. Beck,Orest Boyko,Tanveer Syeda-Mahmood cs.LG,cs.CV,eess.IV

title: Shared Autonomous Vehicle Mobility for a Transportation Underserved City
title_zh: 交通服务欠缺城市的共享自动驾驶汽车移动性
abstract: This paper proposes the use of an on-demand, ride hailed and ride-Shared Autonomous Vehicle (SAV) service as a feasible solution to serve the mobility needs of a small city where fixed route, circulator type public transportation may be too expensive to operate. The presented work builds upon our earlier work that modeled the city of Marysville, Ohio as an example of such a city, with realistic traffic behavior, and trip requests. A simple SAV dispatcher is implemented to model the behavior of the proposed on-demand mobility service. The goal of the service is to optimally distribute SAVs along the network to allocate passengers and shared rides. The pickup and drop-off locations are strategically placed along the network to provide mobility from affordable housing, which are also transit deserts, to locations corresponding to jobs and other opportunities. The study is carried out by varying the behaviors of the SAV driving system from cautious to aggressive along with the size of the SAV fleet and analyzing their corresponding performance. It is found that the size of the network and behavior of AV driving system behavior results in an optimal number of SAVs after which increasing the number of SAVs does not improve overall mobility. For the Marysville network, which is a 9 mile by 8 mile network, this happens at the mark of a fleet of 8 deployed SAVs. The results show that the introduction of the proposed SAV service with a simple optimal shared scheme can provide access to services and jobs to hundreds of people in a small sized city.

abstract_zh: 本文提出使用按需、叫车和共享自动驾驶汽车 (SAV) 服务作为一种可行的解决方案，以满足小城市的出行需求，在这些城市，固定路线、循环式公共交通的运营成本可能太高。所提出的工作建立在我们早期的工作基础上，该工作以俄亥俄州马里斯维尔市为例子，具有现实的交通行为和行程请求。实现了一个简单的 SAV 调度程序来对所提出的按需移动服务的行为进行建模。该服务的目标是沿网络优化分配 SAV，以分配乘客和共享乘车。接送地点战略性地沿网络布置，以提供从经济适用房（也是过境沙漠）到与工作和其他机会相对应的地点的流动性。这项研究是根据 SAV 车队的规模，将 SAV 驾驶系统的行为从谨慎到激进进行变化，并分析其相应的性能。研究发现，网络规模和 AV 驾驶系统行为会导致 SAV 的最佳数量，之后增加 SAV 的数量并不会改善整体移动性。对于马里斯维尔 (Marysville) 网络（这是一个 9 英里 x 8 英里的网络），这种情况发生在部署了 8 辆 SAV 的车队中。结果表明，引入所提出的 SAV 服务和简单​​的最优共享方案可以为小城市中的数百人提供服务和工作机会。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过按需共享自动驾驶车辆（SAV）服务，解决交通服务不足的小城市出行问题，并以俄亥俄州玛丽斯维尔市为案例进行模拟分析。
AI.motivation: 传统固定路线公交在小城市运营成本高且覆盖不足，而共享自动驾驶车辆可提供灵活、经济的出行方案，尤其服务于交通荒漠地区的居民。
AI.method: 基于玛丽斯维尔市的真实交通数据，构建网络模型并实现简单SAV调度器，通过调整车辆驾驶行为（谨慎至激进）和车队规模，分析不同参数对出行效率的影响。
AI.result: 在9英里×8英里范围内，8辆SAV为最优规模，超出后效率不再提升；该服务可为数百居民提供就业和生活服务的可达性。
AI.conclusion: 共享自动驾驶车辆能有效改善小城市交通，但需根据网络规模和驾驶行为优化车队配置及调度策略。

authors_text: Banafsheh Rafiee,Sina Ghiassian,Jun Jin,Richard Sutton,Jun Luo,Adam White
title: Auxiliary task discovery through generate-and-test
title_zh: 通过生成和测试发现辅助任务
abstract: In this paper, we explore an approach to auxiliary task discovery in reinforcement learning based on ideas from representation learning. Auxiliary tasks tend to improve data efficiency by forcing the agent to learn auxiliary prediction and control objectives in addition to the main task of maximizing reward, and thus producing better representations. Typically these tasks are designed by people. Meta-learning offers a promising avenue for automatic task discovery; however, these methods are computationally expensive and challenging to tune in practice. In this paper, we explore a complementary approach to the auxiliary task discovery: continually generating new auxiliary tasks and preserving only those with high utility. We also introduce a new measure of auxiliary tasks' usefulness based on how useful the features induced by them are for the main task. Our discovery algorithm significantly outperforms random tasks and learning without auxiliary tasks across a suite of environments.
summary: In this paper, we explore an approach to auxiliary task discovery in reinforcement learning based on ideas from representation learning. Auxiliary tasks tend to improve data efficiency by forcing the agent to learn auxiliary prediction and control objectives in addition to the main task of maximizing reward, and thus producing better representations. Typically these tasks are designed by people. Meta-learning offers a promising avenue for automatic task discovery; however, these methods are computationally expensive and challenging to tune in practice. In this paper, we explore a complementary approach to the auxiliary task discovery: continually generating new auxiliary tasks and preserving only those with high utility. We also introduce a new measure of auxiliary tasks' usefulness based on how useful the features induced by them are for the main task. Our discovery algorithm significantly outperforms random tasks and learning without auxiliary tasks across a suite of environments.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们基于表示学习的思想探索了一种强化学习中辅助任务发现的方法。辅助任务倾向于通过迫使智能体在最大化奖励的主要任务之外学习辅助预测和控制目标来提高数据效率，从而产生更好的表示。通常这些任务是由人设计的。元学习为自动任务发现提供了一条有前途的途径；然而，这些方法的计算成本很高，并且在实践中调整起来具有挑战性。在本文中，我们探索了辅助任务发现的补充方法：不断生成新的辅助任务并仅保留那些具有高实用性的任务。我们还引入了一种新的辅助任务有用性衡量标准，该衡量标准基于辅助任务引发的特征对主要任务的有用程度。我们的发现算法在一系列环境中显着优于随机任务和无需辅助任务的学习。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过生成和测试自动发现辅助任务的方法，以提高强化学习中的数据效率。
AI.motivation: 人工设计辅助任务耗时且元学习方法计算成本高，需探索更高效的自动发现机制。
AI.method: 持续生成新辅助任务并保留高效任务，引入基于特征对主任务有用性的度量标准。
AI.result: 在多个环境中显著优于随机任务和无辅助任务的学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 该算法能有效自动发现有用辅助任务，提升强化学习性能。

title: LaundroGraph: Self-Supervised Graph Representation Learning for Anti-Money Laundering
title_zh: LaundroGraph：用于反洗钱的自监督图表示学习
comment: Accepted at ACM International Conference on AI in Finance 2022 (ICAIF'22)
comments: Accepted at ACM International Conference on AI in Finance 2022 (ICAIF'22)
abstract: Anti-money laundering (AML) regulations mandate financial institutions to deploy AML systems based on a set of rules that, when triggered, form the basis of a suspicious alert to be assessed by human analysts. Reviewing these cases is a cumbersome and complex task that requires analysts to navigate a large network of financial interactions to validate suspicious movements. Furthermore, these systems have very high false positive rates (estimated to be over 95\%). The scarcity of labels hinders the use of alternative systems based on supervised learning, reducing their applicability in real-world applications. In this work we present LaundroGraph, a novel self-supervised graph representation learning approach to encode banking customers and financial transactions into meaningful representations. These representations are used to provide insights to assist the AML reviewing process, such as identifying anomalous movements for a given customer. LaundroGraph represents the underlying network of financial interactions as a customer-transaction bipartite graph and trains a graph neural network on a fully self-supervised link prediction task. We empirically demonstrate that our approach outperforms other strong baselines on self-supervised link prediction using a real-world dataset, improving the best non-graph baseline by $12$ p.p. of AUC. The goal is to increase the efficiency of the reviewing process by supplying these AI-powered insights to the analysts upon review. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first fully self-supervised system within the context of AML detection.

abstract_zh: 反洗钱 (AML) 法规要求金融机构根据一组规则部署反洗钱系统，这些规则一旦触发，就构成可疑警报的基础，由人类分析师进行评估。审查这些案例是一项繁琐而复杂的任务，需要分析师浏览庞大的金融互动网络以验证可疑的动向。 Furthermore, these systems have very high false positive rates (estimated to be over 95\%).标签的稀缺阻碍了基于监督学习的替代系统的使用，降低了它们在现实世界应用中的适用性。在这项工作中，我们提出了 LaundroGraph，这是一种新颖的自监督图表示学习方法，可将银行客户和金融交易编码为有意义的表示。这些表示用于提供见解以协助反洗钱审查流程，例如识别给定客户的异常活动。 LaundroGraph 将金融交互的底层网络表示为客户交易二分图，并在完全自监督的链接预测任务上训练图神经网络。我们凭经验证明，我们的方法在使用真实世界数据集的自监督链接预测方面优于其他强基线，将最佳非图基线提高了 12 美元。曲线下面积。 The goal is to increase the efficiency of the reviewing process by supplying these AI-powered insights to the analysts upon review. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first fully self-supervised system within the context of AML detection.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LaundroGraph，一种自监督图表示学习方法，用于反洗钱（AML）中的异常交易检测，通过构建客户-交易二分图并训练图神经网络提升审查效率。
AI.motivation: 现有AML系统依赖规则触发可疑警报，但存在高误报率（超95%）且依赖人工分析，而监督学习因标签稀缺难以应用，需开发无需标签的自监督方法。
AI.method: 将金融交互网络建模为客户-交易二分图，通过自监督链接预测任务训练图神经网络，生成客户和交易的表示以识别异常模式。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上，LaundroGraph的AUC指标优于其他基线12个百分点，且为首个全自监督AML检测系统。
AI.conclusion: LaundroGraph通过自监督图学习有效辅助AML人工审查，显著降低误报并提升检测效率，为无标签场景下的金融风控提供新思路。
