title: Multi-Domain Long-Tailed Learning by Augmenting Disentangled Representations
title_zh: 通过增强解缠结表示进行多领域长尾学习
abstract: There is an inescapable long-tailed class-imbalance issue in many real-world classification problems. Current methods for addressing this problem only consider scenarios where all examples come from the same distribution. However, in many cases, there are multiple domains with distinct class imbalance. We study this multi-domain long-tailed learning problem and aim to produce a model that generalizes well across all classes and domains. Towards that goal, we introduce TALLY, a method that addresses this multi-domain long-tailed learning problem. Built upon a proposed selective balanced sampling strategy, TALLY achieves this by mixing the semantic representation of one example with the domain-associated nuisances of another, producing a new representation for use as data augmentation. To improve the disentanglement of semantic representations, TALLY further utilizes a domain-invariant class prototype that averages out domain-specific effects. We evaluate TALLY on several benchmarks and real-world datasets and find that it consistently outperforms other state-of-the-art methods in both subpopulation and domain shift. Our code and data have been released at https://github.com/huaxiuyao/TALLY.
summary: There is an inescapable long-tailed class-imbalance issue in many real-world classification problems. Current methods for addressing this problem only consider scenarios where all examples come from the same distribution. However, in many cases, there are multiple domains with distinct class imbalance. We study this multi-domain long-tailed learning problem and aim to produce a model that generalizes well across all classes and domains. Towards that goal, we introduce TALLY, a method that addresses this multi-domain long-tailed learning problem. Built upon a proposed selective balanced sampling strategy, TALLY achieves this by mixing the semantic representation of one example with the domain-associated nuisances of another, producing a new representation for use as data augmentation. To improve the disentanglement of semantic representations, TALLY further utilizes a domain-invariant class prototype that averages out domain-specific effects. We evaluate TALLY on several benchmarks and real-world datasets and find that it consistently outperforms other state-of-the-art methods in both subpopulation and domain shift. Our code and data have been released at https://github.com/huaxiuyao/TALLY.
abstract_zh: 在许多现实世界的分类问题中都存在不可避免的长尾类不平衡问题。当前解决此问题的方法仅考虑所有示例都来自同一分布的情况。然而，在许多情况下，存在多个具有明显类别不平衡的领域。我们研究这个多领域长尾学习问题，旨在产生一个能够很好地泛化所有类别和领域的模型。为了实现这一目标，我们引入了 TALLY，这是一种解决多领域长尾学习问题的方法。基于所提出的选择性平衡采样策略，TALLY 通过将一个示例的语义表示与另一个示例的领域相关的麻烦混合在一起来实现这一目标，生成一种用作数据增强的新表示。为了改善语义表示的解缠结，TALLY 进一步利用域不变的类原型来平均域特定的效果。我们在多个基准和现实数据集上评估 TALLY，发现它在子群体和领域转移方面始终优于其他最先进的方法。我们的代码和数据已发布在https://github.com/huaxiuyao/TALLY。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为TALLY的方法，用于解决多领域长尾学习问题，通过增强解耦表示来提升跨领域和子群体的分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现实世界中的分类问题普遍存在长尾类别不平衡现象，而现有方法仅针对单一分布场景，无法处理多领域间类别不平衡差异显著的问题。
AI.method: TALLY通过选择性平衡采样策略，混合不同样本的语义表示与领域特定噪声生成新数据，并利用领域不变类别原型消除领域影响以增强表示解耦。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集和真实场景测试中，TALLY在子群体和领域迁移任务上均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: TALLY通过解耦表示增强与领域不变原型设计，有效解决了多领域长尾学习问题，为跨领域泛化提供了新思路。

title: A DirectX-Based DICOM Viewer for Multi-User Surgical Planning in Augmented Reality
title_zh: 基于 DirectX 的 DICOM 查看器，用于增强现实中的多用户手术规划
comment: ef:ISVC 2022 symposium proceeding, will be on Lecture Notes in Computer Science (LNCS) series
comments: ef:ISVC 2022 symposium proceeding, will be on Lecture Notes in Computer Science (LNCS) series
abstract: Preoperative medical imaging is an essential part of surgical planning. The data from medical imaging devices, such as CT and MRI scanners, consist of stacks of 2D images in DICOM format. Conversely, advances in 3D data visualization provide further information by assembling cross-sections into 3D volumetric datasets. As Microsoft unveiled the HoloLens 2 (HL2), which is considered one of the best Mixed Reality (XR) headsets in the market, it promised to enhance visualization in 3D by providing an immersive experience to users. This paper introduces a prototype holographic XR DICOM Viewer for the 3D visualization of DICOM image sets on HL2 for surgical planning. We first developed a standalone graphical C++ engine using the native DirectX11 API and HLSL shaders. Based on that, the prototype further applies the OpenXR API for potential deployment on a wide range of devices from vendors across the XR spectrum. With native access to the device, our prototype unravels the limitation of hardware capabilities on HL2 for 3D volume rendering and interaction. Moreover, smartphones can act as input devices to provide another user interaction method by connecting to our server. In this paper, we present a holographic DICOM viewer for the HoloLens 2 and contribute (i) a prototype that renders the DICOM image stacks in real-time on HL2, (ii) three types of user interactions in XR, and (iii) a preliminary qualitative evaluation of our prototype.

Moreover, smartphones can act as input devices to provide another user interaction method by connecting to our server. In this paper, we present a holographic DICOM viewer for the HoloLens 2 and contribute (i) a prototype that renders the DICOM image stacks in real-time on HL2, (ii) three types of user interactions in XR, and (iii) a preliminary qualitative evaluation of our prototype.
abstract_zh: 术前医学影像是手术计划的重要组成部分。来自 CT 和 MRI 扫描仪等医学成像设备的数据由 DICOM 格式的 2D 图像堆栈组成。相反，3D 数据可视化的进步通过将横截面组装成 3D 体积数据集来提供更多信息。微软推出了 HoloLens 2 (HL2)，它被认为是市场上最好的混合现实 (XR) 耳机之一，它承诺通过为用户提供身临其境的体验来增强 3D 可视化。本文介绍了原型全息 XR DICOM 查看器，用于在 HL2 上对 DICOM 图像集进行 3D 可视化，以进行手术规划。我们首先使用本机 DirectX11 API 和 HLSL 着色器开发了一个独立的图形 C++ 引擎。在此基础上，该原型进一步应用了 OpenXR API，以便在 XR 频谱供应商的各种设备上进行潜在部署。通过对设备的本机访问，我们的原型解决了 HL2 上用于 3D 体积渲染和交互的硬件功能的限制。此外，智能手机可以作为输入设备，通过连接到我们的服务器来提供另一种用户交互方式。在本文中，我们展示了适用于 HoloLens 2 的全息 DICOM 查看器，并贡献了 (i) 在 HL2 上实时渲染 DICOM 图像堆栈的原型，(ii) XR 中的三种类型的用户交互，以及 (iii) 对我们的原型的初步定性评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于DirectX的DICOM影像三维可视化原型系统，用于HoloLens 2的增强现实手术规划。
AI.motivation: 传统医学影像的二维显示难以满足手术规划需求，而HoloLens 2的混合现实特性可提供沉浸式三维可视化，但现有硬件存在渲染和交互限制。
AI.method: 开发基于DirectX11和HLSL的C++图形引擎，结合OpenXR实现跨设备部署，并通过智能手机作为输入设备扩展交互方式。
AI.result: 实现了DICOM影像实时渲染、三种XR交互方式及初步定性评估，验证了原型在HL2上的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该原型突破了HL2硬件限制，为多用户AR手术规划提供了基础，未来可扩展至更多XR设备和临床场景。

search_text: A DirectX-Based DICOM Viewer for Multi-User Surgical Planning in Augmented Reality 基于 DirectX 的 DICOM 查看器，用于增强现实中的多用户手术规划 Preoperative medical imaging is an essential part of surgical planning. The data from medical imaging devices, such as CT and MRI scanners, consist of stacks of 2D images in DICOM format. Conversely, advances in 3D data visualization provide further information by assembling cross-sections into 3D volumetric datasets. As Microsoft unveiled the HoloLens 2 (HL2), which is considered one of the best Mixed Reality (XR) headsets in the market, it promised to enhance visualization in 3D by providing an immersive experience to users. This paper introduces a prototype holographic XR DICOM Viewer for the 3D visualization of DICOM image sets on HL2 for surgical planning. We first developed a standalone graphical C++ engine using the native DirectX11 API and HLSL shaders. Based on that, the prototype further applies the OpenXR API for potential deployment on a wide range of devices from vendors across the XR spectrum. With native access to the device, our prototype unravels the limitation of hardware capabilities on HL2 for 3D volume rendering and interaction. Moreover, smartphones can act as input devices to provide another user interaction method by connecting to our server. In this paper, we present a holographic DICOM viewer for the HoloLens 2 and contribute (i) a prototype that renders the DICOM image stacks in real-time on HL2, (ii) three types of user interactions in XR, and (iii) a preliminary qualitative evaluation of our prototype. 术前医学影像是手术计划的重要组成部分。来自 CT 和 MRI 扫描仪等医学成像设备的数据由 DICOM 格式的 2D 图像堆栈组成。相反，3D 数据可视化的进步通过将横截面组装成 3D 体积数据集来提供更多信息。微软推出了 HoloLens 2 (HL2)，它被认为是市场上最好的混合现实 (XR) 耳机之一，它承诺通过为用户提供身临其境的体验来增强 3D 可视化。本文介绍了原型全息 XR DICOM 查看器，用于在 HL2 上对 DICOM 图像集进行 3D 可视化，以进行手术规划。我们首先使用本机 DirectX11 API 和 HLSL 着色器开发了一个独立的图形 C++ 引擎。在此基础上，该原型进一步应用了 OpenXR API，以便在 XR 频谱供应商的各种设备上进行潜在部署。通过对设备的本机访问，我们的原型解决了 HL2 上用于 3D 体积渲染和交互的硬件功能的限制。此外，智能手机可以作为输入设备，通过连接到我们的服务器来提供另一种用户交互方式。在本文中，我们展示了适用于 HoloLens 2 的全息 DICOM 查看器，并贡献了 (i) 在 HL2 上实时渲染 DICOM 图像堆栈的原型，(ii) XR 中的三种类型的用户交互，以及 (iii) 对我们的原型的初步定性评估。 本文提出了一种基于DirectX的DICOM影像三维可视化原型系统，用于HoloLens 2的增强现实手术规划。 Menghe Zhang,Weichen Liu,Nadir Weibel,Jurgen Schulze cs.MM,cs.HC

title: New wrapper method based on normalized mutual information for dimension reduction and classification of hyperspectral images
title_zh: 基于归一化互信息的新包装方法用于高光谱图像降维和分类
comment: ef:Proceedings of the 2018 International Conference on Optimization and Applications, ICOA 2018, 2018, pp. 1-7 http://www.scopus.com/inward/record.url?eid=2-s2.0-85048829863&partnerID=MN8TOARS
comments: ef:Proceedings of the 2018 International Conference on Optimization and Applications, ICOA 2018, 2018, pp. 1-7 http://www.scopus.com/inward/record.url?eid=2-s2.0-85048829863&partnerID=MN8TOARS
abstract: Feature selection is one of the most important problems in hyperspectral images classification. It consists to choose the most informative bands from the entire set of input datasets and discard the noisy, redundant and irrelevant ones. In this context, we propose a new wrapper method based on normalized mutual information (NMI) and error probability (PE) using support vector machine (SVM) to reduce the dimensionality of the used hyperspectral images and increase the classification efficiency. The experiments have been performed on two challenging hyperspectral benchmarks datasets captured by the NASA's Airborne Visible/Infrared Imaging Spectrometer Sensor (AVIRIS). Several metrics had been calculated to evaluate the performance of the proposed algorithm. The obtained results prove that our method can increase the classification performance and provide an accurate thematic map in comparison with other reproduced algorithms. This method may be improved for more classification efficiency. Keywords-Feature selection, hyperspectral images, classification, wrapper, normalized mutual information, support vector machine.
summary: Feature selection is one of the most important problems in hyperspectral images classification. It consists to choose the most informative bands from the entire set of input datasets and discard the noisy, redundant and irrelevant ones. In this context, we propose a new wrapper method based on normalized mutual information (NMI) and error probability (PE) using support vector machine (SVM) to reduce the dimensionality of the used hyperspectral images and increase the classification efficiency. The experiments have been performed on two challenging hyperspectral benchmarks datasets captured by the NASA's Airborne Visible/Infrared Imaging Spectrometer Sensor (AVIRIS). Several metrics had been calculated to evaluate the performance of the proposed algorithm. The obtained results prove that our method can increase the classification performance and provide an accurate thematic map in comparison with other reproduced algorithms. This method may be improved for more classification efficiency. Keywords-Feature selection, hyperspectral images, classification, wrapper, normalized mutual information, support vector machine.
abstract_zh: 特征选择是高光谱图像分类中最重要的问题之一。它包括从整组输入数据集中选择信息最丰富的波段，并丢弃嘈杂、冗余和不相关的波段。在这种情况下，我们提出了一种基于归一化互信息（NMI）和错误概率（PE）的新包装方法，使用支持向量机（SVM）来降低所用高光谱图像的维数并提高分类效率。这些实验是在 NASA 机载可见光/红外成像光谱仪传感器 (AVIRIS) 捕获的两个具有挑战性的高光谱基准数据集上进行的。已经计算了几个指标来评估所提出的算法的性能。获得的结果证明，与其他重现算法相比，我们的方法可以提高分类性能并提供准确的专题图。可以改进该方法以获得更高的分类效率。关键词-特征选择、高光谱图像、分类、包装器、归一化互信息、支持向量机。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于归一化互信息（NMI）和误差概率（PE）的包装法，用于高光谱图像的特征选择和分类。
AI.motivation: 高光谱图像分类中特征选择至关重要，需剔除冗余和无关波段以提高分类效率，传统方法存在局限性。
AI.method: 结合NMI与PE指标，利用支持向量机（SVM）构建包装法模型，通过优化特征子集实现降维和分类。
AI.result: 在AVIRIS数据集实验中，该方法较其他算法显著提升了分类准确率并生成更精确的主题图。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效提升分类性能，但仍有优化空间以进一步提高效率。

title: A Depolarizing Noise-aware Transpiler for Optimal Amplitude Amplification
title_zh: 用于最佳幅度放大的去极化噪声感知转换器
abstract: Amplitude amplification provides a quadratic speed-up for an array of quantum algorithms when run on a quantum machine perfectly isolated from its environment. However, the advantage is substantially diminished as the NISQ-era quantum machines lack the large number of qubits necessary to provide error correction. Noise in the computation grows with the number of gate counts in the circuit with each iteration of amplitude amplification. After a certain number of amplifications, the loss in accuracy from the gate noise starts to overshadow the gain in accuracy due to amplification, forming an inflection point. Beyond this point, accuracy continues to deteriorate until the machine reaches a maximally mixed state where the result is uniformly random. Hence, quantum transpilers should take the noise parameters of the underlying quantum machine into consideration such that the circuit can be optimized to attain the maximal accuracy possible for that machine. In this work, we propose an extension to the transpiler that predicts the accuracy of the result at every amplification with high fidelity by applying pure Bayesian analysis to individual gate noise rates. Using this information, it finds the inflection point and optimizes the circuit by halting amplification at that point. The prediction is made without needing to execute the circuit either on a quantum simulator or an actual quantum machine.
summary: Amplitude amplification provides a quadratic speed-up for an array of quantum algorithms when run on a quantum machine perfectly isolated from its environment. However, the advantage is substantially diminished as the NISQ-era quantum machines lack the large number of qubits necessary to provide error correction. Noise in the computation grows with the number of gate counts in the circuit with each iteration of amplitude amplification. After a certain number of amplifications, the loss in accuracy from the gate noise starts to overshadow the gain in accuracy due to amplification, forming an inflection point. Beyond this point, accuracy continues to deteriorate until the machine reaches a maximally mixed state where the result is uniformly random. Hence, quantum transpilers should take the noise parameters of the underlying quantum machine into consideration such that the circuit can be optimized to attain the maximal accuracy possible for that machine. In this work, we propose an extension to the transpiler that predicts the accuracy of the result at every amplification with high fidelity by applying pure Bayesian analysis to individual gate noise rates. Using this information, it finds the inflection point and optimizes the circuit by halting amplification at that point. The prediction is made without needing to execute the circuit either on a quantum simulator or an actual quantum machine.
abstract_zh: 当在与环境完全隔离的量子机器上运行时，幅度放大可以为一系列量子算法提供二次加速。然而，由于 NISQ 时代的量子机器缺乏提供纠错所需的大量量子位，这一优势大大减弱。每次幅度放大迭代时，计算中的噪声随着电路中门计数的数量而增加。经过一定次数的放大后，栅极噪声造成的精度损失开始掩盖放大带来的精度增益，形成拐点。超过这一点，准确性会继续恶化，直到机器达到最大混合状态，其中结果是均匀随机的。因此，量子转译器应该考虑底层量子机的噪声参数，以便可以优化电路以获得该机器可能的最大精度。在这项工作中，我们提出了对转译器的扩展，通过对各个门噪声率应用纯贝叶斯分析，以高保真度预测每次放大结果的准确性。利用这些信息，它可以找到拐点，并通过在该点停止放大来优化电路。无需在量子模拟器或实际量子机上执行电路即可做出预测。

AI.tldr: 开发一种考虑退相干噪声的量子转译器，以优化幅度放大算法的准确性。
AI.motivation: NISQ时代量子设备因缺乏纠错能力，噪声随门操作次数增加导致幅度放大算法优势减弱，需在噪声影响与算法增益间找到平衡点。
AI.method: 基于贝叶斯分析预测单个门噪声率对结果精度的影响，通过数学建模定位精度拐点并优化停止放大迭代的时机。
AI.result: 转译器无需实际运行即可预测精度并确定最优放大次数，有效提升量子计算结果准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为NISQ设备实现噪声感知的幅度放大优化提供了可行方案，凸显了量子转译器在噪声环境下的关键作用。

motivation: NISQ时代量子设备因缺乏纠错能力，噪声随门操作次数增加导致幅度放大算法优势减弱，需在噪声影响与算法增益间找到平衡点。
method: 基于贝叶斯分析预测单个门噪声率对结果精度的影响，通过数学建模定位精度拐点并优化停止放大迭代的时机。
result: 转译器无需实际运行即可预测精度并确定最优放大次数，有效提升量子计算结果准确性。
conclusion: 该方法为NISQ设备实现噪声感知的幅度放大优化提供了可行方案，凸显了量子转译器在噪声环境下的关键作用。
search_text: A Depolarizing Noise-aware Transpiler for Optimal Amplitude Amplification 用于最佳幅度放大的去极化噪声感知转换器 Amplitude amplification provides a quadratic speed-up for an array of quantum algorithms when run on a quantum machine perfectly isolated from its environment. However, the advantage is substantially diminished as the NISQ-era quantum machines lack the large number of qubits necessary to provide error correction. Noise in the computation grows with the number of gate counts in the circuit with each iteration of amplitude amplification. After a certain number of amplifications, the loss in accuracy from the gate noise starts to overshadow the gain in accuracy due to amplification, forming an inflection point. Beyond this point, accuracy continues to deteriorate until the machine reaches a maximally mixed state where the result is uniformly random. Hence, quantum transpilers should take the noise parameters of the underlying quantum machine into consideration such that the circuit can be optimized to attain the maximal accuracy possible for that machine. In this work, we propose an extension to the transpiler that predicts the accuracy of the result at every amplification with high fidelity by applying pure Bayesian analysis to individual gate noise rates. Using this information, it finds the inflection point and optimizes the circuit by halting amplification at that point. The prediction is made without needing to execute the circuit either on a quantum simulator or an actual quantum machine. 当在与环境完全隔离的量子机器上运行时，幅度放大可以为一系列量子算法提供二次加速。然而，由于 NISQ 时代的量子机器缺乏提供纠错所需的大量量子位，这一优势大大减弱。每次幅度放大迭代时，计算中的噪声随着电路中门计数的数量而增加。经过一定次数的放大后，栅极噪声造成的精度损失开始掩盖放大带来的精度增益，形成拐点。超过这一点，准确性会继续恶化，直到机器达到最大混合状态，其中结果是均匀随机的。因此，量子转译器应该考虑底层量子机的噪声参数，以便可以优化电路以获得该机器可能的最大精度。在这项工作中，我们提出了对转译器的扩展，通过对各个门噪声率应用纯贝叶斯分析，以高保真度预测每次放大结果的准确性。利用这些信息，它可以找到拐点，并通过在该点停止放大来优化电路。无需在量子模拟器或实际量子机上执行电路即可做出预测。 开发一种考虑退相干噪声的量子转译器，以优化幅度放大算法的准确性。 Debashis Ganguly,Wonsun Ahn quant-ph,cs.ET

title: A single-cell gene expression language model
title_zh: 单细胞基因表达语言模型
comment: 10 pages, 5 figures, Accepted at Learning Meaningful Representations of Life Workshop, 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022)
comments: 10 pages, 5 figures, Accepted at Learning Meaningful Representations of Life Workshop, 36th Conference on Neural Information Processing Systems (NeurIPS 2022)
abstract: Gene regulation is a dynamic process that connects genotype and phenotype. Given the difficulty of physically mapping mammalian gene circuitry, we require new computational methods to learn regulatory rules. Natural language is a valuable analogy to the communication of regulatory control. Machine learning systems model natural language by explicitly learning context dependencies between words. We propose a similar system applied to single-cell RNA expression profiles to learn context dependencies between genes. Our model, Exceiver, is trained across a diversity of cell types using a self-supervised task formulated for discrete count data, accounting for feature sparsity. We found agreement between the similarity profiles of latent sample representations and learned gene embeddings with respect to biological annotations. We evaluated Exceiver on a new dataset and a downstream prediction task and found that pretraining supports transfer learning. Our work provides a framework to model gene regulation on a single-cell level and transfer knowledge to downstream tasks.
summary: Gene regulation is a dynamic process that connects genotype and phenotype. We found agreement between the similarity profiles of latent sample representations and learned gene embeddings with respect to biological annotations. We evaluated Exceiver on a new dataset and a downstream prediction task and found that pretraining supports transfer learning. Our work provides a framework to model gene regulation on a single-cell level and transfer knowledge to downstream tasks.
abstract_zh: 基因调控是连接基因型和表型的动态过程。鉴于绘制哺乳动物基因电路的物理图谱非常困难，我们需要新的计算方法来学习调控规则。自然语言是监管控制沟通的一个有价值的类比。机器学习系统通过显式学习单词之间的上下文依赖关系来建模自然语言。我们提出了一个应用于单细胞 RNA 表达谱的类似系统，以学习基因之间的上下文依赖性。我们的模型 Exceiver 使用针对离散计数数据制定的自我监督任务进行了多种细胞类型的训练，并考虑了特征稀疏性。我们发现潜在样本表示和学习的基因嵌入在生物注释方面的相似性概况之间存在一致性。我们在新数据集和下游预测任务上评估了 Exceiver，发现预训练支持迁移学习。我们的工作提供了一个在单细胞水平上模拟基因调控并将知识转移到下游任务的框架。

AI.tldr: 开发单细胞基因表达语言模型以学习基因调控规则并支持迁移学习
AI.motivation: 解决基因调控机制研究中物理映射困难的问题，通过类比自然语言处理方法建立基因间上下文依赖模型
AI.method: 基于自监督学习的单细胞RNA表达分析模型Exceiver，处理离散计数数据并考虑特征稀疏性
AI.result: 基因嵌入与生物注释一致性验证成功，预训练模型在下游任务中展现迁移学习有效性
AI.conclusion: 提出单细胞基因调控建模新框架，为基因功能解析和跨任务知识迁移提供计算工具

title: Band selection and classification of hyperspectral images by minimizing normalized mutual information
title_zh: 通过最小化归一化互信息进行高光谱图像的波段选择和分类
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2210.13456, arXiv:2210.12296, arXiv:1211.0613, arXiv:1210.0528; text overlap with arXiv:1210.0052, arXiv:1211.0055
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2210.13456, arXiv:2210.12296, arXiv:1211.0613, arXiv:1210.0528; text overlap with arXiv:1210.0052, arXiv:1211.0055
abstract: Hyperspectral images (HSI) classification is a high technical remote sensing tool. The main goal is to classify the point of a region. The HIS contains more than a hundred bidirectional measures, called bands (or simply images), of the same region called Ground Truth Map (GT). Unfortunately, some bands contain redundant information, others are affected by the noise, and the high dimensionalities of features make the accuracy of classification lower. All these bands can be important for some applications, but for the classification a small subset of these is relevant. In this paper we use mutual information (MI) to select the relevant bands; and the Normalized Mutual Information coefficient to avoid and control redundant ones. This is a feature selection scheme and a Filter strategy. We establish this study on HSI AVIRIS 92AV3C. This is effectiveness, and fast scheme to control redundancy. Index Terms: Hyperspectral images, Classification, Feature Selection, Normalized Mutual Information, Redundancy.

Index Terms: Hyperspectral images, Classification, Feature Selection, Normalized Mutual Information, Redundancy.
abstract_zh: 高光谱图像（HSI）分类是一种高科技遥感工具。主要目标是对区域的点进行分类。 HIS 包含一百多个双向测量值，称为波段（或简称为图像），属于同一区域，称为地面实况图 (GT)。不幸的是，一些波段包含冗余信息，另一些波段则受到噪声的影响，并且特征的高维度使得分类的准确性较低。所有这些频段对于某些应用都很重要，但对于分类来说，其中一小部分是相关的。在本文中，我们使用互信息（MI）来选择相关频段；以及归一化互信息系数，以避免和控制冗余。这是一个特征选择方案和一个过滤策略。我们在 HSI AVIRIS 92AV3C 上开展这项研究。这是控制冗余的有效且快速的方案。索引术语：高光谱图像、分类、特征选择、归一化互信息、冗余。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过最小化归一化互信息来选择高光谱图像的关键波段，以提升分类效果。
AI.motivation: 高光谱图像波段数量多且存在冗余信息与噪声，导致分类准确性下降，需通过特征选择减少冗余并保留关键信息。
AI.method: 采用互信息（MI）筛选相关波段，结合归一化互信息系数控制冗余，形成基于过滤策略的特征选择方案。
AI.result: 在AVIRIS 92AV3C数据集验证中，该方法被证明是有效且快速的冗余控制方案。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过归一化互信息实现波段选择，为高光谱图像分类提供了高效特征筛选策略。

title: Obtrusive Subtleness and Why We Should Focus on Meaning, not Form, in Social Acceptability Studies
title_zh: 突兀的微妙性以及为什么我们在社会可接受性研究中应该关注意义而不是形式
abstract: Nowadays, interactive technologies are used almost everywhere. As a result, designers need to increasingly make them "socially acceptable". Previous work recommends "subtle" forms of interaction to increase social acceptability and avoid negative experiences. Although often appropriate, such uniform recommendations neglect the variety of social situations. We demonstrate this limitation in an experiment (N=35), by comparing the observer experience of different forms of interaction in "face-to-face conversations", a social situation rarely studied. Here, the typically recommended form of interaction ("subtle") led to a more negative observer experience than the usually deprecated form ("suspenseful"), in terms of affective experience and product perception. It also made the user appear less extraverted. We conclude by positioning interactions with technology not as separate from the social situation in which they are performed, but as a constitutive part of it that meaningfully relates to other situated activities.
summary: Nowadays, interactive technologies are used almost everywhere. As a result, designers need to increasingly make them "socially acceptable". Previous work recommends "subtle" forms of interaction to increase social acceptability and avoid negative experiences. Although often appropriate, such uniform recommendations neglect the variety of social situations. We demonstrate this limitation in an experiment (N=35), by comparing the observer experience of different forms of interaction in "face-to-face conversations", a social situation rarely studied. Here, the typically recommended form of interaction ("subtle") led to a more negative observer experience than the usually deprecated form ("suspenseful"), in terms of affective experience and product perception. It also made the user appear less extraverted. We conclude by positioning interactions with technology not as separate from the social situation in which they are performed, but as a constitutive part of it that meaningfully relates to other situated activities.
abstract_zh: 如今，交互技术几乎无处不在。因此，设计师需要越来越多地让它们“被社会接受”。之前的工作推荐“微妙”的互动形式，以提高社会可接受性并避免负面经历。尽管这种统一的建议通常是适当的，但它忽略了社会情况的多样性。我们通过比较“面对面对话”（一种很少研究的社会情境）中不同形式的互动的观察者体验，在实验（N=35）中证明了这种局限性。在这里，就情感体验和产品感知而言，通常推荐的交互形式（“微妙”）比通常不赞成的形式（“悬疑”）导致更负面的观察者体验。它还让用户显得不那么外向。我们的结论是，与技术的交互不是与进行交互的社会情境分开，而是与其他情境活动有意义地相关的社会情境的组成部分。

AI.tldr: 本文通过实验挑战传统观点，强调在社会接受度研究中应关注互动的‘意义’而非‘形式’，并探讨不同互动方式在特定社交情境中的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有研究普遍推荐‘微妙’的互动形式以提高社会接受度，但忽视了社交情境的多样性，导致建议缺乏情境适应性。
AI.method: 通过实验（N=35）比较‘面对面对话’场景中两种互动形式（‘微妙’与‘充满悬念’）对观察者情感体验、产品感知及用户外向性表现的影响。
AI.result: ‘微妙’互动形式引发更负面的观察者体验，且使用户显得更内向；而通常被贬低的‘充满悬念’形式在情感体验和产品感知上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 技术互动应被视为社交情境的构成部分，其设计需与具体情境中的其他活动意义关联，而非孤立追求形式上的‘微妙’。

search_text: Obtrusive Subtleness and Why We Should Focus on Meaning, not Form, in Social Acceptability Studies 突兀的微妙性以及为什么我们在社会可接受性研究中应该关注意义而不是形式 Nowadays, interactive technologies are used almost everywhere. As a result, designers need to increasingly make them "socially acceptable". Previous work recommends "subtle" forms of interaction to increase social acceptability and avoid negative experiences. Although often appropriate, such uniform recommendations neglect the variety of social situations. We demonstrate this limitation in an experiment (N=35), by comparing the observer experience of different forms of interaction in "face-to-face conversations", a social situation rarely studied. Here, the typically recommended form of interaction ("subtle") led to a more negative observer experience than the usually deprecated form ("suspenseful"), in terms of affective experience and product perception. It also made the user appear less extraverted. We conclude by positioning interactions with technology not as separate from the social situation in which they are performed, but as a constitutive part of it that meaningfully relates to other situated activities. 如今，交互技术几乎无处不在。因此，设计师需要越来越多地让它们“被社会接受”。之前的工作推荐“微妙”的互动形式，以提高社会可接受性并避免负面经历。尽管这种统一的建议通常是适当的，但它忽略了社会情况的多样性。我们通过比较“面对面对话”（一种很少研究的社会情境）中不同形式的互动的观察者体验，在实验（N=35）中证明了这种局限性。在这里，就情感体验和产品感知而言，通常推荐的交互形式（“微妙”）比通常不赞成的形式（“悬疑”）导致更负面的观察者体验。它还让用户显得不那么外向。我们的结论是，与技术的交互不是与进行交互的社会情境分开，而是与其他情境活动有意义地相关的社会情境的组成部分。 本文通过实验挑战传统观点，强调在社会接受度研究中应关注互动的‘意义’而非‘形式’，并探讨不同互动方式在特定社交情境中的影响。 Alarith Uhde,Tim zum Hoff,Marc Hassenzahl cs.HC

authors_text: Zexin Fang,Bin Han,C. Clark Cao,Hans. D. Schotten
title: Artificial ASMR: A Cyber-Psychological Approach
title_zh: 人工 ASMR：一种网络心理学方法
abstract: The popularity of Autonomous Sensory Meridian Response (ASMR) has skyrockted over the past decade, but scientific studies on what exactly triggered ASMR effect remain few and immature, one most commonly acknowledged trigger is that ASMR clips typically provide rich semantic information. With our attention caught by the common acoustic patterns in ASMR audios, we investigate the correlation between the cyclic features of audio signals and their effectiveness in triggering ASMR effects. A cyber-psychological approach that combines signal processing, artificial intelligence, and experimental psychology is taken, with which we are able to quantize ASMR-related acoustic features, and therewith synthesize ASMR clips with random cyclic patterns but not delivering identifiably scenarios to the audience, which were proven to be effective in triggering ASMR effects.
summary: The popularity of Autonomous Sensory Meridian Response (ASMR) has skyrockted over the past decade, but scientific studies on what exactly triggered ASMR effect remain few and immature, one most commonly acknowledged trigger is that ASMR clips typically provide rich semantic information. With our attention caught by the common acoustic patterns in ASMR audios, we investigate the correlation between the cyclic features of audio signals and their effectiveness in triggering ASMR effects. A cyber-psychological approach that combines signal processing, artificial intelligence, and experimental psychology is taken, with which we are able to quantize ASMR-related acoustic features, and therewith synthesize ASMR clips with random cyclic patterns but not delivering identifiably scenarios to the audience, which were proven to be effective in triggering ASMR effects.
abstract_zh: 自主感觉经络反应 (ASMR) 的受欢迎程度在过去十年中急剧上升，但关于到底是什么触发了 ASMR 效应的科学研究仍然很少且不成熟，最常见的触发因素之一是 ASMR 剪辑通常提供丰富的语义信息。由于我们的注意力被 ASMR 音频中常见的声学模式所吸引，我们研究了音频信号的循环特征与其触发 ASMR 效果的有效性之间的相关性。采用信号处理、人工智能和实验心理学相结合的网络心理学方法，我们能够量化与 ASMR 相关的声学特征，从而合成具有随机循环模式的 ASMR 片段，但不会向观众提供可识别的场景，这被证明可以有效触发 ASMR 效果。

AI.tldr: 本文通过量化ASMR音频的声学特征并合成无特定场景的音频，研究其触发ASMR效果的机制。
AI.motivation: 尽管ASMR流行度高，但其触发机制缺乏科学验证，尤其对声学特征与效果关联性的研究不足。
AI.method: 结合信号处理、人工智能与实验心理学，量化音频循环特征并合成随机循环模式的ASMR片段。
AI.result: 合成的无明确场景音频被证实能有效触发ASMR效果，表明循环声学特征可能为关键触发因素。
AI.conclusion: 通过声学特征量化与合成验证，揭示了循环模式在ASMR触发中的作用，为未来研究提供新方法。

authors_text: Xiangyu Chen,Ying Qin,Wenju Xu,Andrés M. Bur,Cuncong Zhong,Guanghui Wang
title: Explicitly Increasing Input Information Density for Vision Transformers on Small Datasets
title_zh: 在小数据集上显式增加视觉转换器的输入信息密度
abstract: Vision Transformers have attracted a lot of attention recently since the successful implementation of Vision Transformer (ViT) on vision tasks. With vision Transformers, specifically the multi-head self-attention modules, networks can capture long-term dependencies inherently. However, these attention modules normally need to be trained on large datasets, and vision Transformers show inferior performance on small datasets when training from scratch compared with widely dominant backbones like ResNets. Note that the Transformer model was first proposed for natural language processing, which carries denser information than natural images. To boost the performance of vision Transformers on small datasets, this paper proposes to explicitly increase the input information density in the frequency domain. Specifically, we introduce selecting channels by calculating the channel-wise heatmaps in the frequency domain using Discrete Cosine Transform (DCT), reducing the size of input while keeping most information and hence increasing the information density. As a result, 25% fewer channels are kept while better performance is achieved compared with previous work. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach on five small-scale datasets, including CIFAR-10/100, SVHN, Flowers-102, and Tiny ImageNet. The accuracy has been boosted up to 17.05% with Swin and Focal Transformers. Codes are available at https://github.com/xiangyu8/DenseVT.
summary: Vision Transformers have attracted a lot of attention recently since the successful implementation of Vision Transformer (ViT) on vision tasks. With vision Transformers, specifically the multi-head self-attention modules, networks can capture long-term dependencies inherently. However, these attention modules normally need to be trained on large datasets, and vision Transformers show inferior performance on small datasets when training from scratch compared with widely dominant backbones like ResNets. Note that the Transformer model was first proposed for natural language processing, which carries denser information than natural images. To boost the performance of vision Transformers on small datasets, this paper proposes to explicitly increase the input information density in the frequency domain. Specifically, we introduce selecting channels by calculating the channel-wise heatmaps in the frequency domain using Discrete Cosine Transform (DCT), reducing the size of input while keeping most information and hence increasing the information density. As a result, 25% fewer channels are kept while better performance is achieved compared with previous work. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach on five small-scale datasets, including CIFAR-10/100, SVHN, Flowers-102, and Tiny ImageNet. The accuracy has been boosted up to 17.05% with Swin and Focal Transformers. Codes are available at https://github.com/xiangyu8/DenseVT.
abstract_zh: 自从 Vision Transformer（ViT）在视觉任务上成功实施以来，Vision Transformers 最近引起了广泛的关注。借助视觉 Transformer，特别是多头自注意力模块，网络可以固有地捕获长期依赖关系。然而，这些注意力模块通常需要在大型数据集上进行训练，而与 ResNets 等广泛占主导地位的主干网络相比，从头开始训练时，视觉 Transformer 在小型数据集上的表现较差。请注意，Transformer 模型最初是为了自然语言处理而提出的，它携带的信息比自然图像更密集。为了提高视觉 Transformers 在小数据集上的性能，本文提出显式增加频域中的输入信息密度。具体来说，我们通过使用离散余弦变换（DCT）计算频域中的通道热图来选择通道，在保留大部分信息的同时减少输入的大小，从而增加信息密度。因此，与之前的工作相比，保留的通道数量减少了 25%，同时实现了更好的性能。大量实验证明了所提出的方法在五个小规模数据集上的有效性，包括 CIFAR-10/100、SVHN、Flowers-102 和 Tiny ImageNet。 Swin 和 Focal Transformers 的准确性已提高至 17.05%。代码可在 https://github.com/xiangyu8/DenseVT 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过提高输入信息密度来增强视觉Transformer（ViT）在小数据集上的性能。
AI.motivation: 视觉Transformer在小数据集上表现不如ResNet等传统模型，而Transformer最初在信息密度更高的自然语言处理领域表现优异，因此需提升视觉输入的信息密度以改善性能。
AI.method: 利用离散余弦变换（DCT）计算频率域通道热图，通过选择性保留关键通道减少输入尺寸，同时保持主要信息以提高信息密度。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10/100、SVHN等五个小规模数据集上，相比先前方法保持25%更少通道的情况下，使用Swin和Focal Transformer的准确率最高提升了17.05%。
AI.conclusion: 通过频率域通道选择提升输入信息密度的方法，能有效增强视觉Transformer在小数据集上的表现。

Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed approach on five small-scale datasets, including CIFAR-10/100, SVHN, Flowers-102, and Tiny ImageNet. The accuracy has been boosted up to 17.05% with Swin and Focal Transformers. Codes are available at https://github.com/xiangyu8/DenseVT. 自从 Vision Transformer（ViT）在视觉任务上成功实施以来，Vision Transformers 最近引起了广泛的关注。借助视觉 Transformer，特别是多头自注意力模块，网络可以固有地捕获长期依赖关系。然而，这些注意力模块通常需要在大型数据集上进行训练，而与 ResNets 等广泛占主导地位的主干网络相比，从头开始训练时，视觉 Transformer 在小型数据集上的表现较差。请注意，Transformer 模型最初是为了自然语言处理而提出的，它携带的信息比自然图像更密集。为了提高视觉 Transformers 在小数据集上的性能，本文提出显式增加频域中的输入信息密度。具体来说，我们通过使用离散余弦变换（DCT）计算频域中的通道热图来选择通道，在保留大部分信息的同时减少输入的大小，从而增加信息密度。因此，与之前的工作相比，保留的通道数量减少了 25%，同时实现了更好的性能。大量实验证明了所提出的方法在五个小规模数据集上的有效性，包括 CIFAR-10/100、SVHN、Flowers-102 和 Tiny ImageNet。 Swin 和 Focal Transformers 的准确性已提高至 17.05%。代码可在 https://github.com/xiangyu8/DenseVT 获取。 本文提出通过提高输入信息密度来增强视觉Transformer（ViT）在小数据集上的性能。 Xiangyu Chen,Ying Qin,Wenju Xu,Andrés M. Bur,Cuncong Zhong,Guanghui Wang cs.CV

title: Object recognition in atmospheric turbulence scenes
title_zh: 大气湍流场景中的物体识别
abstract: The influence of atmospheric turbulence on acquired surveillance imagery poses significant challenges in image interpretation and scene analysis. Conventional approaches for target classification and tracking are less effective under such conditions. While deep-learning-based object detection methods have shown great success in normal conditions, they cannot be directly applied to atmospheric turbulence sequences. In this paper, we propose a novel framework that learns distorted features to detect and classify object types in turbulent environments. Specifically, we utilise deformable convolutions to handle spatial turbulent displacement. Features are extracted using a feature pyramid network, and Faster R-CNN is employed as the object detector. Experimental results on a synthetic VOC dataset demonstrate that the proposed framework outperforms the benchmark with a mean Average Precision (mAP) score exceeding 30%. Additionally, subjective results on real data show significant improvement in performance.
summary: The influence of atmospheric turbulence on acquired surveillance imagery poses significant challenges in image interpretation and scene analysis. Conventional approaches for target classification and tracking are less effective under such conditions. While deep-learning-based object detection methods have shown great success in normal conditions, they cannot be directly applied to atmospheric turbulence sequences. In this paper, we propose a novel framework that learns distorted features to detect and classify object types in turbulent environments. Specifically, we utilise deformable convolutions to handle spatial turbulent displacement. Features are extracted using a feature pyramid network, and Faster R-CNN is employed as the object detector. Experimental results on a synthetic VOC dataset demonstrate that the proposed framework outperforms the benchmark with a mean Average Precision (mAP) score exceeding 30%. Additionally, subjective results on real data show significant improvement in performance.
abstract_zh: 大气湍流对获取的监视图像的影响给图像解释和场景分析带来了重大挑战。 Conventional approaches for target classification and tracking are less effective under such conditions.虽然基于深度学习的目标检测方法在正常条件下取得了巨大成功，但它们不能直接应用于大气湍流序列。 In this paper, we propose a novel framework that learns distorted features to detect and classify object types in turbulent environments. Specifically, we utilise deformable convolutions to handle spatial turbulent displacement. Features are extracted using a feature pyramid network, and Faster R-CNN is employed as the object detector.合成 VOC 数据集上的实验结果表明，所提出的框架优于基准，平均精度 (mAP) 得分超过 30%。 Additionally, subjective results on real data show significant improvement in performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在大气湍流场景中进行物体识别的新框架，解决传统方法在湍流条件下效果不佳的问题。
AI.motivation: 大气湍流导致监控图像失真，传统目标分类与跟踪方法效果差，而现有深度学习检测方法无法直接处理湍流序列。
AI.method: 利用可变形卷积处理空间湍流位移，结合特征金字塔网络提取特征，并采用Faster R-CNN进行目标检测。
AI.result: 在合成VOC数据集上mAP超过30%，实际数据主观评估显示性能显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效提升了湍流环境下物体检测与分类的准确性，验证了方法的可行性。

title: Streaming Submodular Maximization with Differential Privacy
title_zh: 具有差异隐私的流式子模块最大化
abstract: In this work, we study the problem of privately maximizing a submodular function in the streaming setting. Extensive work has been done on privately maximizing submodular functions in the general case when the function depends upon the private data of individuals. However, when the size of the data stream drawn from the domain of the objective function is large or arrives very fast, one must privately optimize the objective within the constraints of the streaming setting. We establish fundamental differentially private baselines for this problem and then derive better trade-offs between privacy and utility for the special case of decomposable submodular functions. A submodular function is decomposable when it can be written as a sum of submodular functions; this structure arises naturally when each summand function models the utility of an individual and the goal is to study the total utility of the whole population as in the well-known Combinatorial Public Projects Problem. Finally, we complement our theoretical analysis with experimental corroboration.
summary: In this work, we study the problem of privately maximizing a submodular function in the streaming setting. Extensive work has been done on privately maximizing submodular functions in the general case when the function depends upon the private data of individuals. However, when the size of the data stream drawn from the domain of the objective function is large or arrives very fast, one must privately optimize the objective within the constraints of the streaming setting. We establish fundamental differentially private baselines for this problem and then derive better trade-offs between privacy and utility for the special case of decomposable submodular functions. A submodular function is decomposable when it can be written as a sum of submodular functions; this structure arises naturally when each summand function models the utility of an individual and the goal is to study the total utility of the whole population as in the well-known Combinatorial Public Projects Problem. Finally, we complement our theoretical analysis with experimental corroboration.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们研究了在流设置中私自最大化子模函数的问题。当函数依赖于个人的私有数据时，在一般情况下，对子模函数的私有最大化已经进行了大量的工作。然而，当从目标函数域提取的数据流的大小很大或到达速度非常快时，必须在流设置的约束内私下优化目标。我们为这个问题建立了基本的差分隐私基线，然后针对可分解子模函数的特殊情况在隐私和效用之间得出更好的权衡。当子模函数可以写成子模函数的和时，它是可分解的；当每个被加函数对个体的效用进行建模并且目标是研究整个群体的总效用（如著名的组合公共项目问题）时，这种结构就会自然出现。最后，我们用实验证实来补充我们的理论分析。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在流数据环境下，如何利用差分隐私技术对子模函数进行最大化，特别针对可分解子模函数提出隐私与效用的优化方法。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注静态数据下的子模函数隐私优化，但面对大规模或高速流数据时，需在流处理约束下实现隐私保护与效用平衡，尤其在组合公共项目等实际场景中具有重要意义。
AI.method: 建立差分隐私基线方法，针对可分解子模函数设计隐私效用权衡算法，结合理论分析与实验验证。
AI.result: 提出针对可分解子模函数的隐私优化框架，理论推导出更优的隐私-效用权衡，并通过实验验证其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文为流环境下的差分隐私子模最大化提供了理论基础与实用方法，尤其在可分解结构场景中实现了隐私保护与整体效用的提升。

title: JAX-DIPS: Neural bootstrapping of finite discretization methods and application to elliptic problems with discontinuities
title_zh: JAX-DIPS：有限离散化方法的神经引导及其在具有不连续性的椭圆问题中的应用
comment: Accepted for publication in the Journal of Computational Physics
comments: Accepted for publication in the Journal of Computational Physics
abstract: We present a scalable strategy for development of mesh-free hybrid neuro-symbolic partial differential equation solvers based on existing mesh-based numerical discretization methods. Particularly, this strategy can be used to efficiently train neural network surrogate models of partial differential equations by (i) leveraging the accuracy and convergence properties of advanced numerical methods, solvers, and preconditioners, as well as (ii) better scalability to higher order PDEs by strictly limiting optimization to first order automatic differentiation. The presented neural bootstrapping method (hereby dubbed NBM) is based on evaluation of the finite discretization residuals of the PDE system obtained on implicit Cartesian cells centered on a set of random collocation points with respect to trainable parameters of the neural network. Importantly, the conservation laws and symmetries present in the bootstrapped finite discretization equations inform the neural network about solution regularities within local neighborhoods of training points. We apply NBM to the important class of elliptic problems with jump conditions across irregular interfaces in three spatial dimensions. We show the method is convergent such that model accuracy improves by increasing number of collocation points in the domain and predonditioning the residuals. We show NBM is competitive in terms of memory and training speed with other PINN-type frameworks. The algorithms presented here are implemented using \texttt{JAX} in a software package named \texttt{JAX-DIPS} (https://github.com/JAX-DIPS/JAX-DIPS), standing for differentiable interfacial PDE solver. We open sourced \texttt{JAX-DIPS} to facilitate research into use of differentiable algorithms for developing hybrid PDE solvers.
summary: We present a scalable strategy for development of mesh-free hybrid neuro-symbolic partial differential equation solvers based on existing mesh-based numerical discretization methods. Particularly, this strategy can be used to efficiently train neural network surrogate models of partial differential equations by (i) leveraging the accuracy and convergence properties of advanced numerical methods, solvers, and preconditioners, as well as (ii) better scalability to higher order PDEs by strictly limiting optimization to first order automatic differentiation. The presented neural bootstrapping method (hereby dubbed NBM) is based on evaluation of the finite discretization residuals of the PDE system obtained on implicit Cartesian cells centered on a set of random collocation points with respect to trainable parameters of the neural network. Importantly, the conservation laws and symmetries present in the bootstrapped finite discretization equations inform the neural network about solution regularities within local neighborhoods of training points. We apply NBM to the important class of elliptic problems with jump conditions across irregular interfaces in three spatial dimensions. We show the method is convergent such that model accuracy improves by increasing number of collocation points in the domain and predonditioning the residuals. We show NBM is competitive in terms of memory and training speed with other PINN-type frameworks. The algorithms presented here are implemented using \texttt{JAX} in a software package named \texttt{JAX-DIPS} (https://github.com/JAX-DIPS/JAX-DIPS), standing for differentiable interfacial PDE solver. We open sourced \texttt{JAX-DIPS} to facilitate research into use of differentiable algorithms for developing hybrid PDE solvers.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种可扩展的策略，用于基于现有的基于网格的数值离散方法开发无网格混合神经符号偏微分方程求解器。特别是，该策略可用于有效地训练偏微分方程的神经网络代理模型，方法是（i）利用先进数值方法、求解器和预处理器的准确性和收敛特性，以及（ii）通过严格限制优化到一阶自动微分来更好地扩展高阶偏微分方程。所提出的神经引导方法（在此称为 NBM）基于对 PDE 系统的有限离散残差的评估，该残差是在以一组随机搭配点为中心的隐式笛卡尔单元上获得的，与神经网络的可训练参数有关。重要的是，自举有限离散方程中存在的守恒定律和对称性告知神经网络有关训练点局部邻域内的解规律。我们将 NBM 应用于重要的一类椭圆问题，这些问题具有跨越三个空间维度的不规则界面的跳跃条件。我们证明该方法是收敛的，因此通过增加域中的搭配点数量和预处理残差来提高模型精度。我们证明 NBM 在内存和训练速度方面与其他 PINN 类型框架相比具有竞争力。这里介绍的算法是使用名为 \texttt{JAX-DIPS} (https://github.com/JAX-DIPS/JAX-DIPS) 的软件包中的 \texttt{JAX} 实现的，代表可微分界面 PDE 求解器。我们开源了 \texttt{JAX-DIPS} 来促进使用可微算法开发混合 PDE 求解器的研究。

AI.tldr: 开发一种基于神经网络的混合求解器，用于解决具有不连续性的椭圆型偏微分方程。
AI.motivation: 传统网格方法在处理不连续性及高维问题时存在局限性，需开发更高效且具可扩展性的神经符号混合求解框架。
AI.method: 提出神经引导方法（NBM），通过有限离散残差与守恒定律约束训练神经网络，结合JAX实现自动微分优化。
AI.result: 方法在三维不连续椭圆问题中收敛性良好，精度随采样点增加而提升，内存与训练速度优于其他PINN框架。
AI.conclusion: NBM有效结合数值方法与神经网络，开源工具JAX-DIPS为混合PDE求解研究提供支持。

ai_content.tldr: 开发一种基于神经网络的混合求解器，用于解决具有不连续性的椭圆型偏微分方程。

search_text: JAX-DIPS: Neural bootstrapping of finite discretization methods and application to elliptic problems with discontinuities JAX-DIPS：有限离散化方法的神经引导及其在具有不连续性的椭圆问题中的应用 We present a scalable strategy for development of mesh-free hybrid neuro-symbolic partial differential equation solvers based on existing mesh-based numerical discretization methods. Particularly, this strategy can be used to efficiently train neural network surrogate models of partial differential equations by (i) leveraging the accuracy and convergence properties of advanced numerical methods, solvers, and preconditioners, as well as (ii) better scalability to higher order PDEs by strictly limiting optimization to first order automatic differentiation. The presented neural bootstrapping method (hereby dubbed NBM) is based on evaluation of the finite discretization residuals of the PDE system obtained on implicit Cartesian cells centered on a set of random collocation points with respect to trainable parameters of the neural network. Importantly, the conservation laws and symmetries present in the bootstrapped finite discretization equations inform the neural network about solution regularities within local neighborhoods of training points. We apply NBM to the important class of elliptic problems with jump conditions across irregular interfaces in three spatial dimensions. We show the method is convergent such that model accuracy improves by increasing number of collocation points in the domain and predonditioning the residuals. We show NBM is competitive in terms of memory and training speed with other PINN-type frameworks. The algorithms presented here are implemented using \texttt{JAX} in a software package named \texttt{JAX-DIPS} (https://github.com/JAX-DIPS/JAX-DIPS), standing for differentiable interfacial PDE solver. We open sourced \texttt{JAX-DIPS} to facilitate research into use of differentiable algorithms for developing hybrid PDE solvers. 我们提出了一种可扩展的策略，用于基于现有的基于网格的数值离散方法开发无网格混合神经符号偏微分方程求解器。特别是，该策略可用于有效地训练偏微分方程的神经网络代理模型，方法是（i）利用先进数值方法、求解器和预处理器的准确性和收敛特性，以及（ii）通过严格限制优化到一阶自动微分来更好地扩展高阶偏微分方程。所提出的神经引导方法（在此称为 NBM）基于对 PDE 系统的有限离散残差的评估，该残差是在以一组随机搭配点为中心的隐式笛卡尔单元上获得的，与神经网络的可训练参数有关。重要的是，自举有限离散方程中存在的守恒定律和对称性告知神经网络有关训练点局部邻域内的解规律。我们将 NBM 应用于重要的一类椭圆问题，这些问题具有跨越三个空间维度的不规则界面的跳跃条件。我们证明该方法是收敛的，因此通过增加域中的搭配点数量和预处理残差来提高模型精度。我们证明 NBM 在内存和训练速度方面与其他 PINN 类型框架相比具有竞争力。这里介绍的算法是使用名为 \texttt{JAX-DIPS} (https://github.com/JAX-DIPS/JAX-DIPS) 的软件包中的 \texttt{JAX} 实现的，代表可微分界面 PDE 求解器。我们开源了 \texttt{JAX-DIPS} 来促进使用可微算法开发混合 PDE 求解器的研究。 开发一种基于神经网络的混合求解器，用于解决具有不连续性的椭圆型偏微分方程。 Pouria Mistani,Samira Pakravan,Rajesh Ilango,Frederic Gibou math.NA,cs.AI,cs.CE

title: Reading Between the Lines: Modeling User Behavior and Costs in AI-Assisted Programming
title_zh: 言外之意：在人工智能辅助编程中对用户行为和成本进行建模
abstract: Code-recommendation systems, such as Copilot and CodeWhisperer, have the potential to improve programmer productivity by suggesting and auto-completing code. However, to fully realize their potential, we must understand how programmers interact with these systems and identify ways to improve that interaction. To seek insights about human-AI collaboration with code recommendations systems, we studied GitHub Copilot, a code-recommendation system used by millions of programmers daily. We developed CUPS, a taxonomy of common programmer activities when interacting with Copilot. Our study of 21 programmers, who completed coding tasks and retrospectively labeled their sessions with CUPS, showed that CUPS can help us understand how programmers interact with code-recommendation systems, revealing inefficiencies and time costs. Our insights reveal how programmers interact with Copilot and motivate new interface designs and metrics.
summary: Code-recommendation systems, such as Copilot and CodeWhisperer, have the potential to improve programmer productivity by suggesting and auto-completing code. However, to fully realize their potential, we must understand how programmers interact with these systems and identify ways to improve that interaction. To seek insights about human-AI collaboration with code recommendations systems, we studied GitHub Copilot, a code-recommendation system used by millions of programmers daily. We developed CUPS, a taxonomy of common programmer activities when interacting with Copilot. Our study of 21 programmers, who completed coding tasks and retrospectively labeled their sessions with CUPS, showed that CUPS can help us understand how programmers interact with code-recommendation systems, revealing inefficiencies and time costs. Our insights reveal how programmers interact with Copilot and motivate new interface designs and metrics.
abstract_zh: 代码推荐系统（例如 Copilot 和 CodeWhisperer）可以通过建议和自动完成代码来提高程序员的工作效率。然而，为了充分发挥它们的潜力，我们必须了解程序员如何与这些系统交互，并找出改进这种交互的方法。为了深入了解人类与人工智能通过代码推荐系统进行协作的情况，我们研究了 GitHub Copilot，这是一个每天都有数百万程序员使用的代码推荐系统。我们开发了 CUPS，这是与 Copilot 交互时常见程序员活动的分类法。我们对 21 名程序员进行的研究表明，CUPS 可以帮助我们了解程序员如何与代码推荐系统交互，揭示效率低下和时间成本。我们的见解揭示了程序员如何与 Copilot 交互并激发新的界面设计和指标。

AI.tldr: 本文研究程序员与AI代码推荐系统（如GitHub Copilot）的交互行为，开发了CUPS分类法以分析用户活动并揭示效率问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管代码推荐系统能提升编程效率，但需深入理解用户交互模式及潜在改进空间，以优化系统设计和评估指标。
AI.method: 通过开发CUPS分类框架，对21名程序员完成编码任务后的会话进行回顾性标注，分析其与Copilot的交互行为。
AI.result: 研究发现程序员在使用Copilot时存在效率低下和时间成本问题，CUPS分类法有效揭示了这些交互模式。
AI.conclusion: CUPS框架为改进AI编程工具的界面设计和评估指标提供了依据，强调需关注用户行为与系统成本的平衡。

authors_text: Jue Jiang,Jun Hong,Kathryn Tringale,Marsha Reyngold,Christopher Crane,Neelam Tyagi,Harini Veeraraghavan
title: Progressively refined deep joint registration segmentation (ProRSeg) of gastrointestinal organs at risk: Application to MRI and cone-beam CT
title_zh: 危险胃肠器官的逐步精细化深度关节配准分割 (ProRSeg)：在 MRI 和锥束 CT 中的应用
comment: This manuscript is currently under review at Medical Physics
comments: This manuscript is currently under review at Medical Physics
abstract: Method: ProRSeg was trained using 5-fold cross-validation with 110 T2-weighted MRI acquired at 5 treatment fractions from 10 different patients, taking care that same patient scans were not placed in training and testing folds. Segmentation accuracy was measured using Dice similarity coefficient (DSC) and Hausdorff distance at 95th percentile (HD95). Registration consistency was measured using coefficient of variation (CV) in displacement of OARs. Ablation tests and accuracy comparisons against multiple methods were done. Finally, applicability of ProRSeg to segment cone-beam CT (CBCT) scans was evaluated on 80 scans using 5-fold cross-validation. Results: ProRSeg processed 3D volumes (128 $\times$ 192 $\times$ 128) in 3 secs on a NVIDIA Tesla V100 GPU. It's segmentations were significantly more accurate ($p<0.001$) than compared methods, achieving a DSC of 0.94 $\pm$0.02 for liver, 0.88$\pm$0.04 for large bowel, 0.78$\pm$0.03 for small bowel and 0.82$\pm$0.04 for stomach-duodenum from MRI. ProRSeg achieved a DSC of 0.72$\pm$0.01 for small bowel and 0.76$\pm$0.03 for stomach-duodenum from CBCT. ProRSeg registrations resulted in the lowest CV in displacement (stomach-duodenum $CV_{x}$: 0.75\%, $CV_{y}$: 0.73\%, and $CV_{z}$: 0.81\%; small bowel $CV_{x}$: 0.80\%, $CV_{y}$: 0.80\%, and $CV_{z}$: 0.68\%; large bowel $CV_{x}$: 0.71\%, $CV_{y}$ : 0.81\%, and $CV_{z}$: 0.75\%). ProRSeg based dose accumulation accounting for intra-fraction (pre-treatment to post-treatment MRI scan) and inter-fraction motion showed that the organ dose constraints were violated in 4 patients for stomach-duodenum and for 3 patients for small bowel. Study limitations include lack of independent testing and ground truth phantom datasets to measure dose accumulation accuracy.

Results: ProRSeg processed 3D volumes (128 $\times$ 192 $\times$ 128) in 3 secs on a NVIDIA Tesla V100 GPU. It's segmentations were significantly more accurate ($p<0.001$) than compared methods, achieving a DSC of 0.94 $\pm$0.02 for liver, 0.88$\pm$0.04 for large bowel, 0.78$\pm$0.03 for small bowel and 0.82$\pm$0.04 for stomach-duodenum from MRI. ProRSeg achieved a DSC of 0.72$\pm$0.01 for small bowel and 0.76$\pm$0.03 for stomach-duodenum from CBCT. ProRSeg registrations resulted in the lowest CV in displacement (stomach-duodenum $CV_{x}$: 0.75\%, $CV_{y}$: 0.73\%, and $CV_{z}$: 0.81\%; small bowel $CV_{x}$: 0.80\%, $CV_{y}$: 0.80\%, and $CV_{z}$: 0.68\%; large bowel $CV_{x}$: 0.71\%, $CV_{y}$ : 0.81\%, and $CV_{z}$: 0.75\%). ProRSeg based dose accumulation accounting for intra-fraction (pre-treatment to post-treatment MRI scan) and inter-fraction motion showed that the organ dose constraints were violated in 4 patients for stomach-duodenum and for 3 patients for small bowel. abstract_zh: 方法：使用 5 倍交叉验证和 110 个 T2 加权 MRI 来训练 ProRSeg，这些 MRI 在 10 个不同患者的 5 个治疗阶段采集，注意不要将相同患者的扫描放在训练和测试折叠中。使用 Dice 相似系数 (DSC) 和第 95 个百分位处的 Hausdorff 距离 (HD95) 来测量分割精度。使用 OAR 位移的变异系数 (CV) 来测量配准一致性。进行了消融测试并与多种方法进行了准确性比较。最后，使用 5 倍交叉验证对 80 次扫描进行了 ProRSeg 分段锥形束 CT (CBCT) 扫描的适用性评估。结果：ProRSeg 在 NVIDIA Tesla V100 GPU 上 3 秒内处理了 3D 体积（128 $\times$ 192 $\times$ 128）。与比较方法相比，它的分割明显更准确（$p<0.001$），从 MRI 来看，肝脏的 DSC 为 0.94 $\pm$0.02，大肠为 0.88$\pm$0.04，小肠为 0.78$\pm$0.03，胃十二指肠为 0.82$\pm$0.04。根据 CBCT，ProRSeg 小肠的 DSC 为 0.72$\pm$0.01，胃十二指肠的 DSC 为 0.76$\pm$0.03。 ProRSeg 注册导致位移中的 CV 最低（胃十二指肠 $CV_{x}$：0.75\%、$CV_{y}$：0.73\% 和 $CV_{z}$：0.81\%；小肠 $CV_{x}$：0.80\%、$CV_{y}$：0.80\% 和 $CV_{z}$： 0.68\%；大肠$CV_{x}$：0.71\%，$CV_{y}$：0.81\%，$CV_{z}$：0.75\%)。基于 ProRSeg 的剂量累积考虑了分次内（治疗前到治疗后 MRI 扫描）和分次间运动，结果显示 4 名胃十二指肠患者和 3 名小肠患者违反了器官剂量限制。研究局限性包括缺乏独立测试和地面真实模型数据集来测量剂量累积准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ProRSeg的深度学习方法，用于对胃肠道器官进行联合配准和分割，并将其应用于MRI和CBCT图像。
AI.motivation: 在放射治疗中，准确的器官分割和配准对于剂量计算和治疗计划至关重要。然而，传统方法在处理胃肠道器官时存在挑战，尤其是在MRI和CBCT图像上。
AI.method: ProRSeg使用5折交叉验证进行训练，基于10名患者在5次治疗分割中获取的110个T2加权MRI图像。分割精度通过Dice相似系数（DSC）和95百分位Hausdorff距离（HD95）进行评估，配准一致性通过位移的变异系数（CV）进行评估。此外，还评估了ProRSeg在CBCT图像上的适用性。
AI.result: ProRSeg在MRI图像上实现了较高的分割精度（例如肝脏DSC为0.94±0.02），并在CBCT图像上也表现出良好的性能（如小肠DSC为0.72±0.01）。配准结果的CV值较低，表明其稳定性较好。然而，剂量累积分析显示，部分患者的器官剂量约束被违反。
AI.conclusion: ProRSeg在胃肠道器官的联合配准和分割任务中表现出色，但其在剂量累积准确性方面的验证仍需进一步独立测试和真实数据集的支持。

ai_content_json.method: ProRSeg使用5折交叉验证进行训练，基于10名患者在5次治疗分割中获取的110个T2加权MRI图像。分割精度通过Dice相似系数（DSC）和95百分位Hausdorff距离（HD95）进行评估，配准一致性通过位移的变异系数（CV）进行评估。此外，还评估了ProRSeg在CBCT图像上的适用性。
ai_content_json.result: ProRSeg在MRI图像上实现了较高的分割精度（例如肝脏DSC为0.94±0.02），并在CBCT图像上也表现出良好的性能（如小肠DSC为0.72±0.01）。配准结果的CV值较低，表明其稳定性较好。然而，剂量累积分析显示，部分患者的器官剂量约束被违反。
ai_content_json.conclusion: ProRSeg在胃肠道器官的联合配准和分割任务中表现出色，但其在剂量累积准确性方面的验证仍需进一步独立测试和真实数据集的支持。

tldr: 本文提出了一种名为ProRSeg的深度学习方法，用于对胃肠道器官进行联合配准和分割，并将其应用于MRI和CBCT图像。
motivation: 在放射治疗中，准确的器官分割和配准对于剂量计算和治疗计划至关重要。然而，传统方法在处理胃肠道器官时存在挑战，尤其是在MRI和CBCT图像上。
method: ProRSeg使用5折交叉验证进行训练，基于10名患者在5次治疗分割中获取的110个T2加权MRI图像。分割精度通过Dice相似系数（DSC）和95百分位Hausdorff距离（HD95）进行评估，配准一致性通过位移的变异系数（CV）进行评估。此外，还评估了ProRSeg在CBCT图像上的适用性。
result: ProRSeg在MRI图像上实现了较高的分割精度（例如肝脏DSC为0.94±0.02），并在CBCT图像上也表现出良好的性能（如小肠DSC为0.72±0.01）。配准结果的CV值较低，表明其稳定性较好。然而，剂量累积分析显示，部分患者的器官剂量约束被违反。
conclusion: ProRSeg在胃肠道器官的联合配准和分割任务中表现出色，但其在剂量累积准确性方面的验证仍需进一步独立测试和真实数据集的支持。
search_text: Progressively refined deep joint registration segmentation (ProRSeg) of gastrointestinal organs at risk: Application to MRI and cone-beam CT 危险胃肠器官的逐步精细化深度关节配准分割 (ProRSeg)：在 MRI 和锥束 CT 中的应用 Method: ProRSeg was trained using 5-fold cross-validation with 110 T2-weighted MRI acquired at 5 treatment fractions from 10 different patients, taking care that same patient scans were not placed in training and testing folds. Segmentation accuracy was measured using Dice similarity coefficient (DSC) and Hausdorff distance at 95th percentile (HD95). Registration consistency was measured using coefficient of variation (CV) in displacement of OARs. Ablation tests and accuracy comparisons against multiple methods were done. Finally, applicability of ProRSeg to segment cone-beam CT (CBCT) scans was evaluated on 80 scans using 5-fold cross-validation. Results: ProRSeg processed 3D volumes (128 $\times$ 192 $\times$ 128) in 3 secs on a NVIDIA Tesla V100 GPU. It's segmentations were significantly more accurate ($p<0.001$) than compared methods, achieving a DSC of 0.94 $\pm$0.02 for liver, 0.88$\pm$0.04 for large bowel, 0.78$\pm$0.03 for small bowel and 0.82$\pm$0.04 for stomach-duodenum from MRI. ProRSeg achieved a DSC of 0.72$\pm$0.01 for small bowel and 0.76$\pm$0.03 for stomach-duodenum from CBCT. ProRSeg registrations resulted in the lowest CV in displacement (stomach-duodenum $CV_{x}$: 0.75\%, $CV_{y}$: 0.73\%, and $CV_{z}$: 0.81\%; small bowel $CV_{x}$: 0.80\%, $CV_{y}$: 0.80\%, and $CV_{z}$: 0.68\%; large bowel $CV_{x}$: 0.71\%, $CV_{y}$ : 0.81\%, and $CV_{z}$: 0.75\%). ProRSeg based dose accumulation accounting for intra-fraction (pre-treatment to post-treatment MRI scan) and inter-fraction motion showed that the organ dose constraints were violated in 4 patients for stomach-duodenum and for 3 patients for small bowel. Study limitations include lack of independent testing and ground truth phantom datasets to measure dose accumulation accuracy. 方法：使用 5 倍交叉验证和 110 个 T2 加权 MRI 来训练 ProRSeg，这些 MRI 在 10 个不同患者的 5 个治疗阶段采集，注意不要将相同患者的扫描放在训练和测试折叠中。使用 Dice 相似系数 (DSC) 和第 95 个百分位处的 Hausdorff 距离 (HD95) 来测量分割精度。使用 OAR 位移的变异系数 (CV) 来测量配准一致性。进行了消融测试并与多种方法进行了准确性比较。最后，使用 5 倍交叉验证对 80 次扫描进行了 ProRSeg 分段锥形束 CT (CBCT) 扫描的适用性评估。结果：ProRSeg 在 NVIDIA Tesla V100 GPU 上 3 秒内处理了 3D 体积（128 $\times$ 192 $\times$ 128）。与比较方法相比，它的分割明显更准确（$p<0.001$），从 MRI 来看，肝脏的 DSC 为 0.94 $\pm$0.02，大肠为 0.88$\pm$0.04，小肠为 0.78$\pm$0.03，胃十二指肠为 0.82$\pm$0.04。根据 CBCT，ProRSeg 小肠的 DSC 为 0.72$\pm$0.01，胃十二指肠的 DSC 为 0.76$\pm$0.03。 ProRSeg 注册导致位移中的 CV 最低（胃十二指肠 $CV_{x}$：0.75\%、$CV_{y}$：0.73\% 和 $CV_{z}$：0.81\%；小肠 $CV_{x}$：0.80\%、$CV_{y}$：0.80\% 和 $CV_{z}$： 0.68\%；大肠$CV_{x}$：0.71\%，$CV_{y}$：0.81\%，$CV_{z}$：0.75\%)。基于 ProRSeg 的剂量累积考虑了分次内（治疗前到治疗后 MRI 扫描）和分次间运动，结果显示 4 名胃十二指肠患者和 3 名小肠患者违反了器官剂量限制。研究局限性包括缺乏独立测试和地面真实模型数据集来测量剂量累积准确性。 本文提出了一种名为ProRSeg的深度学习方法，用于对胃肠道器官进行联合配准和分割，并将其应用于MRI和CBCT图像。 Jue Jiang,Jun Hong,Kathryn Tringale,Marsha Reyngold,Christopher Crane,Neelam Tyagi,Harini Veeraraghavan eess.IV,cs.CV

title: Cross-View Image Sequence Geo-localization
title_zh: 跨视图图像序列地理定位
abstract: Cross-view geo-localization aims to estimate the GPS location of a query ground-view image by matching it to images from a reference database of geo-tagged aerial images. To address this challenging problem, recent approaches use panoramic ground-view images to increase the range of visibility. Although appealing, panoramic images are not readily available compared to the videos of limited Field-Of-View (FOV) images. In this paper, we present the first cross-view geo-localization method that works on a sequence of limited FOV images. Our model is trained end-to-end to capture the temporal structure that lies within the frames using the attention-based temporal feature aggregation module. To robustly tackle different sequences length and GPS noises during inference, we propose to use a sequential dropout scheme to simulate variant length sequences. To evaluate the proposed approach in realistic settings, we present a new large-scale dataset containing ground-view sequences along with the corresponding aerial-view images. Extensive experiments and comparisons demonstrate the superiority of the proposed approach compared to several competitive baselines.
summary: Cross-view geo-localization aims to estimate the GPS location of a query ground-view image by matching it to images from a reference database of geo-tagged aerial images. To address this challenging problem, recent approaches use panoramic ground-view images to increase the range of visibility. Although appealing, panoramic images are not readily available compared to the videos of limited Field-Of-View (FOV) images. In this paper, we present the first cross-view geo-localization method that works on a sequence of limited FOV images. Our model is trained end-to-end to capture the temporal structure that lies within the frames using the attention-based temporal feature aggregation module. To robustly tackle different sequences length and GPS noises during inference, we propose to use a sequential dropout scheme to simulate variant length sequences. To evaluate the proposed approach in realistic settings, we present a new large-scale dataset containing ground-view sequences along with the corresponding aerial-view images. Extensive experiments and comparisons demonstrate the superiority of the proposed approach compared to several competitive baselines.
abstract_zh: 跨视图地理定位旨在通过将查询地面视图图像与地理标记航空图像参考数据库中的图像进行匹配来估计其 GPS 位置。为了解决这个具有挑战性的问题，最近的方法使用全景地景图像来增加可见范围。尽管全景图像很有吸引力，但与有限视场 (FOV) 图像的视频相比，全景图像并不容易获得。在本文中，我们提出了第一个适用于有限视场图像序列的跨视图地理定位方法。我们的模型经过端到端训练，以使用基于注意力的时间特征聚合模块捕获帧内的时间结构。为了在推理过程中稳健地处理不同的序列长度和 GPS 噪声，我们建议使用顺序 dropout 方案来模拟不同长度的序列。为了在现实环境中评估所提出的方法，我们提出了一个新的大规模数据集，其中包含地面视图序列以及相应的鸟瞰图像。大量的实验和比较证明了所提出的方法与几个竞争基线相比的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于有限视场角图像序列的跨视角地理定位方法，通过匹配地面视角图像序列与航拍图像来估计GPS位置。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖全景图像但实际获取困难，而有限视场角视频序列更易获得。需解决序列长度差异和GPS噪声问题，并验证方法在真实场景下的有效性。
AI.method: 设计端到端模型，采用基于注意力机制的时序特征聚合模块捕捉帧间关系，并引入序列丢弃方案模拟不同长度序列以增强鲁棒性。同时构建包含地面序列与航拍图像的大规模数据集。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多个基准测试中优于现有方法，尤其在处理有限视场角视频序列和GPS噪声场景下表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的时序特征聚合与序列丢弃方案有效提升了跨视角地理定位性能，为实际应用提供了更实用的解决方案。

title: Refining Action Boundaries for One-stage Detection
title_zh: 细化一级检测的行动边界
comment: Accepted to AVSS 2022. Our code is available at https://github.com/hanielwang/Refining_Boundary_Head.git
comments: Accepted to AVSS 2022. Our code is available at https://github.com/hanielwang/Refining_Boundary_Head.git
abstract: Current one-stage action detection methods, which simultaneously predict action boundaries and the corresponding class, do not estimate or use a measure of confidence in their boundary predictions, which can lead to inaccurate boundaries. We incorporate the estimation of boundary confidence into one-stage anchor-free detection, through an additional prediction head that predicts the refined boundaries with higher confidence. We obtain state-of-the-art performance on the challenging EPIC-KITCHENS-100 action detection as well as the standard THUMOS14 action detection benchmarks, and achieve improvement on the ActivityNet-1.3 benchmark.
summary: Current one-stage action detection methods, which simultaneously predict action boundaries and the corresponding class, do not estimate or use a measure of confidence in their boundary predictions, which can lead to inaccurate boundaries. We incorporate the estimation of boundary confidence into one-stage anchor-free detection, through an additional prediction head that predicts the refined boundaries with higher confidence. We obtain state-of-the-art performance on the challenging EPIC-KITCHENS-100 action detection as well as the standard THUMOS14 action detection benchmarks, and achieve improvement on the ActivityNet-1.3 benchmark.
abstract_zh: 当前的单阶段动作检测方法同时预测动作边界和相应的类别，不会估计或使用其边界预测的置信度度量，这可能导致边界不准确。我们通过额外的预测头将边界置信度的估计纳入一级无锚检测中，该预测头以更高的置信度预测细化边界。我们在具有挑战性的 EPIC-KITCHENS-100 动作检测以及标准 THUMOS14 动作检测基准上获得了最先进的性能，并在 ActivityNet-1.3 基准上实现了改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进一阶段动作检测中动作边界预测的方法，通过引入边界置信度估计提升检测准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有的一阶段动作检测方法在预测动作边界时缺乏置信度评估，导致边界定位不精确。
AI.method: 在anchor-free的一阶段检测框架中增加额外预测头，专门用于估计并优化动作边界置信度。
AI.result: 在EPIC-KITCHENS-100、THUMOS14和ActivityNet-1.3基准测试中均取得优于现有方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模边界置信度，可有效提升一阶段动作检测的边界预测精度与整体检测性能。

search_text: Refining Action Boundaries for One-stage Detection 细化一级检测的行动边界 Current one-stage action detection methods, which simultaneously predict action boundaries and the corresponding class, do not estimate or use a measure of confidence in their boundary predictions, which can lead to inaccurate boundaries. We incorporate the estimation of boundary confidence into one-stage anchor-free detection, through an additional prediction head that predicts the refined boundaries with higher confidence. We obtain state-of-the-art performance on the challenging EPIC-KITCHENS-100 action detection as well as the standard THUMOS14 action detection benchmarks, and achieve improvement on the ActivityNet-1.3 benchmark. 当前的单阶段动作检测方法同时预测动作边界和相应的类别，不会估计或使用其边界预测的置信度度量，这可能导致边界不准确。我们通过额外的预测头将边界置信度的估计纳入一级无锚检测中，该预测头以更高的置信度预测细化边界。我们在具有挑战性的 EPIC-KITCHENS-100 动作检测以及标准 THUMOS14 动作检测基准上获得了最先进的性能，并在 ActivityNet-1.3 基准上实现了改进。 本文提出一种改进一阶段动作检测中动作边界预测的方法，通过引入边界置信度估计提升检测准确性。 Hanyuan Wang,Majid Mirmehdi,Dima Damen,Toby Perrett cs.CV

title: Accelerating Certified Robustness Training via Knowledge Transfer
title_zh: 通过知识转移加速认证稳健性培训
abstract: Training deep neural network classifiers that are certifiably robust against adversarial attacks is critical to ensuring the security and reliability of AI-controlled systems. Although numerous state-of-the-art certified training methods have been developed, they are computationally expensive and scale poorly with respect to both dataset and network complexity. Widespread usage of certified training is further hindered by the fact that periodic retraining is necessary to incorporate new data and network improvements. In this paper, we propose Certified Robustness Transfer (CRT), a general-purpose framework for reducing the computational overhead of any certifiably robust training method through knowledge transfer. Given a robust teacher, our framework uses a novel training loss to transfer the teacher's robustness to the student. We provide theoretical and empirical validation of CRT. Our experiments on CIFAR-10 show that CRT speeds up certified robustness training by $8 \times$ on average across three different architecture generations while achieving comparable robustness to state-of-the-art methods. We also show that CRT can scale to large-scale datasets like ImageNet.
summary: Training deep neural network classifiers that are certifiably robust against adversarial attacks is critical to ensuring the security and reliability of AI-controlled systems. Although numerous state-of-the-art certified training methods have been developed, they are computationally expensive and scale poorly with respect to both dataset and network complexity. Widespread usage of certified training is further hindered by the fact that periodic retraining is necessary to incorporate new data and network improvements. In this paper, we propose Certified Robustness Transfer (CRT), a general-purpose framework for reducing the computational overhead of any certifiably robust training method through knowledge transfer. Given a robust teacher, our framework uses a novel training loss to transfer the teacher's robustness to the student. We provide theoretical and empirical validation of CRT. Our experiments on CIFAR-10 show that CRT speeds up certified robustness training by $8 \times$ on average across three different architecture generations while achieving comparable robustness to state-of-the-art methods. We also show that CRT can scale to large-scale datasets like ImageNet.
abstract_zh: 训练可证明对对抗性攻击具有鲁棒性的深度神经网络分类器对于确保人工智能控制系统的安全性和可靠性至关重要。尽管已经开发了许多最先进的认证训练方法，但它们的计算成本很高，并且在数据集和网络复杂性方面扩展性较差。由于需要定期进行再培训以纳入新数据和网络改进，这一事实进一步阻碍了认证培训的广泛使用。在本文中，我们提出了经过认证的鲁棒性迁移（CRT），这是一种通用框架，用于通过知识迁移来减少任何可证明鲁棒性训练方法的计算开销。给定一个强大的老师，我们的框架使用一种新颖的训练损失将老师的稳健性转移给学生。我们提供 CRT 的理论和实证验证。我们在 CIFAR-10 上的实验表明，CRT 在三个不同的架构代中平均将经过认证的鲁棒性训练速度提高了 8 美元，同时实现了与最先进方法相当的鲁棒性。我们还展示了 CRT 可以扩展到 ImageNet 等大规模数据集。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过知识迁移加速认证鲁棒性训练的方法CRT，解决现有方法计算成本高、扩展性差的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有认证鲁棒训练方法计算开销大且难以扩展，且需频繁重训练以适应新数据和网络改进，阻碍了实际应用。
AI.method: 设计Certified Robustness Transfer（CRT）框架，利用教师模型的鲁棒性通过新型训练损失函数迁移至学生模型。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10上实现平均8倍加速且鲁棒性与SOTA方法相当，并成功扩展至ImageNet等大规模数据集。
AI.conclusion: CRT有效降低认证训练计算开销，为大规模安全AI系统提供高效训练方案。

title: Learning in Multi-Player Stochastic Games
title_zh: 在多人随机游戏中学习
abstract: We consider the problem of simultaneous learning in stochastic games with many players in the finite-horizon setting. While the typical target solution for a stochastic game is a Nash equilibrium, this is intractable with many players. We instead focus on variants of {\it correlated equilibria}, such as those studied for extensive-form games. We begin with a hardness result for the adversarial MDP problem: even for a horizon of 3, obtaining sublinear regret against the best non-stationary policy is \textsf{NP}-hard when both rewards and transitions are adversarial. This implies that convergence to even the weakest natural solution concept -- normal-form coarse correlated equilbrium -- is not possible via black-box reduction to a no-regret algorithm even in stochastic games with constant horizon (unless $\textsf{NP}\subseteq\textsf{BPP}$). Instead, we turn to a different target: algorithms which {\it generate} an equilibrium when they are used by all players. Our main result is algorithm which generates an {\it extensive-form} correlated equilibrium, whose runtime is exponential in the horizon but polynomial in all other parameters. We give a similar algorithm which is polynomial in all parameters for "fast-mixing" stochastic games. We also show a method for efficiently reaching normal-form coarse correlated equilibria in "single-controller" stochastic games which follows the traditional no-regret approach. When shared randomness is available, the two generative algorithms can be extended to give simultaneous regret bounds and converge in the traditional sense.
summary: We consider the problem of simultaneous learning in stochastic games with many players in the finite-horizon setting. While the typical target solution for a stochastic game is a Nash equilibrium, this is intractable with many players. We instead focus on variants of {\it correlated equilibria}, such as those studied for extensive-form games. We begin with a hardness result for the adversarial MDP problem: even for a horizon of 3, obtaining sublinear regret against the best non-stationary policy is \textsf{NP}-hard when both rewards and transitions are adversarial. This implies that convergence to even the weakest natural solution concept -- normal-form coarse correlated equilbrium -- is not possible via black-box reduction to a no-regret algorithm even in stochastic games with constant horizon (unless $\textsf{NP}\subseteq\textsf{BPP}$). Instead, we turn to a different target: algorithms which {\it generate} an equilibrium when they are used by all players. Our main result is algorithm which generates an {\it extensive-form} correlated equilibrium, whose runtime is exponential in the horizon but polynomial in all other parameters. We give a similar algorithm which is polynomial in all parameters for "fast-mixing" stochastic games. We also show a method for efficiently reaching normal-form coarse correlated equilibria in "single-controller" stochastic games which follows the traditional no-regret approach. When shared randomness is available, the two generative algorithms can be extended to give simultaneous regret bounds and converge in the traditional sense.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑在有限范围设置中许多玩家的随机游戏中同时学习的问题。虽然随机博弈的典型目标解决方案是纳什均衡，但这对许多玩家来说是棘手的。相反，我们关注{\相关均衡}的变体，例如针对扩展形式博弈研究的变体。我们从对抗性 MDP 问题的硬度结果开始：即使对于范围为 3 的情况，当奖励和转换都是对抗性时，针对最佳非平稳策略获得次线性遗憾也是 \textsf{NP}-困难的。这意味着，即使在具有恒定视野的随机博弈中，通过黑盒简化为无遗憾算法，也无法收敛到最弱的自然解概念——正态粗相关平衡（除非$\textsf{NP}\subseteq\textsf{BPP}$）。相反，我们转向一个不同的目标：当所有玩家使用它们时，算法会产生平衡。我们的主要结果是生成一个{\it广泛形式}相关平衡的算法，其运行时间在范围内是指数的，但在所有其他参数中是多项式的。我们给出了一个类似的算法，它对于“快速混合”随机游戏的所有参数都是多项式。我们还展示了一种在“单控制器”随机博弈中有效达到正态粗相关均衡的方法，该方法遵循传统的无悔方法。当共享随机性可用时，这两种生成算法可以扩展以同时给出遗憾界限并在传统意义上收敛。

AI.tldr: 本文研究多玩家随机博弈中的同步学习问题，提出在有限时间范围内生成相关均衡的算法，并分析其计算复杂性。
AI.motivation: 传统纳什均衡在多玩家场景下计算复杂度过高，而相关均衡提供了更可行的解决方案。作者指出对抗性MDP问题的困难性，证明现有方法无法达到弱均衡概念，需探索新算法。
AI.method: 提出生成扩展形式相关均衡的指数时间算法，针对快速混合博弈设计多项式时间算法，并通过无遗憾方法解决单控制器博弈。利用共享随机性实现同时遗憾界。
AI.result: 证明对抗性MDP问题的次线性遗憾目标是NP难的；设计生成相关均衡的算法，其时间复杂度在水平线性增长但其他参数多项式；对特定博弈类型实现多项式时间解决方案。
AI.conclusion: 多玩家随机博弈的均衡学习需依赖博弈结构特性，相关均衡生成算法在计算可行性与均衡质量间取得平衡，为实际应用提供理论支持。

authors_text: Tingwei Wang,Da Li,Kaiyang Zhou,Tao Xiang,Yi-Zhe Song
title: Learning to Augment via Implicit Differentiation for Domain Generalization
title_zh: 学习通过隐式微分来增强领域泛化
abstract: Machine learning models are intrinsically vulnerable to domain shift between training and testing data, resulting in poor performance in novel domains. Domain generalization (DG) aims to overcome the problem by leveraging multiple source domains to learn a domain-generalizable model. In this paper, we propose a novel augmentation-based DG approach, dubbed AugLearn. Different from existing data augmentation methods, our AugLearn views a data augmentation module as hyper-parameters of a classification model and optimizes the module together with the model via meta-learning. Specifically, at each training step, AugLearn (i) divides source domains into a pseudo source and a pseudo target set, and (ii) trains the augmentation module in such a way that the augmented (synthetic) images can make the model generalize well on the pseudo target set. Moreover, to overcome the expensive second-order gradient computation during meta-learning, we formulate an efficient joint training algorithm, for both the augmentation module and the classification model, based on the implicit function theorem. With the flexibility of augmenting data in both time and frequency spaces, AugLearn shows effectiveness on three standard DG benchmarks, PACS, Office-Home and Digits-DG.
summary: Machine learning models are intrinsically vulnerable to domain shift between training and testing data, resulting in poor performance in novel domains. Domain generalization (DG) aims to overcome the problem by leveraging multiple source domains to learn a domain-generalizable model. In this paper, we propose a novel augmentation-based DG approach, dubbed AugLearn. Different from existing data augmentation methods, our AugLearn views a data augmentation module as hyper-parameters of a classification model and optimizes the module together with the model via meta-learning. Specifically, at each training step, AugLearn (i) divides source domains into a pseudo source and a pseudo target set, and (ii) trains the augmentation module in such a way that the augmented (synthetic) images can make the model generalize well on the pseudo target set. Moreover, to overcome the expensive second-order gradient computation during meta-learning, we formulate an efficient joint training algorithm, for both the augmentation module and the classification model, based on the implicit function theorem. With the flexibility of augmenting data in both time and frequency spaces, AugLearn shows effectiveness on three standard DG benchmarks, PACS, Office-Home and Digits-DG.
abstract_zh: 机器学习模型本质上很容易受到训练和测试数据之间领域转换的影响，从而导致新领域的性能不佳。域泛化（DG）旨在通过利用多个源域来学习域泛化模型来克服该问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的基于增强的 DG 方法，称为 AugLearn。与现有的数据增强方法不同，我们的 AugLearn 将数据增强模块视为分类模型的超参数，并通过元学习将该模块与模型一起优化。具体来说，在每个训练步骤中，AugLearn (i) 将源域划分为伪源和伪目标集，并且 (ii) 以增强（合成）图像可以使模型在伪目标集上很好地泛化的方式训练增强模块。此外，为了克服元学习期间昂贵的二阶梯度计算，我们基于隐函数定理为增强模块和分类模型制定了一种有效的联合训练算法。凭借在时间和频率空间中增强数据的灵活性，AugLearn 在三个标准 DG 基准（PACS、Office-Home 和 Digits-DG）上显示了有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于隐式微分的域泛化方法AugLearn，通过元学习优化数据增强模块以提升模型在新域中的性能。
AI.motivation: 机器学习模型在训练与测试域存在差异时表现不佳，现有数据增强方法难以有效应对域偏移问题。
AI.method: 将数据增强模块视为分类模型的超参数，通过元学习联合优化模型与增强模块，并利用隐函数定理设计高效训练算法，支持时频域数据增强。
AI.result: 在PACS、Office-Home和Digits-DG三个基准数据集上验证了方法的有效性，显著提升域泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: AugLearn通过元学习与隐式微分结合，实现了灵活高效的数据增强策略，为域泛化问题提供了新思路。

authors_text: Youngin Cho,Junsoo Lee,Soyoung Yang,Juntae Kim,Yeojeong Park,Haneol Lee,Mohammad Azam Khan,Daesik Kim,Jaegul Choo
title: Guiding Users to Where to Give Color Hints for Efficient Interactive Sketch Colorization via Unsupervised Region Prioritization
title_zh: 通过无监督区域优先级划分，引导用户在何处提供颜色提示，以实现高效的交互式草图着色
abstract: Existing deep interactive colorization models have focused on ways to utilize various types of interactions, such as point-wise color hints, scribbles, or natural-language texts, as methods to reflect a user's intent at runtime. However, another approach, which actively informs the user of the most effective regions to give hints for sketch image colorization, has been under-explored. This paper proposes a novel model-guided deep interactive colorization framework that reduces the required amount of user interactions, by prioritizing the regions in a colorization model. Our method, called GuidingPainter, prioritizes these regions where the model most needs a color hint, rather than just relying on the user's manual decision on where to give a color hint. In our extensive experiments, we show that our approach outperforms existing interactive colorization methods in terms of the conventional metrics, such as PSNR and FID, and reduces required amount of interactions.
summary: Existing deep interactive colorization models have focused on ways to utilize various types of interactions, such as point-wise color hints, scribbles, or natural-language texts, as methods to reflect a user's intent at runtime. However, another approach, which actively informs the user of the most effective regions to give hints for sketch image colorization, has been under-explored. This paper proposes a novel model-guided deep interactive colorization framework that reduces the required amount of user interactions, by prioritizing the regions in a colorization model. Our method, called GuidingPainter, prioritizes these regions where the model most needs a color hint, rather than just relying on the user's manual decision on where to give a color hint. In our extensive experiments, we show that our approach outperforms existing interactive colorization methods in terms of the conventional metrics, such as PSNR and FID, and reduces required amount of interactions.
abstract_zh: 现有的深度交互式着色模型侧重于利用各种类型的交互的方法，例如逐点颜色提示、涂鸦或自然语言文本，作为在运行时反映用户意图的方法。然而，另一种方法尚未得到充分探索，该方法主动告知用户最有效的区域以提供草图图像着色提示。本文提出了一种新颖的模型引导的深度交互着色框架，通过优先考虑着色模型中的区域来减少所需的用户交互量。我们的方法称为 GuidingPainter，优先考虑模型最需要颜色提示的这些区域，而不是仅仅依赖于用户手动决定在何处给出颜色提示。在我们广泛的实验中，我们表明我们的方法在传统指标（例如 PSNR 和 FID）方面优于现有的交互式着色方法，并且减少了所需的交互量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为GuidingPainter的新型深度交互式着色框架，通过无监督区域优先化指导用户在何处提供颜色提示，以提高交互式草图着色的效率。
AI.motivation: 现有的深度交互式着色模型主要关注如何利用各种交互方式来表达用户意图，但较少关注如何主动告知用户在哪些区域提供颜色提示最为有效。
AI.method: 本文提出的方法通过模型引导，优先化那些最需要颜色提示的区域，而不是单纯依赖用户手动决定颜色提示的位置。
AI.result: 在广泛的实验中，该方法在PSNR和FID等传统指标上优于现有的交互式着色方法，并减少了所需的交互次数。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的方法通过模型引导的区域优先化策略，显著提升了交互式草图着色的效率和效果。
