title: Isomorphic mesh generation from point clouds with multilayer perceptrons
title_zh: 使用多层感知器从点云生成同构网格
abstract: We propose a new neural network, called isomorphic mesh generator (iMG), which generates isomorphic meshes from point clouds containing noise and missing parts. Isomorphic meshes of arbitrary objects have a unified mesh structure even though the objects belong to different classes. This unified representation enables surface models to be handled by DNNs. Moreover, the unified mesh structure of isomorphic meshes enables the same process to be applied to all isomorphic meshes; although in the case of general mesh models, we need to consider the processes depending on their mesh structures. Therefore, the use of isomorphic meshes leads to efficient memory usage and calculation time compared with general mesh models. As iMG is a data-free method, preparing any point clouds as training data in advance is unnecessary, except a point cloud of the target object used as the input data of iMG. Additionally, iMG outputs an isomorphic mesh obtained by mapping a reference mesh to a given input point cloud. To estimate the mapping function stably, we introduce a step-by-step mapping strategy. This strategy achieves a flexible deformation while maintaining the structure of the reference mesh. From simulation and experiments using a mobile phone, we confirmed that iMG can generate isomorphic meshes of given objects reliably even when the input point cloud includes noise and missing parts.
summary: We propose a new neural network, called isomorphic mesh generator (iMG), which generates isomorphic meshes from point clouds containing noise and missing parts. Isomorphic meshes of arbitrary objects have a unified mesh structure even though the objects belong to different classes. This unified representation enables surface models to be handled by DNNs. Moreover, the unified mesh structure of isomorphic meshes enables the same process to be applied to all isomorphic meshes; although in the case of general mesh models, we need to consider the processes depending on their mesh structures. Therefore, the use of isomorphic meshes leads to efficient memory usage and calculation time compared with general mesh models. As iMG is a data-free method, preparing any point clouds as training data in advance is unnecessary, except a point cloud of the target object used as the input data of iMG. Additionally, iMG outputs an isomorphic mesh obtained by mapping a reference mesh to a given input point cloud. To estimate the mapping function stably, we introduce a step-by-step mapping strategy. This strategy achieves a flexible deformation while maintaining the structure of the reference mesh. From simulation and experiments using a mobile phone, we confirmed that iMG can generate isomorphic meshes of given objects reliably even when the input point cloud includes noise and missing parts.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的神经网络，称为同构网格生成器（iMG），它从包含噪声和缺失部分的点云生成同构网格。任意对象的同构网格具有统一的网格结构，即使对象属于不同的类。这种统一的表示使得表面模型能够由 DNN 处理。而且，同构网格的统一网格结构使得相同的过程可以应用于所有同构网格；尽管在一般网格模型的情况下，我们需要根据其网格结构来考虑过程。因此，与一般网格模型相比，使用同构网格可以实现高效的内存使用和计算时间。由于iMG是一种无数据方法，因此除了用作iMG的输入数据的目标物体的点云之外，不需要预先准备任何点云作为训练数据。此外，iMG 输出通过将参考网格映射到给定输入点云而获得的同构网格。为了稳定地估计映射函数，我们引入了逐步映射策略。该策略在保持参考网格结构的同时实现了灵活的变形。通过使用手机进行的模拟和实验，我们证实即使输入点云包含噪声和缺失部分，iMG 也可以可靠地生成给定对象的同构网格。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为iMG的神经网络，用于从包含噪声和缺失部分的点云中生成统一结构的同构网格。
AI.motivation: 传统网格模型因结构差异需定制化处理，导致内存和计算效率低下；而同构网格的统一结构可简化深度学习处理流程。
AI.method: 采用数据无关方法，通过将参考网格逐步映射到输入点云，结合分步映射策略保持网格结构稳定性并实现灵活变形。
AI.result: 实验表明，iMG在手机端测试中能可靠生成含噪声或缺失部分点云的同构网格，验证了其鲁棒性与有效性。
AI.conclusion: iMG通过统一网格结构和分步映射策略，实现了高效、可靠的点云到网格转换，适用于复杂场景下的表面建模。

authors_text: Lei Zhang,Xiaoke Wang,Michael Rawson,Radu Balan,Edward H. Herskovits,Elias Melhem,Linda Chang,Ze Wang,Thomas Ernst
title: Motion correction in MRI using deep learning and a novel hybrid loss function
title_zh: 使用深度学习和新型混合损失函数进行 MRI 运动校正
abstract: Purpose To develop and evaluate a deep learning-based method (MC-Net) to suppress motion artifacts in brain magnetic resonance imaging (MRI). Methods MC-Net was derived from a UNet combined with a two-stage multi-loss function. T1-weighted axial brain images contaminated with synthetic motions were used to train the network. Evaluation used simulated T1 and T2-weighted axial, coronal, and sagittal images unseen during training, as well as T1-weighted images with motion artifacts from real scans. Performance indices included the peak signal to noise ratio (PSNR), structural similarity index measure (SSIM), and visual reading scores. Two clinical readers scored the images. Results The MC-Net outperformed other methods implemented in terms of PSNR and SSIM on the T1 axial test set. The MC-Net significantly improved the quality of all T1-weighted images (for all directions and for simulated as well as real motion artifacts), both on quantitative measures and visual scores. However, the MC-Net performed poorly on images of untrained contrast (T2-weighted). Conclusion The proposed two-stage multi-loss MC-Net can effectively suppress motion artifacts in brain MRI without compromising image context. Given the efficiency of the MC-Net (single image processing time ~40ms), it can potentially be used in real clinical settings. To facilitate further research, the code and trained model are available at https://github.com/MRIMoCo/DL_Motion_Correction.

Methods MC-Net was derived from a UNet combined with a two-stage multi-loss function. T1-weighted axial brain images contaminated with synthetic motions were used to train the network. Conclusion The proposed two-stage multi-loss MC-Net can effectively suppress motion artifacts in brain MRI without compromising image context. Given the efficiency of the MC-Net (single image processing time ~40ms), it can potentially be used in real clinical settings. To facilitate further research, the code and trained model are available at https://github.com/MRIMoCo/DL_Motion_Correction.
abstract_zh: 目的开发和评估一种基于深度学习的方法 (MC-Net)，以抑制脑磁共振成像 (MRI) 中的运动伪影。方法 MC-Net 源自 UNet 与两阶段多重损失函数的结合。受合成运动污染的 T1 加权轴向大脑图像用于训练网络。评估使用训练期间未见过的模拟 T1 和 T2 加权轴向、冠状和矢状图像，以及来自真实扫描的带有运动伪影的 T1 加权图像。性能指标包括峰值信噪比（PSNR）、结构相似性指数测量（SSIM）和视觉阅读分数。两名临床读者对图像进行评分。结果 MC-Net 在 T1 轴向测试集上的 PSNR 和 SSIM 方面优于其他方法。 MC-Net 在定量测量和视觉评分方面显着提高了所有 T1 加权图像（针对所有方向以及模拟和真实运动伪影）的质量。然而，MC-Net 在未经训练的对比度（T2 加权）图像上表现不佳。结论 所提出的两阶段多损失 MC-Net 可以有效抑制脑 MRI 中的运动伪影，而不影响图像上下文。鉴于 MC-Net 的效率（单张图像处理时间约 40 毫秒），它有可能用于实际的临床环境。为了便于进一步研究，代码和训练模型可在 https://github.com/MRIMoCo/DL_Motion_Correction 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习和新型混合损失函数的MRI运动伪影校正方法MC-Net。
AI.motivation: MRI中的运动伪影会严重影响图像质量和诊断准确性，传统校正方法存在局限性，需开发更高效的深度学习解决方案。
AI.method: 基于UNet架构设计MC-Net，结合两阶段多损失函数，使用合成运动污染的T1加权轴向脑图像进行训练，并在模拟和真实运动伪影数据上验证。
AI.result: MC-Net在T1轴向测试集上优于其他方法，显著提升图像质量（PSNR/SSIM指标和视觉评分），但对未训练的T2加权图像效果较差。
AI.conclusion: 提出的两阶段多损失MC-Net能有效抑制脑部MRI运动伪影且保持图像上下文，处理速度达40ms/张，具备临床应用潜力。

search_text: Motion correction in MRI using deep learning and a novel hybrid loss function 使用深度学习和新型混合损失函数进行 MRI 运动校正 Purpose To develop and evaluate a deep learning-based method (MC-Net) to suppress motion artifacts in brain magnetic resonance imaging (MRI). Methods MC-Net was derived from a UNet combined with a two-stage multi-loss function. T1-weighted axial brain images contaminated with synthetic motions were used to train the network. Evaluation used simulated T1 and T2-weighted axial, coronal, and sagittal images unseen during training, as well as T1-weighted images with motion artifacts from real scans. Performance indices included the peak signal to noise ratio (PSNR), structural similarity index measure (SSIM), and visual reading scores. Two clinical readers scored the images. Results The MC-Net outperformed other methods implemented in terms of PSNR and SSIM on the T1 axial test set. The MC-Net significantly improved the quality of all T1-weighted images (for all directions and for simulated as well as real motion artifacts), both on quantitative measures and visual scores. However, the MC-Net performed poorly on images of untrained contrast (T2-weighted). Conclusion The proposed two-stage multi-loss MC-Net can effectively suppress motion artifacts in brain MRI without compromising image context. Given the efficiency of the MC-Net (single image processing time ~40ms), it can potentially be used in real clinical settings. To facilitate further research, the code and trained model are available at https://github.com/MRIMoCo/DL_Motion_Correction. 目的开发和评估一种基于深度学习的方法 (MC-Net)，以抑制脑磁共振成像 (MRI) 中的运动伪影。方法 MC-Net 源自 UNet 与两阶段多重损失函数的结合。受合成运动污染的 T1 加权轴向大脑图像用于训练网络。评估使用训练期间未见过的模拟 T1 和 T2 加权轴向、冠状和矢状图像，以及来自真实扫描的带有运动伪影的 T1 加权图像。性能指标包括峰值信噪比（PSNR）、结构相似性指数测量（SSIM）和视觉阅读分数。两名临床读者对图像进行评分。结果 MC-Net 在 T1 轴向测试集上的 PSNR 和 SSIM 方面优于其他方法。 MC-Net 在定量测量和视觉评分方面显着提高了所有 T1 加权图像（针对所有方向以及模拟和真实运动伪影）的质量。然而，MC-Net 在未经训练的对比度（T2 加权）图像上表现不佳。结论 所提出的两阶段多损失 MC-Net 可以有效抑制脑 MRI 中的运动伪影，而不影响图像上下文。鉴于 MC-Net 的效率（单张图像处理时间约 40 毫秒），它有可能用于实际的临床环境。为了便于进一步研究，代码和训练模型可在 https://github.com/MRIMoCo/DL_Motion_Correction 获取。 本文提出一种基于深度学习和新型混合损失函数的MRI运动伪影校正方法MC-Net。 Lei Zhang,Xiaoke Wang,Michael Rawson,Radu Balan,Edward H. title: Detection of Real-time DeepFakes in Video Conferencing with Active Probing and Corneal Reflection
title_zh: 通过主动探测和角膜反射检测视频会议中的实时 DeepFakes
abstract: The COVID pandemic has led to the wide adoption of online video calls in recent years. However, the increasing reliance on video calls provides opportunities for new impersonation attacks by fraudsters using the advanced real-time DeepFakes. Real-time DeepFakes pose new challenges to detection methods, which have to run in real-time as a video call is ongoing. In this paper, we describe a new active forensic method to detect real-time DeepFakes. Specifically, we authenticate video calls by displaying a distinct pattern on the screen and using the corneal reflection extracted from the images of the call participant's face. This pattern can be induced by a call participant displaying on a shared screen or directly integrated into the video-call client. In either case, no specialized imaging or lighting hardware is required. Through large-scale simulations, we evaluate the reliability of this approach under a range in a variety of real-world imaging scenarios.
summary: The COVID pandemic has led to the wide adoption of online video calls in recent years. However, the increasing reliance on video calls provides opportunities for new impersonation attacks by fraudsters using the advanced real-time DeepFakes. Real-time DeepFakes pose new challenges to detection methods, which have to run in real-time as a video call is ongoing. In this paper, we describe a new active forensic method to detect real-time DeepFakes. Specifically, we authenticate video calls by displaying a distinct pattern on the screen and using the corneal reflection extracted from the images of the call participant's face. This pattern can be induced by a call participant displaying on a shared screen or directly integrated into the video-call client. In either case, no specialized imaging or lighting hardware is required. Through large-scale simulations, we evaluate the reliability of this approach under a range in a variety of real-world imaging scenarios.
abstract_zh: 近年来，新冠疫情大流行导致在线视频通话的广泛采用。然而，对视频通话的日益依赖为欺诈者使用先进的实时 DeepFakes 进行新的冒充攻击提供了机会。实时 DeepFakes 对检测方法提出了新的挑战，检测方法必须在视频通话正在进行时实时运行。在本文中，我们描述了一种新的主​​动取证方法来检测实时 DeepFakes。具体来说，我们通过在屏幕上显示不同的图案并使用从通话参与者面部图像中提取的角膜反射来验证视频通话。这种模式可以由显示在共享屏幕上的呼叫参与者引起，也可以直接集成到视频呼叫客户端中。无论哪种情况，都不需要专门的成像或照明硬件。通过大规模模拟，我们评估了该方法在各种现实世界成像场景下的可靠性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过主动探测和角膜反射检测视频会议中实时深度伪造（DeepFakes）的新方法。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情推动了视频会议的普及，但实时深度伪造技术可能被用于身份冒充攻击，现有检测方法难以实现实时性与有效性。
AI.method: 在视频会议中显示特定图案并通过分析参与者面部角膜反射来验证身份，无需专用硬件，图案可通过共享屏幕或集成于客户端实现。
AI.result: 通过大规模仿真验证了该方法在多种现实场景下的可靠性，能够有效检测实时深度伪造。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为实时视频会议中的深度伪造检测提供了无需硬件支持的有效解决方案。

authors_text: Alireza Azadbakht,Saeed Reza Kheradpisheh,Ismail Khalfaoui-Hassani,Timothée Masquelier
title: Drastically Reducing the Number of Trainable Parameters in Deep CNNs by Inter-layer Kernel-sharing
title_zh: 通过层间内核共享大幅减少深度 CNN 中可训练参数的数量
abstract: Deep convolutional neural networks (DCNNs) have become the state-of-the-art (SOTA) approach for many computer vision tasks: image classification, object detection, semantic segmentation, etc. However, most SOTA networks are too large for edge computing. Here, we suggest a simple way to reduce the number of trainable parameters and thus the memory footprint: sharing kernels between multiple convolutional layers. Kernel-sharing is only possible between ``isomorphic" layers, i.e.layers having the same kernel size, input and output channels. This is typically the case inside each stage of a DCNN. Our experiments on CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100, using the ConvMixer and SE-ResNet architectures show that the number of parameters of these models can drastically be reduced with minimal cost on accuracy. The resulting networks are appealing for certain edge computing applications that are subject to severe memory constraints, and even more interesting if leveraging "frozen weights" hardware accelerators. Kernel-sharing is also an efficient regularization method, which can reduce overfitting. The codes are publicly available at https://github.com/AlirezaAzadbakht/kernel-sharing.
summary: Deep convolutional neural networks (DCNNs) have become the state-of-the-art (SOTA) approach for many computer vision tasks: image classification, object detection, semantic segmentation, etc. However, most SOTA networks are too large for edge computing. Here, we suggest a simple way to reduce the number of trainable parameters and thus the memory footprint: sharing kernels between multiple convolutional layers. Kernel-sharing is only possible between ``isomorphic" layers, i.e.layers having the same kernel size, input and output channels. This is typically the case inside each stage of a DCNN. Our experiments on CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100, using the ConvMixer and SE-ResNet architectures show that the number of parameters of these models can drastically be reduced with minimal cost on accuracy. The resulting networks are appealing for certain edge computing applications that are subject to severe memory constraints, and even more interesting if leveraging "frozen weights" hardware accelerators. Kernel-sharing is also an efficient regularization method, which can reduce overfitting. The codes are publicly available at https://github.com/AlirezaAzadbakht/kernel-sharing.
abstract_zh: 深度卷积神经网络 (DCNN) 已成为许多计算机视觉任务的最先进 (SOTA) 方法：图像分类、对象检测、语义分割等。然而，大多数 SOTA 网络对于边缘计算来说太大。在这里，我们建议一种简单的方法来减少可训练参数的数量，从而减少内存占用：在多个卷积层之间共享内核。内核共享只能在“同构”层之间实现，即具有相同内核大小、输入和输出通道的层。这通常是 DCNN 每个阶段内的情况。我们使用 ConvMixer 和 SE-ResNet 架构在 CIFAR-10 和 CIFAR-100 上进行的实验表明，可以以最小的精度成本大幅减少这些模型的参数数量。由此产生的网络对于某些受严重内存影响的边缘计算应用程序很有吸引力约束，如果利用“冻结权重”硬件加速器也是一种有效的正则化方法，可以减少过度拟合，则更有趣。这些代码可在 https://github.com/AlirezaAzadbakht/kernel-sharing 上公开获得。

AI.tldr: 提出通过层间核共享大幅减少深度卷积神经网络（DCNN）可训练参数数量的方法，以降低内存占用并适用于边缘计算
AI.motivation: 现有深度卷积网络参数过多，难以部署在边缘设备；同时需解决内存限制和过拟合问题
AI.method: 在具有相同核尺寸、输入输出通道的同构卷积层间共享权重核，减少参数数量并作为正则化手段
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10/100数据集上，ConvMixer和SE-ResNet模型参数显著减少，准确率损失小，适合边缘计算且减少过拟合
AI.conclusion: 核共享有效减少模型参数和内存需求，同时作为正则化方法提升泛化能力，适用于内存受限的边缘计算场景

search_text: Drastically Reducing the Number of Trainable Parameters in Deep CNNs by Inter-layer Kernel-sharing 通过层间内核共享大幅减少深度 CNN 中可训练参数的数量 Deep convolutional neural networks (DCNNs) have become the state-of-the-art (SOTA) approach for many computer vision tasks: image classification, object detection, semantic segmentation, etc. However, most SOTA networks are too large for edge computing. Here, we suggest a simple way to reduce the number of trainable parameters and thus the memory footprint: sharing kernels between multiple convolutional layers. Kernel-sharing is only possible between ``isomorphic" layers, i.e.layers having the same kernel size, input and output channels. This is typically the case inside each stage of a DCNN. Our experiments on CIFAR-10 and CIFAR-100, using the ConvMixer and SE-ResNet architectures show that the number of parameters of these models can drastically be reduced with minimal cost on accuracy. The resulting networks are appealing for certain edge computing applications that are subject to severe memory constraints, and even more interesting if leveraging "frozen weights" hardware accelerators. Kernel-sharing is also an efficient regularization method, which can reduce overfitting. The codes are publicly available at https://github.com/AlirezaAzadbakht/kernel-sharing. 深度卷积神经网络 (DCNN) 已成为许多计算机视觉任务的最先进 (SOTA) 方法：图像分类、对象检测、语义分割等。然而，大多数 SOTA 网络对于边缘计算来说太大。在这里，我们建议一种简单的方法来减少可训练参数的数量，从而减少内存占用：在多个卷积层之间共享内核。内核共享只能在“同构”层之间实现，即具有相同内核大小、输入和输出通道的层。这通常是 DCNN 每个阶段内的情况。我们使用 ConvMixer 和 SE-ResNet 架构在 CIFAR-10 和 CIFAR-100 上进行的实验表明，可以以最小的精度成本大幅减少这些模型的参数数量。由此产生的网络对于某些受严重内存影响的边缘计算应用程序很有吸引力约束，如果利用“冻结权重”硬件加速器也是一种有效的正则化方法，可以减少过度拟合，则更有趣。这些代码可在 https://github.com/AlirezaAzadbakht/kernel-sharing 上公开获得。 提出通过层间核共享大幅减少深度卷积神经网络（DCNN）可训练参数数量的方法，以降低内存占用并适用于边缘计算 Alireza Azadbakht,Saeed Reza Kheradpisheh,Ismail Khalfaoui-Hassani,Timothée Masquelier cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Atlas flow : compatible local structures on the manifold
title_zh: Atlas flow：歧管上兼容的局部结构
abstract: In this paper, we focus on the intersections of a manifold's local structures to analyze the global structure of a manifold. We obtain local regions on data manifolds such as the latent space of StyleGAN2, using Mapper, a tool from topological data analysis. We impose gluing compatibility conditions on overlapping local regions, which guarantee that the local structures can be glued together to the global structure of a manifold. We propose a novel generative flow model called Atlas flow that uses compatibility to reattach the local regions. Our model shows that the generating processes perform well on synthetic dataset samples of well-known manifolds with noise. Furthermore, we investigate the style vector manifold of StyleGAN2 using our model.
summary: In this paper, we focus on the intersections of a manifold's local structures to analyze the global structure of a manifold. We obtain local regions on data manifolds such as the latent space of StyleGAN2, using Mapper, a tool from topological data analysis. We impose gluing compatibility conditions on overlapping local regions, which guarantee that the local structures can be glued together to the global structure of a manifold. We propose a novel generative flow model called Atlas flow that uses compatibility to reattach the local regions. Our model shows that the generating processes perform well on synthetic dataset samples of well-known manifolds with noise. Furthermore, we investigate the style vector manifold of StyleGAN2 using our model.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们关注流形局部结构的交集来分析流形的全局结构。我们使用拓扑数据分析工具 Mapper 获取数据流形上的局部区域，例如 StyleGAN2 的潜在空间。我们在重叠的局部区域上施加粘合兼容性条件，这保证了局部结构可以粘合在一起到流形的全局结构。我们提出了一种称为 Atlas flow 的新型生成流模型，它使用兼容性来重新连接局部区域。我们的模型表明，生成过程在带有噪声的已知流形的合成数据集样本上表现良好。此外，我们使用我们的模型研究了 StyleGAN2 的风格向量流形。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Atlas flow的生成流模型，通过确保流形局部结构的兼容性来重建全局结构。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以有效整合流形的局部结构以揭示全局特性，需通过兼容性条件实现局部到全局的衔接。
AI.method: 利用Mapper工具提取数据流形的局部区域（如StyleGAN2的潜在空间），并施加重叠区域的粘合兼容性条件，设计Atlas flow模型实现局部结构的重新连接。
AI.result: 模型在合成数据集和StyleGAN2风格向量流形上均表现出良好的生成效果，验证了兼容性约束的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Atlas flow通过局部结构兼容性为流形分析和生成模型提供了新方法，有助于理解复杂数据的全局拓扑特性。

title: Food Ingredients Recognition through Multi-label Learning
title_zh: 通过多标签学习进行食品成分识别
abstract: The ability to recognize various food-items in a generic food plate is a key determinant for an automated diet assessment system. This study motivates the need for automated diet assessment and proposes a framework to achieve this. Within this framework, we focus on one of the core functionalities to visually recognize various ingredients. To this end, we employed a deep multi-label learning approach and evaluated several state-of-the-art neural networks for their ability to detect an arbitrary number of ingredients in a dish image. The models evaluated in this work follow a definite meta-structure, consisting of an encoder and a decoder component. Two distinct decoding schemes, one based on global average pooling and the other on attention mechanism, are evaluated and benchmarked. Whereas for encoding, several well-known architectures, including DenseNet, EfficientNet, MobileNet, Inception and Xception, were employed. We present promising preliminary results for deep learning-based ingredients detection, using a challenging dataset, Nutrition5K, and establish a strong baseline for future explorations.
summary: The ability to recognize various food-items in a generic food plate is a key determinant for an automated diet assessment system. This study motivates the need for automated diet assessment and proposes a framework to achieve this. Within this framework, we focus on one of the core functionalities to visually recognize various ingredients. To this end, we employed a deep multi-label learning approach and evaluated several state-of-the-art neural networks for their ability to detect an arbitrary number of ingredients in a dish image. The models evaluated in this work follow a definite meta-structure, consisting of an encoder and a decoder component. Two distinct decoding schemes, one based on global average pooling and the other on attention mechanism, are evaluated and benchmarked. Whereas for encoding, several well-known architectures, including DenseNet, EfficientNet, MobileNet, Inception and Xception, were employed. We present promising preliminary results for deep learning-based ingredients detection, using a challenging dataset, Nutrition5K, and establish a strong baseline for future explorations.
abstract_zh: 识别通用食品盘中各种食品的能力是自动饮食评估系统的关键决定因素。这项研究激发了对自动化饮食评估的需求，并提出了一个实现这一目标的框架。在此框架内，我们专注于视觉识别各种成分的核心功能之一。为此，我们采用了深度多标签学习方法，并评估了几种最先进的神经网络检测菜肴图像中任意数量成分的能力。这项工作中评估的模型遵循明确的元结构，由编码器和解码器组件组成。对两种不同的解码方案进行了评估和基准测试，一种基于全局平均池，另一种基于注意力机制。而在编码方面，采用了几种著名的架构，包括 DenseNet、EfficientNet、MobileNet、Inception 和 Xception。我们使用具有挑战性的数据集 Nutrition5K 展示了基于深度学习的成分检测的有希望的初步结果，并为未来的探索建立了强有力的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多标签学习的食品成分识别方法，用于自动饮食评估系统。
AI.motivation: 自动饮食评估系统需要能够识别各种食物成分，本文旨在解决这一问题并提供一个有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 本文采用深度多标签学习方法，评估了多种最先进的神经网络模型，包括编码器和解码器结构，并比较了两种解码方案：基于全局平均池化和基于注意力机制。
AI.result: 在挑战性数据集Nutrition5K上取得了有希望的初步结果，并为未来研究建立了坚实的基础。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的框架为食品成分识别提供了有效的解决方案，并为未来的研究提供了参考基准。

title: GlassesGAN: Eyewear Personalization using Synthetic Appearance Discovery and Targeted Subspace Modeling
title_zh: GlassesGAN：使用合成外观发现和目标子空间建模的眼镜个性化
abstract: We present GlassesGAN, a novel image editing framework for custom design of glasses, that sets a new standard in terms of image quality, edit realism, and continuous multi-style edit capability. To facilitate the editing process with GlassesGAN, we propose a Targeted Subspace Modelling (TSM) procedure that, based on a novel mechanism for (synthetic) appearance discovery in the latent space of a pre-trained GAN generator, constructs an eyeglasses-specific (latent) subspace that the editing framework can utilize. Additionally, we also introduce an appearance-constrained subspace initialization (SI) technique that centers the latent representation of the given input image in the well-defined part of the constructed subspace to improve the reliability of the learned edits. We test GlassesGAN on two (diverse) high-resolution datasets (CelebA-HQ and SiblingsDB-HQf) and compare it to three state-of-the-art competitors, i.e., InterfaceGAN, GANSpace, and MaskGAN. The reported results show that GlassesGAN convincingly outperforms all competing techniques, while offering additional functionality (e.g., fine-grained multi-style editing) not available with any of the competitors. The source code will be made freely available.
summary: We present GlassesGAN, a novel image editing framework for custom design of glasses, that sets a new standard in terms of image quality, edit realism, and continuous multi-style edit capability. To facilitate the editing process with GlassesGAN, we propose a Targeted Subspace Modelling (TSM) procedure that, based on a novel mechanism for (synthetic) appearance discovery in the latent space of a pre-trained GAN generator, constructs an eyeglasses-specific (latent) subspace that the editing framework can utilize. Additionally, we also introduce an appearance-constrained subspace initialization (SI) technique that centers the latent representation of the given input image in the well-defined part of the constructed subspace to improve the reliability of the learned edits. We test GlassesGAN on two (diverse) high-resolution datasets (CelebA-HQ and SiblingsDB-HQf) and compare it to three state-of-the-art competitors, i.e., InterfaceGAN, GANSpace, and MaskGAN. The reported results show that GlassesGAN convincingly outperforms all competing techniques, while offering additional functionality (e.g., fine-grained multi-style editing) not available with any of the competitors. The source code will be made freely available.
abstract_zh: 我们推出 GlassesGAN，这是一种用于眼镜定制设计的新颖图像编辑框架，它在图像质量、编辑真实性和连续多风格编辑能力方面树立了新标准。为了促进 GlassesGAN 的编辑过程，我们提出了一种目标子空间建模 (TSM) 程序，该程序基于在预训练 GAN 生成器的潜在空间中进行（合成）外观发现的新颖机制，构建了编辑框架可以利用的眼镜特定（潜在）子空间。此外，我们还引入了外观约束子空间初始化（SI）技术，该技术将给定输入图像的潜在表示集中在构造子空间的明确定义部分中，以提高学习编辑的可靠性。我们在两个（不同的）高分辨率数据集（CelebA-HQ 和 SiblingsDB-HQf）上测试 GlassesGAN，并将其与三个最先进的竞争对手（即 InterfaceGAN、GANSpace 和 MaskGAN）进行比较。报告的结果表明，GlassesGAN 令人信服地优于所有竞争技术，同时提供任何竞争对手所不具备的附加功能（例如细粒度多风格编辑）。源代码将免费提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GlassesGAN框架，通过合成外观发现和定向子空间建模技术，实现高质量、真实感强的眼镜个性化图像编辑。
AI.motivation: 现有图像编辑方法在眼镜定制场景中存在编辑真实感不足、多风格编辑能力有限等问题，需开发更可靠且功能更全面的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出定向子空间建模（TSM）和外观约束子空间初始化（SI）技术，利用预训练GAN的潜在空间构建眼镜专用子空间，并通过约束初始化提升编辑可靠性。
AI.result: 在CelebA-HQ和SiblingsDB-HQf数据集上优于InterfaceGAN、GANSpace和MaskGAN等三类先进方法，支持细粒度多风格编辑功能。
AI.conclusion: GlassesGAN在图像质量、编辑真实感和功能多样性上达到新水平，代码将开源促进后续研究。

search_text: GlassesGAN: Eyewear Personalization using Synthetic Appearance Discovery and Targeted Subspace Modeling GlassesGAN：使用合成外观发现和目标子空间建模的眼镜个性化 We present GlassesGAN, a novel image editing framework for custom design of glasses, that sets a new standard in terms of image quality, edit realism, and continuous multi-style edit capability. To facilitate the editing process with GlassesGAN, we propose a Targeted Subspace Modelling (TSM) procedure that, based on a novel mechanism for (synthetic) appearance discovery in the latent space of a pre-trained GAN generator, constructs an eyeglasses-specific (latent) subspace that the editing framework can utilize. Additionally, we also introduce an appearance-constrained subspace initialization (SI) technique that centers the latent representation of the given input image in the well-defined part of the constructed subspace to improve the reliability of the learned edits. We test GlassesGAN on two (diverse) high-resolution datasets (CelebA-HQ and SiblingsDB-HQf) and compare it to three state-of-the-art competitors, i.e., InterfaceGAN, GANSpace, and MaskGAN. The reported results show that GlassesGAN convincingly outperforms all competing techniques, while offering additional functionality (e.g., fine-grained multi-style editing) not available with any of the competitors. The source code will be made freely available. 我们推出 GlassesGAN，这是一种用于眼镜定制设计的新颖图像编辑框架，它在图像质量、编辑真实性和连续多风格编辑能力方面树立了新标准。为了促进 GlassesGAN 的编辑过程，我们提出了一种目标子空间建模 (TSM) 程序，该程序基于在预训练 GAN 生成器的潜在空间中进行（合成）外观发现的新颖机制，构建了编辑框架可以利用的眼镜特定（潜在）子空间。此外，我们还引入了外观约束子空间初始化（SI）技术，该技术将给定输入图像的潜在表示集中在构造子空间的明确定义部分中，以提高学习编辑的可靠性。我们在两个（不同的）高分辨率数据集（CelebA-HQ 和 SiblingsDB-HQf）上测试 GlassesGAN，并将其与三个最先进的竞争对手（即 InterfaceGAN、GANSpace 和 MaskGAN）进行比较。报告的结果表明，GlassesGAN 令人信服地优于所有竞争技术，同时提供任何竞争对手所不具备的附加功能（例如细粒度多风格编辑）。源代码将免费提供。 本文提出GlassesGAN框架，通过合成外观发现和定向子空间建模技术，实现高质量、真实感强的眼镜个性化图像编辑。 Richard Plesh,Peter Peer,Vitomir Štruc cs.CV,eess.IV

title: From colouring-in to pointillism: revisiting semantic segmentation supervision
title_zh: 从着色到点画法：重新审视语义分割监督
comment: Open Images V7 available at https://g.co/dataset/open-images
comments: Open Images V7 available at https://g.co/dataset/open-images
abstract: The prevailing paradigm for producing semantic segmentation training data relies on densely labelling each pixel of each image in the training set, akin to colouring-in books. This approach becomes a bottleneck when scaling up in the number of images, classes, and annotators. Here we propose instead a pointillist approach for semantic segmentation annotation, where only point-wise yes/no questions are answered. We explore design alternatives for such an active learning approach, measure the speed and consistency of human annotators on this task, show that this strategy enables training good segmentation models, and that it is suitable for evaluating models at test time. As concrete proof of the scalability of our method, we collected and released 22.6M point labels over 4,171 classes on the Open Images dataset. Our results enable to rethink the semantic segmentation pipeline of annotation, training, and evaluation from a pointillism point of view.
summary: The prevailing paradigm for producing semantic segmentation training data relies on densely labelling each pixel of each image in the training set, akin to colouring-in books. This approach becomes a bottleneck when scaling up in the number of images, classes, and annotators. Here we propose instead a pointillist approach for semantic segmentation annotation, where only point-wise yes/no questions are answered. We explore design alternatives for such an active learning approach, measure the speed and consistency of human annotators on this task, show that this strategy enables training good segmentation models, and that it is suitable for evaluating models at test time. As concrete proof of the scalability of our method, we collected and released 22.6M point labels over 4,171 classes on the Open Images dataset. Our results enable to rethink the semantic segmentation pipeline of annotation, training, and evaluation from a pointillism point of view.
abstract_zh: 生成语义分割训练数据的流行范例依赖于密集标记训练集中每个图像的每个像素，类似于给书着色。当扩大图像、类和注释器的数量时，这种方法成为瓶颈。在这里，我们提出了一种用于语义分割注释的点画方法，其中仅回答逐点的是/否问题。我们探索这种主动学习方法的设计替代方案，测量人类注释者在此任务上的速度和一致性，表明该策略能够训练良好的分割模型，并且适合在测试时评估模型。作为我们方法可扩展性的具体证明，我们在 Open Images 数据集上收集并发布了 4,171 个类的 2260 万个点标签。我们的结果使得能够从点画法的角度重新思考注释、训练和评估的语义分割流程。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的语义分割监督方法，通过点状标注替代传统像素级标注，以提高数据标注的可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 传统语义分割需要密集像素标注，导致标注成本高、难以扩展，尤其在图像数量、类别和标注者规模增加时成为瓶颈。
AI.method: 采用点illism方法，仅通过回答点状位置的yes/no问题进行标注，并探索主动学习策略以优化标注效率和模型训练。
AI.result: 在Open Images数据集上收集并发布22.6M点标注（覆盖4,171类），证明该方法可训练有效分割模型且适用于测试阶段评估。
AI.conclusion: 点illism标注方法为语义分割的标注、训练和评估流程提供了可扩展的新视角，有望替代传统密集标注范式。

title: Learning Explicit Object-Centric Representations with Vision Transformers
title_zh: 使用 Vision Transformer 学习显式的以对象为中心的表示
abstract: With the recent successful adaptation of transformers to the vision domain, particularly when trained in a self-supervised fashion, it has been shown that vision transformers can learn impressive object-reasoning-like behaviour and features expressive for the task of object segmentation in images. In this paper, we build on the self-supervision task of masked autoencoding and explore its effectiveness for explicitly learning object-centric representations with transformers. To this end, we design an object-centric autoencoder using transformers only and train it end-to-end to reconstruct full images from unmasked patches. We show that the model efficiently learns to decompose simple scenes as measured by segmentation metrics on several multi-object benchmarks.
summary: With the recent successful adaptation of transformers to the vision domain, particularly when trained in a self-supervised fashion, it has been shown that vision transformers can learn impressive object-reasoning-like behaviour and features expressive for the task of object segmentation in images. In this paper, we build on the self-supervision task of masked autoencoding and explore its effectiveness for explicitly learning object-centric representations with transformers. To this end, we design an object-centric autoencoder using transformers only and train it end-to-end to reconstruct full images from unmasked patches. We show that the model efficiently learns to decompose simple scenes as measured by segmentation metrics on several multi-object benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 最近，随着 Transformer 成功适应视觉领域，特别是在以自我监督的方式进行训练时，事实证明，视觉 Transformer 可以学习令人印象深刻的类对象推理行为和表达图像中对象分割任务的特征。在本文中，我们以屏蔽自动编码的自我监督任务为基础，并探索其使用变压器显式学习以对象为中心的表示的有效性。为此，我们仅使用变压器设计了一个以对象为中心的自动编码器，并对其进行端到端训练，以从未屏蔽的补丁中重建完整图像。我们表明，该模型可以有效地学习分解简单场景，这是通过几个多对象基准上的分割指标来衡量的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何利用视觉Transformer通过自监督学习显式物体中心表示，以提升图像分割任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管视觉Transformer在自监督任务中表现出色，但现有方法尚未明确探索其学习物体中心表示的能力，而这一能力对分割等任务至关重要。
AI.method: 设计一个仅基于Transformer的物体中心自编码器，通过端到端训练从未遮罩的图像块重建完整图像，从而显式学习物体分解能力。
AI.result: 模型在多个多物体基准测试中展现出有效的场景分解能力，分割指标表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 自监督训练下的视觉Transformer能够高效学习物体中心表示，为后续物体分割等任务奠定基础。

title: PolyHope: Two-Level Hope Speech Detection from Tweets
title_zh: PolyHope：来自推文的两级希望语音检测
abstract: Hope is characterized as openness of spirit toward the future, a desire, expectation, and wish for something to happen or to be true that remarkably affects human's state of mind, emotions, behaviors, and decisions. Hope is usually associated with concepts of desired expectations and possibility/probability concerning the future. Despite its importance, hope has rarely been studied as a social media analysis task. This paper presents a hope speech dataset that classifies each tweet first into "Hope" and "Not Hope", then into three fine-grained hope categories: "Generalized Hope", "Realistic Hope", and "Unrealistic Hope" (along with "Not Hope"). English tweets in the first half of 2022 were collected to build this dataset. Furthermore, we describe our annotation process and guidelines in detail and discuss the challenges of classifying hope and the limitations of the existing hope speech detection corpora. In addition, we reported several baselines based on different learning approaches, such as traditional machine learning, deep learning, and transformers, to benchmark our dataset. We evaluated our baselines using weighted-averaged and macro-averaged F1-scores. Observations show that a strict process for annotator selection and detailed annotation guidelines enhanced the dataset's quality. This strict annotation process resulted in promising performance for simple machine learning classifiers with only bi-grams; however, binary and multiclass hope speech detection results reveal that contextual embedding models have higher performance in this dataset.
summary: Hope is characterized as openness of spirit toward the future, a desire, expectation, and wish for something to happen or to be true that remarkably affects human's state of mind, emotions, behaviors, and decisions. Hope is usually associated with concepts of desired expectations and possibility/probability concerning the future. Despite its importance, hope has rarely been studied as a social media analysis task. This paper presents a hope speech dataset that classifies each tweet first into "Hope" and "Not Hope", then into three fine-grained hope categories: "Generalized Hope", "Realistic Hope", and "Unrealistic Hope" (along with "Not Hope"). English tweets in the first half of 2022 were collected to build this dataset. Furthermore, we describe our annotation process and guidelines in detail and discuss the challenges of classifying hope and the limitations of the existing hope speech detection corpora. In addition, we reported several baselines based on different learning approaches, such as traditional machine learning, deep learning, and transformers, to benchmark our dataset. We evaluated our baselines using weighted-averaged and macro-averaged F1-scores. Observations show that a strict process for annotator selection and detailed annotation guidelines enhanced the dataset's quality. This strict annotation process resulted in promising performance for simple machine learning classifiers with only bi-grams; however, binary and multiclass hope speech detection results reveal that contextual embedding models have higher performance in this dataset.
abstract_zh: 希望的特征是对未来的开放精神，是对某事发生或成真的渴望、期望和愿望，它显着影响人类的精神状态、情感、行为和决定。希望通常与对未来的期望和可能性/概率的概念相关。尽管希望很重要，但它很少被作为社交媒体分析任务来研究。本文提出了一个希望语音数据集，该数据集首先将每条推文分为“希望”和“不希望”，然后分为三个细粒度的希望类别：“广义希望”、“现实希望”和“不现实希望”（以及“不希望”）。收集了 2022 年上半年的英语推文来构建该数据集。此外，我们详细描述了我们的注释过程和指南，并讨论了对希望进行分类的挑战以及现有希望语音检测语料库的局限性。此外，我们还报告了基于不同学习方法（例如传统机器学习、深度学习和 Transformer）的多个基线，以对我们的数据集进行基准测试。我们使用加权平均和宏观平均 F1 分数来评估我们的基线。观察表明，严格的注释者选择过程和详细的注释指南提高了数据集的质量。这种严格的注释过程为仅使用二元组的简单机器学习分类器带来了良好的性能；然而，二进制和多类希望语音检测结果表明，上下文嵌入模型在此数据集中具有更高的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PolyHope的两层希望言论检测方法，用于从推文中识别希望言论。
AI.motivation: 希望作为一种积极的情感，对人类的心理、情绪、行为和决策有重要影响，但在社交媒体分析中研究较少，因此需要构建一个专门的数据集并研究其检测方法。
AI.method: 本文构建了一个包含2022年上半年英文推文的希望言论数据集，并将其分为'希望'和'非希望'两类，再细分为'一般性希望'、'现实希望'和'不现实希望'。通过详细的标注过程和指南，使用传统机器学习、深度学习和Transformer模型进行基准测试。
AI.result: 严格的标注流程和详细指南提高了数据集质量，简单的二元组机器学习分类器表现良好，但基于上下文嵌入的模型在希望言论检测任务中性能更高。
AI.conclusion: 构建高质量的希望言论数据集对于研究社交媒体中的积极情感具有重要意义，而上下文嵌入模型在该任务中表现优异。

title: IELM: An Open Information Extraction Benchmark for Pre-Trained Language Models
title_zh: IELM：预训练语言模型的开放信息提取基准
comment: EMNLP 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2010.11967
comments: EMNLP 2022. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2010.11967
abstract: We introduce a new open information extraction (OIE) benchmark for pre-trained language models (LM). Recent studies have demonstrated that pre-trained LMs, such as BERT and GPT, may store linguistic and relational knowledge. In particular, LMs are able to answer ``fill-in-the-blank'' questions when given a pre-defined relation category. Instead of focusing on pre-defined relations, we create an OIE benchmark aiming to fully examine the open relational information present in the pre-trained LMs. We accomplish this by turning pre-trained LMs into zero-shot OIE systems. Surprisingly, pre-trained LMs are able to obtain competitive performance on both standard OIE datasets (CaRB and Re-OIE2016) and two new large-scale factual OIE datasets (TAC KBP-OIE and Wikidata-OIE) that we establish via distant supervision. For instance, the zero-shot pre-trained LMs outperform the F1 score of the state-of-the-art supervised OIE methods on our factual OIE datasets without needing to use any training sets. Our code and datasets are available at https://github.com/cgraywang/IELM
summary: We introduce a new open information extraction (OIE) benchmark for pre-trained language models (LM). Recent studies have demonstrated that pre-trained LMs, such as BERT and GPT, may store linguistic and relational knowledge. In particular, LMs are able to answer ``fill-in-the-blank'' questions when given a pre-defined relation category. Instead of focusing on pre-defined relations, we create an OIE benchmark aiming to fully examine the open relational information present in the pre-trained LMs. We accomplish this by turning pre-trained LMs into zero-shot OIE systems. Surprisingly, pre-trained LMs are able to obtain competitive performance on both standard OIE datasets (CaRB and Re-OIE2016) and two new large-scale factual OIE datasets (TAC KBP-OIE and Wikidata-OIE) that we establish via distant supervision. For instance, the zero-shot pre-trained LMs outperform the F1 score of the state-of-the-art supervised OIE methods on our factual OIE datasets without needing to use any training sets. Our code and datasets are available at https://github.com/cgraywang/IELM
abstract_zh: 我们为预训练语言模型 (LM) 引入了新的开放信息提取 (OIE) 基准。最近的研究表明，预训练的语言模型（例如 BERT 和 GPT）可以存储语言和关系知识。特别是，当给定预定义的关系类别时，语言模型能够回答“填空”问题。我们没有关注预定义的关系，而是创建了一个 OIE 基准，旨在全面检查预训练的 LM 中存在的开放关系信息。我们通过将预先训练的 LM 转变为零样本 OIE 系统来实现这一目标。令人惊讶的是，经过预训练的 LM 能够在标准 OIE 数据集（CaRB 和 Re-OIE2016）和我们通过远程监督建立的两个新的大规模事实 OIE 数据集（TAC KBP-OIE 和 Wikidata-OIE）上获得有竞争力的性能。例如，零样本预训练的 LM 在我们的事实 OIE 数据集上优于最先进的监督 OIE 方法的 F1 分数，而无需使用任何训练集。我们的代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/cgraywang/IELM 获取

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个新的开放信息抽取（OIE）基准，用于评估预训练语言模型的能力。
AI.motivation: 尽管预训练语言模型如BERT和GPT展示了存储语言和关系知识的能力，但现有研究主要关注预定义关系，未能全面评估模型中的开放关系信息。
AI.method: 将预训练语言模型转化为零样本OIE系统，并通过远监督方法构建了两个大规模事实性OIE数据集（TAC KBP-OIE和Wikidata-OIE）。
AI.result: 零样本预训练语言模型在标准OIE数据集和新构建的事实性OIE数据集上均表现出色，甚至优于现有监督OIE方法的F1分数。
AI.conclusion: 预训练语言模型在开放信息抽取任务中具有强大的零样本能力，无需额外训练数据即可实现高性能。

authors_text: Yufan Zhou,Chunyuan Li,Changyou Chen,Jianfeng Gao,Jinhui Xu
title: Lafite2: Few-shot Text-to-Image Generation
title_zh: Lafite2：少量文本到图像生成
abstract: Text-to-image generation models have progressed considerably in recent years, which can now generate impressive realistic images from arbitrary text. Most of such models are trained on web-scale image-text paired datasets, which may not be affordable for many researchers. In this paper, we propose a novel method for pre-training text-to-image generation model on image-only datasets. It considers a retrieval-then-optimization procedure to synthesize pseudo text features: for a given image, relevant pseudo text features are first retrieved, then optimized for better alignment. The low requirement of the proposed method yields high flexibility and usability: it can be beneficial to a wide range of settings, including the few-shot, semi-supervised and fully-supervised learning; it can be applied on different models including generative adversarial networks (GANs) and diffusion models. Extensive experiments illustrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. On MS-COCO dataset, our GAN model obtains Fréchet Inception Distance (FID) of 6.78 which is the new state-of-the-art (SoTA) of GANs under fully-supervised setting. Our diffusion model obtains FID of 8.42 and 4.28 on zero-shot and supervised setting respectively, which are competitive to SoTA diffusion models with a much smaller model size.
summary: Text-to-image generation models have progressed considerably in recent years, which can now generate impressive realistic images from arbitrary text. Most of such models are trained on web-scale image-text paired datasets, which may not be affordable for many researchers. In this paper, we propose a novel method for pre-training text-to-image generation model on image-only datasets. It considers a retrieval-then-optimization procedure to synthesize pseudo text features: for a given image, relevant pseudo text features are first retrieved, then optimized for better alignment. The low requirement of the proposed method yields high flexibility and usability: it can be beneficial to a wide range of settings, including the few-shot, semi-supervised and fully-supervised learning; it can be applied on different models including generative adversarial networks (GANs) and diffusion models. Extensive experiments illustrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. On MS-COCO dataset, our GAN model obtains Fréchet Inception Distance (FID) of 6.78 which is the new state-of-the-art (SoTA) of GANs under fully-supervised setting. Our diffusion model obtains FID of 8.42 and 4.28 on zero-shot and supervised setting respectively, which are competitive to SoTA diffusion models with a much smaller model size.
abstract_zh: 近年来，文本到图像生成模型取得了长足的进步，现在可以从任意文本生成令人印象深刻的逼真图像。大多数此类模型都是在网络规模的图像文本配对数据集上进行训练的，这对于许多研究人员来说可能负担不起。在本文中，我们提出了一种在纯图像数据集上预训练文本到图像生成模型的新方法。它考虑了一个检索然后优化的过程来合成伪文本特征：对于给定的图像，首先检索相关的伪文本特征，然后进行优化以获得更好的对齐。该方法的低要求带来了很高的灵活性和可用性：它可以有利于广泛的设置，包括少样本、半监督和全监督学习；它可以应用于不同的模型，包括生成对抗网络（GAN）和扩散模型。大量的实验证明了所提出方法的有效性。在 MS-COCO 数据集上，我们的 GAN 模型获得了 6.78 的 Fréchet 起始距离（FID），这是完全监督设置下 GAN 的最新技术（SoTA）。我们的扩散模型在零样本和监督设置上分别获得 8.42 和 4.28 的 FID，这与模型尺寸小得多的 SoTA 扩散模型具有竞争力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在仅使用图像数据集而非图像-文本配对数据集上预训练文本到图像生成模型的新方法。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像生成模型依赖大规模图像-文本配对数据集，成本高昂且难以获取，限制了研究的普及性。
AI.method: 采用'检索-优化'流程生成伪文本特征：先检索与图像相关的伪文本特征，再通过优化提升对齐效果，适用于GAN和扩散模型等多种架构及少样本等场景。
AI.result: 在MS-COCO数据集上，GAN模型FID达6.78（全监督SOTA），扩散模型在零样本和监督设置下FID分别为8.42和4.28，模型规模更小却保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过仅使用图像数据实现高效预训练，验证了在多种学习场景和模型架构中的有效性，为资源受限的研究提供了可行方案。

search_text: Lafite2: Few-shot Text-to-Image Generation Lafite2：少量文本到图像生成 Text-to-image generation models have progressed considerably in recent years, which can now generate impressive realistic images from arbitrary text. Most of such models are trained on web-scale image-text paired datasets, which may not be affordable for many researchers. In this paper, we propose a novel method for pre-training text-to-image generation model on image-only datasets. It considers a retrieval-then-optimization procedure to synthesize pseudo text features: for a given image, relevant pseudo text features are first retrieved, then optimized for better alignment. The low requirement of the proposed method yields high flexibility and usability: it can be beneficial to a wide range of settings, including the few-shot, semi-supervised and fully-supervised learning; it can be applied on different models including generative adversarial networks (GANs) and diffusion models. Extensive experiments illustrate the effectiveness of the proposed method. On MS-COCO dataset, our GAN model obtains Fréchet Inception Distance (FID) of 6.78 which is the new state-of-the-art (SoTA) of GANs under fully-supervised setting. Our diffusion model obtains FID of 8.42 and 4.28 on zero-shot and supervised setting respectively, which are competitive to SoTA diffusion models with a much smaller model size. 近年来，文本到图像生成模型取得了长足的进步，现在可以从任意文本生成令人印象深刻的逼真图像。大多数此类模型都是在网络规模的图像文本配对数据集上进行训练的，这对于许多研究人员来说可能负担不起。在本文中，我们提出了一种在纯图像数据集上预训练文本到图像生成模型的新方法。它考虑了一个检索然后优化的过程来合成伪文本特征：对于给定的图像，首先检索相关的伪文本特征，然后进行优化以获得更好的对齐。该方法的低要求带来了很高的灵活性和可用性：它可以有利于广泛的设置，包括少样本、半监督和全监督学习；它可以应用于不同的模型，包括生成对抗网络（GAN）和扩散模型。大量的实验证明了所提出方法的有效性。在 MS-COCO 数据集上，我们的 GAN 模型获得了 6.78 的 Fréchet 起始距离（FID），这是完全监督设置下 GAN 的最新技术（SoTA）。我们的扩散模型在零样本和监督设置上分别获得 8.42 和 4.28 的 FID，这与模型尺寸小得多的 SoTA 扩散模型具有竞争力。 本文提出一种在仅使用图像数据集而非图像-文本配对数据集上预训练文本到图像生成模型的新方法。 Yufan Zhou,Chunyuan Li,Changyou Chen,Jianfeng Gao,Jinhui Xu cs.CV,cs.AI

title: An adaptive multi-fidelity sampling framework for safety analysis of connected and automated vehicles
title_zh: 用于联网和自动驾驶车辆安全分析的自适应多保真度采样框架
abstract: Testing and evaluation are expensive but critical steps in the development of connected and automated vehicles (CAVs). In this paper, we develop an adaptive sampling framework to efficiently evaluate the accident rate of CAVs, particularly for scenario-based tests where the probability distribution of input parameters is known from the Naturalistic Driving Data. Our framework relies on a surrogate model to approximate the CAV performance and a novel acquisition function to maximize the benefit (information to accident rate) of the next sample formulated through an information-theoretic consideration. In addition to the standard application with only a single high-fidelity model of CAV performance, we also extend our approach to the bi-fidelity context where an additional low-fidelity model can be used at a lower computational cost to approximate the CAV performance. Accordingly, for the second case, our approach is formulated such that it allows the choice of the next sample in terms of both fidelity level (i.e., which model to use) and sampling location to maximize the benefit per cost. Our framework is tested in a widely-considered two-dimensional cut-in problem for CAVs, where Intelligent Driving Model (IDM) with different time resolutions are used to construct the high and low-fidelity models. We show that our single-fidelity method outperforms the existing approach for the same problem, and the bi-fidelity method can further save half of the computational cost to reach a similar accuracy in estimating the accident rate.
summary: Testing and evaluation are expensive but critical steps in the development of connected and automated vehicles (CAVs). In this paper, we develop an adaptive sampling framework to efficiently evaluate the accident rate of CAVs, particularly for scenario-based tests where the probability distribution of input parameters is known from the Naturalistic Driving Data. Our framework relies on a surrogate model to approximate the CAV performance and a novel acquisition function to maximize the benefit (information to accident rate) of the next sample formulated through an information-theoretic consideration. In addition to the standard application with only a single high-fidelity model of CAV performance, we also extend our approach to the bi-fidelity context where an additional low-fidelity model can be used at a lower computational cost to approximate the CAV performance. Accordingly, for the second case, our approach is formulated such that it allows the choice of the next sample in terms of both fidelity level (i.e., which model to use) and sampling location to maximize the benefit per cost. Our framework is tested in a widely-considered two-dimensional cut-in problem for CAVs, where Intelligent Driving Model (IDM) with different time resolutions are used to construct the high and low-fidelity models. We show that our single-fidelity method outperforms the existing approach for the same problem, and the bi-fidelity method can further save half of the computational cost to reach a similar accuracy in estimating the accident rate.
abstract_zh: 测试和评估是昂贵的，但却是联网自动驾驶车辆 (CAV) 开发中的关键步骤。在本文中，我们开发了一种自适应采样框架来有效评估 CAV 的事故率，特别是对于基于场景的测试，其中输入参数的概率分布是从自然驾驶数据中得知的。我们的框架依靠代理模型来近似 CAV 性能，并依靠新颖的采集函数来最大化通过信息论考虑制定的下一个样本的收益（信息与事故率）。除了仅具有 CAV 性能的单个高保真模型的标准应用程序之外，我们还将我们的方法扩展到双保真环境，其中可以以较低的计算成本使用附加的低保真模型来近似 CAV 性能。因此，对于第二种情况，我们的方法被制定为允许根据保真度水平（即使用哪个模型）和采样位置来选择下一个样本，以最大化单位成本的收益。我们的框架在广泛考虑的 CAV 二维切入问题中进行了测试，其中使用不同时间分辨率的智能驾驶模型（IDM）来构建高保真度和低保真度模型。我们表明，对于同一问题，我们的单保真方法优于现有方法，并且双保真方法可以进一步节省一半的计算成本，以在估计事故率方面达到类似的准确性。

AI.tldr: 开发一种自适应多保真度采样框架，用于高效评估连接和自动驾驶车辆（CAVs）的事故率。
AI.motivation: 测试和评估是CAV开发中昂贵且关键的步骤，现有方法在场景测试中效率不足，需降低计算成本并提高精度。
AI.method: 基于代理模型和信息论获取函数构建自适应采样框架，通过单保真度和双保真度模型（高低保真度结合）优化样本选择与计算成本。
AI.result: 单保真度方法优于现有技术，双保真度方法在保持精度的同时节省约50%计算成本。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效平衡了安全分析的精度与计算效率，适用于CAV的场景测试优化。

authors_text: Yujia Qin,Cheng Qian,Jing Yi,Weize Chen,Yankai Lin,Xu Han,Zhiyuan Liu,Maosong Sun,Jie Zhou
title: Exploring Mode Connectivity for Pre-trained Language Models
title_zh: 探索预训练语言模型的模式连接
abstract: Recent years have witnessed the prevalent application of pre-trained language models (PLMs) in NLP. From the perspective of parameter space, PLMs provide generic initialization, starting from which high-performance minima could be found. Although plenty of works have studied how to effectively and efficiently adapt PLMs to high-performance minima, little is known about the connection of various minima reached under different adaptation configurations. In this paper, we investigate the geometric connections of different minima through the lens of mode connectivity, which measures whether two minima can be connected with a low-loss path. We conduct empirical analyses to investigate three questions: (1) how could hyperparameters, specific tuning methods, and training data affect PLM's mode connectivity? (2) How does mode connectivity change during pre-training? (3) How does the PLM's task knowledge change along the path connecting two minima? In general, exploring the mode connectivity of PLMs conduces to understanding the geometric connection of different minima, which may help us fathom the inner workings of PLM downstream adaptation.
summary: Recent years have witnessed the prevalent application of pre-trained language models (PLMs) in NLP. From the perspective of parameter space, PLMs provide generic initialization, starting from which high-performance minima could be found. Although plenty of works have studied how to effectively and efficiently adapt PLMs to high-performance minima, little is known about the connection of various minima reached under different adaptation configurations. In this paper, we investigate the geometric connections of different minima through the lens of mode connectivity, which measures whether two minima can be connected with a low-loss path. We conduct empirical analyses to investigate three questions: (1) how could hyperparameters, specific tuning methods, and training data affect PLM's mode connectivity? (2) How does mode connectivity change during pre-training? (3) How does the PLM's task knowledge change along the path connecting two minima? In general, exploring the mode connectivity of PLMs conduces to understanding the geometric connection of different minima, which may help us fathom the inner workings of PLM downstream adaptation.
abstract_zh: 近年来，预训练语言模型（PLM）在 NLP 中得到了广泛的应用。从参数空间的角度来看，PLM 提供通用初始化，从中可以找到高性能最小值。尽管大量工作已经研究了如何有效且高效地使 PLM 适应高性能最小值，但对于不同自适应配置下达到的各种最小值之间的联系知之甚少。在本文中，我们通过模式连通性的角度研究不同最小值的几何连接，它衡量两个最小值是否可以通过低损耗路径连接。我们进行实证分析来研究三个问题：（1）超参数、特定调整方法和训练数据如何影响 PLM 的模式连接？ (2)预训练期间模式连接如何变化？ (3) PLM 的任务知识沿着连接两个最小值的路径如何变化？一般来说，探索 PLM 的模式连通性有助于理解不同最小值的几何连接，这可能有助于我们理解 PLM 下游自适应的内部工作原理。

AI.tldr: 本文研究预训练语言模型（PLMs）在不同适应配置下达到的多个极小值之间的几何连接性，通过模式连接性分析其低损失路径。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有大量研究关注如何高效适应PLMs至高性能极小值，但不同极小值间的连接性尚未被充分探索，阻碍了对PLM下游适应机制的理解。
AI.method: 通过实证分析，从模式连接性角度测量不同极小值间的低损失路径，探讨超参数、调优方法、训练数据对连接性的影响，并分析预训练过程中连接性变化及任务知识沿路径的演变。
AI.result: 发现超参数与训练数据显著影响模式连接性，预训练阶段连接性呈现动态变化，且沿极小值路径的任务知识存在可解释的渐进式调整。
AI.conclusion: 探索PLM的模式连接性有助于揭示不同极小值的几何关系，为理解模型适应机制及优化下游任务提供新视角。

ai_content.tldr: 本文研究预训练语言模型（PLMs）在不同适应配置下达到的多个极小值之间的几何连接性，通过模式连接性分析其低损失路径。
ai_content.motivation: 尽管已有大量研究关注如何高效适应PLMs至高性能极小值，但不同极小值间的连接性尚未被充分探索，阻碍了对PLM下游适应机制的理解。
ai_content.method: 通过实证分析，从模式连接性角度测量不同极小值间的低损失路径，探讨超参数、调优方法、训练数据对连接性的影响，并分析预训练过程中连接性变化及任务知识沿路径的演变。
ai_content.result: 发现超参数与训练数据显著影响模式连接性，预训练阶段连接性呈现动态变化，且沿极小值路径的任务知识存在可解释的渐进式调整。
ai_content.conclusion: 探索PLM的模式连接性有助于揭示不同极小值的几何关系，为理解模型适应机制及优化下游任务提供新视角。

search_text: Exploring Mode Connectivity for Pre-trained Language Models 探索预训练语言模型的模式连接 Recent years have witnessed the prevalent application of pre-trained language models (PLMs) in NLP. From the perspective of parameter space, PLMs provide generic initialization, starting from which high-performance minima could be found. Although plenty of works have studied how to effectively and efficiently adapt PLMs to high-performance minima, little is known about the connection of various minima reached under different adaptation configurations. In this paper, we investigate the geometric connections of different minima through the lens of mode connectivity, which measures whether two minima can be connected with a low-loss path. We conduct empirical analyses to investigate three questions: (1) how could hyperparameters, specific tuning methods, and training data affect PLM's mode connectivity? (2) How does mode connectivity change during pre-training? (3) How does the PLM's task knowledge change along the path connecting two minima? In general, exploring the mode connectivity of PLMs conduces to understanding the geometric connection of different minima, which may help us fathom the inner workings of PLM downstream adaptation. 近年来，预训练语言模型（PLM）在 NLP 中得到了广泛的应用。从参数空间的角度来看，PLM 提供通用初始化，从中可以找到高性能最小值。尽管大量工作已经研究了如何有效且高效地使 PLM 适应高性能最小值，但对于不同自适应配置下达到的各种最小值之间的联系知之甚少。在本文中，我们通过模式连通性的角度研究不同最小值的几何连接，它衡量两个最小值是否可以通过低损耗路径连接。我们进行实证分析来研究三个问题：（1）超参数、特定调整方法和训练数据如何影响 PLM 的模式连接？ (2)预训练期间模式连接如何变化？ (3) PLM 的任务知识沿着连接两个最小值的路径如何变化？一般来说，探索 PLM 的模式连通性有助于理解不同最小值的几何连接，这可能有助于我们理解 PLM 下游自适应的内部工作原理。 本文研究预训练语言模型（PLMs）在不同适应配置下达到的多个极小值之间的几何连接性，通过模式连接性分析其低损失路径。 Yujia Qin,Cheng Qian,Jing Yi,Weize Chen,Yankai Lin,Xu Han,Zhiyuan Liu,Maosong Sun,Jie Zhou cs.CL,cs.AI

title: EBEN: Extreme bandwidth extension network applied to speech signals captured with noise-resilient body-conduction microphones
title_zh: EBEN：极端带宽扩展网络应用于使用抗噪声体传导麦克风捕获的语音信号
abstract: In this paper, we present Extreme Bandwidth Extension Network (EBEN), a Generative Adversarial network (GAN) that enhances audio measured with body-conduction microphones. This type of capture equipment suppresses ambient noise at the expense of speech bandwidth, thereby requiring signal enhancement techniques to recover the wideband speech signal. EBEN leverages a multiband decomposition of the raw captured speech to decrease the data time-domain dimensions, and give better control over the full-band signal. This multiband representation is fed to a U-Net-like model, which adopts a combination of feature and adversarial losses to recover an enhanced audio signal. We also benefit from this original representation in the proposed discriminator architecture. Our approach can achieve state-of-the-art results with a lightweight generator and real-time compatible operation.
summary: In this paper, we present Extreme Bandwidth Extension Network (EBEN), a Generative Adversarial network (GAN) that enhances audio measured with body-conduction microphones. This type of capture equipment suppresses ambient noise at the expense of speech bandwidth, thereby requiring signal enhancement techniques to recover the wideband speech signal. EBEN leverages a multiband decomposition of the raw captured speech to decrease the data time-domain dimensions, and give better control over the full-band signal. This multiband representation is fed to a U-Net-like model, which adopts a combination of feature and adversarial losses to recover an enhanced audio signal. We also benefit from this original representation in the proposed discriminator architecture. Our approach can achieve state-of-the-art results with a lightweight generator and real-time compatible operation.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了极限带宽扩展网络（EBEN），这是一种生成对抗网络（GAN），可以增强使用体传导麦克风测量的音频。这种类型的捕获设备以牺牲语音带宽为代价来抑制环境噪声，因此需要信号增强技术来恢复宽带语音信号。 EBEN 利用原始捕获语音的多频​​带分解来减少数据时域维度，并更好地控制全频带信号。这种多频带表示被馈送到类似 U-Net 的模型，该模型采用特征和对抗性损失的组合来恢复增强的音频信号。我们还受益于所提出的鉴别器架构中的这种原始表示。我们的方法可以通过轻量级生成器和实时兼容操作实现最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的极端带宽扩展网络（EBEN），用于增强通过抗噪声体传导麦克风捕获的语音信号。
AI.motivation: 体传导麦克风在抑制环境噪声的同时会压缩语音带宽，需要信号增强技术恢复高质量宽带语音。
AI.method: 通过多带分解降低时间维度数据，结合U-Net结构与特征/对抗损失进行信号重建，并优化判别器架构。
AI.result: 在轻量级生成器和实时操作条件下达到最先进增强效果，有效恢复宽带语音信号。
AI.conclusion: EBEN方法在保证实时性的同时实现了高质量语音带宽扩展，适用于噪声环境下的语音增强场景。

title: Audio MFCC-gram Transformers for respiratory insufficiency detection in COVID-19
title_zh: 用于检测 COVID-19 呼吸功能不全的音频 MFCC-gram Transformer
comment: ef:SIMPÓSIO BRASILEIRO DE TECNOLOGIA DA INFORMAÇÃO E DA LINGUAGEM HUMANA (STIL), 13. , 2021, Evento Online. Anais [...]. Porto Alegre: Sociedade Brasileira de Computação, 2021 . p. 143-152
comments: ef:SIMPÓSIO BRASILEIRO DE TECNOLOGIA DA INFORMAÇÃO E DA LINGUAGEM HUMANA (STIL), 13. , 2021, Evento Online. Anais [...]. Porto Alegre: Sociedade Brasileira de Computação, 2021 . p. 143-152
abstract: This work explores speech as a biomarker and investigates the detection of respiratory insufficiency (RI) by analyzing speech samples. Previous work \cite{spira2021} constructed a dataset of respiratory insufficiency COVID-19 patient utterances and analyzed it by means of a convolutional neural network achieving an accuracy of $87.04\%$, validating the hypothesis that one can detect RI through speech. Here, we study how Transformer neural network architectures can improve the performance on RI detection. This approach enables construction of an acoustic model. By choosing the correct pretraining technique, we generate a self-supervised acoustic model, leading to improved performance ($96.53\%$) of Transformers for RI detection.
summary: This work explores speech as a biomarker and investigates the detection of respiratory insufficiency (RI) by analyzing speech samples. Previous work \cite{spira2021} constructed a dataset of respiratory insufficiency COVID-19 patient utterances and analyzed it by means of a convolutional neural network achieving an accuracy of $87.04\%$, validating the hypothesis that one can detect RI through speech. Here, we study how Transformer neural network architectures can improve the performance on RI detection. This approach enables construction of an acoustic model. By choosing the correct pretraining technique, we generate a self-supervised acoustic model, leading to improved performance ($96.53\%$) of Transformers for RI detection.
abstract_zh: 这项工作探索了语音作为生物标志物的作用，并通过分析语音样本来研究呼吸功能不全 (RI) 的检测。之前的工作 \cite{spira2021} 构建了呼吸功能不全的 COVID-19 患者言语数据集，并通过卷积神经网络对其进行了分析，达到了 $87.04\%$ 的准确度，验证了人们可以通过语音检测 RI 的假设。在这里，我们研究 Transformer 神经网络架构如何提高 RI 检测的性能。这种方法可以构建声学模型。通过选择正确的预训练技术，我们生成了一个自监督声学模型，从而提高了 Transformer RI 检测的性能 ($96.53\%$)。

AI.tldr: 本文研究利用音频MFCC-gram和Transformer模型检测COVID-19患者的呼吸不足（RI），通过自监督预训练提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 先前研究使用CNN检测RI准确率达87.04%，但作者认为Transformer架构可能进一步提升性能，并探索自监督学习的潜力。
AI.method: 构建基于MFCC-gram的音频模型，采用Transformer架构并结合自监督预训练技术优化RI检测。
AI.result: Transformer模型在RI检测中达到96.53%的准确率，显著优于之前的CNN方法（87.04%）。
AI.conclusion: Transformer结合自监督预训练能有效提升RI检测性能，为语音生物标志物研究提供新方向。

title: On Fine-Tuned Deep Features for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 关于无监督域适应的微调深度特征
abstract: Prior feature transformation based approaches to Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) employ the deep features extracted by pre-trained deep models without fine-tuning them on the specific source or target domain data for a particular domain adaptation task. In contrast, end-to-end learning based approaches optimise the pre-trained backbones and the customised adaptation modules simultaneously to learn domain-invariant features for UDA. In this work, we explore the potential of combining fine-tuned features and feature transformation based UDA methods for improved domain adaptation performance. Specifically, we integrate the prevalent progressive pseudo-labelling techniques into the fine-tuning framework to extract fine-tuned features which are subsequently used in a state-of-the-art feature transformation based domain adaptation method SPL (Selective Pseudo-Labeling). Thorough experiments with multiple deep models including ResNet-50/101 and DeiT-small/base are conducted to demonstrate the combination of fine-tuned features and SPL can achieve state-of-the-art performance on several benchmark datasets.
summary: Prior feature transformation based approaches to Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) employ the deep features extracted by pre-trained deep models without fine-tuning them on the specific source or target domain data for a particular domain adaptation task. In contrast, end-to-end learning based approaches optimise the pre-trained backbones and the customised adaptation modules simultaneously to learn domain-invariant features for UDA. In this work, we explore the potential of combining fine-tuned features and feature transformation based UDA methods for improved domain adaptation performance. Specifically, we integrate the prevalent progressive pseudo-labelling techniques into the fine-tuning framework to extract fine-tuned features which are subsequently used in a state-of-the-art feature transformation based domain adaptation method SPL (Selective Pseudo-Labeling). Thorough experiments with multiple deep models including ResNet-50/101 and DeiT-small/base are conducted to demonstrate the combination of fine-tuned features and SPL can achieve state-of-the-art performance on several benchmark datasets.
abstract_zh: 先前基于特征转换的无监督域适应（UDA）方法采用由预先训练的深度模型提取的深层特征，而无需针对特定域适应任务对特定源或目标域数据进行微调。相比之下，基于端到端学习的方法同时优化预训练的主干和定制的适应模块，以学习 UDA 的域不变特征。在这项工作中，我们探索了结合微调特征和基于特征转换的 UDA 方法的潜力，以提高域适应性能。具体来说，我们将流行的渐进伪标签技术集成到微调框架中，以提取微调特征，这些特征随后用于基于最先进的特征转换的域适应方法 SPL（选择性伪标签）。对包括 ResNet-50/101 和 DeiT-small/base 在内的多个深度模型进行了彻底的实验，以证明微调特征和 SPL 的组合可以在多个基准数据集上实现最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨结合微调深度特征与特征变换方法提升无监督域适应性能。
AI.motivation: 现有域适应方法或直接使用预训练特征而未微调，或采用端到端学习但忽略特征微调潜力，限制了性能提升。
AI.method: 将渐进伪标签技术集成到微调框架中提取特征，再结合SPL方法进行域适应。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上达到最先进水平，验证了微调特征与SPL结合的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 微调特征与特征变换方法的结合能显著提升无监督域适应效果。

search_text: On Fine-Tuned Deep Features for Unsupervised Domain Adaptation 关于无监督域适应的微调深度特征 Prior feature transformation based approaches to Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) employ the deep features extracted by pre-trained deep models without fine-tuning them on the specific source or target domain data for a particular domain adaptation task. In contrast, end-to-end learning based approaches optimise the pre-trained backbones and the customised adaptation modules simultaneously to learn domain-invariant features for UDA. In this work, we explore the potential of combining fine-tuned features and feature transformation based UDA methods for improved domain adaptation performance. Specifically, we integrate the prevalent progressive pseudo-labelling techniques into the fine-tuning framework to extract fine-tuned features which are subsequently used in a state-of-the-art feature transformation based domain adaptation method SPL (Selective Pseudo-Labeling). Thorough experiments with multiple deep models including ResNet-50/101 and DeiT-small/base are conducted to demonstrate the combination of fine-tuned features and SPL can achieve state-of-the-art performance on several benchmark datasets. 先前基于特征转换的无监督域适应（UDA）方法采用由预先训练的深度模型提取的深层特征，而无需针对特定域适应任务对特定源或目标域数据进行微调。相比之下，基于端到端学习的方法同时优化预训练的主干和定制的适应模块，以学习 UDA 的域不变特征。在这项工作中，我们探索了结合微调特征和基于特征转换的 UDA 方法的潜力，以提高域适应性能。具体来说，我们将流行的渐进伪标签技术集成到微调框架中，以提取微调特征，这些特征随后用于基于最先进的特征转换的域适应方法 SPL（选择性伪标签）。对包括 ResNet-50/101 和 DeiT-small/base 在内的多个深度模型进行了彻底的实验，以证明微调特征和 SPL 的组合可以在多个基准数据集上实现最先进的性能。 本文探讨结合微调深度特征与特征变换方法提升无监督域适应性能。 Qian Wang,Toby P. Breckon cs.CV

authors_text: Ziyu Zhao,Yuqi Bai,Kun Kuang,Ruoxuan Xiong,Fei Wu
title: Learning Individual Treatment Effects under Heterogeneous Interference in Networks
title_zh: 学习网络异质干扰下的个体治疗效果
abstract: Estimates of individual treatment effects from networked observational data are attracting increasing attention these days. One major challenge in network scenarios is the violation of the stable unit treatment value assumption (SUTVA), which assumes that the treatment assignment of a unit does not influence others' outcomes. In network data, due to interference, the outcome of a unit is influenced not only by its treatment (i.e., direct effects) but also by others' treatments (i.e., spillover effects). Furthermore, the influences from other units are always heterogeneous (e.g., friends with similar interests affect a person differently than friends with different interests). In this paper, we focus on the problem of estimating individual treatment effects (both direct and spillover effects) under heterogeneous interference. To address this issue, we propose a novel Dual Weighting Regression (DWR) algorithm by simultaneously learning attention weights that capture the heterogeneous interference and sample weights to eliminate the complex confounding bias in networks. We formulate the entire learning process as a bi-level optimization problem. In theory, we present generalization error bounds for individual treatment effect estimation. Extensive experiments on four benchmark datasets demonstrate that the proposed DWR algorithm outperforms state-of-the-art methods for estimating individual treatment effects under heterogeneous interference.
summary: Estimates of individual treatment effects from networked observational data are attracting increasing attention these days. One major challenge in network scenarios is the violation of the stable unit treatment value assumption (SUTVA), which assumes that the treatment assignment of a unit does not influence others' outcomes. In network data, due to interference, the outcome of a unit is influenced not only by its treatment (i.e., direct effects) but also by others' treatments (i.e., spillover effects). Furthermore, the influences from other units are always heterogeneous (e.g., friends with similar interests affect a person differently than friends with different interests). In this paper, we focus on the problem of estimating individual treatment effects (both direct and spillover effects) under heterogeneous interference. To address this issue, we propose a novel Dual Weighting Regression (DWR) algorithm by simultaneously learning attention weights that capture the heterogeneous interference and sample weights to eliminate the complex confounding bias in networks. We formulate the entire learning process as a bi-level optimization problem. In theory, we present generalization error bounds for individual treatment effect estimation. Extensive experiments on four benchmark datasets demonstrate that the proposed DWR algorithm outperforms state-of-the-art methods for estimating individual treatment effects under heterogeneous interference.
abstract_zh: 如今，根据网络观察数据对个体治疗效果的估计越来越引起人们的关注。网络场景中的一个主要挑战是违反稳定单元处理值假设（SUTVA），该假设假设一个单元的处理分配不会影响其他单元的结果。在网络数据中，由于干扰，一个单元的结果不仅受到其处理（即直接效应）的影响，而且还受到其他单元处理（即溢出效应）的影响。此外，来自其他单位的影响总是异质的（例如，具有相似兴趣的朋友与具有不同兴趣的朋友对一个人的影响不同）。在本文中，我们重点研究异质干扰下估计个体治疗效果（直接效应和溢出效应）的问题。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的双权重回归（DWR）算法，通过同时学习捕获异质干扰和样本权重的注意力权重来消除网络中复杂的混杂偏差。我们将整个学习过程表述为双层优化问题。理论上，我们提出了个体治疗效果估计的泛化误差界限。对四个基准数据集的大量实验表明，所提出的 DWR 算法优于估计异构干扰下个体治疗效果的最先进方法。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在从网络观测数据中估计个体处理效应，考虑异质性干扰的影响。
AI.motivation: 网络场景中稳定单元处理值假设(SUTVA)被违反，个体结果不仅受自身处理影响，还受其他个体处理的异质性溢出效应影响，现有方法难以准确估计个体处理效应。
AI.method: 提出双加权回归(DWR)算法，通过同时学习捕捉异质性干扰的注意力权重和消除网络混杂偏差的样本权重，将学习过程建模为双层优化问题。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上的实验表明，DWR算法在异质性干扰下的个体处理效应估计任务中优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: DWR算法通过建模异质性干扰和消除混杂偏差，有效提升了网络数据中个体处理效应估计的准确性。

title: Unsupervised Anomaly Detection for Auditing Data and Impact of Categorical Encodings
title_zh: 用于审核数据和分类编码影响的无监督异常检测
comment: This work has been accepted at Proceedings of the Neurips 2022 Workshop on Synthetic Data 4ML
comments: This work has been accepted at Proceedings of the Neurips 2022 Workshop on Synthetic Data 4ML
abstract: In this paper, we introduce the Vehicle Claims dataset, consisting of fraudulent insurance claims for automotive repairs. The data belongs to the more broad category of Auditing data, which includes also Journals and Network Intrusion data. Insurance claim data are distinctively different from other auditing data (such as network intrusion data) in their high number of categorical attributes. We tackle the common problem of missing benchmark datasets for anomaly detection: datasets are mostly confidential, and the public tabular datasets do not contain relevant and sufficient categorical attributes. Therefore, a large-sized dataset is created for this purpose and referred to as Vehicle Claims (VC) dataset. The dataset is evaluated on shallow and deep learning methods. Due to the introduction of categorical attributes, we encounter the challenge of encoding them for the large dataset. As One Hot encoding of high cardinal dataset invokes the "curse of dimensionality", we experiment with GEL encoding and embedding layer for representing categorical attributes. Our work compares competitive learning, reconstruction-error, density estimation and contrastive learning approaches for Label, One Hot, GEL encoding and embedding layer to handle categorical values.
summary: In this paper, we introduce the Vehicle Claims dataset, consisting of fraudulent insurance claims for automotive repairs. The data belongs to the more broad category of Auditing data, which includes also Journals and Network Intrusion data. Insurance claim data are distinctively different from other auditing data (such as network intrusion data) in their high number of categorical attributes. We tackle the common problem of missing benchmark datasets for anomaly detection: datasets are mostly confidential, and the public tabular datasets do not contain relevant and sufficient categorical attributes. Therefore, a large-sized dataset is created for this purpose and referred to as Vehicle Claims (VC) dataset. The dataset is evaluated on shallow and deep learning methods. Due to the introduction of categorical attributes, we encounter the challenge of encoding them for the large dataset. As One Hot encoding of high cardinal dataset invokes the "curse of dimensionality", we experiment with GEL encoding and embedding layer for representing categorical attributes. Our work compares competitive learning, reconstruction-error, density estimation and contrastive learning approaches for Label, One Hot, GEL encoding and embedding layer to handle categorical values.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了车辆索赔数据集，其中包含汽车维修的欺诈性保险索赔。这些数据属于更广泛的审计数据类别，其中还包括期刊和网络入侵数据。保险索赔数据与其他审计数据（例如网络入侵数据）的明显不同之处在于其大量的分类属性。我们解决了异常检测缺少基准数据集的常见问题：数据集大多是机密的，公共表格数据集不包含相关且足够的分类属性。因此，为此目的创建了一个大型数据集，称为车辆索赔（VC）数据集。该数据集通过浅层和深度学习方法进行评估。由于分类属性的引入，我们遇到了针对大型数据集对它们进行编码的挑战。由于高基数数据集的 One Hot 编码会引发“维数灾难”，因此我们尝试使用 GEL 编码和嵌入层来表示分类属性。我们的工作比较了竞争性学习、重建误差、密度估计和标签、One Hot、GEL 编码和嵌入层处理分类值的对比学习方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出用于审计数据的无监督异常检测方法，并探讨分类变量编码对模型性能的影响，同时发布包含大量分类属性的Vehicle Claims数据集。
AI.motivation: 现有审计数据集多为保密数据或缺乏足够分类属性，难以支撑异常检测研究，尤其针对保险理赔等高分类特征场景存在基准数据缺失问题。
AI.method: 构建包含车辆理赔欺诈数据的VC数据集，对比One Hot编码、GEL编码、嵌入层等方法在浅层与深度学习模型中的表现，评估标签学习、重构误差、密度估计等异常检测框架效果。
AI.result: 验证了GEL编码和嵌入层在处理高基数分类变量时优于传统One Hot编码，且VC数据集可有效评估不同异常检测方法在审计数据场景的性能差异。
AI.conclusion: 通过新型数据集和编码方法研究，为审计领域异常检测提供了基准数据支持，证明了深度学习方法结合合适分类编码在处理高维分类特征时的优越性。

search_text: Unsupervised Anomaly Detection for Auditing Data and Impact of Categorical Encodings 用于审核数据和分类编码影响的无监督异常检测 In this paper, we introduce the Vehicle Claims dataset, consisting of fraudulent insurance claims for automotive repairs. The data belongs to the more broad category of Auditing data, which includes also Journals and Network Intrusion data. Insurance claim data are distinctively different from other auditing data (such as network intrusion data) in their high number of categorical attributes. We tackle the common problem of missing benchmark datasets for anomaly detection: datasets are mostly confidential, and the public tabular datasets do not contain relevant and sufficient categorical attributes. Therefore, a large-sized dataset is created for this purpose and referred to as Vehicle Claims (VC) dataset. The dataset is evaluated on shallow and deep learning methods. Due to the introduction of categorical attributes, we encounter the challenge of encoding them for the large dataset. As One Hot encoding of high cardinal dataset invokes the "curse of dimensionality", we experiment with GEL encoding and embedding layer for representing categorical attributes. Our work compares competitive learning, reconstruction-error, density estimation and contrastive learning approaches for Label, One Hot, GEL encoding and embedding layer to handle categorical values. 在本文中，我们介绍了车辆索赔数据集，其中包含汽车维修的欺诈性保险索赔。这些数据属于更广泛的审计数据类别，其中还包括期刊和网络入侵数据。保险索赔数据与其他审计数据（例如网络入侵数据）的明显不同之处在于其大量的分类属性。我们解决了异常检测缺少基准数据集的常见问题：数据集大多是机密的，公共表格数据集不包含相关且足够的分类属性。因此，为此目的创建了一个大型数据集，称为车辆索赔（VC）数据集。该数据集通过浅层和深度学习方法进行评估。由于分类属性的引入，我们遇到了针对大型数据集对它们进行编码的挑战。由于高基数数据集的 One Hot 编码会引发“维数灾难”，因此我们尝试使用 GEL 编码和嵌入层来表示分类属性。我们的工作比较了竞争性学习、重建误差、密度估计和标签、One Hot、GEL 编码和嵌入层处理分类值的对比学习方法。 本文提出用于审计数据的无监督异常检测方法，并探讨分类变量编码对模型性能的影响，同时发布包含大量分类属性的Vehicle Claims数据集。 Ajay Chawda,Stefanie Grimm,Marius Kloft cs.LG,cs.AI

title: Policy-Guided Lazy Search with Feedback for Task and Motion Planning
title_zh: 带有任务和运动规划反馈的策略引导惰性搜索
comment: ef:2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), London, United Kingdom, 2023, pp. 3743-3749
comments: ef:2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), London, United Kingdom, 2023, pp. 3743-3749
abstract: PDDLStream solvers have recently emerged as viable solutions for Task and Motion Planning (TAMP) problems, extending PDDL to problems with continuous action spaces. Prior work has shown how PDDLStream problems can be reduced to a sequence of PDDL planning problems, which can then be solved using off-the-shelf planners. However, this approach can suffer from long runtimes. In this paper we propose LAZY, a solver for PDDLStream problems that maintains a single integrated search over action skeletons, which gets progressively more geometrically informed, as samples of possible motions are lazily drawn during motion planning. We explore how learned models of goal-directed policies and current motion sampling data can be incorporated in LAZY to adaptively guide the task planner. We show that this leads to significant speed-ups in the search for a feasible solution evaluated over unseen test environments of varying numbers of objects, goals, and initial conditions. We evaluate our TAMP approach by comparing to existing solvers for PDDLStream problems on a range of simulated 7DoF rearrangement/manipulation problems.
summary: PDDLStream solvers have recently emerged as viable solutions for Task and Motion Planning (TAMP) problems, extending PDDL to problems with continuous action spaces. Prior work has shown how PDDLStream problems can be reduced to a sequence of PDDL planning problems, which can then be solved using off-the-shelf planners. However, this approach can suffer from long runtimes. In this paper we propose LAZY, a solver for PDDLStream problems that maintains a single integrated search over action skeletons, which gets progressively more geometrically informed, as samples of possible motions are lazily drawn during motion planning. We explore how learned models of goal-directed policies and current motion sampling data can be incorporated in LAZY to adaptively guide the task planner. We show that this leads to significant speed-ups in the search for a feasible solution evaluated over unseen test environments of varying numbers of objects, goals, and initial conditions. We evaluate our TAMP approach by comparing to existing solvers for PDDLStream problems on a range of simulated 7DoF rearrangement/manipulation problems.
abstract_zh: PDDLStream 求解器最近成为任务和运动规划 (TAMP) 问题的可行解决方案，将 PDDL 扩展到具有连续动作空间的问题。之前的工作已经展示了如何将 PDDLStream 问题简化为一系列 PDDL 规划问题，然后可以使用现成的规划器来解决这些问题。然而，这种方法可能会受到运行时间过长的影响。在本文中，我们提出了 LAZY，一种 PDDLStream 问题的求解器，它维护对动作骨架的单一集成搜索，随着在运动规划期间延迟绘制可能运动的样本，该搜索逐渐获得更多的几何信息。我们探索如何将目标导向策略和当前运动采样数据的学习模型合并到 LAZY 中，以自适应地指导任务规划器。我们表明，这会显着加快寻找可行解决方案的速度，该解决方案是在不同数量的对象、目标和初始条件的未见过的测试环境中进行评估的。我们通过与一系列模拟 7DoF 重排/操作问题上的 PDDLStream 问题的现有求解器进行比较来评估我们的 TAMP 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LAZY的求解器，通过结合策略模型和运动采样数据，优化PDDLStream在任务与运动规划（TAMP）中的搜索效率。
AI.motivation: 现有PDDLStream求解器在处理连续动作空间的TAMP问题时，因需解决多个PDDL规划问题而面临运行时间过长的挑战，亟需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: LAZY通过维护单一流程的集成搜索，逐步整合几何信息，并利用学习的导向策略模型和实时运动采样数据，自适应引导任务规划器。
AI.result: 实验表明，LAZY在多种未见过的测试环境中，针对不同数量的对象、目标和初始条件，显著提升了搜索速度，并在7自由度模拟任务中优于现有求解器。
AI.conclusion: LAZY通过策略引导的懒惰搜索方法，有效解决了TAMP问题的效率瓶颈，为复杂场景下的任务与运动规划提供了更优的解决方案。
