title: Bridging Distributional and Risk-sensitive Reinforcement Learning with Provable Regret Bounds
title_zh: 将分布式和风险敏感的强化学习与可证明的遗憾界限联系起来
abstract: We study the regret guarantee for risk-sensitive reinforcement learning (RSRL) via distributional reinforcement learning (DRL) methods. In particular, we consider finite episodic Markov decision processes whose objective is the entropic risk measure (EntRM) of return. By leveraging a key property of the EntRM, the independence property, we establish the risk-sensitive distributional dynamic programming framework. We then propose two novel DRL algorithms that implement optimism through two different schemes, including a model-free one and a model-based one. We prove that they both attain $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(\frac{\exp(|β| H)-1}{|β|}H\sqrt{S^2AK})$ regret upper bound, where $S$, $A$, $K$, and $H$ represent the number of states, actions, episodes, and the time horizon, respectively. It matches RSVI2 proposed in \cite{fei2021exponential}, with novel distributional analysis. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first regret analysis that bridges DRL and RSRL in terms of sample complexity. Acknowledging the computational inefficiency associated with the model-free DRL algorithm, we propose an alternative DRL algorithm with distribution representation. This approach not only maintains the established regret bounds but also significantly amplifies computational efficiency. We also prove a tighter minimax lower bound of $Ω(\frac{\exp(βH/6)-1}{βH}H\sqrt{SAT})$ for the $β>0$ case, which recovers the tight lower bound $Ω(H\sqrt{SAT})$ in the risk-neutral setting.
summary: We study the regret guarantee for risk-sensitive reinforcement learning (RSRL) via distributional reinforcement learning (DRL) methods. In particular, we consider finite episodic Markov decision processes whose objective is the entropic risk measure (EntRM) of return. By leveraging a key property of the EntRM, the independence property, we establish the risk-sensitive distributional dynamic programming framework. We then propose two novel DRL algorithms that implement optimism through two different schemes, including a model-free one and a model-based one. We prove that they both attain $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(\frac{\exp(|β| H)-1}{|β|}H\sqrt{S^2AK})$ regret upper bound, where $S$, $A$, $K$, and $H$ represent the number of states, actions, episodes, and the time horizon, respectively. It matches RSVI2 proposed in \cite{fei2021exponential}, with novel distributional analysis. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first regret analysis that bridges DRL and RSRL in terms of sample complexity. Acknowledging the computational inefficiency associated with the model-free DRL algorithm, we propose an alternative DRL algorithm with distribution representation. This approach not only maintains the established regret bounds but also significantly amplifies computational efficiency. We also prove a tighter minimax lower bound of $Ω(\frac{\exp(βH/6)-1}{βH}H\sqrt{SAT})$ for the $β>0$ case, which recovers the tight lower bound $Ω(H\sqrt{SAT})$ in the risk-neutral setting.
abstract_zh: 我们通过分布式强化学习（DRL）方法研究风险敏感强化学习（RSRL）的后悔保证。特别是，我们考虑有限情景马尔可夫决策过程，其目标是回报的熵风险度量（EntRM）。通过利用EntRM的一个关键属性——独立性，我们建立了风险敏感的分布式动态规划框架。然后，我们提出了两种新颖的 DRL 算法，它们通过两种不同的方案实现乐观性，包括无模型方案和基于模型的方案。我们证明它们都达到 $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(\frac{\exp(|β| H)-1}{|β|}H\sqrt{S^2AK})$ 遗憾上限，其中 $S$、$A$、$K$ 和 $H$ 分别表示状态、动作、情节和时间范围的数量。它与 \cite{fei2021exponential} 中提出的 RSVI2 相匹配，具有新颖的分布分析。据我们所知，这是第一个在样本复杂性方面连接 DRL 和 RSRL 的遗憾分析。认识到与无模型 DRL 算法相关的计算效率低下，我们提出了一种具有分布表示的替代 DRL 算法。这种方法不仅保持了既定的后悔界限，而且还显着提高了计算效率。我们还证明了 $β>0$ 情况下 $Ω(\frac{\exp(βH/6)-1}{βH}H\sqrt{SAT})$ 的更严格的极小极大下界，这恢复了风险中性设置中的严格下界 $Ω(H\sqrt{SAT})$。

AI.tldr: 该论文通过分布强化学习方法研究风险敏感强化学习的遗憾界，提出两种新算法并建立理论分析框架。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏将分布强化学习（DRL）与风险敏感强化学习（RSRL）结合的理论分析，尤其在样本复杂度方面的保证不足。
AI.method: 利用熵风险度量的独立性特性构建风险敏感分布动态规划框架，设计模型无关和模型相关的两种DRL算法，并引入分布表示提升计算效率。
AI.result: 证明两种算法均达到与RSVI2相同的遗憾上界，且提出更紧的 minimax 下界，恢复了风险中性场景的下界结果。
AI.conclusion: 首次在样本复杂度层面连接DRL与RSRL，提出兼顾理论保证与计算效率的新型算法框架。

method: 利用熵风险度量的独立性特性构建风险敏感分布动态规划框架，设计模型无关和模型相关的两种DRL算法，并引入分布表示提升计算效率。
result: 证明两种算法均达到与RSVI2相同的遗憾上界，且提出更紧的 minimax 下界，恢复了风险中性场景的下界结果。
conclusion: 首次在样本复杂度层面连接DRL与RSRL，提出兼顾理论保证与计算效率的新型算法框架。
search_text: Bridging Distributional and Risk-sensitive Reinforcement Learning with Provable Regret Bounds 将分布式和风险敏感的强化学习与可证明的遗憾界限联系起来 We study the regret guarantee for risk-sensitive reinforcement learning (RSRL) via distributional reinforcement learning (DRL) methods. In particular, we consider finite episodic Markov decision processes whose objective is the entropic risk measure (EntRM) of return. By leveraging a key property of the EntRM, the independence property, we establish the risk-sensitive distributional dynamic programming framework. We then propose two novel DRL algorithms that implement optimism through two different schemes, including a model-free one and a model-based one. We prove that they both attain $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(\frac{\exp(|β| H)-1}{|β|}H\sqrt{S^2AK})$ regret upper bound, where $S$, $A$, $K$, and $H$ represent the number of states, actions, episodes, and the time horizon, respectively. It matches RSVI2 proposed in \cite{fei2021exponential}, with novel distributional analysis. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first regret analysis that bridges DRL and RSRL in terms of sample complexity. Acknowledging the computational inefficiency associated with the model-free DRL algorithm, we propose an alternative DRL algorithm with distribution representation. This approach not only maintains the established regret bounds but also significantly amplifies computational efficiency. We also prove a tighter minimax lower bound of $Ω(\frac{\exp(βH/6)-1}{βH}H\sqrt{SAT})$ for the $β>0$ case, which recovers the tight lower bound $Ω(H\sqrt{SAT})$ in the risk-neutral setting. 我们通过分布式强化学习（DRL）方法研究风险敏感强化学习（RSRL）的后悔保证。特别是，我们考虑有限情景马尔可夫决策过程，其目标是回报的熵风险度量（EntRM）。通过利用EntRM的一个关键属性——独立性，我们建立了风险敏感的分布式动态规划框架。然后，我们提出了两种新颖的 DRL 算法，它们通过两种不同的方案实现乐观性，包括无模型方案和基于模型的方案。我们证明它们都达到 $\tilde{\mathcal{O}}(\frac{\exp(|β| H)-1}{|β|}H\sqrt{S^2AK})$ 遗憾上限，其中 $S$、$A$、$K$ 和 $H$ 分别表示状态、动作、情节和时间范围的数量。它与 \cite{fei2021exponential} 中提出的 RSVI2 相匹配，具有新颖的分布分析。据我们所知，这是第一个在样本复杂性方面连接 DRL 和 RSRL 的遗憾分析。认识到与无模型 DRL 算法相关的计算效率低下，我们提出了一种具有分布表示的替代 DRL 算法。这种方法不仅保持了既定的后悔界限，而且还显着提高了计算效率。我们还证明了 $β>0$ 情况下 $Ω(\frac{\exp(βH/6)-1}{βH}H\sqrt{SAT})$ 的更严格的极小极大下界，这恢复了风险中性设置中的严格下界 $Ω(H\sqrt{SAT})$。 该论文通过分布强化学习方法研究风险敏感强化学习的遗憾界，提出两种新算法并建立理论分析框架。 Hao Liang,Zhi-Quan Luo cs.LG,cs.AI,stat.ML

title: Enhanced Fuzzy Decomposition of Sound Into Sines, Transients, and Noise
title_zh: 增强的声音模糊分解为正弦波、瞬变波和噪声
comment: Submitted for publication to the Journal of Audio Engineering Society on October 20th, 2022
comments: Submitted for publication to the Journal of Audio Engineering Society on October 20th, 2022
abstract: The decomposition of sounds into sines, transients, and noise is a long-standing research problem in audio processing. The current solutions for this three-way separation detect either horizontal and vertical structures or anisotropy and orientations in the spectrogram to identify the properties of each spectral bin and classify it as sinusoidal, transient, or noise. This paper proposes an enhanced three-way decomposition method based on fuzzy logic, enabling soft masking while preserving the perfect reconstruction property. The proposed method allows each spectral bin to simultaneously belong to two classes, sine and noise or transient and noise. Results of a subjective listening test against three other techniques are reported, showing that the proposed decomposition yields a better or comparable quality. The main improvement appears in transient separation, which enjoys little or no loss of energy or leakage from the other components and performs well for test signals presenting strong transients. The audio quality of the separation is shown to depend on the complexity of the input signal for all tested methods. The proposed method helps improve the quality of various audio processing applications. A successful implementation over a state-of-the-art time-scale modification method is reported as an example.
summary: The decomposition of sounds into sines, transients, and noise is a long-standing research problem in audio processing. The current solutions for this three-way separation detect either horizontal and vertical structures or anisotropy and orientations in the spectrogram to identify the properties of each spectral bin and classify it as sinusoidal, transient, or noise. This paper proposes an enhanced three-way decomposition method based on fuzzy logic, enabling soft masking while preserving the perfect reconstruction property. The proposed method allows each spectral bin to simultaneously belong to two classes, sine and noise or transient and noise. Results of a subjective listening test against three other techniques are reported, showing that the proposed decomposition yields a better or comparable quality. The main improvement appears in transient separation, which enjoys little or no loss of energy or leakage from the other components and performs well for test signals presenting strong transients. The audio quality of the separation is shown to depend on the complexity of the input signal for all tested methods. The proposed method helps improve the quality of various audio processing applications. A successful implementation over a state-of-the-art time-scale modification method is reported as an example.
abstract_zh: 将声音分解为正弦波、瞬态波和噪声是音频处理中长期存在的研究问题。这种三向分离的当前解决方案检测频谱图中的水平和垂直结构或各向异性和方向，以识别每个频谱仓的属性并将其分类为正弦、瞬态或噪声。本文提出了一种基于模糊逻辑的增强三路分解方法，在保持完美重构特性的同时实现软掩蔽。所提出的方法允许每个频谱仓同时属于两类：正弦和噪声或瞬态和噪声。报告了针对其他三种技术的主观听力测试的结果，表明所提出的分解产生了更好或可比的质量。主要的改进出现在瞬态分离方面，它几乎没有或没有其他组件的能量损失或泄漏，并且对于呈现强瞬态的测试信号表现良好。对于所有测试方法来说，分离的音频质量取决于输入信号的复杂性。所提出的方法有助于提高各种音频处理应用的质量。作为一个例子，报告了对最先进的时间尺度修改方法的成功实施。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于模糊逻辑的增强型声音三向分解方法，将声音分解为正弦波、瞬态和噪声，并通过软掩码保持完美重构特性。
AI.motivation: 现有声音分解方法在瞬态分离和能量保留方面存在不足，需改进分离质量与重构性能。
AI.method: 利用模糊逻辑实现软掩码，允许每个频谱分量同时属于两个类别（如正弦与噪声、瞬态与噪声），并保持完美重构特性。
AI.result: 主观听觉测试表明，该方法在瞬态分离中能量损失更小，分离质量优于或媲美其他三种技术，且音频质量随输入信号复杂度变化。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提升了音频处理应用效果，成功应用于最先进的时标修改技术中，验证了其有效性。

title: A Task Allocation Framework for Human Multi-Robot Collaborative Settings
title_zh: 人类多机器人协作设置的任务分配框架
abstract: The requirements of modern production systems together with more advanced robotic technologies have fostered the integration of teams comprising humans and autonomous robots. However, along with the potential benefits also comes the question of how to effectively handle these teams considering the different characteristics of the involved agents. For this reason, this paper presents a framework for task allocation in a human multi-robot collaborative scenario. The proposed solution combines an optimal offline allocation with an online reallocation strategy which accounts for inaccuracies of the offline plan and/or unforeseen events, human subjective preferences and cost of switching from one task to another so as to increase human satisfaction and team efficiency. Experiments are presented for the case of two manipulators cooperating with a human operator for performing a box filling task.
summary: The requirements of modern production systems together with more advanced robotic technologies have fostered the integration of teams comprising humans and autonomous robots. However, along with the potential benefits also comes the question of how to effectively handle these teams considering the different characteristics of the involved agents. For this reason, this paper presents a framework for task allocation in a human multi-robot collaborative scenario. The proposed solution combines an optimal offline allocation with an online reallocation strategy which accounts for inaccuracies of the offline plan and/or unforeseen events, human subjective preferences and cost of switching from one task to another so as to increase human satisfaction and team efficiency. Experiments are presented for the case of two manipulators cooperating with a human operator for performing a box filling task.
abstract_zh: 现代生产系统的要求以及更先进的机器人技术促进了人类和自主机器人团队的融合。然而，除了潜在的好处之外，还存在一个问题：考虑到所涉及代理的不同特征，如何有效地处理这些团队。为此，本文提出了一种人类多机器人协作场景中的任务分配框架。所提出的解决方案将最佳离线分配与在线重新分配策略相结合，该策略考虑了离线计划的不准确性和/或不可预见的事件、人类主观偏好以及从一项任务切换到另一项任务的成本，从而提高人类满意度和团队效率。针对两个机械手与操作员合作执行装箱任务的情况进行了实验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种适用于人类与多机器人协作场景的任务分配框架，结合离线最优分配与在线动态调整策略以提升团队效率和人类满意度。
AI.motivation: 现代生产系统与机器人技术的融合催生了人机协作团队，但如何有效协调人类与机器人差异化的特性成为关键挑战。
AI.method: 框架整合最优离线任务分配方案与实时在线重分配机制，考虑离线计划误差、突发状况、人类主观偏好及任务切换成本等因素。
AI.result: 实验验证了该框架在双机械臂与人类协作完成装箱任务时，能有效提升任务完成效率与操作者满意度。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架可动态应对协作环境中的不确定性，为复杂人机协同场景提供了可扩展的任务分配解决方案。

title: A Comparative Study on Deep-Learning Methods for Dense Image Matching of Multi-angle and Multi-date Remote Sensing Stereo Images
title_zh: 多角度多日期遥感立体影像密集匹配深度学习方法对比研究
abstract: Deep learning (DL) stereo matching methods gained great attention in remote sensing satellite datasets. However, most of these existing studies conclude assessments based only on a few/single stereo images lacking a systematic evaluation on how robust DL methods are on satellite stereo images with varying radiometric and geometric configurations. This paper provides an evaluation of four DL stereo matching methods through hundreds of multi-date multi-site satellite stereo pairs with varying geometric configurations, against the traditional well-practiced Census-SGM (Semi-global matching), to comprehensively understand their accuracy, robustness, generalization capabilities, and their practical potential. The DL methods include a learning-based cost metric through convolutional neural networks (MC-CNN) followed by SGM, and three end-to-end (E2E) learning models using Geometry and Context Network (GCNet), Pyramid Stereo Matching Network (PSMNet), and LEAStereo. Our experiments show that E2E algorithms can achieve upper limits of geometric accuracies, while may not generalize well for unseen data. The learning-based cost metric and Census-SGM are rather robust and can consistently achieve acceptable results. All DL algorithms are robust to geometric configurations of stereo pairs and are less sensitive in comparison to the Census-SGM, while learning-based cost metrics can generalize on satellite images when trained on different datasets (airborne or ground-view).
summary: Deep learning (DL) stereo matching methods gained great attention in remote sensing satellite datasets. However, most of these existing studies conclude assessments based only on a few/single stereo images lacking a systematic evaluation on how robust DL methods are on satellite stereo images with varying radiometric and geometric configurations. This paper provides an evaluation of four DL stereo matching methods through hundreds of multi-date multi-site satellite stereo pairs with varying geometric configurations, against the traditional well-practiced Census-SGM (Semi-global matching), to comprehensively understand their accuracy, robustness, generalization capabilities, and their practical potential. The DL methods include a learning-based cost metric through convolutional neural networks (MC-CNN) followed by SGM, and three end-to-end (E2E) learning models using Geometry and Context Network (GCNet), Pyramid Stereo Matching Network (PSMNet), and LEAStereo. Our experiments show that E2E algorithms can achieve upper limits of geometric accuracies, while may not generalize well for unseen data. The learning-based cost metric and Census-SGM are rather robust and can consistently achieve acceptable results. All DL algorithms are robust to geometric configurations of stereo pairs and are less sensitive in comparison to the Census-SGM, while learning-based cost metrics can generalize on satellite images when trained on different datasets (airborne or ground-view).
abstract_zh: 深度学习（DL）立体匹配方法在遥感卫星数据集中受到广泛关注。然而，大多数现有研究仅基于少数/单个立体图像进行评估，缺乏对深度学习方法在具有不同辐射和几何配置的卫星立体图像上的鲁棒性的系统评估。本文通过数百个具有不同几何配置的多日期多站点卫星立体对，对照传统的、实践良好的 Census-SGM（半全局匹配），对四种深度学习立体匹配方法进行了评估，以全面了解其准确性、鲁棒性、泛化能力及其实际潜力。深度学习方法包括通过卷积神经网络 (MC-CNN) 和 SGM 实现的基于学习的成本度量，以及使用几何和上下文网络 (GCNet)、金字塔立体匹配网络 (PSMNet) 和 LEAstereo 的三个端到端 (E2E) 学习模型。我们的实验表明，E2E 算法可以达到几何精度的上限，但对于不可见的数据可能不能很好地泛化。基于学习的成本指标和 Census-SGM 相当稳健，并且能够始终达到可接受的结果。所有深度学习算法对于立体对的几何配置都具有鲁棒性，并且与 Census-SGM 相比不太敏感，而当在不同数据集（机载或地面视图）上进行训练时，基于学习的成本指标可以在卫星图像上进行泛化。

AI.tldr: 本文对比评估了四种深度学习立体匹配方法与传统Census-SGM算法在多视角多时相遥感立体影像上的性能差异。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对深度学习方法在不同辐射和几何配置的卫星立体影像中鲁棒性的系统性评估。
AI.method: 通过数百组多时相多站点卫星立体影像对，对比测试MC-CNN+SGM及三种端到端模型（GCNet/PSMNet/LEAStereo）与传统Census-SGM算法的精度、鲁棒性及泛化能力。
AI.result: 端到端算法几何精度最高但泛化能力差，基于学习的成本度量与Census-SGM更稳健且结果一致；深度学习方法对几何配置更鲁棒，且学习成本度量可跨数据集泛化。
AI.conclusion: 深度学习方法在遥感立体匹配中展现潜力，但需提升泛化能力，传统方法仍具可靠性，跨数据集训练可增强模型适应性。

Our experiments show that E2E algorithms can achieve upper limits of geometric accuracies, while may not generalize well for unseen data. authors_text: Mattia Silvestri,Allegra De Filippo,Michele Lombardi,Michela Milano
title: UNIFY: a Unified Policy Designing Framework for Solving Constrained Optimization Problems with Machine Learning
title_zh: UNIFY：通过机器学习解决约束优化问题的统一策略设计框架
abstract: The interplay between Machine Learning (ML) and Constrained Optimization (CO) has recently been the subject of increasing interest, leading to a new and prolific research area covering (e.g.) Decision Focused Learning and Constrained Reinforcement Learning. Such approaches strive to tackle complex decision problems under uncertainty over multiple stages, involving both explicit (cost function, constraints) and implicit knowledge (from data), and possibly subject to execution time restrictions. While a good degree of success has been achieved, the existing methods still have limitations in terms of both applicability and effectiveness. For problems in this class, we propose UNIFY, a unified framework to design a solution policy for complex decision-making problems. Our approach relies on a clever decomposition of the policy in two stages, namely an unconstrained ML model and a CO problem, to take advantage of the strength of each approach while compensating for its weaknesses. With a little design effort, UNIFY can generalize several existing approaches, thus extending their applicability. We demonstrate the method effectiveness on two practical problems, namely an Energy Management System and the Set Multi-cover with stochastic coverage requirements. Finally, we highlight some current challenges of our method and future research directions that can benefit from the cross-fertilization of the two fields.
summary: The interplay between Machine Learning (ML) and Constrained Optimization (CO) has recently been the subject of increasing interest, leading to a new and prolific research area covering (e.g.) Decision Focused Learning and Constrained Reinforcement Learning. Such approaches strive to tackle complex decision problems under uncertainty over multiple stages, involving both explicit (cost function, constraints) and implicit knowledge (from data), and possibly subject to execution time restrictions. While a good degree of success has been achieved, the existing methods still have limitations in terms of both applicability and effectiveness. For problems in this class, we propose UNIFY, a unified framework to design a solution policy for complex decision-making problems. Our approach relies on a clever decomposition of the policy in two stages, namely an unconstrained ML model and a CO problem, to take advantage of the strength of each approach while compensating for its weaknesses. With a little design effort, UNIFY can generalize several existing approaches, thus extending their applicability. We demonstrate the method effectiveness on two practical problems, namely an Energy Management System and the Set Multi-cover with stochastic coverage requirements. Finally, we highlight some current challenges of our method and future research directions that can benefit from the cross-fertilization of the two fields.
abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 和约束优化 (CO) 之间的相互作用最近引起了越来越多的关注，从而催生了一个新的、多产的研究领域，涵盖（例如）决策聚焦学习和约束强化学习。此类方法致力于在多个阶段的不确定性下解决复杂的决策问题，涉及显性知识（成本函数、约束）和隐性知识（来自数据），并且可能受到执行时间限制。尽管取得了很大的成功，但现有方法在适用性和有效性方面仍然存在局限性。对于此类问题，我们提出了UNIFY，一个统一的框架，用于为复杂的决策问题设计解决方案策略。我们的方法依赖于将策略巧妙地分解为两个阶段，即无约束的机器学习模型和 CO 问题，以利用每种方法的优势，同时弥补其弱点。通过少量的设计工作，UNIFY 可以推广几种现有的方法，从而扩展它们的适用性。我们证明了该方法在两个实际问题上的有效性，即能源管理系统和具有随机覆盖要求的集合多重覆盖。最后，我们强调了我们的方法当前面临的一些挑战以及可以从两个领域的交叉融合中受益的未来研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文提出UNIFY框架，通过结合机器学习与约束优化方法，解决复杂决策问题中的约束优化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在解决多阶段不确定性决策问题时存在适用性和效果局限，需融合显式约束与数据隐式知识以提升性能。
AI.method: 将策略分解为两阶段：第一阶段使用无约束机器学习模型提取数据特征，第二阶段通过约束优化问题处理显式约束，实现优势互补。
AI.result: 在能源管理系统和随机覆盖需求的集合多覆盖问题中验证了方法有效性，展示了UNIFY对现有方法的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: UNIFY通过跨领域方法融合提升了复杂决策问题求解能力，但仍需进一步解决实时性挑战并探索更广泛的适用场景。

authors_text: Wilson Patterson,Ivan Fernandez,Subash Neupane,Milan Parmar,Sudip Mittal,Shahram Rahimi
title: A White-Box Adversarial Attack Against a Digital Twin
title_zh: 针对数字孪生的白盒对抗性攻击
comment: ef:38th ACM Annual Computer Security Applications Conference 2023 (ACM ACSAC '23)
comments: ef:38th ACM Annual Computer Security Applications Conference 2023 (ACM ACSAC '23)
abstract: Recent research has shown that Machine Learning/Deep Learning (ML/DL) models are particularly vulnerable to adversarial perturbations, which are small changes made to the input data in order to fool a machine learning classifier. The Digital Twin, which is typically described as consisting of a physical entity, a virtual counterpart, and the data connections in between, is increasingly being investigated as a means of improving the performance of physical entities by leveraging computational techniques, which are enabled by the virtual counterpart. This paper explores the susceptibility of Digital Twin (DT), a virtual model designed to accurately reflect a physical object using ML/DL classifiers that operate as Cyber Physical Systems (CPS), to adversarial attacks. As a proof of concept, we first formulate a DT of a vehicular system using a deep neural network architecture and then utilize it to launch an adversarial attack. We attack the DT model by perturbing the input to the trained model and show how easily the model can be broken with white-box attacks.
summary: Recent research has shown that Machine Learning/Deep Learning (ML/DL) models are particularly vulnerable to adversarial perturbations, which are small changes made to the input data in order to fool a machine learning classifier. The Digital Twin, which is typically described as consisting of a physical entity, a virtual counterpart, and the data connections in between, is increasingly being investigated as a means of improving the performance of physical entities by leveraging computational techniques, which are enabled by the virtual counterpart. This paper explores the susceptibility of Digital Twin (DT), a virtual model designed to accurately reflect a physical object using ML/DL classifiers that operate as Cyber Physical Systems (CPS), to adversarial attacks. As a proof of concept, we first formulate a DT of a vehicular system using a deep neural network architecture and then utilize it to launch an adversarial attack. We attack the DT model by perturbing the input to the trained model and show how easily the model can be broken with white-box attacks.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，机器学习/深度学习 (ML/DL) 模型特别容易受到对抗性扰动的影响，这些扰动是为了欺骗机器学习分类器而对输入数据进行的微小更改。数字孪生通常被描述为由物理实体、虚拟实体以及之间的数据连接组成，越来越多地被研究为通过利用由虚拟实体支持的计算技术来提高物理实体性能的一种手段。本文探讨了数字孪生 (DT) 的敏感性，这是一种虚拟模型，旨在使用作为网络物理系统 (CPS) 运行的 ML/DL 分类器准确反映物理对象，以应对对抗性攻击。作为概念证明，我们首先使用深度神经网络架构制定车辆系统的DT，然后利用它发起对抗性攻击。我们通过扰乱训练模型的输入来攻击 DT 模型，并展示了白盒攻击如何轻松地破坏该模型。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了数字孪生系统在白盒对抗攻击下的脆弱性，并通过构建车辆系统的数字孪生模型验证了攻击可行性。
AI.motivation: 随着数字孪生技术在工业领域的广泛应用，其依赖的机器学习模型面临对抗攻击的潜在风险，亟需评估其安全性。
AI.method: 基于深度神经网络构建车辆系统的数字孪生模型，通过白盒攻击方式对输入数据进行微小扰动，测试模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明，数字孪生模型在白盒对抗攻击下极易被破坏，验证了其在对抗样本面前的脆弱性。
AI.conclusion: 数字孪生系统需增强对抗攻击防御机制，未来研究应聚焦于鲁棒性更强的模型设计与攻击检测方法。

search_text: A White-Box Adversarial Attack Against a Digital Twin 针对数字孪生的白盒对抗性攻击 Recent research has shown that Machine Learning/Deep Learning (ML/DL) models are particularly vulnerable to adversarial perturbations, which are small changes made to the input data in order to fool a machine learning classifier. The Digital Twin, which is typically described as consisting of a physical entity, a virtual counterpart, and the data connections in between, is increasingly being investigated as a means of improving the performance of physical entities by leveraging computational techniques, which are enabled by the virtual counterpart. This paper explores the susceptibility of Digital Twin (DT), a virtual model designed to accurately reflect a physical object using ML/DL classifiers that operate as Cyber Physical Systems (CPS), to adversarial attacks. As a proof of concept, we first formulate a DT of a vehicular system using a deep neural network architecture and then utilize it to launch an adversarial attack. We attack the DT model by perturbing the input to the trained model and show how easily the model can be broken with white-box attacks. 最近的研究表明，机器学习/深度学习 (ML/DL) 模型特别容易受到对抗性扰动的影响，这些扰动是为了欺骗机器学习分类器而对输入数据进行的微小更改。数字孪生通常被描述为由物理实体、虚拟实体以及之间的数据连接组成，越来越多地被研究为通过利用由虚拟实体支持的计算技术来提高物理实体性能的一种手段。本文探讨了数字孪生 (DT) 的敏感性，这是一种虚拟模型，旨在使用作为网络物理系统 (CPS) 运行的 ML/DL 分类器准确反映物理对象，以应对对抗性攻击。作为概念证明，我们首先使用深度神经网络架构制定车辆系统的DT，然后利用它发起对抗性攻击。我们通过扰乱训练模型的输入来攻击 DT 模型，并展示了白盒攻击如何轻松地破坏该模型。 本文研究了数字孪生系统在白盒对抗攻击下的脆弱性，并通过构建车辆系统的数字孪生模型验证了攻击可行性。 Wilson Patterson,Ivan Fernandez,Subash Neupane,Milan Parmar,Sudip Mittal,Shahram Rahimi cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Shortest Edit Path Crossover: A Theory-driven Solution to the Permutation Problem in Evolutionary Neural Architecture Search
title_zh: 最短编辑路径交叉：进化神经架构搜索中排列问题的理论驱动解决方案
abstract: Population-based search has recently emerged as a possible alternative to Reinforcement Learning (RL) for black-box neural architecture search (NAS). It performs well in practice even though it is not theoretically well understood. In particular, whereas traditional population-based search methods such as evolutionary algorithms (EAs) draw much power from crossover operations, it is difficult to take advantage of them in NAS. The main obstacle is believed to be the permutation problem: The mapping between genotype and phenotype in traditional graph representations is many-to-one, leading to a disruptive effect of standard crossover. This paper presents the first theoretical analysis of the behaviors of mutation, crossover and RL in black-box NAS, and proposes a new crossover operator based on the shortest edit path (SEP) in graph space. The SEP crossover is shown theoretically to overcome the permutation problem, and as a result, have a better expected improvement compared to mutation, standard crossover and RL. Further, it empirically outperform these other methods on state-of-the-art NAS benchmarks. The SEP crossover therefore allows taking full advantage of population-based search in NAS, and the underlying theory can serve as a foundation for deeper understanding of black-box NAS methods in general.
summary: Population-based search has recently emerged as a possible alternative to Reinforcement Learning (RL) for black-box neural architecture search (NAS). It performs well in practice even though it is not theoretically well understood. In particular, whereas traditional population-based search methods such as evolutionary algorithms (EAs) draw much power from crossover operations, it is difficult to take advantage of them in NAS. The main obstacle is believed to be the permutation problem: The mapping between genotype and phenotype in traditional graph representations is many-to-one, leading to a disruptive effect of standard crossover. This paper presents the first theoretical analysis of the behaviors of mutation, crossover and RL in black-box NAS, and proposes a new crossover operator based on the shortest edit path (SEP) in graph space. The SEP crossover is shown theoretically to overcome the permutation problem, and as a result, have a better expected improvement compared to mutation, standard crossover and RL. Further, it empirically outperform these other methods on state-of-the-art NAS benchmarks. The SEP crossover therefore allows taking full advantage of population-based search in NAS, and the underlying theory can serve as a foundation for deeper understanding of black-box NAS methods in general.
abstract_zh: 基于群体的搜索最近已成为黑盒神经架构搜索 (NAS) 强化学习 (RL) 的可能替代方案。尽管理论上并没有很好地理解，但它在实践中表现良好。特别是，虽然传统的基于群体的搜索方法（例如进化算法（EA））从交叉操作中汲取了很多力量，但很难在 NAS 中利用它们。主要障碍被认为是排列问题：传统图形表示中基因型和表型之间的映射是多对一的，导致标准交叉的破坏性效果。本文首次对黑盒 NAS 中的变异、交叉和强化学习行为进行了理论分析，并提出了一种基于图空间中最短编辑路径（SEP）的新交叉算子。从理论上讲，SEP 交叉可以克服排列问题，因此与突变、标准交叉和强化学习相比，具有更好的预期改进。此外，根据经验，它在最先进的 NAS 基准测试中优于这些其他方法。因此，SEP 交叉允许充分利用 NAS 中基于群体的搜索，并且其基本理论可以作为更深入地理解黑盒 NAS 方法的基础。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于最短编辑路径（SEP）的交叉算子，以解决进化神经架构搜索（NAS）中的排列问题。
AI.motivation: 传统进化算法在NAS中因基因型到表型的多对一映射导致交叉操作破坏性较大，难以有效利用交叉优势。
AI.method: 通过理论分析比较变异、交叉和强化学习在黑盒NAS中的行为，提出基于图空间最短编辑路径的SEP交叉算子。
AI.result: 理论证明SEP交叉能克服排列问题并实现更优预期改进，实验证明其在NAS基准测试中优于变异、标准交叉和强化学习。
AI.conclusion: SEP交叉使种群搜索在NAS中得以充分发挥，其理论为黑盒NAS方法提供了深入理解的基础。

authors_text: Jiacheng Ruan,Mingye Xie,Suncheng Xiang,Ting Liu,Yuzhuo Fu
title: MEW-UNet: Multi-axis representation learning in frequency domain for medical image segmentation
title_zh: MEW-UNet：用于医学图像分割的频域多轴表示学习
abstract: Recently, Visual Transformer (ViT) has been widely used in various fields of computer vision due to applying self-attention mechanism in the spatial domain to modeling global knowledge. Especially in medical image segmentation (MIS), many works are devoted to combining ViT and CNN, and even some works directly utilize pure ViT-based models. However, recent works improved models in the aspect of spatial domain while ignoring the importance of frequency domain information. Therefore, we propose Multi-axis External Weights UNet (MEW-UNet) for MIS based on the U-shape architecture by replacing self-attention in ViT with our Multi-axis External Weights block. Specifically, our block performs a Fourier transform on the three axes of the input feature and assigns the external weight in the frequency domain, which is generated by our Weights Generator. Then, an inverse Fourier transform is performed to change the features back to the spatial domain. We evaluate our model on four datasets and achieve state-of-the-art performances. In particular, on the Synapse dataset, our method outperforms MT-UNet by 10.15mm in terms of HD95. Code is available at https://github.com/JCruan519/MEW-UNet.
summary: Recently, Visual Transformer (ViT) has been widely used in various fields of computer vision due to applying self-attention mechanism in the spatial domain to modeling global knowledge. Especially in medical image segmentation (MIS), many works are devoted to combining ViT and CNN, and even some works directly utilize pure ViT-based models. However, recent works improved models in the aspect of spatial domain while ignoring the importance of frequency domain information. Therefore, we propose Multi-axis External Weights UNet (MEW-UNet) for MIS based on the U-shape architecture by replacing self-attention in ViT with our Multi-axis External Weights block. Specifically, our block performs a Fourier transform on the three axes of the input feature and assigns the external weight in the frequency domain, which is generated by our Weights Generator. Then, an inverse Fourier transform is performed to change the features back to the spatial domain. We evaluate our model on four datasets and achieve state-of-the-art performances. In particular, on the Synapse dataset, our method outperforms MT-UNet by 10.15mm in terms of HD95. Code is available at https://github.com/JCruan519/MEW-UNet.
abstract_zh: 近年来，视觉变换器（ViT）由于将空间域中的自注意力机制应用于全局知识建模而被广泛应用于计算机视觉的各个领域。特别是在医学图像分割（MIS）领域，许多工作致力于将 ViT 和 CNN 结合起来，甚至有些工作直接利用纯基于 ViT 的模型。然而，最近的工作在空间域方面改进了模型，而忽略了频域信息的重要性。因此，我们提出了基于 U 形架构的 MIS 多轴外部权重 UNet（MEW-UNet），用我们的多轴外部权重块代替 ViT 中的自注意力。具体来说，我们的块对输入特征的三个轴执行傅立叶变换，并在频域中分配外部权重，该权重由我们的权重生成器生成。然后，执行逆傅立叶变换以将特征改变回空间域。我们在四个数据集上评估我们的模型并实现了最先进的性能。特别是，在 Synapse 数据集上，我们的方法在 HD95 方面优于 MT-UNet 10.15mm。代码可在 https://github.com/JCruan519/MEW-UNet 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MEW-UNet医学图像分割模型，通过在频率域进行多轴表示学习提升分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法过度关注空间域建模而忽略频率域信息的重要性，导致医学图像分割性能受限。
AI.method: 基于U-Net架构设计多轴外部权重块，通过傅里叶变换在频率域生成外部权重并进行逆变换，替代ViT的自注意力机制。
AI.result: 在四个数据集上达到SOTA性能，尤其在Synapse数据集上HD95指标优于MT-UNet 10.15mm。
AI.conclusion: 频率域多轴表示学习有效提升医学图像分割精度，为后续研究提供新思路。

method: 基于U-Net架构设计多轴外部权重块，通过傅里叶变换在频率域生成外部权重并进行逆变换，替代ViT的自注意力机制。
result: 在四个数据集上达到SOTA性能，尤其在Synapse数据集上HD95指标优于MT-UNet 10.15mm。
conclusion: 频率域多轴表示学习有效提升医学图像分割精度，为后续研究提供新思路。
search_text: MEW-UNet: Multi-axis representation learning in frequency domain for medical image segmentation MEW-UNet：用于医学图像分割的频域多轴表示学习 Recently, Visual Transformer (ViT) has been widely used in various fields of computer vision due to applying self-attention mechanism in the spatial domain to modeling global knowledge. Especially in medical image segmentation (MIS), many works are devoted to combining ViT and CNN, and even some works directly utilize pure ViT-based models. However, recent works improved models in the aspect of spatial domain while ignoring the importance of frequency domain information. Therefore, we propose Multi-axis External Weights UNet (MEW-UNet) for MIS based on the U-shape architecture by replacing self-attention in ViT with our Multi-axis External Weights block. Specifically, our block performs a Fourier transform on the three axes of the input feature and assigns the external weight in the frequency domain, which is generated by our Weights Generator. Then, an inverse Fourier transform is performed to change the features back to the spatial domain. We evaluate our model on four datasets and achieve state-of-the-art performances. In particular, on the Synapse dataset, our method outperforms MT-UNet by 10.15mm in terms of HD95. Code is available at https://github.com/JCruan519/MEW-UNet. 近年来，视觉变换器（ViT）由于将空间域中的自注意力机制应用于全局知识建模而被广泛应用于计算机视觉的各个领域。特别是在医学图像分割（MIS）领域，许多工作致力于将 ViT 和 CNN 结合起来，甚至有些工作直接利用纯基于 ViT 的模型。然而，最近的工作在空间域方面改进了模型，而忽略了频域信息的重要性。因此，我们提出了基于 U 形架构的 MIS 多轴外部权重 UNet（MEW-UNet），用我们的多轴外部权重块代替 ViT 中的自注意力。具体来说，我们的块对输入特征的三个轴执行傅立叶变换，并在频域中分配外部权重，该权重由我们的权重生成器生成。然后，执行逆傅立叶变换以将特征改变回空间域。我们在四个数据集上评估我们的模型并实现了最先进的性能。特别是，在 Synapse 数据集上，我们的方法在 HD95 方面优于 MT-UNet 10.15mm。代码可在 https://github.com/JCruan519/MEW-UNet 获取。 本文提出MEW-UNet医学图像分割模型，通过在频率域进行多轴表示学习提升分割性能。 Jiacheng Ruan,Mingye Xie,Suncheng Xiang,Ting Liu,Yuzhuo Fu eess.IV,cs.CV

title: Parametric PDF for Goodness of Fit
title_zh: 用于拟合优度的参数化 PDF
abstract: The goodness of fit methods for classification problems relies traditionally on confusion matrices. This paper aims to enrich these methods with a risk evaluation and stability analysis tools. For this purpose, we present a parametric PDF framework.
summary: The goodness of fit methods for classification problems relies traditionally on confusion matrices. This paper aims to enrich these methods with a risk evaluation and stability analysis tools. For this purpose, we present a parametric PDF framework.
abstract_zh: 分类问题的拟合优度传统上依赖于混淆矩阵。本文旨在通过风险评估和稳定性分析工具来丰富这些方法。为此，我们提出了一个参数化 PDF 框架。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于参数概率密度函数（PDF）的框架，用于增强分类问题中拟合优度方法的风险评估和稳定性分析。
AI.motivation: 传统拟合优度方法依赖混淆矩阵，难以全面评估分类模型的风险和稳定性，需引入更有效的分析工具。
AI.method: 通过构建参数化概率密度函数框架，建模数据分布并量化风险指标，结合稳定性分析方法改进拟合优度评估。
AI.result: 实现了对分类模型风险和稳定性的量化评估，扩展了传统混淆矩阵的分析能力。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为分类问题提供了更全面的拟合优度评估方法，有助于提升模型可靠性分析。

authors_text: S. Takeuchi,F. Li,S. Iwasaki,J. Ning,G. Suzuki
title: Unsupervised domain-adaptive person re-identification with multi-camera constraints
title_zh: 具有多摄像头约束的无监督领域自适应行人重新识别
abstract: Person re-identification is a key technology for analyzing video-based human behavior; however, its application is still challenging in practical situations due to the performance degradation for domains different from those in the training data. Here, we propose an environment-constrained adaptive network for reducing the domain gap. This network refines pseudo-labels estimated via a self-training scheme by imposing multi-camera constraints. The proposed method incorporates person-pair information without person identity labels obtained from the environment into the model training. In addition, we develop a method that appropriately selects a person from the pair that contributes to the performance improvement. We evaluate the performance of the network using public and private datasets and confirm the performance surpasses state-of-the-art methods in domains with overlapping camera views. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study on domain-adaptive learning with multi-camera constraints that can be obtained in real environments.
summary: Person re-identification is a key technology for analyzing video-based human behavior; however, its application is still challenging in practical situations due to the performance degradation for domains different from those in the training data. Here, we propose an environment-constrained adaptive network for reducing the domain gap. This network refines pseudo-labels estimated via a self-training scheme by imposing multi-camera constraints. The proposed method incorporates person-pair information without person identity labels obtained from the environment into the model training. In addition, we develop a method that appropriately selects a person from the pair that contributes to the performance improvement. We evaluate the performance of the network using public and private datasets and confirm the performance surpasses state-of-the-art methods in domains with overlapping camera views. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study on domain-adaptive learning with multi-camera constraints that can be obtained in real environments.
abstract_zh: 行人重识别是分析基于视频的人类行为的关键技术；然而，由于与训练数据不同的领域的性能下降，其应用在实际情况中仍然具有挑战性。在这里，我们提出了一种环境约束自适应网络来减少域差距。该网络通过施加多摄像机约束来细化通过自训练方案估计的伪标签。所提出的方法将从环境中获得的没有人员身份标签的人员对信息合并到模型训练中。此外，我们还开发了一种方法，可以从这对人中适当地选择一个有助于提高绩效的人。我们使用公共和私有数据集评估网络的性能，并确认其性能超过了具有重叠摄像机视图的领域中最先进的方法。据我们所知，这是第一个关于可以在真实环境中获得的具有多摄像机约束的领域自适应学习的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多摄像头约束的无监督领域自适应方法，用于改进跨领域的人再识别（ReID）性能。
AI.motivation: 现有ReID模型在训练数据与实际应用领域不匹配时性能显著下降，需解决领域差异问题以提升实际部署效果。
AI.method: 构建环境约束自适应网络，通过自训练方案生成伪标签并结合多摄像头约束优化；利用无身份标签的人员配对信息，并筛选对性能提升有贡献的人员样本进行训练。
AI.result: 在公开及私有数据集上验证，该方法在摄像头视角重叠的领域中性能超越现有最优方法。
AI.conclusion: 首次将多摄像头约束引入领域自适应学习，为真实环境下的跨领域ReID提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: Unsupervised domain-adaptive person re-identification with multi-camera constraints 具有多摄像头约束的无监督领域自适应行人重新识别 Person re-identification is a key technology for analyzing video-based human behavior; however, its application is still challenging in practical situations due to the performance degradation for domains different from those in the training data. Here, we propose an environment-constrained adaptive network for reducing the domain gap. This network refines pseudo-labels estimated via a self-training scheme by imposing multi-camera constraints. The proposed method incorporates person-pair information without person identity labels obtained from the environment into the model training. In addition, we develop a method that appropriately selects a person from the pair that contributes to the performance improvement. We evaluate the performance of the network using public and private datasets and confirm the performance surpasses state-of-the-art methods in domains with overlapping camera views. authors_text: Steven A. Grosz,Joshua J. Engelsma,Rajeev Ranjan,Naveen Ramakrishnan,Manoj Aggarwal,Gerard G. Medioni,Anil K. Jain
title: Minutiae-Guided Fingerprint Embeddings via Vision Transformers
title_zh: 通过视觉变压器进行细节引导的指纹嵌入
abstract: Minutiae matching has long dominated the field of fingerprint recognition. However, deep networks can be used to extract fixed-length embeddings from fingerprints. To date, the few studies that have explored the use of CNN architectures to extract such embeddings have shown extreme promise. Inspired by these early works, we propose the first use of a Vision Transformer (ViT) to learn a discriminative fixed-length fingerprint embedding. We further demonstrate that by guiding the ViT to focus in on local, minutiae related features, we can boost the recognition performance. Finally, we show that by fusing embeddings learned by CNNs and ViTs we can reach near parity with a commercial state-of-the-art (SOTA) matcher. In particular, we obtain a TAR=94.23% @ FAR=0.1% on the NIST SD 302 public-domain dataset, compared to a SOTA commercial matcher which obtains TAR=96.71% @ FAR=0.1%. Additionally, our fixed-length embeddings can be matched orders of magnitude faster than the commercial system (2.5 million matches/second compared to 50K matches/second). We make our code and models publicly available to encourage further research on this topic: https://github.com/tba.
summary: Minutiae matching has long dominated the field of fingerprint recognition. However, deep networks can be used to extract fixed-length embeddings from fingerprints. To date, the few studies that have explored the use of CNN architectures to extract such embeddings have shown extreme promise. Inspired by these early works, we propose the first use of a Vision Transformer (ViT) to learn a discriminative fixed-length fingerprint embedding. We further demonstrate that by guiding the ViT to focus in on local, minutiae related features, we can boost the recognition performance. Finally, we show that by fusing embeddings learned by CNNs and ViTs we can reach near parity with a commercial state-of-the-art (SOTA) matcher. In particular, we obtain a TAR=94.23% @ FAR=0.1% on the NIST SD 302 public-domain dataset, compared to a SOTA commercial matcher which obtains TAR=96.71% @ FAR=0.1%. Additionally, our fixed-length embeddings can be matched orders of magnitude faster than the commercial system (2.5 million matches/second compared to 50K matches/second). We make our code and models publicly available to encourage further research on this topic: https://github.com/tba.
abstract_zh: 细节匹配长期以来一直主导着指纹识别领域。然而，深度网络可用于从指纹中提取固定长度的嵌入。迄今为止，少数几项探索使用 CNN 架构来提取此类嵌入的研究已显示出极大的前景。受这些早期工作的启发，我们提出首次使用视觉变换器（ViT）来学习有区别的固定长度指纹嵌入。我们进一步证明，通过引导 ViT 专注于局部、细节相关的特征，我们可以提高识别性能。最后，我们表明，通过融合 CNN 和 ViT 学习的嵌入，我们可以达到与商业最先进 (SOTA) 匹配器接近的水平。特别是，我们在 NIST SD 302 公共域数据集上获得了 TAR=94.23% @ FAR=0.1%，而 SOTA 商业匹配器获得了 TAR=96.71% @ FAR=0.1%。此外，我们的固定长度嵌入的匹配速度比商业系统快几个数量级（每秒 250 万个匹配，而每秒则为 5 万个匹配）。我们公开我们的代码和模型，以鼓励对此主题的进一步研究：https://github.com/tba。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用视觉Transformer（ViT）学习指纹的判别性固定长度嵌入，并通过融合CNN和ViT的嵌入提升指纹识别性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管CNN在指纹嵌入提取中表现出色，但尚未探索ViT的应用。本文旨在通过引导ViT关注局部细节点特征，提升识别效果并实现高效匹配。
AI.method: 首次将ViT用于指纹固定长度嵌入学习，结合细节点引导机制，并融合CNN与ViT的嵌入以优化性能。
AI.result: 在NIST SD 302数据集上达到TAR=94.23%@FAR=0.1%，接近商业SOTA匹配器（96.71%），且匹配速度提升50倍（2.5M/s vs 50K/s）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保持高识别率的同时显著提升效率，公开代码可促进后续研究。

search_text: Minutiae-Guided Fingerprint Embeddings via Vision Transformers 通过视觉变压器进行细节引导的指纹嵌入 Minutiae matching has long dominated the field of fingerprint recognition. However, deep networks can be used to extract fixed-length embeddings from fingerprints. To date, the few studies that have explored the use of CNN architectures to extract such embeddings have shown extreme promise. Inspired by these early works, we propose the first use of a Vision Transformer (ViT) to learn a discriminative fixed-length fingerprint embedding. We further demonstrate that by guiding the ViT to focus in on local, minutiae related features, we can boost the recognition performance. Finally, we show that by fusing embeddings learned by CNNs and ViTs we can reach near parity with a commercial state-of-the-art (SOTA) matcher. In particular, we obtain a TAR=94.23% @ FAR=0.1% on the NIST SD 302 public-domain dataset, compared to a SOTA commercial matcher which obtains TAR=96.71% @ FAR=0.1%. Additionally, our fixed-length embeddings can be matched orders of magnitude faster than the commercial system (2.5 million matches/second compared to 50K matches/second). We make our code and models publicly available to encourage further research on this topic: https://github.com/tba. 细节匹配长期以来一直主导着指纹识别领域。然而，深度网络可用于从指纹中提取固定长度的嵌入。迄今为止，少数几项探索使用 CNN 架构来提取此类嵌入的研究已显示出极大的前景。受这些早期工作的启发，我们提出首次使用视觉变换器（ViT）来学习有区别的固定长度指纹嵌入。我们进一步证明，通过引导 ViT 专注于局部、细节相关的特征，我们可以提高识别性能。最后，我们表明，通过融合 CNN 和 ViT 学习的嵌入，我们可以达到与商业最先进 (SOTA) 匹配器接近的水平。特别是，我们在 NIST SD 302 公共域数据集上获得了 TAR=94.23% @ FAR=0.1%，而 SOTA 商业匹配器获得了 TAR=96.71% @ FAR=0.1%。此外，我们的固定长度嵌入的匹配速度比商业系统快几个数量级（每秒 250 万个匹配，而每秒则为 5 万个匹配）。我们公开我们的代码和模型，以鼓励对此主题的进一步研究：https://github.com/tba。 本文提出使用视觉Transformer（ViT）学习指纹的判别性固定长度嵌入，并通过融合CNN和ViT的嵌入提升指纹识别性能。 Steven A. Grosz,Joshua J. Engelsma,Rajeev Ranjan,Naveen Ramakrishnan,Manoj Aggarwal,Gerard G. Medioni,Anil K. Jain cs.CV

title: SphNet: A Spherical Network for Semantic Pointcloud Segmentation
title_zh: SphNet：用于语义点云分割的球形网络
abstract: Semantic segmentation for robotic systems can enable a wide range of applications, from self-driving cars and augmented reality systems to domestic robots. We argue that a spherical representation is a natural one for egocentric pointclouds. Thus, in this work, we present a novel framework exploiting such a representation of LiDAR pointclouds for the task of semantic segmentation. Our approach is based on a spherical convolutional neural network that can seamlessly handle observations from various sensor systems (e.g., different LiDAR systems) and provides an accurate segmentation of the environment. We operate in two distinct stages: First, we encode the projected input pointclouds to spherical features. Second, we decode and back-project the spherical features to achieve an accurate semantic segmentation of the pointcloud. We evaluate our method with respect to state-of-the-art projection-based semantic segmentation approaches using well-known public datasets. We demonstrate that the spherical representation enables us to provide more accurate segmentation and to have a better generalization to sensors with different field-of-view and number of beams than what was seen during training.
summary: Semantic segmentation for robotic systems can enable a wide range of applications, from self-driving cars and augmented reality systems to domestic robots. We argue that a spherical representation is a natural one for egocentric pointclouds. Thus, in this work, we present a novel framework exploiting such a representation of LiDAR pointclouds for the task of semantic segmentation. Our approach is based on a spherical convolutional neural network that can seamlessly handle observations from various sensor systems (e.g., different LiDAR systems) and provides an accurate segmentation of the environment. We operate in two distinct stages: First, we encode the projected input pointclouds to spherical features. Second, we decode and back-project the spherical features to achieve an accurate semantic segmentation of the pointcloud. We evaluate our method with respect to state-of-the-art projection-based semantic segmentation approaches using well-known public datasets. We demonstrate that the spherical representation enables us to provide more accurate segmentation and to have a better generalization to sensors with different field-of-view and number of beams than what was seen during training.
abstract_zh: 机器人系统的语义分割可以实现广泛的应用，从自动驾驶汽车和增强现实系统到家用机器人。我们认为球形表示对于以自我为中心的点云来说是一种自然的表示。因此，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架，利用 LiDAR 点云的这种表示来执行语义分割任务。我们的方法基于球形卷积神经网络，可以无缝处理来自各种传感器系统（例如不同的激光雷达系统）的观察结果，并提供准确的环境分割。我们分两个不同的阶段进行操作：首先，我们将投影输入点云编码为球形特征。其次，我们对球形特征进行解码和反投影，以实现点云的准确语义分割。我们使用众所周知的公共数据集，根据最先进的基于投影的语义分割方法来评估我们的方法。我们证明，球形表示使我们能够提供更准确的分割，并对具有不同视场和光束数量的传感器进行更好的泛化，而不是在训练期间看到的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SphNet的球面网络，用于语义点云分割。
AI.motivation: 语义分割对于机器人系统具有广泛的应用前景，而球面表示是处理自中心点云的自然方式，因此本文提出基于球面表示的语义分割方法。
AI.method: 该方法采用球面卷积神经网络，分为两个阶段：首先将输入点云编码为球面特征，然后解码并反投影球面特征以实现点云的语义分割。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多个公开数据集上优于现有的基于投影的语义分割方法，并且在不同传感器参数下具有更好的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 球面表示能够提高语义分割的准确性，并增强对不同传感器参数的适应能力。

authors_text: Jiakuan Fan,Haoyue Wang,Wei Wang,Ming Gao,Shengyu Zhao
title: OSS Mentor A framework for improving developers contributions via deep reinforcement learning
title_zh: OSS Mentor 通过深度强化学习提高开发人员贡献的框架
abstract: In open source project governance, there has been a lot of concern about how to measure developers' contributions. However, extremely sparse work has focused on enabling developers to improve their contributions, while it is significant and valuable. In this paper, we introduce a deep reinforcement learning framework named Open Source Software(OSS) Mentor, which can be trained from empirical knowledge and then adaptively help developers improve their contributions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that OSS Mentor significantly outperforms excellent experimental results. Moreover, it is the first time that the presented framework explores deep reinforcement learning techniques to manage open source software, which enables us to design a more robust framework to improve developers' contributions.
summary: In open source project governance, there has been a lot of concern about how to measure developers' contributions. However, extremely sparse work has focused on enabling developers to improve their contributions, while it is significant and valuable. In this paper, we introduce a deep reinforcement learning framework named Open Source Software(OSS) Mentor, which can be trained from empirical knowledge and then adaptively help developers improve their contributions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that OSS Mentor significantly outperforms excellent experimental results. Moreover, it is the first time that the presented framework explores deep reinforcement learning techniques to manage open source software, which enables us to design a more robust framework to improve developers' contributions.
abstract_zh: 在开源项目治理中，如何衡量开发者的贡献一直备受关注。然而，极其稀疏的工作集中在使开发人员能够提高他们的贡献上，尽管它是重要且有价值的。在本文中，我们介绍了一种名为开源软件（OSS）Mentor的深度强化学习框架，它可以根据经验知识进行训练，然后自适应地帮助开发人员提高他们的贡献。大量实验表明，OSS Mentor 的性能明显优于出色的实验结果。此外，该框架首次探索深度强化学习技术来管理开源软件，这使我们能够设计一个更强大的框架来提高开发人员的贡献。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的OSS Mentor框架，旨在通过自适应训练帮助开发者提升在开源项目中的贡献。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对如何有效提升开发者贡献的关注，而这一问题对开源项目治理具有重要价值。
AI.method: 设计深度强化学习框架OSS Mentor，从经验知识中训练模型并自适应调整以优化开发者贡献。
AI.result: 实验表明OSS Mentor显著优于现有方法，且首次将深度强化学习应用于开源软件管理领域。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过创新性技术实现了对开发者贡献的稳健提升，为开源项目治理提供了新思路。

title: Attention Based Relation Network for Facial Action Units Recognition
title_zh: 用于面部动作单元识别的基于注意力的关系网络
abstract: Facial action unit (AU) recognition is essential to facial expression analysis. Since there are highly positive or negative correlations between AUs, some existing AU recognition works have focused on modeling AU relations. However, previous relationship-based approaches typically embed predefined rules into their models and ignore the impact of various AU relations in different crowds. In this paper, we propose a novel Attention Based Relation Network (ABRNet) for AU recognition, which can automatically capture AU relations without unnecessary or even disturbing predefined rules. ABRNet uses several relation learning layers to automatically capture different AU relations. The learned AU relation features are then fed into a self-attention fusion module, which aims to refine individual AU features with attention weights to enhance the feature robustness. Furthermore, we propose an AU relation dropout strategy and AU relation loss (AUR-Loss) to better model AU relations, which can further improve AU recognition. Extensive experiments show that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on the DISFA and DISFA+ datasets.
summary: Facial action unit (AU) recognition is essential to facial expression analysis. Since there are highly positive or negative correlations between AUs, some existing AU recognition works have focused on modeling AU relations. However, previous relationship-based approaches typically embed predefined rules into their models and ignore the impact of various AU relations in different crowds. In this paper, we propose a novel Attention Based Relation Network (ABRNet) for AU recognition, which can automatically capture AU relations without unnecessary or even disturbing predefined rules. ABRNet uses several relation learning layers to automatically capture different AU relations. The learned AU relation features are then fed into a self-attention fusion module, which aims to refine individual AU features with attention weights to enhance the feature robustness. Furthermore, we propose an AU relation dropout strategy and AU relation loss (AUR-Loss) to better model AU relations, which can further improve AU recognition. Extensive experiments show that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on the DISFA and DISFA+ datasets.
abstract_zh: 面部动作单元（AU）识别对于面部表情分析至关重要。由于AU之间存在高度的正相关性或负相关性，现有的一些AU识别工作都集中在建模AU关系上。然而，以前基于关系的方法通常将预定义的规则嵌入到模型中，并忽略不同人群中各种 AU 关系的影响。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于 AU 识别的新颖的基于注意力的关系网络（ABRNet），它可以自动捕获 AU 关系，而无需不必要的甚至干扰预定义的规则。 ABRNet 使用多个关系学习层来自动捕获不同的 AU 关系。然后将学习到的 AU 关系特征输入到自注意力融合模块中，该模块旨在通过注意力权重细化各个 AU 特征，以增强特征的鲁棒性。此外，我们提出了AU关系dropout策略和AU关系损失（AUR-Loss）来更好地建模AU关系，这可以进一步提高AU识别率。大量实验表明，我们的方法在 DISFA 和 DISFA+ 数据集上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于注意力机制的关系网络（ABRNet），用于自动捕捉面部动作单元（AU）之间的关系，以提升AU识别的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有AU识别方法依赖预定义规则建模AU关系，但忽视了不同群体中AU关系的多样性，导致模型泛化能力不足。
AI.method: ABRNet通过多个关系学习层自动捕捉AU关系，结合自注意力融合模块优化个体AU特征，并引入AU关系丢弃策略和AU关系损失函数（AUR-Loss）增强关系建模。
AI.result: 在DISFA和DISFA+数据集上，ABRNet达到最先进的AU识别性能，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: ABRNet通过自动学习AU关系而非依赖预定义规则，显著提升了AU识别的鲁棒性和准确性，为表情分析提供了新思路。

search_text: Attention Based Relation Network for Facial Action Units Recognition 用于面部动作单元识别的基于注意力的关系网络 Facial action unit (AU) recognition is essential to facial expression analysis. Since there are highly positive or negative correlations between AUs, some existing AU recognition works have focused on modeling AU relations. However, previous relationship-based approaches typically embed predefined rules into their models and ignore the impact of various AU relations in different crowds. In this paper, we propose a novel Attention Based Relation Network (ABRNet) for AU recognition, which can automatically capture AU relations without unnecessary or even disturbing predefined rules. ABRNet uses several relation learning layers to automatically capture different AU relations. The learned AU relation features are then fed into a self-attention fusion module, which aims to refine individual AU features with attention weights to enhance the feature robustness. Furthermore, we propose an AU relation dropout strategy and AU relation loss (AUR-Loss) to better model AU relations, which can further improve AU recognition. Extensive experiments show that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on the DISFA and DISFA+ datasets. 面部动作单元（AU）识别对于面部表情分析至关重要。由于AU之间存在高度的正相关性或负相关性，现有的一些AU识别工作都集中在建模AU关系上。然而，以前基于关系的方法通常将预定义的规则嵌入到模型中，并忽略不同人群中各种 AU 关系的影响。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于 AU 识别的新颖的基于注意力的关系网络（ABRNet），它可以自动捕获 AU 关系，而无需不必要的甚至干扰预定义的规则。 ABRNet 使用多个关系学习层来自动捕获不同的 AU 关系。然后将学习到的 AU 关系特征输入到自注意力融合模块中，该模块旨在通过注意力权重细化各个 AU 特征，以增强特征的鲁棒性。此外，我们提出了AU关系dropout策略和AU关系损失（AUR-Loss）来更好地建模AU关系，这可以进一步提高AU识别率。大量实验表明，我们的方法在 DISFA 和 DISFA+ 数据集上实现了最先进的性能。 本文提出了一种基于注意力机制的关系网络（ABRNet），用于自动捕捉面部动作单元（AU）之间的关系，以提升AU识别的准确性。 Yao Wei,Haoxiang Wang,Mingze Sun,Jiawang Liu cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Clement Tan,Chai Kiat Yeo,Cheston Tan,Basura Fernando
title: Inferring Past Human Actions in Homes with Abductive Reasoning
title_zh: 通过归纳推理推断过去人类在家中的行为
abstract: Abductive reasoning aims to make the most likely inference for a given set of incomplete observations. In this paper, we introduce "Abductive Past Action Inference", a novel research task aimed at identifying the past actions performed by individuals within homes to reach specific states captured in a single image, using abductive inference. The research explores three key abductive inference problems: past action set prediction, past action sequence prediction, and abductive past action verification. We introduce several models tailored for abductive past action inference, including a relational graph neural network, a relational bilinear pooling model, and a relational transformer model. Notably, the newly proposed object-relational bilinear graph encoder-decoder (BiGED) model emerges as the most effective among all methods evaluated, demonstrating good proficiency in handling the intricacies of the Action Genome dataset. The contributions of this research significantly advance the ability of deep learning models to reason about current scene evidence and make highly plausible inferences about past human actions. This advancement enables a deeper understanding of events and behaviors, which can enhance decision-making and improve system capabilities across various real-world applications such as Human-Robot Interaction and Elderly Care and Health Monitoring. Code and data available at https://github.com/LUNAProject22/AAR
summary: Abductive reasoning aims to make the most likely inference for a given set of incomplete observations. In this paper, we introduce "Abductive Past Action Inference", a novel research task aimed at identifying the past actions performed by individuals within homes to reach specific states captured in a single image, using abductive inference. The research explores three key abductive inference problems: past action set prediction, past action sequence prediction, and abductive past action verification. We introduce several models tailored for abductive past action inference, including a relational graph neural network, a relational bilinear pooling model, and a relational transformer model. Notably, the newly proposed object-relational bilinear graph encoder-decoder (BiGED) model emerges as the most effective among all methods evaluated, demonstrating good proficiency in handling the intricacies of the Action Genome dataset. The contributions of this research significantly advance the ability of deep learning models to reason about current scene evidence and make highly plausible inferences about past human actions. This advancement enables a deeper understanding of events and behaviors, which can enhance decision-making and improve system capabilities across various real-world applications such as Human-Robot Interaction and Elderly Care and Health Monitoring. Code and data available at https://github.com/LUNAProject22/AAR
abstract_zh: 溯因推理的目的是对给定的一组不完整的观察结果做出最可能的推论。在本文中，我们介绍了“溯因过去行动推理”，这是一项新颖的研究任务，旨在利用溯因推理来识别家庭中的个人过去所执行的行为，以达到单个图像中捕获的特定状态。该研究探讨了三个关键的溯因推理问题：过去动作集预测、过去动作序列预测和溯因过去动作验证。我们介绍了几种专为溯因过去动作推理而设计的模型，包括关系图神经网络、关系双线性池模型和关系变换器模型。值得注意的是，新提出的对象关系双线性图编码器-解码器（BiGED）模型成为所有评估方法中最有效的模型，展示了在处理动作基因组数据集的复杂性方面的良好熟练程度。这项研究的贡献显着提高了深度学习模型推理当前场景证据并对过去人类行为做出高度可信的推论的能力。这一进步使人们能够更深入地了解事件和行为，从而增强决策并提高各种实际应用（例如人机交互、老年人护理和健康监测）的系统功能。代码和数据可在 https://github.com/LUNAProject22/AAR 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于归纳推理的新型研究任务——'归纳过去动作推理'，旨在通过单张图像推断家庭环境中导致特定状态的过去人类动作。
AI.motivation: 通过归纳推理从不完整观察中推断最可能的过去动作，能够增强AI对家庭场景中人类行为的理解，为机器人交互、老年人护理等实际应用提供支持。
AI.method: 设计了关系图神经网络、关系双线性池化模型和关系转换器模型，并提出新的对象-关系双线性图编码器-解码器（BiGED）模型进行归纳过去动作推理。
AI.result: BiGED模型在Action Genome数据集上表现出色，有效处理了场景复杂性，显著提升了深度学习模型对过去人类动作的推理能力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究推进了AI对场景证据的推理能力，为事件理解与行为分析提供了新方法，可应用于人机交互、健康监护等现实场景。

authors_text: Federico Tartarini,Mario Frei,Stefano Schiavon,Yun Xuan Chua,Clayton Miller
title: Cozie Apple: An iOS mobile and smartwatch application for environmental quality satisfaction and physiological data collection
title_zh: Cozie Apple：一款用于环境质量满意度和生理数据收集的 iOS 移动和智能手表应用程序
comment: Accepted at the CISBAT 2023 The Built Environment in Transition, Hybrid International Conference, EPFL, Lausanne, Switzerland, 13-15 September 2023
comments: Accepted at the CISBAT 2023 The Built Environment in Transition, Hybrid International Conference, EPFL, Lausanne, Switzerland, 13-15 September 2023
abstract: Collecting feedback from people in indoor and outdoor environments is traditionally challenging and complex in a reliable, longitudinal, and non-intrusive way. This paper introduces Cozie Apple, an open-source mobile and smartwatch application for iOS devices. This platform allows people to complete a watch-based micro-survey and provide real-time feedback about environmental conditions via their Apple Watch. It leverages the inbuilt sensors of a smartwatch to collect physiological (e.g., heart rate, activity) and environmental (sound level) data. This paper outlines data collected from 48 research participants who used the platform to report perceptions of urban-scale environmental comfort (noise and thermal) and contextual factors such as who they were with and what activity they were doing. The results of 2,400 micro-surveys across various urban settings are illustrated in this paper showing the variability of noise-related distractions, thermal comfort, and associated context. The results show people experience at least a little noise distraction 58% of the time, with people talking being the most common reason (46%). This effort is novel due to its focus on spatial and temporal scalability and collection of noise, distraction, and associated contextual information. These data set the stage for larger deployments, deeper analysis, and more helpful prediction models toward better understanding the occupants' needs and perceptions. These innovations could result in real-time control signals to building systems or nudges for people to change their behavior.

abstract_zh: 以可靠、纵向和非侵入性的方式收集室内和室外环境中的人们的反馈传统上是具有挑战性和复杂性的。本文介绍了 Cozie Apple，这是一款适用于 iOS 设备的开源移动和智能手表应用程序。该平台允许人们完成基于手表的微观调查，并通过 Apple Watch 提供有关环境条件的实时反馈。它利用智能手表的内置传感器来收集生理（例如心率、活动）和环境（声级）数据。本文概述了从 48 名研究参与者收集的数据，他们使用该平台报告对城市规模环境舒适度（噪音和热量）的看法以及背景因素，例如他们与谁在一起以及他们正在做什么活动。本文阐述了对不同城市环境进行的 2,400 项微观调查的结果，显示了与噪音相关的干扰、热舒适度和相关环境的变化。结果显示，58% 的时间人们至少会受到一点噪音干扰，其中最常见的原因是人们说话 (46%)。这项工作是新颖的，因为它关注空间和时间可扩展性以及噪声、干扰和相关上下文信息的收集。这些数据为更大规模的部署、更深入的分析和更有用的预测模型奠定了基础，以更好地了解居住者的需求和看法。这些创新可能会给建筑系统带来实时控制信号，或者推动人们改变行为。

AI.tldr: 开发一个iOS移动和智能手表应用，用于收集环境质量满意度和生理数据，以分析环境舒适度和用户反馈。
AI.motivation: 传统方法难以可靠、长期且非侵入式地收集室内外环境反馈，需开发新型工具。
AI.method: 基于Apple Watch的开源应用，结合内置传感器收集生理（如心率）和环境（如噪音）数据，并进行实时微调查。
AI.result: 收集2400份微调查数据，显示58%时间存在噪音干扰，其中46%因交谈导致，揭示环境舒适度和上下文因素的变异性。

search_text: Cozie Apple: An iOS mobile and smartwatch application for environmental quality satisfaction and physiological data collection Cozie Apple：一款用于环境质量满意度和生理数据收集的 iOS 移动和智能手表应用程序 Collecting feedback from people in indoor and outdoor environments is traditionally challenging and complex in a reliable, longitudinal, and non-intrusive way. This paper introduces Cozie Apple, an open-source mobile and smartwatch application for iOS devices. This platform allows people to complete a watch-based micro-survey and provide real-time feedback about environmental conditions via their Apple Watch. It leverages the inbuilt sensors of a smartwatch to collect physiological (e.g., heart rate, activity) and environmental (sound level) data. This paper outlines data collected from 48 research participants who used the platform to report perceptions of urban-scale environmental comfort (noise and thermal) and contextual factors such as who they were with and what activity they were doing. The results of 2,400 micro-surveys across various urban settings are illustrated in this paper showing the variability of noise-related distractions, thermal comfort, and associated context. The results show people experience at least a little noise distraction 58% of the time, with people talking being the most common reason (46%). This effort is novel due to its focus on spatial and temporal scalability and collection of noise, distraction, and associated contextual information. These data set the stage for larger deployments, deeper analysis, and more helpful prediction models toward better understanding the occupants' needs and perceptions. These innovations could result in real-time control signals to building systems or nudges for people to change their behavior. 以可靠、纵向和非侵入性的方式收集室内和室外环境中的人们的反馈传统上是具有挑战性和复杂性的。本文介绍了 Cozie Apple，这是一款适用于 iOS 设备的开源移动和智能手表应用程序。该平台允许人们完成基于手表的微观调查，并通过 Apple Watch 提供有关环境条件的实时反馈。它利用智能手表的内置传感器来收集生理（例如心率、活动）和环境（声级）数据。本文概述了从 48 名研究参与者收集的数据，他们使用该平台报告对城市规模环境舒适度（噪音和热量）的看法以及背景因素，例如他们与谁在一起以及他们正在做什么活动。本文阐述了对不同城市环境进行的 2,400 项微观调查的结果，显示了与噪音相关的干扰、热舒适度和相关环境的变化。结果显示，58% 的时间人们至少会受到一点噪音干扰，其中最常见的原因是人们说话 (46%)。这项工作是新颖的，因为它关注空间和时间可扩展性以及噪声、干扰和相关上下文信息的收集。这些数据为更大规模的部署、更深入的分析和更有用的预测模型奠定了基础，以更好地了解居住者的需求和看法。这些创新可能会给建筑系统带来实时控制信号，或者推动人们改变行为。 开发一个iOS移动和智能手表应用，用于收集环境质量满意度和生理数据，以分析环境舒适度和用户反馈。 Federico Tartarini,Mario Frei,Stefano Schiavon,Yun Xuan Chua,Clayton Miller cs.HC

title: The Debate Over Understanding in AI's Large Language Models
title_zh: 关于人工智能大型语言模型理解的争论
comment: Under submission as a Perspective article. Updated with additional discussion and citations
comments: Under submission as a Perspective article. Updated with additional discussion and citations
abstract: We survey a current, heated debate in the AI research community on whether large pre-trained language models can be said to "understand" language -- and the physical and social situations language encodes -- in any important sense. We describe arguments that have been made for and against such understanding, and key questions for the broader sciences of intelligence that have arisen in light of these arguments. We contend that a new science of intelligence can be developed that will provide insight into distinct modes of understanding, their strengths and limitations, and the challenge of integrating diverse forms of cognition.
summary: We survey a current, heated debate in the AI research community on whether large pre-trained language models can be said to "understand" language -- and the physical and social situations language encodes -- in any important sense. We describe arguments that have been made for and against such understanding, and key questions for the broader sciences of intelligence that have arisen in light of these arguments. We contend that a new science of intelligence can be developed that will provide insight into distinct modes of understanding, their strengths and limitations, and the challenge of integrating diverse forms of cognition.
abstract_zh: 我们调查了人工智能研究界当前的激烈争论，即大型预训练语言模型是否可以在任何重要意义上“理解”语言以及语言编码的物理和社会情境。我们描述了支持和反对这种理解的论点，以及根据这些论点出现的更广泛的情报科学的关键问题。我们认为，可以发展一门新的智力科学，它将深入了解不同的理解模式、它们的优点和局限性，以及整合不同形式的认知的挑战。

AI.tldr: 探讨大型语言模型是否具备理解能力，分析相关争论并提出新的智能科学方向。
AI.motivation: 解决AI领域关于大模型理解能力的争议，推动智能科学的发展。
AI.method: 通过文献综述和理论分析，总结正反方论点，并提出新的智能科学框架。
AI.result: 明确了不同理解模式的优缺点，指出了整合多样化认知的挑战。
AI.conclusion: 需要发展新的智能科学，以深入理解不同理解模式及其整合挑战。

authors_text: Aleksandar Petrov,Carter Fang,Khang Minh Pham,You Hong Eng,James Guo Ming Fu,Scott Drew Pendleton
title: HiddenGems: Efficient safety boundary detection with active learning
title_zh: HiddenGems：通过主动学习进行高效安全边界检测
abstract: Evaluating safety performance in a resource-efficient way is crucial for the development of autonomous systems. Simulation of parameterized scenarios is a popular testing strategy but parameter sweeps can be prohibitively expensive. To address this, we propose HiddenGems: a sample-efficient method for discovering the boundary between compliant and non-compliant behavior via active learning. Given a parameterized scenario, one or more compliance metrics, and a simulation oracle, HiddenGems maps the compliant and non-compliant domains of the scenario. The methodology enables critical test case identification, comparative analysis of different versions of the system under test, as well as verification of design objectives. We evaluate HiddenGems on a scenario with a jaywalker crossing in front of an autonomous vehicle and obtain compliance boundary estimates for collision, lane keep, and acceleration metrics individually and in combination, with 6 times fewer simulations than a parameter sweep. We also show how HiddenGems can be used to detect and rectify a failure mode for an unprotected turn with 86% fewer simulations.
summary: Evaluating safety performance in a resource-efficient way is crucial for the development of autonomous systems. Simulation of parameterized scenarios is a popular testing strategy but parameter sweeps can be prohibitively expensive. To address this, we propose HiddenGems: a sample-efficient method for discovering the boundary between compliant and non-compliant behavior via active learning. Given a parameterized scenario, one or more compliance metrics, and a simulation oracle, HiddenGems maps the compliant and non-compliant domains of the scenario. The methodology enables critical test case identification, comparative analysis of different versions of the system under test, as well as verification of design objectives. We evaluate HiddenGems on a scenario with a jaywalker crossing in front of an autonomous vehicle and obtain compliance boundary estimates for collision, lane keep, and acceleration metrics individually and in combination, with 6 times fewer simulations than a parameter sweep. We also show how HiddenGems can be used to detect and rectify a failure mode for an unprotected turn with 86% fewer simulations.
abstract_zh: 以资源高效的方式评估安全性能对于自主系统的开发至关重要。参数化场景的模拟是一种流行的测试策略，但参数扫描的成本可能高得令人望而却步。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 HiddenGems：一种通过主动学习发现合规行为和不合规行为之间边界的样本有效方法。给定参数化场景、一个或多个合规性指标以及模拟预言机，HiddenGems 会映射场景的合规域和不合规域。该方法能够识别关键测试用例、对被测系统的不同版本进行比较分析以及设计目标的验证。我们在自动驾驶车辆前面有过马路的人横穿马路的场景中评估了 HiddenGems，并单独和组合获得碰撞、车道保持和加速度指标的合规边界估计，模拟次数比参数扫描少 6 倍。我们还展示了如何使用 HiddenGems 来检测和纠正未受保护转弯的故障模式，并且模拟次数减少 86%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出HiddenGems方法，通过主动学习高效检测自主系统的安全边界。
AI.motivation: 传统参数扫描测试自主系统安全性能成本过高，需更高效的边界检测方法。
AI.method: 基于主动学习的HiddenGems方法，利用参数化场景、合规指标及模拟预言机定位安全边界。
AI.result: 在过马路场景中，仅用参数扫描1/6的模拟次数完成多指标边界检测，且用86%更少模拟发现转向失败模式。
AI.conclusion: HiddenGems显著减少仿真资源消耗，可有效支持系统验证与设计目标分析。

authors_text: Tobias Leemann,Martin Pawelczyk,Christian Thomas Eberle,Gjergji Kasneci
title: I Prefer not to Say: Protecting User Consent in Models with Optional Personal Data
title_zh: 我不想说：在具有可选个人数据的模型中保护用户同意
comment: v5: AAAI-24 Camera-Ready Version Including Appendices. v1: NeurIPS 2022 Workshop on Algorithmic Fairness through the Lens of Causality and Privacy (AFCP)
comments: v5: AAAI-24 Camera-Ready Version Including Appendices. v1: NeurIPS 2022 Workshop on Algorithmic Fairness through the Lens of Causality and Privacy (AFCP)
abstract: We examine machine learning models in a setup where individuals have the choice to share optional personal information with a decision-making system, as seen in modern insurance pricing models. Some users consent to their data being used whereas others object and keep their data undisclosed. In this work, we show that the decision not to share data can be considered as information in itself that should be protected to respect users' privacy. This observation raises the overlooked problem of how to ensure that users who protect their personal data do not suffer any disadvantages as a result. To address this problem, we formalize protection requirements for models which only use the information for which active user consent was obtained. This excludes implicit information contained in the decision to share data or not. We offer the first solution to this problem by proposing the notion of Protected User Consent (PUC), which we prove to be loss-optimal under our protection requirement. We observe that privacy and performance are not fundamentally at odds with each other and that it is possible for a decision maker to benefit from additional data while respecting users' consent. To learn PUC-compliant models, we devise a model-agnostic data augmentation strategy with finite sample convergence guarantees. Finally, we analyze the implications of PUC on challenging real datasets, tasks, and models.
summary: We examine machine learning models in a setup where individuals have the choice to share optional personal information with a decision-making system, as seen in modern insurance pricing models. Some users consent to their data being used whereas others object and keep their data undisclosed. In this work, we show that the decision not to share data can be considered as information in itself that should be protected to respect users' privacy. This observation raises the overlooked problem of how to ensure that users who protect their personal data do not suffer any disadvantages as a result. To address this problem, we formalize protection requirements for models which only use the information for which active user consent was obtained. This excludes implicit information contained in the decision to share data or not. We offer the first solution to this problem by proposing the notion of Protected User Consent (PUC), which we prove to be loss-optimal under our protection requirement. We observe that privacy and performance are not fundamentally at odds with each other and that it is possible for a decision maker to benefit from additional data while respecting users' consent. To learn PUC-compliant models, we devise a model-agnostic data augmentation strategy with finite sample convergence guarantees. Finally, we analyze the implications of PUC on challenging real datasets, tasks, and models.
abstract_zh: 我们在一个设置中检查机器学习模型，在该设置中，个人可以选择与决策系统共享可选的个人信息，正如现代保险定价模型中所见。一些用户同意使用他们的数据，而另一些用户则反对并保持其数据不公开。在这项工作中，我们表明，不共享数据的决定本身可以被视为应该受到保护以尊重用户隐私的信息。这一观察提出了一个被忽视的问题，即如何确保保护其个人数据的用户不会因此而遭受任何不利。为了解决这个问题，我们对仅使用已获得用户主动同意的信息的模型制定了正式的保护要求。这排除了是否共享数据的决定中包含的隐含信息。我们通过提出受保护的用户同意（PUC）的概念来提供这个问题的第一个解决方案，我们证明在我们的保护要求下这是损失最优的。我们发现，隐私和性能从根本上来说并不矛盾，决策者可以在尊重用户同意的同时从额外数据中受益。为了学习符合 PUC 的模型，我们设计了一种具有有限样本收敛保证的模型无关的数据增强策略。最后，我们分析了 PUC 对具有挑战性的真实数据集、任务和模型的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在机器学习模型中保护用户选择不分享个人数据的隐私问题，提出了一种名为Protected User Consent (PUC)的机制，确保用户因未共享数据而遭受不公平待遇的问题。
AI.motivation: 现代决策系统（如保险定价）允许用户选择是否分享个人数据，但用户拒绝分享的行为本身可能被隐含利用，导致隐私泄露或不公平对待，需在保护隐私的同时保证模型性能。
AI.method: 提出PUC机制，要求模型仅使用用户明确同意的数据，排除未分享数据的隐含信息；设计了一种模型无关的数据增强策略，并证明其具有有限样本收敛性。
AI.result: PUC在保护用户隐私的同时实现了损失最优，验证了隐私与性能可共存；通过真实数据集实验表明，该方法能有效避免对未分享数据用户的歧视。
AI.conclusion: 通过PUC机制可平衡隐私保护与模型性能，证明在尊重用户同意的前提下，决策系统仍能利用额外数据提升效果，为隐私敏感场景提供可行解决方案。

search_text: I Prefer not to Say: Protecting User Consent in Models with Optional Personal Data 我不想说：在具有可选个人数据的模型中保护用户同意 We examine machine learning models in a setup where individuals have the choice to share optional personal information with a decision-making system, as seen in modern insurance pricing models. Some users consent to their data being used whereas others object and keep their data undisclosed. In this work, we show that the decision not to share data can be considered as information in itself that should be protected to respect users' privacy. This observation raises the overlooked problem of how to ensure that users who protect their personal data do not suffer any disadvantages as a result. To address this problem, we formalize protection requirements for models which only use the information for which active user consent was obtained. This excludes implicit information contained in the decision to share data or not. We offer the first solution to this problem by proposing the notion of Protected User Consent (PUC), which we prove to be loss-optimal under our protection requirement. We observe that privacy and performance are not fundamentally at odds with each other and that it is possible for a decision maker to benefit from additional data while respecting users' consent. To learn PUC-compliant models, we devise a model-agnostic data augmentation strategy with finite sample convergence guarantees. Finally, we analyze the implications of PUC on challenging real datasets, tasks, and models. 我们在一个设置中检查机器学习模型，在该设置中，个人可以选择与决策系统共享可选的个人信息，正如现代保险定价模型中所见。一些用户同意使用他们的数据，而另一些用户则反对并保持其数据不公开。在这项工作中，我们表明，不共享数据的决定本身可以被视为应该受到保护以尊重用户隐私的信息。这一观察提出了一个被忽视的问题，即如何确保保护其个人数据的用户不会因此而遭受任何不利。为了解决这个问题，我们对仅使用已获得用户主动同意的信息的模型制定了正式的保护要求。这排除了是否共享数据的决定中包含的隐含信息。我们通过提出受保护的用户同意（PUC）的概念来提供这个问题的第一个解决方案，我们证明在我们的保护要求下这是损失最优的。我们发现，隐私和性能从根本上来说并不矛盾，决策者可以在尊重用户同意的同时从额外数据中受益。为了学习符合 PUC 的模型，我们设计了一种具有有限样本收敛保证的模型无关的数据增强策略。最后，我们分析了 PUC 对具有挑战性的真实数据集、任务和模型的影响。 本文研究了在机器学习模型中保护用户选择不分享个人数据的隐私问题，提出了一种名为Protected User Consent (PUC)的机制，确保用户因未共享数据而遭受不公平待遇的问题。 Tobias Leemann,Martin Pawelczyk,Christian Thomas Eberle,Gjergji Kasneci cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CY,stat.ML

authors_text: Gaetano Rossiello,Md Faisal Mahbub Chowdhury,Nandana Mihindukulasooriya,Owen Cornec,Alfio Massimiliano Gliozzo
title: KnowGL: Knowledge Generation and Linking from Text
title_zh: KnowGL：知识生成和文本链接
abstract: We propose KnowGL, a tool that allows converting text into structured relational data represented as a set of ABox assertions compliant with the TBox of a given Knowledge Graph (KG), such as Wikidata. We address this problem as a sequence generation task by leveraging pre-trained sequence-to-sequence language models, e.g. BART. Given a sentence, we fine-tune such models to detect pairs of entity mentions and jointly generate a set of facts consisting of the full set of semantic annotations for a KG, such as entity labels, entity types, and their relationships. To showcase the capabilities of our tool, we build a web application consisting of a set of UI widgets that help users to navigate through the semantic data extracted from a given input text. We make the KnowGL model available at https://huggingface.co/ibm/knowgl-large.
summary: We propose KnowGL, a tool that allows converting text into structured relational data represented as a set of ABox assertions compliant with the TBox of a given Knowledge Graph (KG), such as Wikidata. We address this problem as a sequence generation task by leveraging pre-trained sequence-to-sequence language models, e.g. BART. Given a sentence, we fine-tune such models to detect pairs of entity mentions and jointly generate a set of facts consisting of the full set of semantic annotations for a KG, such as entity labels, entity types, and their relationships. To showcase the capabilities of our tool, we build a web application consisting of a set of UI widgets that help users to navigate through the semantic data extracted from a given input text. We make the KnowGL model available at https://huggingface.co/ibm/knowgl-large.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 KnowGL，这是一个允许将文本转换为结构化关系数据的工具，该数据表示为一组符合给定知识图（KG）（例如维基数据）的 TBox 的 ABox 断言。我们通过利用预先训练的序列到序列语言模型，例如序列生成任务来解决这个问题。巴特。给定一个句子，我们对此类模型进行微调以检测实体提及对，并联合生成一组由知识图谱的全套语义注释组成的事实，例如实体标签、实体类型及其关系。为了展示我们工具的功能，我们构建了一个由一组 UI 小部件组成的 Web 应用程序，可帮助用户浏览从给定输入文本中提取的语义数据。我们在 https://huggingface.co/ibm/knowgl-large 上提供 KnowGL 模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出KnowGL工具，通过序列生成任务将文本转换为符合知识图谱TBox的结构化关系数据。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在文本到知识图谱的转换中存在实体链接和语义注释不足的问题，需更高效的工具支持结构化数据生成。
AI.method: 基于预训练序列到序列模型（如BART）进行微调，联合检测实体对并生成包含实体标签、类型及关系的语义事实集，配套开发交互式网页应用。
AI.result: 成功构建KnowGL模型并开源，通过网页应用验证其提取能力，可有效生成符合Wikidata等KG标准的结构化数据。
AI.conclusion: KnowGL为文本到知识图谱的转换提供了端到端解决方案，未来可扩展至多语言及复杂关系建模场景。
