title: Pointly-Supervised Panoptic Segmentation
title_zh: 点监督全景分割
abstract: In this paper, we propose a new approach to applying point-level annotations for weakly-supervised panoptic segmentation. Instead of the dense pixel-level labels used by fully supervised methods, point-level labels only provide a single point for each target as supervision, significantly reducing the annotation burden. We formulate the problem in an end-to-end framework by simultaneously generating panoptic pseudo-masks from point-level labels and learning from them. To tackle the core challenge, i.e., panoptic pseudo-mask generation, we propose a principled approach to parsing pixels by minimizing pixel-to-point traversing costs, which model semantic similarity, low-level texture cues, and high-level manifold knowledge to discriminate panoptic targets. We conduct experiments on the Pascal VOC and the MS COCO datasets to demonstrate the approach's effectiveness and show state-of-the-art performance in the weakly-supervised panoptic segmentation problem. Codes are available at https://github.com/BraveGroup/PSPS.git.
summary: In this paper, we propose a new approach to applying point-level annotations for weakly-supervised panoptic segmentation. Instead of the dense pixel-level labels used by fully supervised methods, point-level labels only provide a single point for each target as supervision, significantly reducing the annotation burden. We formulate the problem in an end-to-end framework by simultaneously generating panoptic pseudo-masks from point-level labels and learning from them. To tackle the core challenge, i.e., panoptic pseudo-mask generation, we propose a principled approach to parsing pixels by minimizing pixel-to-point traversing costs, which model semantic similarity, low-level texture cues, and high-level manifold knowledge to discriminate panoptic targets. We conduct experiments on the Pascal VOC and the MS COCO datasets to demonstrate the approach's effectiveness and show state-of-the-art performance in the weakly-supervised panoptic segmentation problem. Codes are available at https://github.com/BraveGroup/PSPS.git.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种将点级注释应用于弱监督全景分割的新方法。点级标签不是完全监督方法使用的密集像素级标签，而是仅为每个目标提供单个点作为监督，从而显着减轻了注释负担。我们通过同时从点级标签生成全景伪掩模并从中学习，在端到端框架中制定问题。为了解决核心挑战，即全景伪掩模生成，我们提出了一种通过最小化像素到点遍历成本来解析像素的原则性方法，该方法对语义相似性、低级纹理线索和高级流形知识进行建模以区分全景目标。我们在 Pascal VOC 和 MS COCO 数据集上进行了实验，以证明该方法的有效性，并在弱监督全景分割问题中展示最先进的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/BraveGroup/PSPS.git 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于点级标注的弱监督全景分割方法，通过生成伪掩码并结合多线索优化实现高效分割。
AI.motivation: 传统全景分割依赖密集像素级标注，标注成本高昂。点级标注可大幅降低标注负担，但如何有效利用点信息生成高质量伪掩码是核心挑战。
AI.method: 构建端到端框架，通过最小化像素到点的遍历成本生成伪掩码，融合语义相似性、纹理特征与流形结构知识进行像素解析。
AI.result: 在Pascal VOC和MS COCO数据集上达到弱监督全景分割的最先进性能，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在减少标注成本的同时保持分割精度，为弱监督场景下的全景分割提供了新思路与可行方案。

motivation: 传统全景分割依赖密集像素级标注，标注成本高昂。点级标注可大幅降低标注负担，但如何有效利用点信息生成高质量伪掩码是核心挑战。
method: 构建端到端框架，通过最小化像素到点的遍历成本生成伪掩码，融合语义相似性、纹理特征与流形结构知识进行像素解析。
result: 在Pascal VOC和MS COCO数据集上达到弱监督全景分割的最先进性能，验证了方法有效性。
conclusion: 该方法在减少标注成本的同时保持分割精度，为弱监督场景下的全景分割提供了新思路与可行方案。
search_text: Pointly-Supervised Panoptic Segmentation 点监督全景分割 In this paper, we propose a new approach to applying point-level annotations for weakly-supervised panoptic segmentation. Instead of the dense pixel-level labels used by fully supervised methods, point-level labels only provide a single point for each target as supervision, significantly reducing the annotation burden. We formulate the problem in an end-to-end framework by simultaneously generating panoptic pseudo-masks from point-level labels and learning from them. To tackle the core challenge, i.e., panoptic pseudo-mask generation, we propose a principled approach to parsing pixels by minimizing pixel-to-point traversing costs, which model semantic similarity, low-level texture cues, and high-level manifold knowledge to discriminate panoptic targets. We conduct experiments on the Pascal VOC and the MS COCO datasets to demonstrate the approach's effectiveness and show state-of-the-art performance in the weakly-supervised panoptic segmentation problem. Codes are available at https://github.com/BraveGroup/PSPS.git. 在本文中，我们提出了一种将点级注释应用于弱监督全景分割的新方法。点级标签不是完全监督方法使用的密集像素级标签，而是仅为每个目标提供单个点作为监督，从而显着减轻了注释负担。我们通过同时从点级标签生成全景伪掩模并从中学习，在端到端框架中制定问题。为了解决核心挑战，即全景伪掩模生成，我们提出了一种通过最小化像素到点遍历成本来解析像素的原则性方法，该方法对语义相似性、低级纹理线索和高级流形知识进行建模以区分全景目标。我们在 Pascal VOC 和 MS COCO 数据集上进行了实验，以证明该方法的有效性，并在弱监督全景分割问题中展示最先进的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/BraveGroup/PSPS.git 获取。 本文提出一种基于点级标注的弱监督全景分割方法，通过生成伪掩码并结合多线索优化实现高效分割。 Junsong Fan,Zhaoxiang Zhang,Tieniu Tan cs.CV

title: A Survey on Artificial Intelligence for Music Generation: Agents, Domains and Perspectives
title_zh: 音乐生成人工智能调查：代理、领域和观点
abstract: Music is one of the Gardner's intelligences in his theory of multiple intelligences. How humans perceive and understand music is still being studied and is crucial to develop artificial intelligence models that imitate such processes. Music generation with Artificial Intelligence is an emerging field that is gaining much attention in the recent years. In this paper, we describe how humans compose music and how new AI systems could imitate such process by comparing past and recent advances in the field with music composition techniques. To understand how AI models and algorithms generate music and the potential applications that might appear in the future, we explore, analyze and describe the agents that take part of the music generation process: the datasets, models, interfaces, the users and the generated music. We mention possible applications that might benefit from this field and we also propose new trends and future research directions that could be explored in the future.
summary: Music is one of the Gardner's intelligences in his theory of multiple intelligences. How humans perceive and understand music is still being studied and is crucial to develop artificial intelligence models that imitate such processes. Music generation with Artificial Intelligence is an emerging field that is gaining much attention in the recent years. In this paper, we describe how humans compose music and how new AI systems could imitate such process by comparing past and recent advances in the field with music composition techniques. To understand how AI models and algorithms generate music and the potential applications that might appear in the future, we explore, analyze and describe the agents that take part of the music generation process: the datasets, models, interfaces, the users and the generated music. We mention possible applications that might benefit from this field and we also propose new trends and future research directions that could be explored in the future.
abstract_zh: 音乐是加德纳多元智能理论中的智能之一。人类如何感知和理解音乐仍在研究中，这对于开发模仿此类过程的人工智能模型至关重要。人工智能音乐生成是近年来备受关注的新兴领域。在本文中，我们通过比较音乐创作技术领域过去和最近的进展，描述了人类如何创作音乐，以及新的人工智能系统如何模仿这一过程。为了了解人工智能模型和算法如何生成音乐以及未来可能出现的潜在应用，我们探索、分析和描述参与音乐生成过程的代理：数据集、模型、界面、用户和生成的音乐。我们提到了可能受益于该领域的可能应用，并且我们还提出了未来可以探索的新趋势和未来研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了人工智能在音乐生成领域的研究进展，分析了音乐生成过程中的关键要素（数据集、模型、接口等）及未来发展方向。
AI.motivation: 音乐作为人类智能的重要组成部分，其生成机制的研究对开发类人AI模型具有重要意义，且该领域近年发展迅速需系统总结。
AI.method: 通过对比历史与最新技术，分析音乐生成中的核心组件（数据、模型、用户交互等），并探讨其应用潜力与研究趋势。
AI.result: 梳理了AI音乐生成的技术演进，明确了当前技术瓶颈，提出了跨领域应用前景及未来研究方向如多模态生成与伦理问题。
AI.conclusion: AI音乐生成具有广阔应用前景，需进一步突破技术限制并探索人机协作新模式以推动艺术与科技融合。

authors_text: Sidharth Ranjan,Marten van Schijndel,Sumeet Agarwal,Rajakrishnan Rajkumar
title: Discourse Context Predictability Effects in Hindi Word Order
title_zh: 印地语词序中的话语语境可预测性效应
abstract: We test the hypothesis that discourse predictability influences Hindi syntactic choice. While prior work has shown that a number of factors (e.g., information status, dependency length, and syntactic surprisal) influence Hindi word order preferences, the role of discourse predictability is underexplored in the literature. Inspired by prior work on syntactic priming, we investigate how the words and syntactic structures in a sentence influence the word order of the following sentences. Specifically, we extract sentences from the Hindi-Urdu Treebank corpus (HUTB), permute the preverbal constituents of those sentences, and build a classifier to predict which sentences actually occurred in the corpus against artificially generated distractors. The classifier uses a number of discourse-based features and cognitive features to make its predictions, including dependency length, surprisal, and information status. We find that information status and LSTM-based discourse predictability influence word order choices, especially for non-canonical object-fronted orders. We conclude by situating our results within the broader syntactic priming literature.
summary: We test the hypothesis that discourse predictability influences Hindi syntactic choice. While prior work has shown that a number of factors (e.g., information status, dependency length, and syntactic surprisal) influence Hindi word order preferences, the role of discourse predictability is underexplored in the literature. Inspired by prior work on syntactic priming, we investigate how the words and syntactic structures in a sentence influence the word order of the following sentences. Specifically, we extract sentences from the Hindi-Urdu Treebank corpus (HUTB), permute the preverbal constituents of those sentences, and build a classifier to predict which sentences actually occurred in the corpus against artificially generated distractors. The classifier uses a number of discourse-based features and cognitive features to make its predictions, including dependency length, surprisal, and information status. We find that information status and LSTM-based discourse predictability influence word order choices, especially for non-canonical object-fronted orders. We conclude by situating our results within the broader syntactic priming literature.
abstract_zh: 我们检验了话语可预测性影响印地语句法选择的假设。虽然先前的研究表明，许多因素（例如信息状态、依存长度和句法惊喜）影响印地语词序偏好，但文献中对话语可预测性的作用尚未进行充分探讨。受先前关于句法启动的研究的启发，我们研究了句子中的单词和句法结构如何影响后续句子的词序。具体来说，我们从印地语-乌尔都语树库语料库（HUTB）中提取句子，排列这些句子的前动词成分，并构建一个分类器来预测语料库中实际出现的句子，以对抗人工生成的干扰项。分类器使用许多基于话语的特征和认知特征来进行预测，包括依赖长度、惊讶和信息状态。我们发现信息状态和基于 LSTM 的话语可预测性会影响词序选择，特别是对于非规范的面向对象的词序。最后，我们将我们的结果置于更广泛的句法启动文献中。

AI.tldr: 研究语篇上下文可预测性对印地语语序选择的影响。
AI.motivation: 尽管已有研究发现信息状态、依赖长度等因素影响印地语语序，但语篇可预测性的作用尚未被充分探讨。
AI.method: 从Hindi-Urdu Treebank语料库提取句子，置换动词前成分并构建分类器，利用依赖长度、惊讶度、信息状态及LSTM模型预测实际语序。
AI.result: 信息状态和基于LSTM的语篇可预测性显著影响语序选择，尤其对非常规宾语前置结构有明显作用。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为句法启动理论提供了新证据，强调语篇预测性在语言生成中的重要性。

authors_text: Sidharth Ranjan,Marten van Schijndel,Sumeet Agarwal,Rajakrishnan Rajkumar
title: Dual Mechanism Priming Effects in Hindi Word Order
title_zh: 印地语词序中的双重机制启动效应
abstract: Word order choices during sentence production can be primed by preceding sentences. In this work, we test the DUAL MECHANISM hypothesis that priming is driven by multiple different sources. Using a Hindi corpus of text productions, we model lexical priming with an n-gram cache model and we capture more abstract syntactic priming with an adaptive neural language model. We permute the preverbal constituents of corpus sentences, and then use a logistic regression model to predict which sentences actually occurred in the corpus against artificially generated meaning-equivalent variants. Our results indicate that lexical priming and lexically-independent syntactic priming affect complementary sets of verb classes. By showing that different priming influences are separable from one another, our results support the hypothesis that multiple different cognitive mechanisms underlie priming.
summary: Word order choices during sentence production can be primed by preceding sentences. In this work, we test the DUAL MECHANISM hypothesis that priming is driven by multiple different sources. Using a Hindi corpus of text productions, we model lexical priming with an n-gram cache model and we capture more abstract syntactic priming with an adaptive neural language model. We permute the preverbal constituents of corpus sentences, and then use a logistic regression model to predict which sentences actually occurred in the corpus against artificially generated meaning-equivalent variants. Our results indicate that lexical priming and lexically-independent syntactic priming affect complementary sets of verb classes. By showing that different priming influences are separable from one another, our results support the hypothesis that multiple different cognitive mechanisms underlie priming.
abstract_zh: 句子生成过程中的词序选择可以由前面的句子启动。在这项工作中，我们测试了双重机制假设，即启动是由多个不同来源驱动的。使用印地语文本生成语料库，我们使用 n-gram 缓存模型对词汇启动进行建模，并使用自适应神经语言模型捕获更抽象的句法启动。我们排列语料库句子的前动词成分，然后使用逻辑回归模型来预测语料库中实际出现的句子与人工生成的含义等效变体。我们的结果表明词汇启动和词汇无关的句法启动影响动词类的互补集。通过证明不同的启动影响是彼此可分离的，我们的结果支持了以下假设：多种不同的认知机制是启动的基础。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究印地语句子生成中词汇启动与句法启动的双重机制对语序选择的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有研究未明确区分启动效应的不同来源，本文旨在验证启动效应是否由多个独立认知机制驱动。
AI.method: 使用印地语语料库，结合n-gram缓存模型分析词汇启动，神经语言模型捕捉句法启动，并通过置换句法成分与逻辑回归模型对比实际语料与人工变体。
AI.result: 词汇启动与句法启动分别影响不同动词类别，且二者作用范围互补。
AI.conclusion: 不同启动效应可分离，支持句法与词汇启动由独立认知机制驱动的双重机制假说。

search_text: Dual Mechanism Priming Effects in Hindi Word Order 印地语词序中的双重机制启动效应 Word order choices during sentence production can be primed by preceding sentences. In this work, we test the DUAL MECHANISM hypothesis that priming is driven by multiple different sources. Using a Hindi corpus of text productions, we model lexical priming with an n-gram cache model and we capture more abstract syntactic priming with an adaptive neural language model. We permute the preverbal constituents of corpus sentences, and then use a logistic regression model to predict which sentences actually occurred in the corpus against artificially generated meaning-equivalent variants. Our results indicate that lexical priming and lexically-independent syntactic priming affect complementary sets of verb classes. By showing that different priming influences are separable from one another, our results support the hypothesis that multiple different cognitive mechanisms underlie priming. 句子生成过程中的词序选择可以由前面的句子启动。在这项工作中，我们测试了双重机制假设，即启动是由多个不同来源驱动的。使用印地语文本生成语料库，我们使用 n-gram 缓存模型对词汇启动进行建模，并使用自适应神经语言模型捕获更抽象的句法启动。我们排列语料库句子的前动词成分，然后使用逻辑回归模型来预测语料库中实际出现的句子与人工生成的含义等效变体。我们的结果表明词汇启动和词汇无关的句法启动影响动词类的互补集。通过证明不同的启动影响是彼此可分离的，我们的结果支持了以下假设：多种不同的认知机制是启动的基础。 本论文研究印地语句子生成中词汇启动与句法启动的双重机制对语序选择的影响。 Sidharth Ranjan,Marten van Schijndel,Sumeet Agarwal,Rajakrishnan Rajkumar cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.IT

title: CoLoC: Conditioned Localizer and Classifier for Sound Event Localization and Detection
title_zh: CoLoC：用于声音事件定位和检测的条件定位器和分类器
abstract: In this article, we describe Conditioned Localizer and Classifier (CoLoC) which is a novel solution for Sound Event Localization and Detection (SELD). The solution constitutes of two stages: the localization is done first and is followed by classification conditioned by the output of the localizer. In order to resolve the problem of the unknown number of sources we incorporate the idea borrowed from Sequential Set Generation (SSG). Models from both stages are SELDnet-like CRNNs, but with single outputs. Conducted reasoning shows that such two single-output models are fit for SELD task. We show that our solution improves on the baseline system in most metrics on the STARSS22 Dataset.
summary: In this article, we describe Conditioned Localizer and Classifier (CoLoC) which is a novel solution for Sound Event Localization and Detection (SELD). The solution constitutes of two stages: the localization is done first and is followed by classification conditioned by the output of the localizer. In order to resolve the problem of the unknown number of sources we incorporate the idea borrowed from Sequential Set Generation (SSG). Models from both stages are SELDnet-like CRNNs, but with single outputs. Conducted reasoning shows that such two single-output models are fit for SELD task. We show that our solution improves on the baseline system in most metrics on the STARSS22 Dataset.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们描述了条件定位器和分类器 (CoLoC)，它是声音事件定位和检测 (SELD) 的一种新颖解决方案。该解决方案由两个阶段组成：首先进行定位，然后根据定位器的输出进行分类。为了解决源数量未知的问题，我们借鉴了顺序集生成（SSG）的思想。这两个阶段的模型都是类似 SELDnet 的 CRNN，但具有单一输出。推理表明这两个单输出模型适合 SELD 任务。我们表明，我们的解决方案在 STARSS22 数据集的大多数指标上都改进了基线系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CoLoC，一种用于声音事件定位与检测（SELD）的两阶段模型，通过条件分类器提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理未知数量声源的SELD任务，需改进模型以提高定位与分类的协同效率。
AI.method: 采用两阶段架构：先通过定位器确定声源位置，再基于定位结果进行条件分类；使用单输出SELDnet-like CRNN，并结合序列集合生成（SSG）思想处理多源问题。
AI.result: 在STARSS22数据集上，CoLoC在多数指标上优于基线系统，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 条件化两阶段设计有效解决了SELD中多源不确定性问题，为声学场景理解提供新思路。

authors_text: Mehdi Sefidgar Dilmaghani,Waseem Shariff,Cian Ryan,Joe Lemley,Peter Corcoran
title: Control and Evaluation of Event Cameras Output Sharpness via Bias
title_zh: 通过偏置控制和评估事件摄像机输出清晰度
abstract: Event cameras also known as neuromorphic sensors are relatively a new technology with some privilege over the RGB cameras. The most important one is their difference in capturing the light changes in the environment, each pixel changes independently from the others when it captures a change in the environment light. To increase the users degree of freedom in controlling the output of these cameras, such as changing the sensitivity of the sensor to light changes, controlling the number of generated events and other similar operations, the camera manufacturers usually introduce some tools to make sensor level changes in camera settings. The contribution of this research is to examine and document the effects of changing the sensor settings on the sharpness as an indicator of quality of the generated stream of event data. To have a qualitative understanding this stream of event is converted to frames, then the average image gradient magnitude as an index of the number of edges and accordingly sharpness is calculated for these frames. Five different bias settings are explained and the effect of their change in the event output is surveyed and analyzed. In addition, the operation of the event camera sensing array is explained with an analogue circuit model and the functions of the bias foundations are linked with this model.
summary: Event cameras also known as neuromorphic sensors are relatively a new technology with some privilege over the RGB cameras. The most important one is their difference in capturing the light changes in the environment, each pixel changes independently from the others when it captures a change in the environment light. To increase the users degree of freedom in controlling the output of these cameras, such as changing the sensitivity of the sensor to light changes, controlling the number of generated events and other similar operations, the camera manufacturers usually introduce some tools to make sensor level changes in camera settings. The contribution of this research is to examine and document the effects of changing the sensor settings on the sharpness as an indicator of quality of the generated stream of event data. To have a qualitative understanding this stream of event is converted to frames, then the average image gradient magnitude as an index of the number of edges and accordingly sharpness is calculated for these frames. Five different bias settings are explained and the effect of their change in the event output is surveyed and analyzed. In addition, the operation of the event camera sensing array is explained with an analogue circuit model and the functions of the bias foundations are linked with this model.
abstract_zh: 事件相机也称为神经形态传感器，是一项相对较新的技术，比 RGB 相机具有一些优势。最重要的是它们在捕捉环境光线变化方面的差异，当每个像素捕捉到环境光线的变化时，每个像素都会独立于其他像素发生变化。为了增加用户控制这些相机输出的自由度，例如改变传感器对光线变化的敏感度、控制生成事件的数量以及其他类似操作，相机制造商通常会引入一些工具来在相机设置中进行传感器级别的更改。这项研究的贡献是检查并记录改变传感器设置对清晰度的影响，作为生成的事件数据流的质量指标。为了获得定性的理解，该事件流被转换为帧，然后计算这些帧的平均图像梯度幅度作为边缘数量的索引以及相应的清晰度。解释了五种不同的偏差设置，并调查和分析了它们的变化对事件输出的影响。此外，事件相机传感阵列的操作通过模拟电路模型进行解释，并且偏置基础的功能与该模型相关联。

AI.tldr: 本文研究通过调整事件相机的偏置设置来控制和评估其输出的锐度，并分析不同设置对事件数据流质量的影响。
AI.motivation: 事件相机的传感器设置调整工具缺乏对输出质量（如锐度）的系统研究，需明确偏置参数变化对数据流的影响以优化应用。
AI.method: 将事件数据流转换为帧，通过计算平均图像梯度幅值评估锐度；结合模拟电路模型解释偏置基础功能与传感器操作的关系。
AI.result: 五种偏置设置对事件输出锐度产生显著差异，验证了偏置参数与边缘检测能力之间的关联性。
AI.conclusion: 偏置设置可有效调控事件相机输出锐度，为传感器参数优化和应用场景适配提供理论依据。

authors_text: Md. Haidar Sharif,Lei Jiao,Christian W. Omlin
title: Deep Crowd Anomaly Detection: State-of-the-Art, Challenges, and Future Research Directions
title_zh: 深度人群异常检测：最新技术、挑战和未来研究方向
abstract: Crowd anomaly detection is one of the most popular topics in computer vision in the context of smart cities. A plethora of deep learning methods have been proposed that generally outperform other machine learning solutions. Our review primarily discusses algorithms that were published in mainstream conferences and journals between 2020 and 2022. We present datasets that are typically used for benchmarking, produce a taxonomy of the developed algorithms, and discuss and compare their performances. Our main findings are that the heterogeneities of pre-trained convolutional models have a negligible impact on crowd video anomaly detection performance. We conclude our discussion with fruitful directions for future research.
summary: Crowd anomaly detection is one of the most popular topics in computer vision in the context of smart cities. A plethora of deep learning methods have been proposed that generally outperform other machine learning solutions. Our review primarily discusses algorithms that were published in mainstream conferences and journals between 2020 and 2022. We present datasets that are typically used for benchmarking, produce a taxonomy of the developed algorithms, and discuss and compare their performances. Our main findings are that the heterogeneities of pre-trained convolutional models have a negligible impact on crowd video anomaly detection performance. We conclude our discussion with fruitful directions for future research.
abstract_zh: 人群异常检测是智慧城市背景下计算机视觉中最流行的主题之一。人们已经提出了大量的深度学习方法，这些方法通常优于其他机器学习解决方案。我们的评论主要讨论 2020 年至 2022 年间在主流会议和期刊上发表的算法。我们提供通常用于基准测试的数据集，对所开发的算法进行分类，并讨论和比较它们的性能。我们的主要发现是，预训练的卷积模型的异质性对人群视频异常检测性能的影响可以忽略不计。我们以未来研究的富有成果的方向结束了我们的讨论。

AI.tldr: 综述深度学习在群体异常检测中的最新进展，分析算法、数据集及性能比较，探讨未来研究方向。
AI.motivation: 智能城市中群体异常检测需求驱动，深度学习方法表现更优，需系统梳理现有研究以指导未来方向。
AI.method: 通过文献综述，整理主流算法、常用数据集，分类算法并对比实验结果。
AI.result: 发现预训练卷积模型异质性对群体视频异常检测性能影响较小。
AI.conclusion: 指出未来研究需关注模型泛化能力、多模态数据融合及可解释性提升。

search_text: Deep Crowd Anomaly Detection: State-of-the-Art, Challenges, and Future Research Directions 深度人群异常检测：最新技术、挑战和未来研究方向 Crowd anomaly detection is one of the most popular topics in computer vision in the context of smart cities. A plethora of deep learning methods have been proposed that generally outperform other machine learning solutions. Our review primarily discusses algorithms that were published in mainstream conferences and journals between 2020 and 2022. We present datasets that are typically used for benchmarking, produce a taxonomy of the developed algorithms, and discuss and compare their performances. Our main findings are that the heterogeneities of pre-trained convolutional models have a negligible impact on crowd video anomaly detection performance. We conclude our discussion with fruitful directions for future research. 人群异常检测是智慧城市背景下计算机视觉中最流行的主题之一。人们已经提出了大量的深度学习方法，这些方法通常优于其他机器学习解决方案。我们的评论主要讨论 2020 年至 2022 年间在主流会议和期刊上发表的算法。我们提供通常用于基准测试的数据集，对所开发的算法进行分类，并讨论和比较它们的性能。我们的主要发现是，预训练的卷积模型的异质性对人群视频异常检测性能的影响可以忽略不计。我们以未来研究的富有成果的方向结束了我们的讨论。 综述深度学习在群体异常检测中的最新进展，分析算法、数据集及性能比较，探讨未来研究方向。 Md. Haidar Sharif,Lei Jiao,Christian W. Omlin cs.CV,cs.AI

title: A Comparative Attention Framework for Better Few-Shot Object Detection on Aerial Images
title_zh: 航空图像上更好的少镜头目标检测的比较注意框架
abstract: Few-Shot Object Detection (FSOD) methods are mainly designed and evaluated on natural image datasets such as Pascal VOC and MS COCO. However, it is not clear whether the best methods for natural images are also the best for aerial images. Furthermore, direct comparison of performance between FSOD methods is difficult due to the wide variety of detection frameworks and training strategies. Therefore, we propose a benchmarking framework that provides a flexible environment to implement and compare attention-based FSOD methods. The proposed framework focuses on attention mechanisms and is divided into three modules: spatial alignment, global attention, and fusion layer. To remain competitive with existing methods, which often leverage complex training, we propose new augmentation techniques designed for object detection. Using this framework, several FSOD methods are reimplemented and compared. This comparison highlights two distinct performance regimes on aerial and natural images: FSOD performs worse on aerial images. Our experiments suggest that small objects, which are harder to detect in the few-shot setting, account for the poor performance. Finally, we develop a novel multiscale alignment method, Cross-Scales Query-Support Alignment (XQSA) for FSOD, to improve the detection of small objects. XQSA outperforms the state-of-the-art significantly on DOTA and DIOR.
summary: Few-Shot Object Detection (FSOD) methods are mainly designed and evaluated on natural image datasets such as Pascal VOC and MS COCO. However, it is not clear whether the best methods for natural images are also the best for aerial images. Furthermore, direct comparison of performance between FSOD methods is difficult due to the wide variety of detection frameworks and training strategies. Therefore, we propose a benchmarking framework that provides a flexible environment to implement and compare attention-based FSOD methods. The proposed framework focuses on attention mechanisms and is divided into three modules: spatial alignment, global attention, and fusion layer. To remain competitive with existing methods, which often leverage complex training, we propose new augmentation techniques designed for object detection. Using this framework, several FSOD methods are reimplemented and compared. This comparison highlights two distinct performance regimes on aerial and natural images: FSOD performs worse on aerial images. Our experiments suggest that small objects, which are harder to detect in the few-shot setting, account for the poor performance. Finally, we develop a novel multiscale alignment method, Cross-Scales Query-Support Alignment (XQSA) for FSOD, to improve the detection of small objects. XQSA outperforms the state-of-the-art significantly on DOTA and DIOR.
abstract_zh: 少样本目标检测（FSOD）方法主要在 Pascal VOC 和 MS COCO 等自然图像数据集上设计和评估。然而，尚不清楚自然图像的最佳方法是否也是航空图像的最佳方法。此外，由于检测框架和训练策略多种多样，直接比较 FSOD 方法之间的性能很困难。因此，我们提出了一个基准测试框架，为实施和比较基于注意力的 FSOD 方法提供了灵活的环境。所提出的框架侧重于注意力机制，分为三个模块：空间对齐、全局注意力和融合层。为了与通常利用复杂训练的现有方法保持竞争力，我们提出了专为对象检测而设计的新增强技术。使用该框架，重新实现并比较了几种 FSOD 方法。此比较突出显示了航拍图像和自然图像上的两种不同的性能状况： FSOD 在航拍图像上的性能较差。我们的实验表明，在少数镜头设置中更难检测到的小物体是导致性能不佳的原因。最后，我们开发了一种新颖的多尺度对齐方法，即 FSOD 的跨尺度查询支持对齐（XQSA），以改进小物体的检测。 XQSA 在 DOTA 和 DIOR 上的表现显着优于最先进的技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于注意力机制的少样本目标检测框架，专门用于航拍图像的基准测试与方法比较。
AI.motivation: 现有少样本目标检测方法多针对自然图像优化，但其在航拍图像上的效果尚未明确，且不同方法间的性能比较缺乏统一框架。
AI.method: 设计包含空间对齐、全局注意力和融合层的模块化框架，并提出针对小目标检测的跨尺度查询-支持对齐（XQSA）方法及新型数据增强技术。
AI.result: 实验表明少样本检测在航拍图像上表现较差，小目标检测是主要瓶颈；XQSA在DOTA和DIOR数据集上显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为航拍图像少样本检测提供了标准化评估平台，揭示了小目标检测的挑战性，并验证了XQSA方法的有效性。

title: Connective Reconstruction-based Novelty Detection
title_zh: 基于连接重建的新颖性检测
abstract: Detection of out-of-distribution samples is one of the critical tasks for real-world applications of computer vision. The advancement of deep learning has enabled us to analyze real-world data which contain unexplained samples, accentuating the need to detect out-of-distribution instances more than before. GAN-based approaches have been widely used to address this problem due to their ability to perform distribution fitting; however, they are accompanied by training instability and mode collapse. We propose a simple yet efficient reconstruction-based method that avoids adding complexities to compensate for the limitations of GAN models while outperforming them. Unlike previous reconstruction-based works that only utilize reconstruction error or generated samples, our proposed method simultaneously incorporates both of them in the detection task. Our model, which we call "Connective Novelty Detection" has two subnetworks, an autoencoder, and a binary classifier. The autoencoder learns the representation of the positive class by reconstructing them. Then, the model creates negative and connected positive examples using real and generated samples. Negative instances are generated via manipulating the real data, so their distribution is close to the positive class to achieve a more accurate boundary for the classifier. To boost the robustness of the detection to reconstruction error, connected positive samples are created by combining the real and generated samples. Finally, the binary classifier is trained using connected positive and negative examples. We demonstrate a considerable improvement in novelty detection over state-of-the-art methods on MNIST and Caltech-256 datasets.
summary: Detection of out-of-distribution samples is one of the critical tasks for real-world applications of computer vision. The advancement of deep learning has enabled us to analyze real-world data which contain unexplained samples, accentuating the need to detect out-of-distribution instances more than before. GAN-based approaches have been widely used to address this problem due to their ability to perform distribution fitting; however, they are accompanied by training instability and mode collapse. We propose a simple yet efficient reconstruction-based method that avoids adding complexities to compensate for the limitations of GAN models while outperforming them. Unlike previous reconstruction-based works that only utilize reconstruction error or generated samples, our proposed method simultaneously incorporates both of them in the detection task. Our model, which we call "Connective Novelty Detection" has two subnetworks, an autoencoder, and a binary classifier. The autoencoder learns the representation of the positive class by reconstructing them. Then, the model creates negative and connected positive examples using real and generated samples. Negative instances are generated via manipulating the real data, so their distribution is close to the positive class to achieve a more accurate boundary for the classifier. To boost the robustness of the detection to reconstruction error, connected positive samples are created by combining the real and generated samples. Finally, the binary classifier is trained using connected positive and negative examples. We demonstrate a considerable improvement in novelty detection over state-of-the-art methods on MNIST and Caltech-256 datasets.
abstract_zh: 检测不分布样本是计算机视觉实际应用的关键任务之一。深度学习的进步使我们能够分析包含无法解释样本的现实世界数据，从而比以前更加需要检测分布外实例。基于 GAN 的方法因其执行分布拟合的能力而被广泛用于解决这个问题；然而，它们伴随着训练不稳定和模式崩溃。我们提出了一种简单而有效的基于重建的方法，避免增加复杂性，以弥补 GAN 模型的局限性，同时超越它们。与之前仅利用重建误差或生成样本的基于重建的工作不同，我们提出的方法同时将它们两者结合到检测任务中。我们的模型称为“连接新颖性检测”，有两个子网络、一个自动编码器和一个二元分类器。自动编码器通过重建正类来学习它们的表示。然后，该模型使用真实样本和生成样本创建负例和相关正例。负实例是通过操纵真实数据生成的，因此它们的分布接近正类，从而为分类器实现更准确的边界。为了提高检测对重建误差的鲁棒性，通过组合真实样本和生成样本来创建连接的正样本。最后，使用连接的正例和负例训练二元分类器。我们在 MNIST 和 Caltech-256 数据集上展示了新颖性检测相对于最先进方法的显着改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于连接重建的新颖性检测方法，用于改进计算机视觉中对分布外样本的检测。
AI.motivation: 尽管基于GAN的方法在分布外检测中广泛应用，但存在训练不稳定和模式崩溃等问题，亟需一种更高效且无需复杂补偿的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出名为'Connective Novelty Detection'的模型，包含自编码器和二分类器。自编码器学习正类数据的表示，通过结合真实样本与生成样本创建负样本和连接正样本，最终训练分类器实现检测。
AI.result: 在MNIST和Caltech-256数据集上，该方法在新颖性检测任务中显著优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过同时利用重建误差与生成样本，有效提升了检测性能，为分布外检测提供了简单高效的替代方案。

result: 在MNIST和Caltech-256数据集上，该方法在新颖性检测任务中显著优于现有最先进方法。
conclusion: 该方法通过同时利用重建误差与生成样本，有效提升了检测性能，为分布外检测提供了简单高效的替代方案。
search_text: Connective Reconstruction-based Novelty Detection 基于连接重建的新颖性检测 Detection of out-of-distribution samples is one of the critical tasks for real-world applications of computer vision. The advancement of deep learning has enabled us to analyze real-world data which contain unexplained samples, accentuating the need to detect out-of-distribution instances more than before. GAN-based approaches have been widely used to address this problem due to their ability to perform distribution fitting; however, they are accompanied by training instability and mode collapse. We propose a simple yet efficient reconstruction-based method that avoids adding complexities to compensate for the limitations of GAN models while outperforming them. Unlike previous reconstruction-based works that only utilize reconstruction error or generated samples, our proposed method simultaneously incorporates both of them in the detection task. Our model, which we call "Connective Novelty Detection" has two subnetworks, an autoencoder, and a binary classifier. The autoencoder learns the representation of the positive class by reconstructing them. Then, the model creates negative and connected positive examples using real and generated samples. Negative instances are generated via manipulating the real data, so their distribution is close to the positive class to achieve a more accurate boundary for the classifier. To boost the robustness of the detection to reconstruction error, connected positive samples are created by combining the real and generated samples. Finally, the binary classifier is trained using connected positive and negative examples. We demonstrate a considerable improvement in novelty detection over state-of-the-art methods on MNIST and Caltech-256 datasets. 检测不分布样本是计算机视觉实际应用的关键任务之一。深度学习的进步使我们能够分析包含无法解释样本的现实世界数据，从而比以前更加需要检测分布外实例。基于 GAN 的方法因其执行分布拟合的能力而被广泛用于解决这个问题；然而，它们伴随着训练不稳定和模式崩溃。我们提出了一种简单而有效的基于重建的方法，避免增加复杂性，以弥补 GAN 模型的局限性，同时超越它们。与之前仅利用重建误差或生成样本的基于重建的工作不同，我们提出的方法同时将它们两者结合到检测任务中。我们的模型称为“连接新颖性检测”，有两个子网络、一个自动编码器和一个二元分类器。自动编码器通过重建正类来学习它们的表示。然后，该模型使用真实样本和生成样本创建负例和相关正例。负实例是通过操纵真实数据生成的，因此它们的分布接近正类，从而为分类器实现更准确的边界。为了提高检测对重建误差的鲁棒性，通过组合真实样本和生成样本来创建连接的正样本。最后，使用连接的正例和负例训练二元分类器。我们在 MNIST 和 Caltech-256 数据集上展示了新颖性检测相对于最先进方法的显着改进。 本文提出了一种基于连接重建的新颖性检测方法，用于改进计算机视觉中对分布外样本的检测。 Seyyed Morteza Hashemi,Parvaneh Aliniya,Parvin Razzaghi cs.CV,cs.AI

title: Quasistatic contact-rich manipulation via linear complementarity quadratic programming
title_zh: 通过线性互补二次规划进行准静态富接触操纵
comment: 8 pages, 7 figures. This work has been accepted to be presented at the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022)
comments: 8 pages, 7 figures. This work has been accepted to be presented at the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022)
abstract: Contact-rich manipulation is challenging due to dynamically-changing physical constraints by the contact mode changes undergone during manipulation. This paper proposes a versatile local planning and control framework for contact-rich manipulation that determines the continuous control action under variable contact modes online. We model the physical characteristics of contact-rich manipulation by quasistatic dynamics and complementarity constraints. We then propose a linear complementarity quadratic program (LCQP) to efficiently determine the control action that implicitly includes the decisions on the contact modes under these constraints. In the LCQP, we relax the complementarity constraints to alleviate ill-conditioned problems that are typically caused by measure noises or model miss-matches. We conduct dynamical simulations on a 3D physical simulator and demonstrate that the proposed method can achieve various contact-rich manipulation tasks by determining the control action including the contact modes in real-time.
summary: Contact-rich manipulation is challenging due to dynamically-changing physical constraints by the contact mode changes undergone during manipulation. This paper proposes a versatile local planning and control framework for contact-rich manipulation that determines the continuous control action under variable contact modes online. We model the physical characteristics of contact-rich manipulation by quasistatic dynamics and complementarity constraints. We then propose a linear complementarity quadratic program (LCQP) to efficiently determine the control action that implicitly includes the decisions on the contact modes under these constraints. In the LCQP, we relax the complementarity constraints to alleviate ill-conditioned problems that are typically caused by measure noises or model miss-matches. We conduct dynamical simulations on a 3D physical simulator and demonstrate that the proposed method can achieve various contact-rich manipulation tasks by determining the control action including the contact modes in real-time.
abstract_zh: 由于操作过程中发生的接触模式变化而动态变化的物理约束，富含接触的操作具有挑战性。本文提出了一种用于接触丰富操纵的通用局部规划和控制框架，该框架在线确定可变接触模式下的连续控制动作。我们通过准静态动力学和互补约束对富含接触操纵的物理特性进行建模。然后，我们提出了一种线性互补二次规划（LCQP）来有效地确定控制动作，该控制动作隐式地包括这些约束下接触模式的决策。在 LCQP 中，我们放宽了互补性约束，以缓解通常由测量噪声或模型失配引起的病态问题。我们在 3D 物理模拟器上进行动态模拟，并证明所提出的方法可以通过实时确定包括接触模式在内的控制动作来实现各种富含接触的操纵任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于线性互补二次规划（LCQP）的接触丰富操作框架，用于在线处理动态变化的接触模式下的连续控制问题。
AI.motivation: 接触丰富操作因操作过程中接触模式的动态变化导致物理约束复杂，传统方法难以实时处理接触模式决策与控制动作的耦合问题。
AI.method: 通过准静态动力学与互补性约束建模接触丰富操作，设计LCQP优化问题，将接触模式决策隐含在控制动作求解中，并通过松弛互补约束缓解噪声和模型误差导致的病态问题。
AI.result: 在3D物理仿真中验证了方法的有效性，能够实时生成包含接触模式决策的控制动作，完成多种接触丰富操作任务。
AI.conclusion: LCQP框架为接触模式动态变化下的操作提供了高效实时的解决方案，通过约束松弛提升了鲁棒性，适用于复杂物理交互场景。

title: One-shot, Offline and Production-Scalable PID Optimisation with Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过深度强化学习实现一次性、离线和可生产规模的 PID 优化
abstract: Proportional-integral-derivative (PID) control underlies more than $97\%$ of automated industrial processes. Controlling these processes effectively with respect to some specified set of performance goals requires finding an optimal set of PID parameters to moderate the PID loop. Tuning these parameters is a long and exhaustive process. A method (patent pending) based on deep reinforcement learning is presented that learns a relationship between generic system properties (e.g. resonance frequency), a multi-objective performance goal and optimal PID parameter values. Performance is demonstrated in the context of a real optical switching product of the foremost manufacturer of such devices globally. Switching is handled by piezoelectric actuators where switching time and optical loss are derived from the speed and stability of actuator-control processes respectively. The method achieves a $5\times$ improvement in the number of actuators that fall within the most challenging target switching speed, $\geq 20\%$ improvement in mean switching speed at the same optical loss and $\geq 75\%$ reduction in performance inconsistency when temperature varies between 5 and 73 degrees celcius. Furthermore, once trained (which takes $\mathcal{O}(hours)$), the model generates actuator-unique PID parameters in a one-shot inference process that takes $\mathcal{O}(ms)$ in comparison to up to $\mathcal{O}(week)$ required for conventional tuning methods, therefore accomplishing these performance improvements whilst achieving up to a $10^6\times$ speed-up. After training, the method can be applied entirely offline, incurring effectively zero optimisation-overhead in production.
summary: Proportional-integral-derivative (PID) control underlies more than $97\%$ of automated industrial processes. Controlling these processes effectively with respect to some specified set of performance goals requires finding an optimal set of PID parameters to moderate the PID loop. Tuning these parameters is a long and exhaustive process. A method (patent pending) based on deep reinforcement learning is presented that learns a relationship between generic system properties (e.g. resonance frequency), a multi-objective performance goal and optimal PID parameter values. Performance is demonstrated in the context of a real optical switching product of the foremost manufacturer of such devices globally. Switching is handled by piezoelectric actuators where switching time and optical loss are derived from the speed and stability of actuator-control processes respectively. The method achieves a $5\times$ improvement in the number of actuators that fall within the most challenging target switching speed, $\geq 20\%$ improvement in mean switching speed at the same optical loss and $\geq 75\%$ reduction in performance inconsistency when temperature varies between 5 and 73 degrees celcius. Furthermore, once trained (which takes $\mathcal{O}(hours)$), the model generates actuator-unique PID parameters in a one-shot inference process that takes $\mathcal{O}(ms)$ in comparison to up to $\mathcal{O}(week)$ required for conventional tuning methods, therefore accomplishing these performance improvements whilst achieving up to a $10^6\times$ speed-up. After training, the method can be applied entirely offline, incurring effectively zero optimisation-overhead in production.
abstract_zh: 比例积分微分 (PID) 控制是超过 97\%$ 的自动化工业过程的基础。要针对某些指定的性能目标有效控制这些过程，需要找到一组最佳 PID 参数来调节 PID 环路。调整这些参数是一个漫长而详尽的过程。提出了一种基于深度强化学习的方法（正在申请专利），该方法可以学习通用系统属性（例如共振频率）、多目标性能目标和最佳 PID 参数值之间的关系。性能是在全球此类设备最重要制造商的真实光交换产品的背景下进行展示的。开关由压电致动器处理，其中开关时间和光损耗分别来自致动器控制过程的速度和稳定性。该方法在最具挑战性的目标切换速度内实现了 $5\times$ 的执行器数量改进，在相同光学损耗下平均切换速度提高了 $\geq 20\%$，并且当温度在 5 到 73 摄氏度之间变化时，性能不一致性减少了 $\geq 75\%$。此外，经过训练（需要 $\mathcal{O}(hours)$）后，该模型会在一次性推理过程中生成执行器独特的 PID 参数，该过程需要 $\mathcal{O}(ms)$，而传统调整方法则需要 $\mathcal{O}(week)$，因此在实现这些性能改进的同时，实现了高达 $10^6\times$ 的加速。训练后，该方法可以完全离线应用，从而在生产中有效地实现零优化开销。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的PID参数优化方法，可在工业场景中实现快速、高效的参数调整。
AI.motivation: 传统PID调参过程耗时且依赖经验，难以满足现代工业对自动化控制效率和性能的要求。
AI.method: 利用深度强化学习建立系统属性（如共振频率）与多目标性能指标之间的映射关系，通过离线训练生成可直接部署的PID参数模型。
AI.result: 在光学开关设备上实现开关速度提升5倍、光学损耗降低20%、温度变化下性能不一致性减少75%，且参数生成速度较传统方法提升百万倍。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过深度强化学习实现了PID优化的工业化应用，兼具高效性、可扩展性和生产部署可行性。

The method achieves a $5\times$ improvement in the number of actuators that fall within the most challenging target switching speed, $\geq 20\%$ improvement in mean switching speed at the same optical loss and $\geq 75\%$ reduction in performance inconsistency when temperature varies between 5 and 73 degrees celcius. After training, the method can be applied entirely offline, incurring effectively zero optimisation-overhead in production. 比例积分微分 (PID) 控制是超过 97\%$ 的自动化工业过程的基础。要针对某些指定的性能目标有效控制这些过程，需要找到一组最佳 PID 参数来调节 PID 环路。调整这些参数是一个漫长而详尽的过程。提出了一种基于深度强化学习的方法（正在申请专利），该方法可以学习通用系统属性（例如共振频率）、多目标性能目标和最佳 PID 参数值之间的关系。性能是在全球此类设备最重要制造商的真实光交换产品的背景下进行展示的。开关由压电致动器处理，其中开关时间和光损耗分别来自致动器控制过程的速度和稳定性。该方法在最具挑战性的目标切换速度内实现了 $5\times$ 的执行器数量改进，在相同光学损耗下平均切换速度提高了 $\geq 20\%$，并且当温度在 5 到 73 摄氏度之间变化时，性能不一致性减少了 $\geq 75\%$。此外，经过训练（需要 $\mathcal{O}(hours)$）后，该模型会在一次性推理过程中生成执行器独特的 PID 参数，该过程需要 $\mathcal{O}(ms)$，而传统调整方法则需要 $\mathcal{O}(week)$，因此在实现这些性能改进的同时，实现了高达 $10^6\times$ 的加速。训练后，该方法可以完全离线应用，从而在生产中有效地实现零优化开销。 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的PID参数优化方法，可在工业场景中实现快速、高效的参数调整。 Zacharaya Shabka,Michael Enrico,Nick Parsons,Georgios Zervas eess.SY,cs.AI,cs.LG

title: Confidence-Calibrated Face and Kinship Verification
title_zh: 置信度校准的面部和亲属关系验证
comment: 14 pages, 10 figures, and 9 tables, IEEE Transactions on Information Forensics and Security
comments: 14 pages, 10 figures, and 9 tables, IEEE Transactions on Information Forensics and Security
abstract: In this paper, we investigate the problem of prediction confidence in face and kinship verification. Most existing face and kinship verification methods focus on accuracy performance while ignoring confidence estimation for their prediction results. However, confidence estimation is essential for modeling reliability and trustworthiness in such high-risk tasks. To address this, we introduce an effective confidence measure that allows verification models to convert a similarity score into a confidence score for any given face pair. We further propose a confidence-calibrated approach, termed Angular Scaling Calibration (ASC). ASC is easy to implement and can be readily applied to existing verification models without model modifications, yielding accuracy-preserving and confidence-calibrated probabilistic verification models. In addition, we introduce the uncertainty in the calibrated confidence to boost the reliability and trustworthiness of the verification models in the presence of noisy data. To the best of our knowledge, our work presents the first comprehensive confidence-calibrated solution for modern face and kinship verification tasks. We conduct extensive experiments on four widely used face and kinship verification datasets, and the results demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed approach. Code and models are available at https://github.com/cnulab/ASC.
summary: In this paper, we investigate the problem of prediction confidence in face and kinship verification. Most existing face and kinship verification methods focus on accuracy performance while ignoring confidence estimation for their prediction results. However, confidence estimation is essential for modeling reliability and trustworthiness in such high-risk tasks. To address this, we introduce an effective confidence measure that allows verification models to convert a similarity score into a confidence score for any given face pair. We further propose a confidence-calibrated approach, termed Angular Scaling Calibration (ASC). ASC is easy to implement and can be readily applied to existing verification models without model modifications, yielding accuracy-preserving and confidence-calibrated probabilistic verification models. In addition, we introduce the uncertainty in the calibrated confidence to boost the reliability and trustworthiness of the verification models in the presence of noisy data. To the best of our knowledge, our work presents the first comprehensive confidence-calibrated solution for modern face and kinship verification tasks. We conduct extensive experiments on four widely used face and kinship verification datasets, and the results demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed approach. Code and models are available at https://github.com/cnulab/ASC.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们研究了人脸和亲属关系验证中的预测置信度问题。大多数现有的人脸和亲属关系验证方法都注重准确性性能，而忽略对其预测结果的置信度估计。然而，置信度估计对于此类高风险任务中的可靠性和可信度建模至关重要。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一种有效的置信度度量，允许验证模型将相似度得分转换为任何给定面部对的置信度得分。我们进一步提出了一种置信度校准方法，称为角度缩放校准（ASC）。 ASC 易于实现，无需模型修改即可轻松应用于现有验证模型，从而产生保持准确性和置信度校准的概率验证模型。此外，我们引入了校准置信度的不确定性，以提高验证模型在存在噪声数据的情况下的可靠性和可信度。据我们所知，我们的工作为现代人脸和亲属关系验证任务提供了第一个全面的置信度校准解决方案。我们对四个广泛使用的面部和亲属关系验证数据集进行了广泛的实验，结果证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。代码和模型可在 https://github.com/cnulab/ASC 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Angular Scaling Calibration (ASC)的置信度校准方法，用于提升人脸识别和亲缘关系验证中预测结果的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法过度关注准确率而忽视预测置信度估计，但置信度对高风险任务的可靠性至关重要。
AI.method: 通过引入相似度到置信度的转换机制，提出无需模型修改即可应用的ASC方法，并引入校准后的不确定性以提升噪声数据下的可靠性。
AI.result: 在四个主流数据集上验证了方法有效性，代码和模型已开源。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次为现代人脸识别和亲缘验证任务提供了完整的置信度校准解决方案，在保持准确率的同时提升模型可信度。

title: MICP-L: Mesh-based ICP for Robot Localization using Hardware-Accelerated Ray Casting
title_zh: MICP-L：使用硬件加速光线投射进行机器人定位的基于网格的 ICP
abstract: Triangle mesh maps are a versatile 3D environment representation for robots to navigate in challenging indoor and outdoor environments exhibiting tunnels, hills and varying slopes. To make use of these mesh maps, methods are needed to accurately localize robots in such maps to perform essential tasks like path planning and navigation. We present Mesh ICP Localization (MICP-L), a novel and computationally efficient method for registering one or more range sensors to a triangle mesh map to continuously localize a robot in 6D, even in GPS-denied environments. We accelerate the computation of ray casting correspondences (RCC) between range sensors and mesh maps by supporting different parallel computing devices like multicore CPUs, GPUs and the latest NVIDIA RTX hardware. By additionally transforming the covariance computation into a reduction operation, we can optimize the initial guessed poses in parallel on CPUs or GPUs, making our implementation applicable in real-time on many architectures. We demonstrate the robustness of our localization approach with datasets from agricultural, aerial, and automotive domains.
summary: Triangle mesh maps are a versatile 3D environment representation for robots to navigate in challenging indoor and outdoor environments exhibiting tunnels, hills and varying slopes. To make use of these mesh maps, methods are needed to accurately localize robots in such maps to perform essential tasks like path planning and navigation. We present Mesh ICP Localization (MICP-L), a novel and computationally efficient method for registering one or more range sensors to a triangle mesh map to continuously localize a robot in 6D, even in GPS-denied environments. We accelerate the computation of ray casting correspondences (RCC) between range sensors and mesh maps by supporting different parallel computing devices like multicore CPUs, GPUs and the latest NVIDIA RTX hardware. By additionally transforming the covariance computation into a reduction operation, we can optimize the initial guessed poses in parallel on CPUs or GPUs, making our implementation applicable in real-time on many architectures. We demonstrate the robustness of our localization approach with datasets from agricultural, aerial, and automotive domains.
abstract_zh: 三角形网格地图是一种多功能的 3D 环境表示，可供机器人在具有挑战性的室内和室外环境（例如隧道、山丘和不同的坡度）中导航。为了利用这些网格地图，需要在这些地图中准确定位机器人以执行路径规划和导航等基本任务的方法。我们提出了网格 ICP 定位 (MICP-L)，这是一种新颖且计算高效的方法，用于将一个或多个范围传感器注册到三角形网格地图，以连续定位机器人的 6D 位置，即使在 GPS 拒绝的环境中也是如此。我们通过支持不同的并行计算设备（如多核 CPU、GPU 和最新的 NVIDIA RTX 硬件）来加速距离传感器和网格图之间的光线投射对应关系 (RCC) 的计算。通过另外将协方差计算转换为归约运算，我们可以在 CPU 或 GPU 上并行优化初始猜测姿势，使我们的实现可实时应用于许多架构。我们利用农业、航空和汽车领域的数据集展示了我们的本地化方法的稳健性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于网格的ICP方法（MICP-L），用于在复杂环境中实现机器人6D实时定位，利用硬件加速的射线投射技术提高计算效率。
AI.motivation: 三角形网格地图能有效表示复杂室内外环境，但现有方法难以高效实现机器人精准定位，尤其在无GPS场景下亟需计算优化方案。
AI.method: 通过支持多核CPU/GPU/NVIDIA RTX硬件加速射线投射对应计算，并将协方差计算转化为归约操作实现并行优化，提升定位效率。
AI.result: 在农业、航空和汽车领域数据集验证了方法鲁棒性，证明其适用于多种复杂环境的实时定位任务。
AI.conclusion: MICP-L通过硬件加速和算法优化，实现了高效精准的6D机器人定位，为无GPS环境下的自主导航提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Asma Elmaizi,Hasna Nhaila,Elkebir Sarhrouni,Ahmed Hammouch,Nacir Chafik
title: A Novel Approach for Dimensionality Reduction and Classification of Hyperspectral Images based on Normalized Synergy
title_zh: 基于归一化协同的高光谱图像降维与分类新方法
comment: ef:(IJACSA) International Journal of Advanced Computer Science and Applications, Vol. 10, No. 8, 2019 - https://www.scopus.com/record/display.uri?eid=2-s2.0-85072285978&origin=inward&txGid=c9d92a087d23b9e6061fdb47b0ec3a96
comments: ef:(IJACSA) International Journal of Advanced Computer Science and Applications, Vol. 10, No. 8, 2019 - https://www.scopus.com/record/display.uri?eid=2-s2.0-85072285978&origin=inward&txGid=c9d92a087d23b9e6061fdb47b0ec3a96
abstract: During the last decade, hyperspectral images have attracted increasing interest from researchers worldwide. They provide more detailed information about an observed area and allow an accurate target detection and precise discrimination of objects compared to classical RGB and multispectral images. Despite the great potentialities of hyperspectral technology, the analysis and exploitation of the large volume data remain a challenging task. The existence of irrelevant redundant and noisy images decreases the classification accuracy. As a result, dimensionality reduction is a mandatory step in order to select a minimal and effective images subset. In this paper, a new filter approach normalized mutual synergy (NMS) is proposed in order to detect relevant bands that are complementary in the class prediction better than the original hyperspectral cube data. The algorithm consists of two steps: images selection through normalized synergy information and pixel classification. The proposed approach measures the discriminative power of the selected bands based on a combination of their maximal normalized synergic information, minimum redundancy and maximal mutual information with the ground truth. A comparative study using the support vector machine (SVM) and k-nearest neighbor (KNN) classifiers is conducted to evaluate the proposed approach compared to the state of art band selection methods. Experimental results on three benchmark hyperspectral images proposed by the NASA "Aviris Indiana Pine", "Salinas" and "Pavia University" demonstrated the robustness, effectiveness and the discriminative power of the proposed approach over the literature approaches. Keywords: Hyperspectral images; target detection; pixel classification; dimensionality reduction; band selection; information theory; mutual information; normalized synergy

Despite the great potentialities of hyperspectral technology, the analysis and exploitation of the large volume data remain a challenging task. The existence of irrelevant redundant and noisy images decreases the classification accuracy. As a result, dimensionality reduction is a mandatory step in order to select a minimal and effective images subset. In this paper, a new filter approach normalized mutual synergy (NMS) is proposed in order to detect relevant bands that are complementary in the class prediction better than the original hyperspectral cube data. The algorithm consists of two steps: images selection through normalized synergy information and pixel classification. The proposed approach measures the discriminative power of the selected bands based on a combination of their maximal normalized synergic information, minimum redundancy and maximal mutual information with the ground truth. A comparative study using the support vector machine (SVM) and k-nearest neighbor (KNN) classifiers is conducted to evaluate the proposed approach compared to the state of art band selection methods. Experimental results on three benchmark hyperspectral images proposed by the NASA "Aviris Indiana Pine", "Salinas" and "Pavia University" demonstrated the robustness, effectiveness and the discriminative power of the proposed approach over the literature approaches. Keywords: Hyperspectral images; target detection; pixel classification; dimensionality reduction; band selection; information theory; mutual information; normalized synergy
abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，高光谱图像引起了全世界研究人员越来越多的兴趣。与传统的 RGB 和多光谱图像相比，它们提供了有关观察区域的更详细信息，并允许准确的目标检测和物体的精确区分。尽管高光谱技术潜力巨大，但大量数据的分析和利用仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。不相关的冗余和噪声图像的存在降低了分类精度。因此，降维是选择最小且有效的图像子集的强制性步骤。本文提出了一种新的滤波器方法归一化互协同（NMS），以便比原始高光谱立方体数据更好地检测类预测中互补的相关波段。该算法包括两个步骤：通过归一化协同信息选择图像和像素分类。所提出的方法基于所选频带的最大归一化协同信息、最小冗余和最大互信息与基本事实的组合来测量所选频带的判别力。使用支持向量机（SVM）和 k 最近邻（KNN）分类器进行比较研究，以评估所提出的方法与最先进的频带选择方法的比较。美国宇航局“Aviris Indiana Pine”、“Salinas”和“Pavia University”提出的三幅基准高光谱图像的实验结果证明了该方法相对于文献方法的鲁棒性、有效性和判别力。关键词：高光谱图像；目标检测；像素分类；降维；频段选择；信息论；相互信息；标准化协同效应

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于归一化协同的高光谱图像降维与分类新方法。
AI.motivation: 高光谱图像数据量大且存在冗余噪声，传统方法难以有效筛选关键波段，影响分类精度。
AI.method: 提出归一化协同滤波算法（NMS），通过结合最大归一化协同信息、最小冗余度和最大互信息三要素筛选波段，分两步实现图像选择与像素分类。
AI.result: 在NASA三个基准数据集实验中，NMS方法在分类准确率和鲁棒性上优于现有波段选择方法。
AI.conclusion: NMS算法通过优化波段选择策略，有效提升了高光谱图像分类性能，验证了其在降维与分类任务中的优越性。

search_text: A Novel Approach for Dimensionality Reduction and Classification of Hyperspectral Images based on Normalized Synergy 基于归一化协同的高光谱图像降维与分类新方法 During the last decade, hyperspectral images have attracted increasing interest from researchers worldwide. They provide more detailed information about an observed area and allow an accurate target detection and precise discrimination of objects compared to classical RGB and multispectral images. Despite the great potentialities of hyperspectral technology, the analysis and exploitation of the large volume data remain a challenging task. The existence of irrelevant redundant and noisy images decreases the classification accuracy. As a result, dimensionality reduction is a mandatory step in order to select a minimal and effective images subset. A comparative study using the support vector machine (SVM) and k-nearest neighbor (KNN) classifiers is conducted to evaluate the proposed approach compared to the state of art band selection methods. Experimental results on three benchmark hyperspectral images proposed by the NASA "Aviris Indiana Pine", "Salinas" and "Pavia University" demonstrated the robustness, effectiveness and the discriminative power of the proposed approach over the literature approaches. title: Predicting Survival Outcomes in the Presence of Unlabeled Data
title_zh: 在存在未标记数据的情况下预测生存结果
abstract: Many clinical studies require the follow-up of patients over time. This is challenging: apart from frequently observed drop-out, there are often also organizational and financial challenges, which can lead to reduced data collection and, in turn, can complicate subsequent analyses. In contrast, there is often plenty of baseline data available of patients with similar characteristics and background information, e.g., from patients that fall outside the study time window. In this article, we investigate whether we can benefit from the inclusion of such unlabeled data instances to predict accurate survival times. In other words, we introduce a third level of supervision in the context of survival analysis, apart from fully observed and censored instances, we also include unlabeled instances. We propose three approaches to deal with this novel setting and provide an empirical comparison over fifteen real-life clinical and gene expression survival datasets. Our results demonstrate that all approaches are able to increase the predictive performance over independent test data. We also show that integrating the partial supervision provided by censored data in a semi-supervised wrapper approach generally provides the best results, often achieving high improvements, compared to not using unlabeled data.
summary: Many clinical studies require the follow-up of patients over time. This is challenging: apart from frequently observed drop-out, there are often also organizational and financial challenges, which can lead to reduced data collection and, in turn, can complicate subsequent analyses. In contrast, there is often plenty of baseline data available of patients with similar characteristics and background information, e.g., from patients that fall outside the study time window. In this article, we investigate whether we can benefit from the inclusion of such unlabeled data instances to predict accurate survival times. In other words, we introduce a third level of supervision in the context of survival analysis, apart from fully observed and censored instances, we also include unlabeled instances. We propose three approaches to deal with this novel setting and provide an empirical comparison over fifteen real-life clinical and gene expression survival datasets. Our results demonstrate that all approaches are able to increase the predictive performance over independent test data. We also show that integrating the partial supervision provided by censored data in a semi-supervised wrapper approach generally provides the best results, often achieving high improvements, compared to not using unlabeled data.
abstract_zh: 许多临床研究需要对患者进行长期随访。这是具有挑战性的：除了经常观察到的退出之外，通常还存在组织和财务挑战，这可能导致数据收集减少，进而使后续分析复杂化。相比之下，通常有大量具有相似特征和背景信息的患者可用的基线数据，例如来自研究时间窗口之外的患者。在本文中，我们研究是否可以从包含此类未标记的数据实例中受益，以预测准确的生存时间。换句话说，我们在生存分析的背景下引入了第三级监督，除了充分观察和审查的实例之外，我们还包括未标记的实例。我们提出了三种方法来处理这种新颖的环境，并提供了对十五个现实生活临床和基因表达生存数据集的实证比较。我们的结果表明，所有方法都能够提高独立测试数据的预测性能。我们还表明，与不使用未标记数据相比，将审查数据提供的部分监督集成到半监督包装方法中通常会提供最佳结果，通常会实现很高的改进。

AI.tldr: 利用未标记数据提升生存预测准确性
AI.motivation: 临床研究中数据收集困难，但存在大量未标记数据，需探索其利用方法
AI.method: 提出三种方法处理未标记数据，并在多个数据集上进行比较
AI.result: 所有方法均提升预测性能，半监督方法效果最佳
AI.conclusion: 半监督方法有效整合未标记数据，显著提升预测准确性

authors_text: Huy Hoang Nguyen,Matthew B. Blaschko,Simo Saarakkala,Aleksei Tiulpin
title: Clinically-Inspired Multi-Agent Transformers for Disease Trajectory Forecasting from Multimodal Data
title_zh: 受临床启发的多智能体变压器，用于根据多模态数据进行疾病轨迹预测
comment: Accepted in IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging 2023
comments: Accepted in IEEE Transactions on Medical Imaging 2023
abstract: Deep neural networks are often applied to medical images to automate the problem of medical diagnosis. However, a more clinically relevant question that practitioners usually face is how to predict the future trajectory of a disease. Current methods for prognosis or disease trajectory forecasting often require domain knowledge and are complicated to apply. In this paper, we formulate the prognosis prediction problem as a one-to-many prediction problem. Inspired by a clinical decision-making process with two agents -- a radiologist and a general practitioner -- we predict prognosis with two transformer-based components that share information with each other. The first transformer in this framework aims to analyze the imaging data, and the second one leverages its internal states as inputs, also fusing them with auxiliary clinical data. The temporal nature of the problem is modeled within the transformer states, allowing us to treat the forecasting problem as a multi-task classification, for which we propose a novel loss. We show the effectiveness of our approach in predicting the development of structural knee osteoarthritis changes and forecasting Alzheimer's disease clinical status directly from raw multi-modal data. The proposed method outperforms multiple state-of-the-art baselines with respect to performance and calibration, both of which are needed for real-world applications. An open-source implementation of our method is made publicly available at \url{https://github.com/Oulu-IMEDS/CLIMATv2}.
summary: Deep neural networks are often applied to medical images to automate the problem of medical diagnosis. However, a more clinically relevant question that practitioners usually face is how to predict the future trajectory of a disease. Current methods for prognosis or disease trajectory forecasting often require domain knowledge and are complicated to apply. In this paper, we formulate the prognosis prediction problem as a one-to-many prediction problem. Inspired by a clinical decision-making process with two agents -- a radiologist and a general practitioner -- we predict prognosis with two transformer-based components that share information with each other. The first transformer in this framework aims to analyze the imaging data, and the second one leverages its internal states as inputs, also fusing them with auxiliary clinical data. The temporal nature of the problem is modeled within the transformer states, allowing us to treat the forecasting problem as a multi-task classification, for which we propose a novel loss. We show the effectiveness of our approach in predicting the development of structural knee osteoarthritis changes and forecasting Alzheimer's disease clinical status directly from raw multi-modal data. The proposed method outperforms multiple state-of-the-art baselines with respect to performance and calibration, both of which are needed for real-world applications. An open-source implementation of our method is made publicly available at \url{https://github.com/Oulu-IMEDS/CLIMATv2}.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络通常应用于医学图像以自动化医学诊断问题。然而，从业者通常面临的一个与临床更相关的问题是如何预测疾病的未来轨迹。当前的预后或疾病轨迹预测方法通常需要领域知识并且应用起来很复杂。在本文中，我们将预后预测问题表述为一对多预测问题。受到两名代理人（一名放射科医生和一名全科医生）临床决策过程的启发，我们通过两个基于变压器的相互共享信息的组件来预测预后。该框架中的第一个变压器旨在分析成像数据，第二个变压器利用其内部状态作为输入，并将它们与辅助临床数据融合。问题的时间性质是在变压器状态内建模的，使我们能够将预测问题视为多任务分类，为此我们提出了一种新颖的损失。我们展示了我们的方法在预测结构性膝骨关节炎变化的发展以及直接从原始多模态数据预测阿尔茨海默病临床状态方面的有效性。所提出的方法在性能和校准方面优于多个最先进的基线，这两者都是实际应用所需要的。我们的方法的开源实现已在 \url{https://github.com/Oulu-IMEDS/CLIMATv2} 上公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多智能体Transformer的临床启发方法，用于从多模态数据中预测疾病轨迹。
AI.motivation: 现有疾病轨迹预测方法依赖领域知识且应用复杂，临床实践中需要更直观且自动化的预测工具。
AI.method: 设计双Transformer架构模拟放射科医生与全科医生协作流程，第一模块分析影像数据，第二模块融合其状态与辅助临床数据，通过时序建模和多任务分类损失函数实现预测。
AI.result: 在预测膝关节骨关节炎结构变化和阿尔茨海默病临床状态任务中，该方法在性能和校准度上优于多个先进基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过临床启发的多智能体框架有效解决了疾病轨迹预测问题，具有实际应用价值。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 所提方法通过临床启发的多智能体框架有效解决了疾病轨迹预测问题，具有实际应用价值。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多智能体Transformer的临床启发方法，用于从多模态数据中预测疾病轨迹。
motivation: 现有疾病轨迹预测方法依赖领域知识且应用复杂，临床实践中需要更直观且自动化的预测工具。
method: 设计双Transformer架构模拟放射科医生与全科医生协作流程，第一模块分析影像数据，第二模块融合其状态与辅助临床数据，通过时序建模和多任务分类损失函数实现预测。
result: 在预测膝关节骨关节炎结构变化和阿尔茨海默病临床状态任务中，该方法在性能和校准度上优于多个先进基线模型。
conclusion: 所提方法通过临床启发的多智能体框架有效解决了疾病轨迹预测问题，具有实际应用价值。
search_text: Clinically-Inspired Multi-Agent Transformers for Disease Trajectory Forecasting from Multimodal Data 受临床启发的多智能体变压器，用于根据多模态数据进行疾病轨迹预测 Deep neural networks are often applied to medical images to automate the problem of medical diagnosis. However, a more clinically relevant question that practitioners usually face is how to predict the future trajectory of a disease. Current methods for prognosis or disease trajectory forecasting often require domain knowledge and are complicated to apply. In this paper, we formulate the prognosis prediction problem as a one-to-many prediction problem. Inspired by a clinical decision-making process with two agents -- a radiologist and a general practitioner -- we predict prognosis with two transformer-based components that share information with each other. The first transformer in this framework aims to analyze the imaging data, and the second one leverages its internal states as inputs, also fusing them with auxiliary clinical data. The temporal nature of the problem is modeled within the transformer states, allowing us to treat the forecasting problem as a multi-task classification, for which we propose a novel loss. We show the effectiveness of our approach in predicting the development of structural knee osteoarthritis changes and forecasting Alzheimer's disease clinical status directly from raw multi-modal data. The proposed method outperforms multiple state-of-the-art baselines with respect to performance and calibration, both of which are needed for real-world applications. An open-source implementation of our method is made publicly available at \url{https://github.com/Oulu-IMEDS/CLIMATv2}. 深度神经网络通常应用于医学图像以自动化医学诊断问题。然而，从业者通常面临的一个与临床更相关的问题是如何预测疾病的未来轨迹。当前的预后或疾病轨迹预测方法通常需要领域知识并且应用起来很复杂。在本文中，我们将预后预测问题表述为一对多预测问题。受到两名代理人（一名放射科医生和一名全科医生）临床决策过程的启发，我们通过两个基于变压器的相互共享信息的组件来预测预后。该框架中的第一个变压器旨在分析成像数据，第二个变压器利用其内部状态作为输入，并将它们与辅助临床数据融合。问题的时间性质是在变压器状态内建模的，使我们能够将预测问题视为多任务分类，为此我们提出了一种新颖的损失。我们展示了我们的方法在预测结构性膝骨关节炎变化的发展以及直接从原始多模态数据预测阿尔茨海默病临床状态方面的有效性。所提出的方法在性能和校准方面优于多个最先进的基线，这两者都是实际应用所需要的。我们的方法的开源实现已在 \url{https://github.com/Oulu-IMEDS/CLIMATv2} 上公开提供。 本文提出了一种基于多智能体Transformer的临床启发方法，用于从多模态数据中预测疾病轨迹。 Huy Hoang Nguyen,Matthew B. Blaschko,Simo Saarakkala,Aleksei Tiulpin eess.IV,cs.CV

title: Real-time AdaBoost cascade face tracker based on likelihood map and optical flow
title_zh: 基于似然图和光流的实时AdaBoost级联人脸跟踪器
abstract: The authors present a novel face tracking approach where optical flow information is incorporated into a modified version of the Viola Jones detection algorithm. In the original algorithm, detection is static, as information from previous frames is not considered. In addition, candidate windows have to pass all stages of the classification cascade, otherwise they are discarded as containing no face. In contrast, the proposed tracker preserves information about the number of classification stages passed by each window. Such information is used to build a likelihood map, which represents the probability of having a face located at that position. Tracking capabilities are provided by extrapolating the position of the likelihood map to the next frame by optical flow computation. The proposed algorithm works in real time on a standard laptop. The system is verified on the Boston Head Tracking Database, showing that the proposed algorithm outperforms the standard Viola Jones detector in terms of detection rate and stability of the output bounding box, as well as including the capability to deal with occlusions. The authors also evaluate two recently published face detectors based on convolutional networks and deformable part models with their algorithm showing a comparable accuracy at a fraction of the computation time.
summary: The authors present a novel face tracking approach where optical flow information is incorporated into a modified version of the Viola Jones detection algorithm. In the original algorithm, detection is static, as information from previous frames is not considered. In addition, candidate windows have to pass all stages of the classification cascade, otherwise they are discarded as containing no face. In contrast, the proposed tracker preserves information about the number of classification stages passed by each window. Such information is used to build a likelihood map, which represents the probability of having a face located at that position. Tracking capabilities are provided by extrapolating the position of the likelihood map to the next frame by optical flow computation. The proposed algorithm works in real time on a standard laptop. The system is verified on the Boston Head Tracking Database, showing that the proposed algorithm outperforms the standard Viola Jones detector in terms of detection rate and stability of the output bounding box, as well as including the capability to deal with occlusions. The authors also evaluate two recently published face detectors based on convolutional networks and deformable part models with their algorithm showing a comparable accuracy at a fraction of the computation time.
abstract_zh: 作者提出了一种新颖的面部跟踪方法，其中光流信息被合并到 Viola Jones 检测算法的修改版本中。在原始算法中，检测是静态的，因为不考虑先前帧的信息。此外，候选窗口必须通过分类级联的所有阶段，否则它们将因不包含人脸而被丢弃。相反，所提出的跟踪器保留有关每个窗口经过的分类阶段数量的信息。此类信息用于构建似然图，表示人脸位于该位置的概率。通过光流计算将似然图的位置外推到下一帧来提供跟踪功能。所提出的算法可以在标准笔记本电脑上实时运行。该系统在波士顿头部跟踪数据库上进行了验证，表明所提出的算法在输出边界框的检测率和稳定性以及处理遮挡的能力方面优于标准 Viola Jones 检测器。作者还评估了最近发布的两种基于卷积网络和可变形零件模型的人脸检测器，其算法显示出在计算时间的一小部分情况下具有相当的精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于似然图和光流的实时AdaBoost级联人脸跟踪方法。
AI.motivation: 传统的Viola-Jones检测算法在检测时未考虑前一帧的信息，且候选窗口必须通过所有分类阶段，否则会被丢弃，导致检测效率和稳定性不足。
AI.method: 该方法将光流信息整合到改进的Viola-Jones检测算法中，保留每个窗口通过分类阶段的信息，构建似然图，并通过光流计算将似然图的位置外推到下一帧。
AI.result: 该算法在标准笔记本电脑上实现了实时运行，并在波士顿头部跟踪数据库上验证，显示出比标准Viola-Jones检测器更高的检测率和输出边界框的稳定性，同时还能处理遮挡问题。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在计算时间上优于基于卷积网络和可变形部件模型的最新人脸检测器，具有较高的准确性和效率。

authors_text: Al-Akhir Nayan,Ahamad Nokib Mozumder,Md. Rakibul Haque,Fahim Hossain Sifat,Khan Raqib Mahmud,Abul Kalam Al Azad,Muhammad Golam Kibria
title: A deep learning approach for brain tumor detection using magnetic resonance imaging
title_zh: 使用磁共振成像检测脑肿瘤的深度学习方法
comment: ef:International Journal of Electrical and Computer Engineering (IJECE), 2023
comments: ef:International Journal of Electrical and Computer Engineering (IJECE), 2023
abstract: The growth of abnormal cells in the brain's tissue causes brain tumors. Brain tumors are considered one of the most dangerous disorders in children and adults. It develops quickly, and the patient's survival prospects are slim if not appropriately treated. Proper treatment planning and precise diagnoses are essential to improving a patient's life expectancy. Brain tumors are mainly diagnosed using magnetic resonance imaging (MRI). As part of a convolution neural network (CNN)-based illustration, an architecture containing five convolution layers, five max-pooling layers, a Flatten layer, and two dense layers has been proposed for detecting brain tumors from MRI images. The proposed model includes an automatic feature extractor, modified hidden layer architecture, and activation function. Several test cases were performed, and the proposed model achieved 98.6% accuracy and 97.8% precision score with a low cross-entropy rate. Compared with other approaches such as adjacent feature propagation network (AFPNet), mask region-based CNN (mask RCNN), YOLOv5, and Fourier CNN (FCNN), the proposed model has performed better in detecting brain tumors.
summary: The growth of abnormal cells in the brain's tissue causes brain tumors. Brain tumors are considered one of the most dangerous disorders in children and adults. It develops quickly, and the patient's survival prospects are slim if not appropriately treated. Proper treatment planning and precise diagnoses are essential to improving a patient's life expectancy. Brain tumors are mainly diagnosed using magnetic resonance imaging (MRI). As part of a convolution neural network (CNN)-based illustration, an architecture containing five convolution layers, five max-pooling layers, a Flatten layer, and two dense layers has been proposed for detecting brain tumors from MRI images. The proposed model includes an automatic feature extractor, modified hidden layer architecture, and activation function. Several test cases were performed, and the proposed model achieved 98.6% accuracy and 97.8% precision score with a low cross-entropy rate. Compared with other approaches such as adjacent feature propagation network (AFPNet), mask region-based CNN (mask RCNN), YOLOv5, and Fourier CNN (FCNN), the proposed model has performed better in detecting brain tumors.
abstract_zh: 脑组织中异常细胞的生长会导致脑肿瘤。脑肿瘤被认为是儿童和成人最危险的疾病之一。它发展迅速，如果治疗不当，患者的生存前景很渺茫。正确的治疗计划和精确的诊断对于提高患者的预期寿命至关重要。脑肿瘤主要使用磁共振成像（MRI）来诊断。作为基于卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的说明的一部分，提出了一种包含五个卷积层、五个最大池层、一个扁平层和两个密集层的架构，用于从 MRI 图像中检测脑肿瘤。所提出的模型包括自动特征提取器、改进的隐藏层架构和激活函数。进行了多个测试用例，所提出的模型以较低的交叉熵率实现了 98.6% 的准确率和 97.8% 的精度分数。与相邻特征传播网络（AFPNet）、基于掩模区域的 CNN（掩模 RCNN）、YOLOv5 和傅里叶 CNN（FCNN）等其他方法相比，该模型在检测脑肿瘤方面表现更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的脑肿瘤检测方法，利用磁共振成像（MRI）图像进行分类识别。
AI.motivation: 脑肿瘤具有高危险性且治疗窗口期短，亟需准确高效的检测手段以提高患者生存率和治疗效果。
AI.method: 设计包含五层卷积层、五层最大池化层、展平层及两个全连接层的改进型CNN架构，集成自动特征提取与优化激活函数机制。
AI.result: 在测试集上达到98.6%的准确率和97.8%的精确率，交叉熵损失较低，优于AFPNet、Mask R-CNN、YOLOv5和FCNN等对比模型。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型在脑肿瘤检测任务中展现出更高的检测性能，为医学影像分析提供了有效的深度学习解决方案。

The proposed model includes an automatic feature extractor, modified hidden layer architecture, and activation function. Several test cases were performed, and the proposed model achieved 98.6% accuracy and 97.8% precision score with a low cross-entropy rate. Compared with other approaches such as adjacent feature propagation network (AFPNet), mask region-based CNN (mask RCNN), YOLOv5, and Fourier CNN (FCNN), the proposed model has performed better in detecting brain tumors. 脑组织中异常细胞的生长会导致脑肿瘤。脑肿瘤被认为是儿童和成人最危险的疾病之一。它发展迅速，如果治疗不当，患者的生存前景很渺茫。正确的治疗计划和精确的诊断对于提高患者的预期寿命至关重要。脑肿瘤主要使用磁共振成像（MRI）来诊断。作为基于卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的说明的一部分，提出了一种包含五个卷积层、五个最大池层、一个扁平层和两个密集层的架构，用于从 MRI 图像中检测脑肿瘤。所提出的模型包括自动特征提取器、改进的隐藏层架构和激活函数。进行了多个测试用例，所提出的模型以较低的交叉熵率实现了 98.6% 的准确率和 97.8% 的精度分数。与相邻特征传播网络（AFPNet）、基于掩模区域的 CNN（掩模 RCNN）、YOLOv5 和傅里叶 CNN（FCNN）等其他方法相比，该模型在检测脑肿瘤方面表现更好。 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的脑肿瘤检测方法，利用磁共振成像（MRI）图像进行分类识别。 Al-Akhir Nayan,Ahamad Nokib Mozumder,Md. Rakibul Haque,Fahim Hossain Sifat,Khan Raqib Mahmud,Abul Kalam Al Azad,Muhammad Golam Kibria eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

title: Efficient and Stable Fully Dynamic Facility Location
title_zh: 高效稳定的全动态设施定位
abstract: We consider the classic facility location problem in fully dynamic data streams, where elements can be both inserted and deleted. In this problem, one is interested in maintaining a stable and high quality solution throughout the data stream while using only little time per update (insertion or deletion). We study the problem and provide the first algorithm that at the same time maintains a constant approximation and incurs polylogarithmic amortized recourse per update. We complement our theoretical results with an experimental analysis showing the practical efficiency of our method.
summary: We consider the classic facility location problem in fully dynamic data streams, where elements can be both inserted and deleted. In this problem, one is interested in maintaining a stable and high quality solution throughout the data stream while using only little time per update (insertion or deletion). We study the problem and provide the first algorithm that at the same time maintains a constant approximation and incurs polylogarithmic amortized recourse per update. We complement our theoretical results with an experimental analysis showing the practical efficiency of our method.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑完全动态数据流中的经典设施位置问题，其中元素可以插入和删除。在这个问题中，人们感兴趣的是在整个数据流中保持稳定和高质量的解决方案，同时每次更新（插入或删除）只使用很少的时间。我们研究了这个问题并提供了第一个算法，该算法同时保持恒定的近似值并在每次更新时产生多对数摊销追索权。我们通过实验分析补充了我们的理论结果，显示了我们方法的实际效率。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了全动态数据流中的设施定位问题，提出了一种高效且稳定的算法，能够在处理元素插入和删除时保持高质量解并减少计算资源消耗。
AI.motivation: 动态数据流中的设施定位问题需要在频繁更新下维持稳定解，传统方法在资源消耗或解稳定性上存在不足，亟需兼顾效率与质量的算法。
AI.method: 设计了一种结合常数近似比与低资源消耗的算法，通过动态调整设施位置并优化更新处理机制，确保每次操作的摊销时间复杂度为对数多项式级别。
AI.result: 理论证明算法达到常数近似比且资源消耗较低，实验验证了其在实际应用中的高效性与稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的算法为动态设施定位问题提供了理论与实践上的有效解决方案，平衡了近似质量与计算效率。

authors_text: M. L. Menezes,A. Samara,L. Galway,A. Sant'anna,A. Verikas,F. Alonso-Fernandez,H. Wang,R. Bond
title: Towards emotion recognition for virtual environments: an evaluation of EEG features on benchmark dataset
title_zh: 走向虚拟环境的情感识别：基准数据集上脑电图特征的评估
comment: Published at Personal and Ubiquitous Computing Journal (PUC)
comments: Published at Personal and Ubiquitous Computing Journal (PUC)
abstract: One of the challenges in virtual environments is the difficulty users have in interacting with these increasingly complex systems. Ultimately, endowing machines with the ability to perceive users emotions will enable a more intuitive and reliable interaction. Consequently, using the electroencephalogram as a bio-signal sensor, the affective state of a user can be modelled and subsequently utilised in order to achieve a system that can recognise and react to the user's emotions. This paper investigates features extracted from electroencephalogram signals for the purpose of affective state modelling based on Russell's Circumplex Model. Investigations are presented that aim to provide the foundation for future work in modelling user affect to enhance interaction experience in virtual environments. The DEAP dataset was used within this work, along with a Support Vector Machine and Random Forest, which yielded reasonable classification accuracies for Valence and Arousal using feature vectors based on statistical measurements and band power from the ź, \b{eta}, ź, and źź waves and High Order Crossing of the EEG signal.
summary: One of the challenges in virtual environments is the difficulty users have in interacting with these increasingly complex systems. Ultimately, endowing machines with the ability to perceive users emotions will enable a more intuitive and reliable interaction. Consequently, using the electroencephalogram as a bio-signal sensor, the affective state of a user can be modelled and subsequently utilised in order to achieve a system that can recognise and react to the user's emotions. This paper investigates features extracted from electroencephalogram signals for the purpose of affective state modelling based on Russell's Circumplex Model. Investigations are presented that aim to provide the foundation for future work in modelling user affect to enhance interaction experience in virtual environments. The DEAP dataset was used within this work, along with a Support Vector Machine and Random Forest, which yielded reasonable classification accuracies for Valence and Arousal using feature vectors based on statistical measurements and band power from the ź, \b{eta}, ź, and źź waves and High Order Crossing of the EEG signal.
abstract_zh: 虚拟环境中的挑战之一是用户与这些日益复杂的系统交互时遇到的困难。最终，赋予机器感知用户情绪的能力将实现更直观、更可靠的交互。因此，使用脑电图作为生物信号传感器，可以对用户的情感状态进行建模并随后利用，以实现可以识别用户的情绪并对​​用户的情绪做出反应的系统。本文研究了从脑电图信号中提取的特征，以基于罗素环路模型进行情感状态建模。提出的研究旨在为未来的用户影响建模工作提供基础，以增强虚拟环境中的交互体验。这项工作中使用了 DEAP 数据集以及支持向量机和随机森林，使用基于 ź、\b{eta}、ź 和 źź 波的统计测量和带功率以及 EEG 信号高阶交叉的特征向量，为效价和唤醒产生了合理的分类精度。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过评估脑电图（EEG）特征在基准数据集上的表现，推动虚拟环境中用户情感识别技术的发展。
AI.motivation: 为解决虚拟环境中用户交互的复杂性，提升系统的直观性与可靠性，需赋予机器感知用户情感的能力。
AI.method: 采用DEAP数据集，结合支持向量机（SVM）和随机森林分类器，提取统计测量值、脑电波频段功率（theta、beta、gamma）及高阶交叉特征进行情感状态建模。
AI.result: 实验结果显示，基于统计特征和频段功率的分类模型在Valence和Arousal维度上达到了合理的分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为未来在虚拟环境中通过情感建模提升交互体验提供了理论基础和技术支持。
