title: Jet tagging algorithm of graph network with HaarPooling message passing
title_zh: HaarPooling消息传递的图网络Jet标记算法
abstract: Recently methods of graph neural networks (GNNs) have been applied to solving the problems in high energy physics (HEP) and have shown its great potential for quark-gluon tagging with graph representation of jet events. In this paper, we introduce an approach of GNNs combined with a HaarPooling operation to analyze the events, called HaarPooling Message Passing neural network (HMPNet). In HMPNet, HaarPooling not only extracts the features of graph, but embeds additional information obtained by clustering of k-means of different particle features. We construct Haarpooling from five different features: absolute energy $\log E$, transverse momentum $\log p_T$, relative coordinates $(Δη,Δφ)$, the mixed ones $(\log E, \log p_T)$ and $(\log E, \log p_T, Δη,Δφ)$. The results show that an appropriate selection of information for HaarPooling enhances the accuracy of quark-gluon tagging, as adding extra information of $\log P_T$ to the HMPNet outperforms all the others, whereas adding relative coordinates information $(Δη,Δφ)$ is not very effective. This implies that by adding effective particle features from HaarPooling can achieve much better results than solely pure message passing neutral network (MPNN) can do, which demonstrates significant improvement of feature extraction via the pooling process. Finally we compare the HMPNet study, ordering by $p_T$, with other studies and prove that the HMPNet is also a good choice of GNN algorithms for jet tagging.
summary: Recently methods of graph neural networks (GNNs) have been applied to solving the problems in high energy physics (HEP) and have shown its great potential for quark-gluon tagging with graph representation of jet events. In this paper, we introduce an approach of GNNs combined with a HaarPooling operation to analyze the events, called HaarPooling Message Passing neural network (HMPNet). In HMPNet, HaarPooling not only extracts the features of graph, but embeds additional information obtained by clustering of k-means of different particle features. We construct Haarpooling from five different features: absolute energy $\log E$, transverse momentum $\log p_T$, relative coordinates $(Δη,Δφ)$, the mixed ones $(\log E, \log p_T)$ and $(\log E, \log p_T, Δη,Δφ)$. The results show that an appropriate selection of information for HaarPooling enhances the accuracy of quark-gluon tagging, as adding extra information of $\log P_T$ to the HMPNet outperforms all the others, whereas adding relative coordinates information $(Δη,Δφ)$ is not very effective. This implies that by adding effective particle features from HaarPooling can achieve much better results than solely pure message passing neutral network (MPNN) can do, which demonstrates significant improvement of feature extraction via the pooling process. Finally we compare the HMPNet study, ordering by $p_T$, with other studies and prove that the HMPNet is also a good choice of GNN algorithms for jet tagging.
abstract_zh: 最近，图神经网络（GNN）的方法已被应用于解决高能物理（HEP）中的问题，并显示出其在用喷流事件的图表示进行夸克-胶子标记方面的巨大潜力。在本文中，我们介绍了一种结合 HaarPooling 操作来分析事件的 GNN 方法，称为 HaarPooling 消息传递神经网络（HMPNet）。在HMPNet中，HaarPooling不仅提取图的特征，还嵌入通过不同粒子特征的k均值聚类获得的附加信息。我们从五个不同的特征构建Haarpooling：绝对能量$\log E$、横向动量$\log p_T$、相对坐标$(Δη,Δφ)$、混合特征$(\log E, \log p_T)$和$(\log E, \log p_T, Δη,Δφ)$。结果表明，适当选择 HaarPooling 的信息可以提高夸克-胶子标记的准确性，因为向 HMPNet 添加 $\log P_T$ 的额外信息优于所有其他信息，而添加相对坐标信息 $(Δη,Δφ)$ 则不是很有效。这意味着通过添加 HaarPooling 的有效粒子特征可以获得比单独的纯消息传递神经网络（MPNN）更好的结果，这表明通过池化过程对特征提取有显着的改进。最后，我们将 HMPNet 研究（按 $p_T$ 排序）与其他研究进行比较，并证明 HMPNet 也是用于喷射标记的 GNN 算法的不错选择。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合HaarPooling操作的图神经网络（HMPNet），用于高能物理中的喷注（jet）标签任务，特别是夸克-胶子区分。
AI.motivation: 图神经网络（GNN）在高能物理中展现出处理喷注事件的潜力，但需改进特征提取方法以提升标签准确性。
AI.method: 构建HMPNet，通过HaarPooling从五类粒子特征（如能量、动量、坐标等）中提取信息，并嵌入k-means聚类结果，比较不同特征组合的效果。
AI.result: 添加log p_T特征显著提升准确率，而相对坐标（Δη,Δφ）效果有限，证明HaarPooling增强的特征提取优于纯消息传递网络（MPNN）。
AI.conclusion: HMPNet通过有效特征融合优于现有方法，是喷注标签任务的优选GNN算法。

search_text: Jet tagging algorithm of graph network with HaarPooling message passing HaarPooling消息传递的图网络Jet标记算法 Recently methods of graph neural networks (GNNs) have been applied to solving the problems in high energy physics (HEP) and have shown its great potential for quark-gluon tagging with graph representation of jet events. In this paper, we introduce an approach of GNNs combined with a HaarPooling operation to analyze the events, called HaarPooling Message Passing neural network (HMPNet). In HMPNet, HaarPooling not only extracts the features of graph, but embeds additional information obtained by clustering of k-means of different particle features. We construct Haarpooling from five different features: absolute energy $\log E$, transverse momentum $\log p_T$, relative coordinates $(Δη,Δφ)$, the mixed ones $(\log E, \log p_T)$ and $(\log E, \log p_T, Δη,Δφ)$. The results show that an appropriate selection of information for HaarPooling enhances the accuracy of quark-gluon tagging, as adding extra information of $\log P_T$ to the HMPNet outperforms all the others, whereas adding relative coordinates information $(Δη,Δφ)$ is not very effective. This implies that by adding effective particle features from HaarPooling can achieve much better results than solely pure message passing neutral network (MPNN) can do, which demonstrates significant improvement of feature extraction via the pooling process. Finally we compare the HMPNet study, ordering by $p_T$, with other studies and prove that the HMPNet is also a good choice of GNN algorithms for jet tagging. 最近，图神经网络（GNN）的方法已被应用于解决高能物理（HEP）中的问题，并显示出其在用喷流事件的图表示进行夸克-胶子标记方面的巨大潜力。在本文中，我们介绍了一种结合 HaarPooling 操作来分析事件的 GNN 方法，称为 HaarPooling 消息传递神经网络（HMPNet）。在HMPNet中，HaarPooling不仅提取图的特征，还嵌入通过不同粒子特征的k均值聚类获得的附加信息。我们从五个不同的特征构建Haarpooling：绝对能量$\log E$、横向动量$\log p_T$、相对坐标$(Δη,Δφ)$、混合特征$(\log E, \log p_T)$和$(\log E, \log p_T, Δη,Δφ)$。结果表明，适当选择 HaarPooling 的信息可以提高夸克-胶子标记的准确性，因为向 HMPNet 添加 $\log P_T$ 的额外信息优于所有其他信息，而添加相对坐标信息 $(Δη,Δφ)$ 则不是很有效。这意味着通过添加 HaarPooling 的有效粒子特征可以获得比单独的纯消息传递神经网络（MPNN）更好的结果，这表明通过池化过程对特征提取有显着的改进。最后，我们将 HMPNet 研究（按 $p_T$ 排序）与其他研究进行比较，并证明 HMPNet 也是用于喷射标记的 GNN 算法的不错选择。 本文提出了一种结合HaarPooling操作的图神经网络（HMPNet），用于高能物理中的喷注（jet）标签任务，特别是夸克-胶子区分。 Fei Ma,Feiyi Liu,Wei Li hep-ex,cs.CV,cs.LG,hep-ph

authors_text: Ahmed A. A. Osman,Timo Bolkart,Dimitrios Tzionas,Michael J. Black
title: SUPR: A Sparse Unified Part-Based Human Representation
title_zh: SUPR：基于部分的稀疏统一人类表示
abstract: Statistical 3D shape models of the head, hands, and fullbody are widely used in computer vision and graphics. Despite their wide use, we show that existing models of the head and hands fail to capture the full range of motion for these parts. Moreover, existing work largely ignores the feet, which are crucial for modeling human movement and have applications in biomechanics, animation, and the footwear industry. The problem is that previous body part models are trained using 3D scans that are isolated to the individual parts. Such data does not capture the full range of motion for such parts, e.g. the motion of head relative to the neck. Our observation is that full-body scans provide important information about the motion of the body parts. Consequently, we propose a new learning scheme that jointly trains a full-body model and specific part models using a federated dataset of full-body and body-part scans. Specifically, we train an expressive human body model called SUPR (Sparse Unified Part-Based Human Representation), where each joint strictly influences a sparse set of model vertices. The factorized representation enables separating SUPR into an entire suite of body part models. Note that the feet have received little attention and existing 3D body models have highly under-actuated feet. Using novel 4D scans of feet, we train a model with an extended kinematic tree that captures the range of motion of the toes. Additionally, feet deform due to ground contact. To model this, we include a novel non-linear deformation function that predicts foot deformation conditioned on the foot pose, shape, and ground contact. We train SUPR on an unprecedented number of scans: 1.2 million body, head, hand and foot scans. We quantitatively compare SUPR and the separated body parts and find that our suite of models generalizes better than existing models. SUPR is available at http://supr.is.tue.mpg.de

Despite their wide use, we show that existing models of the head and hands fail to capture the full range of motion for these parts. Moreover, existing work largely ignores the feet, which are crucial for modeling human movement and have applications in biomechanics, animation, and the footwear industry. The problem is that previous body part models are trained using 3D scans that are isolated to the individual parts. Such data does not capture the full range of motion for such parts, e.g. the motion of head relative to the neck. Our observation is that full-body scans provide important information about the motion of the body parts. Consequently, we propose a new learning scheme that jointly trains a full-body model and specific part models using a federated dataset of full-body and body-part scans. Specifically, we train an expressive human body model called SUPR (Sparse Unified Part-Based Human Representation), where each joint strictly influences a sparse set of model vertices. The factorized representation enables separating SUPR into an entire suite of body part models. Note that the feet have received little attention and existing 3D body models have highly under-actuated feet. Using novel 4D scans of feet, we train a model with an extended kinematic tree that captures the range of motion of the toes. Additionally, feet deform due to ground contact. To model this, we include a novel non-linear deformation function that predicts foot deformation conditioned on the foot pose, shape, and ground contact. We train SUPR on an unprecedented number of scans: 1.2 million body, head, hand and foot scans. We quantitatively compare SUPR and the separated body parts and find that our suite of models generalizes better than existing models. SUPR is available at http://supr.is.tue.mpg.de
abstract_zh: 头部、手部和全身的统计 3D 形状模型广泛应用于计算机视觉和图形学领域。尽管用途广泛，但我们表明现有的头部和手部模型无法捕捉这些部位的完整运动范围。此外，现有的工作很大程度上忽略了脚，脚对于人体运动建模至关重要，并且在生物力学、动画和制鞋业中都有应用。问题在于，以前的身体部位模型是使用与各个部位隔离的 3D 扫描进行训练的。此类数据无法捕获此类部件的完整运动范围，例如，头部相对于颈部的运动。我们的观察是，全身扫描提供了有关身体部位运动的重要信息。因此，我们提出了一种新的学习方案，使用全身和身体部位扫描的联合数据集联合训练全身模型和特定部位模型。具体来说，我们训练了一个名为 SUPR（基于稀疏统一部分的人体表示）的富有表现力的人体模型，其中每个关节严格影响一组稀疏的模型顶点。因式分解表示能够将 SUPR 分离成一整套身体部位模型。请注意，脚部几乎没有受到关注，并且现有 3D 人体模型的脚部驱动严重不足。使用新颖的足部 4D 扫描，我们训练了一个具有扩展运动树的模型，该运动树可以捕获脚趾的运动范围。此外，脚由于接触地面而变形。为了对此进行建模，我们引入了一种新颖的非线性变形函数，该函数可以根据脚部姿势、形状和地面接触来预测脚部变形。我们对 SUPR 进行了前所未有的扫描次数训练：120 万次身体、头部、手部和足部扫描。我们定量比较 SUPR 和分离的身体部位，发现我们的模型套件比现有模型具有更好的泛化能力。 SUPR 的网址为：http://supr.is.tue.mpg.de

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SUPR的稀疏统一部件人体表示模型，通过联合训练全身模型和特定部件模型，改进了头部、手部和足部的运动捕捉能力。
AI.motivation: 现有3D人体模型在头部、手部运动捕捉上存在局限，且忽视了足部建模，导致在生物力学、动画等领域应用不足。
AI.method: 采用全身与部件扫描的联邦数据集，联合训练全身模型与部件模型；设计稀疏顶点影响机制，并引入足部接触变形函数，基于120万扫描数据训练。
AI.result: SUPR模型及其分离部件模型在定量评估中优于现有模型，尤其在足部运动范围和地面接触变形预测上表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 通过整合全身扫描信息与部件特化设计，SUPR有效解决了传统模型的运动捕捉局限性，为人体建模提供了更全面的解决方案。

title: LAB: Learnable Activation Binarizer for Binary Neural Networks
title_zh: LAB：二元神经网络的可学习激活二值化器
comment: This paper is accepted to appear in the proceedings of WACV 2023
comments: This paper is accepted to appear in the proceedings of WACV 2023
abstract: Binary Neural Networks (BNNs) are receiving an upsurge of attention for bringing power-hungry deep learning towards edge devices. The traditional wisdom in this space is to employ sign() for binarizing featuremaps. We argue and illustrate that sign() is a uniqueness bottleneck, limiting information propagation throughout the network. To alleviate this, we propose to dispense sign(), replacing it with a learnable activation binarizer (LAB), allowing the network to learn a fine-grained binarization kernel per layer - as opposed to global thresholding. LAB is a novel universal module that can seamlessly be integrated into existing architectures. To confirm this, we plug it into four seminal BNNs and show a considerable performance boost at the cost of tolerable increase in delay and complexity. Finally, we build an end-to-end BNN (coined as LAB-BNN) around LAB, and demonstrate that it achieves competitive performance on par with the state-of-the-art on ImageNet.
summary: Binary Neural Networks (BNNs) are receiving an upsurge of attention for bringing power-hungry deep learning towards edge devices. The traditional wisdom in this space is to employ sign() for binarizing featuremaps. We argue and illustrate that sign() is a uniqueness bottleneck, limiting information propagation throughout the network. To alleviate this, we propose to dispense sign(), replacing it with a learnable activation binarizer (LAB), allowing the network to learn a fine-grained binarization kernel per layer - as opposed to global thresholding. LAB is a novel universal module that can seamlessly be integrated into existing architectures. To confirm this, we plug it into four seminal BNNs and show a considerable performance boost at the cost of tolerable increase in delay and complexity. Finally, we build an end-to-end BNN (coined as LAB-BNN) around LAB, and demonstrate that it achieves competitive performance on par with the state-of-the-art on ImageNet.
abstract_zh: 二元神经网络 (BNN) 因将耗电的深度学习引入边缘设备而受到广泛关注。这个领域的传统智慧是使用sign()来二值化特征图。我们认为并说明了sign()是一个唯一性瓶颈，限制了整个网络中的信息传播。为了缓解这个问题，我们建议取消sign()，用可学习的激活二值化器（LAB）代替它，允许网络每层学习细粒度的二值化内核——而不是全局阈值。 LAB 是一种新颖的通用模块，可以无缝集成到现有架构中。为了证实这一点，我们将其插入四个开创性的 BNN 中，并以可容忍的延迟和复杂性增加为代价，显示出相当大的性能提升。最后，我们围绕 LAB 构建了一个端到端的 BNN（称为 LAB-BNN），并证明它实现了与 ImageNet 上最先进的技术相当的竞争性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可学习的激活二值化模块LAB，用于改进二值神经网络（BNN）的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统BNN使用sign()函数进行特征图二值化，但其固定阈值限制了信息传播，成为性能瓶颈。
AI.method: 设计可学习的层间二值化核LAB，替代全局阈值的sign()函数，并将其集成到四种经典BNN架构中，构建端到端的LAB-BNN模型。
AI.result: 在保持可接受延迟和复杂度增加的前提下，四类BNN性能显著提升，LAB-BNN在ImageNet上达到SOTA水平。
AI.conclusion: LAB通过细粒度二值化机制有效突破传统方法瓶颈，为BNN设计提供了通用且高效的模块化解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种可学习的激活二值化模块LAB，用于改进二值神经网络（BNN）的性能。

search_text: LAB: Learnable Activation Binarizer for Binary Neural Networks LAB：二元神经网络的可学习激活二值化器 Binary Neural Networks (BNNs) are receiving an upsurge of attention for bringing power-hungry deep learning towards edge devices. The traditional wisdom in this space is to employ sign() for binarizing featuremaps. We argue and illustrate that sign() is a uniqueness bottleneck, limiting information propagation throughout the network. To alleviate this, we propose to dispense sign(), replacing it with a learnable activation binarizer (LAB), allowing the network to learn a fine-grained binarization kernel per layer - as opposed to global thresholding. LAB is a novel universal module that can seamlessly be integrated into existing architectures. To confirm this, we plug it into four seminal BNNs and show a considerable performance boost at the cost of tolerable increase in delay and complexity. Finally, we build an end-to-end BNN (coined as LAB-BNN) around LAB, and demonstrate that it achieves competitive performance on par with the state-of-the-art on ImageNet. 二元神经网络 (BNN) 因将耗电的深度学习引入边缘设备而受到广泛关注。这个领域的传统智慧是使用sign()来二值化特征图。我们认为并说明了sign()是一个唯一性瓶颈，限制了整个网络中的信息传播。为了缓解这个问题，我们建议取消sign()，用可学习的激活二值化器（LAB）代替它，允许网络每层学习细粒度的二值化内核——而不是全局阈值。 LAB 是一种新颖的通用模块，可以无缝集成到现有架构中。为了证实这一点，我们将其插入四个开创性的 BNN 中，并以可容忍的延迟和复杂性增加为代价，显示出相当大的性能提升。最后，我们围绕 LAB 构建了一个端到端的 BNN（称为 LAB-BNN），并证明它实现了与 ImageNet 上最先进的技术相当的竞争性能。 本文提出了一种可学习的激活二值化模块LAB，用于改进二值神经网络（BNN）的性能。 Sieger Falkena,Hadi Jamali-Rad,Jan van Gemert cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Lukas Bernreiter,Shehryar Khattak,Lionel Ott,Roland Siegwart,Marco Hutter,Cesar Cadena
title: A Framework for Collaborative Multi-Robot Mapping using Spectral Graph Wavelets
title_zh: 使用谱图小波的协作多机器人测绘框架
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.00308
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.00308
abstract: The exploration of large-scale unknown environments can benefit from the deployment of multiple robots for collaborative mapping. Each robot explores a section of the environment and communicates onboard pose estimates and maps to a central server to build an optimized global multi-robot map. Naturally, inconsistencies can arise between onboard and server estimates due to onboard odometry drift, failures, or degeneracies. The mapping server can correct and overcome such failure cases using computationally expensive operations such as inter-robot loop closure detection and multi-modal mapping. However, the individual robots do not benefit from the collaborative map if the mapping server provides no feedback. Although server updates from the multi-robot map can greatly alleviate the robotic mission strategically, most existing work lacks them, due to their associated computational and bandwidth-related costs. Motivated by this challenge, this paper proposes a novel collaborative mapping framework that enables global mapping consistency among robots and the mapping server. In particular, we propose graph spectral analysis, at different spatial scales, to detect structural differences between robot and server graphs, and to generate necessary constraints for the individual robot pose graphs. Our approach specifically finds the nodes that correspond to the drift's origin rather than the nodes where the error becomes too large. We thoroughly analyze and validate our proposed framework using several real-world multi-robot field deployments where we show improvements of the onboard system up to 90\% and can recover the onboard estimation from localization failures and even from the degeneracies within its estimation.

Naturally, inconsistencies can arise between onboard and server estimates due to onboard odometry drift, failures, or degeneracies. The mapping server can correct and overcome such failure cases using computationally expensive operations such as inter-robot loop closure detection and multi-modal mapping. However, the individual robots do not benefit from the collaborative map if the mapping server provides no feedback. Although server updates from the multi-robot map can greatly alleviate the robotic mission strategically, most existing work lacks them, due to their associated computational and bandwidth-related costs. Motivated by this challenge, this paper proposes a novel collaborative mapping framework that enables global mapping consistency among robots and the mapping server. In particular, we propose graph spectral analysis, at different spatial scales, to detect structural differences between robot and server graphs, and to generate necessary constraints for the individual robot pose graphs. Our approach specifically finds the nodes that correspond to the drift's origin rather than the nodes where the error becomes too large. We thoroughly analyze and validate our proposed framework using several real-world multi-robot field deployments where we show improvements of the onboard system up to 90\% and can recover the onboard estimation from localization failures and even from the degeneracies within its estimation.
abstract_zh: 对大规模未知环境的探索可以受益于部署多个机器人进行协作测绘。每个机器人都会探索环境的一部分，并将机载姿态估计和地图传送到中央服务器，以构建优化的全局多机器人地图。当然，由于机载里程计漂移、故障或退化，机载和服务器估计之间可能会出现不一致。地图服务器可以使用计算成本较高的操作（例如机器人间闭环检测和多模态地图）来纠正和克服此类故障情况。然而，如果地图服务器不提供反馈，单个机器人就无法从协作地图中受益。尽管来自多机器人地图的服务器更新可以从战略上极大地减轻机器人任务，但由于相关的计算和带宽相关成本，大多数现有工作都缺乏它们。受这一挑战的启发，本文提出了一种新颖的协作地图框架，该框架可以实现机器人和地图服务器之间的全局地图一致性。特别是，我们提出在不同空间尺度上进行图谱分析，以检测机器人图和服务器图之间的结构差异，并为各个机器人位姿图生成必要的约束。我们的方法专门找到与漂移原点相对应的节点，而不是误差变得太大的节点。我们使用几个真实的多机器人现场部署来彻底分析和验证我们提出的框架，其中我们展示了机载系统高达 90% 的改进，并且可以从定位失败甚至从估计中的退化中恢复机载估计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于谱图小波的协作多机器人映射框架，解决多机器人与服务器映射一致性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有协作映射方法因计算和带宽成本未向机器人提供反馈，导致航位推算漂移等不一致性问题难以修正。
AI.method: 通过多尺度谱图小波分析检测机器人与服务器图结构差异，定位漂移起源节点并生成约束条件优化单机位姿图。
AI.result: 实际部署验证显示 onboard 系统性能提升最高达90%，可恢复定位失效和退化情况下的估计。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效实现了机器人与服务器间的全局映射一致性，解决了协作映射中的反馈缺失难题。

title: An Improved Algorithm for Open Online Dial-a-Ride
title_zh: 一种改进的开放式在线叫车算法
abstract: We consider the open online dial-a-ride problem, where transportation requests appear online in a metric space and need to be served by a single server. The objective is to minimize the completion time until all requests have been served. We present a new, parameterized algorithm for this problem and prove that it attains a competitive ratio of $1 + \varphi \approx 2.618$ for some choice of its parameter, where $\varphi$ is the golden ratio. This improves the best known bounds for open online dial-a-ride both for general metric spaces as well as for the real line. We also give a lower bound of~$2.457$ for the competitive ratio of our algorithm for any parameter choice.
summary: We consider the open online dial-a-ride problem, where transportation requests appear online in a metric space and need to be served by a single server. The objective is to minimize the completion time until all requests have been served. We present a new, parameterized algorithm for this problem and prove that it attains a competitive ratio of $1 + \varphi \approx 2.618$ for some choice of its parameter, where $\varphi$ is the golden ratio. This improves the best known bounds for open online dial-a-ride both for general metric spaces as well as for the real line. We also give a lower bound of~$2.457$ for the competitive ratio of our algorithm for any parameter choice.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑开放式在线叫车问题，其中交通请求出现在度量空间中在线，并且需要由单个服务器提供服务。目标是最大限度地缩短完成时间，直到所有请求均得到满足。我们针对这个问题提出了一种新的参数化算法，并证明对于某些参数的选择，它获得了 $1 + \varphi \approx 2.618$ 的竞争比，其中 $\varphi$ 是黄金比例。这改善了开放式在线叫车服务的已知界限，无论是对于一般度量空间还是对于实线。我们还为我们的算法对于任何参数选择的竞争比给出了约 2.457 美元的下限。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种改进的参数化算法，用于解决开放在线拨号接送问题，以最小化完成所有运输请求的时间。
AI.motivation: 现有算法在开放在线拨号接送问题中的竞争比存在理论界限限制，需进一步优化性能。
AI.method: 设计参数化算法并证明其竞争比，结合黄金比例参数选择以提升效率。
AI.result: 算法在一般度量空间和实数轴上实现1+φ≈2.618的竞争比，且证明任意参数选择下界为2.457。
AI.conclusion: 该算法在理论界面上改进了开放在线拨号接送问题的最优竞争比，但实际应用效果需进一步验证。

authors_text: Ahmed Tawfik Aboukhadra,Jameel Malik,Ahmed Elhayek,Nadia Robertini,Didier Stricker
title: THOR-Net: End-to-end Graformer-based Realistic Two Hands and Object Reconstruction with Self-supervision
title_zh: THOR-Net：基于端到端 Graformer 的现实两只手和具有自我监督的对象重建
abstract: Realistic reconstruction of two hands interacting with objects is a new and challenging problem that is essential for building personalized Virtual and Augmented Reality environments. Graph Convolutional networks (GCNs) allow for the preservation of the topologies of hands poses and shapes by modeling them as a graph. In this work, we propose the THOR-Net which combines the power of GCNs, Transformer, and self-supervision to realistically reconstruct two hands and an object from a single RGB image. Our network comprises two stages; namely the features extraction stage and the reconstruction stage. In the features extraction stage, a Keypoint RCNN is used to extract 2D poses, features maps, heatmaps, and bounding boxes from a monocular RGB image. Thereafter, this 2D information is modeled as two graphs and passed to the two branches of the reconstruction stage. The shape reconstruction branch estimates meshes of two hands and an object using our novel coarse-to-fine GraFormer shape network. The 3D poses of the hands and objects are reconstructed by the other branch using a GraFormer network. Finally, a self-supervised photometric loss is used to directly regress the realistic textured of each vertex in the hands' meshes. Our approach achieves State-of-the-art results in Hand shape estimation on the HO-3D dataset (10.0mm) exceeding ArtiBoost (10.8mm). It also surpasses other methods in hand pose estimation on the challenging two hands and object (H2O) dataset by 5mm on the left-hand pose and 1 mm on the right-hand pose.

The 3D poses of the hands and objects are reconstructed by the other branch using a GraFormer network. abstract_zh: 两只手与物体交互的真实重建是一个新的、具有挑战性的问题，对于构建个性化的虚拟和增强现实环境至关重要。图卷积网络（GCN）允许通过将手部姿势和形状建模为图来保存手部姿势和形状的拓扑。在这项工作中，我们提出了 THOR-Net，它结合了 GCN、Transformer 和自我监督的力量，可以从单个 RGB 图像中真实地重建两只手和一个物体。我们的网络包括两个阶段；即特征提取阶段和重建阶段。在特征提取阶段，使用 Keypoint RCNN 从单目 RGB 图像中提取 2D 姿态、特征图、热图和边界框。此后，该二维信息被建模为两个图并传递到重建阶段的两个分支。形状重建分支使用我们新颖的从粗到细的 GraFormer 形状网络来估计两只手和一个物体的网格。手和物体的 3D 姿势由另一个分支使用 GraFormer 网络重建。最后，使用自监督光度损失来直接回归手部网格中每个顶点的真实纹理。我们的方法在 HO-3D 数据集 (10.0mm) 上的手部形状估计方面取得了超过 ArtiBoost (10.8mm) 的最先进结果。在具有挑战性的两只手和物体 (H2O) 数据集上，它在手部姿势估计方面也优于其他方法，在左手姿势上比其他方法高出 5 毫米，在右手姿势上比其他方法高出 1 毫米。

AI.tldr: 本文提出THOR-Net，通过结合图卷积网络、Transformer和自监督学习，从单张RGB图像中重建交互的双手及物体的三维形态与姿态。
AI.motivation: 双手与物体的高精度三维重建对虚拟现实和增强现实环境构建至关重要，但现有方法在双手交互场景下存在精度不足的问题。
AI.method: 采用两阶段架构：第一阶段使用Keypoint RCNN提取2D关键点和特征图；第二阶段通过GraFormer网络分别重建双手及物体的形状（粗到细优化）和3D姿态，并利用自监督光度损失优化表面纹理。
AI.result: 在HO-3D数据集上手部形状估计误差达10.0mm（优于ArtiBoost的10.8mm），在H2O数据集上左手姿态误差降低5mm、右手降低1mm。
AI.conclusion: THOR-Net通过图结构建模与自监督学习有效解决了双手-物体交互重建难题，为VR/AR应用提供了更精确的三维重建方案。

search_text: THOR-Net: End-to-end Graformer-based Realistic Two Hands and Object Reconstruction with Self-supervision THOR-Net：基于端到端 Graformer 的现实两只手和具有自我监督的对象重建 Realistic reconstruction of two hands interacting with objects is a new and challenging problem that is essential for building personalized Virtual and Augmented Reality environments. Thereafter, this 2D information is modeled as two graphs and passed to the two branches of the reconstruction stage. The shape reconstruction branch estimates meshes of two hands and an object using our novel coarse-to-fine GraFormer shape network. The 3D poses of the hands and objects are reconstructed by the other branch using a GraFormer network. Finally, a self-supervised photometric loss is used to directly regress the realistic textured of each vertex in the hands' meshes. title: Tight analysis of the lazy algorithm for open online dial-a-ride
title_zh: 开放在线叫车惰性算法的严密分析
abstract: In the open online dial-a-ride problem, a single server has to deliver transportation requests appearing over time in some metric space, subject to minimizing the completion time. We improve on the best known upper bounds on the competitive ratio on general metric spaces and on the half-line, for both the preemptive and non-preemptive version of the problem. We achieve this by revisiting the algorithm $\textsc{Lazy}$ recently suggested in [WAOA, 2022] and giving an improved and tight analysis. More precisely, we show that it has competitive ratio $2.457$ on general metric spaces and $2.366$ on the half-line. This is the first upper bound that beats known lower bounds of 2.5 for schedule-based algorithms as well as the natural $\textsc{Replan}$ algorithm.
summary: In the open online dial-a-ride problem, a single server has to deliver transportation requests appearing over time in some metric space, subject to minimizing the completion time. We improve on the best known upper bounds on the competitive ratio on general metric spaces and on the half-line, for both the preemptive and non-preemptive version of the problem. We achieve this by revisiting the algorithm $\textsc{Lazy}$ recently suggested in [WAOA, 2022] and giving an improved and tight analysis. More precisely, we show that it has competitive ratio $2.457$ on general metric spaces and $2.366$ on the half-line. This is the first upper bound that beats known lower bounds of 2.5 for schedule-based algorithms as well as the natural $\textsc{Replan}$ algorithm.
abstract_zh: 在开放式在线叫车问题中，单个服务器必须交付在某个度量空间中随着时间的推移出现的运输请求，并最大限度地缩短完成时间。对于问题的抢占式和非抢占式版本，我们改进了一般度量空间和半线上最著名的竞争比上限。我们通过重新审视 [WAOA, 2022] 最近建议的算法 $\textsc{Lazy}$ 并给出改进和严格的分析来实现这一目标。更准确地说，我们表明它在一般度量空间上的竞争比为 2.457 美元，在半线上的竞争比为 2.366 美元。对于基于调度的算法以及自然的 $\textsc{Replan}$ 算法，这是第一个超过已知下限 2.5 的上限。

AI.tldr: 本文对在线调车问题中的Lazy算法进行严格分析，改进了通用度量空间和半线上的竞争比率上界。
AI.motivation: 现有算法在通用度量空间的下限为2.5，而本文旨在通过改进分析突破这一限制，提供更优的上界。
AI.method: 重新审视Lazy算法并优化其分析方法，结合数学推导与算法调整，证明更紧的竞争比率。
AI.result: 在通用度量空间实现2.457的竞争比率，在半线上实现2.366，首次超越2.5的下限。
AI.conclusion: Lazy算法的改进分析为在线调车问题提供了更优解法，为后续研究奠定理论基础。

authors_text: Yi Zhao,Rinu Boney,Alexander Ilin,Juho Kannala,Joni Pajarinen
title: Adaptive Behavior Cloning Regularization for Stable Offline-to-Online Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 自适应行为克隆正则化，实现稳定的离线到在线强化学习
abstract: Offline reinforcement learning, by learning from a fixed dataset, makes it possible to learn agent behaviors without interacting with the environment. However, depending on the quality of the offline dataset, such pre-trained agents may have limited performance and would further need to be fine-tuned online by interacting with the environment. During online fine-tuning, the performance of the pre-trained agent may collapse quickly due to the sudden distribution shift from offline to online data. While constraints enforced by offline RL methods such as a behaviour cloning loss prevent this to an extent, these constraints also significantly slow down online fine-tuning by forcing the agent to stay close to the behavior policy. We propose to adaptively weigh the behavior cloning loss during online fine-tuning based on the agent's performance and training stability. Moreover, we use a randomized ensemble of Q functions to further increase the sample efficiency of online fine-tuning by performing a large number of learning updates. Experiments show that the proposed method yields state-of-the-art offline-to-online reinforcement learning performance on the popular D4RL benchmark. Code is available: \url{https://github.com/zhaoyi11/adaptive_bc}.
summary: Offline reinforcement learning, by learning from a fixed dataset, makes it possible to learn agent behaviors without interacting with the environment. However, depending on the quality of the offline dataset, such pre-trained agents may have limited performance and would further need to be fine-tuned online by interacting with the environment. During online fine-tuning, the performance of the pre-trained agent may collapse quickly due to the sudden distribution shift from offline to online data. While constraints enforced by offline RL methods such as a behaviour cloning loss prevent this to an extent, these constraints also significantly slow down online fine-tuning by forcing the agent to stay close to the behavior policy. We propose to adaptively weigh the behavior cloning loss during online fine-tuning based on the agent's performance and training stability. Moreover, we use a randomized ensemble of Q functions to further increase the sample efficiency of online fine-tuning by performing a large number of learning updates. Experiments show that the proposed method yields state-of-the-art offline-to-online reinforcement learning performance on the popular D4RL benchmark. Code is available: \url{https://github.com/zhaoyi11/adaptive_bc}.
abstract_zh: 离线强化学习通过从固定数据集中学习，可以在不与环境交互的情况下学习代理行为。然而，根据离线数据集的质量，此类预训练代理的性能可能有限，并且还需要通过与环境交互进行在线微调。在在线微调期间，由于分布从离线数据突然转移到在线数据，预训练代理的性能可能会迅速崩溃。虽然离线 RL 方法强制执行的约束（例如行为克隆损失）在一定程度上阻止了这种情况的发生，但这些约束也通过迫使代理保持接近行为策略而显着减慢了在线微调的速度。我们建议根据代理的性能和训练稳定性，在在线微调期间自适应地权衡行为克隆损失。此外，我们使用 Q 函数的随机集成，通过执行大量学习更新来进一步提高在线微调的样本效率。实验表明，所提出的方法在流行的 D4RL 基准上产生了最先进的离线到在线强化学习性能。代码可用：\url{https://github.com/zhaoyi11/adaptive_bc}。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种自适应行为克隆正则化方法，旨在提升离线到在线强化学习的稳定性与性能。
AI.motivation: 离线强化学习预训练的智能体在在线微调时易因分布偏移导致性能骤降，而现有行为克隆约束虽能缓解问题，却显著降低了在线微调效率。
AI.method: 根据智能体性能与训练稳定性动态调整行为克隆损失权重，并结合随机化Q函数集成以提高样本效率。
AI.result: 在D4RL基准测试中达到离线到在线强化学习的最先进性能，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 自适应正则化策略有效平衡了稳定性与微调效率，为离线到在线强化学习提供了更优解决方案。

ai_content.tldr: 该论文提出了一种自适应行为克隆正则化方法，旨在提升离线到在线强化学习的稳定性与性能。
ai_content.motivation: 离线强化学习预训练的智能体在在线微调时易因分布偏移导致性能骤降，而现有行为克隆约束虽能缓解问题，却显著降低了在线微调效率。
ai_content.method: 根据智能体性能与训练稳定性动态调整行为克隆损失权重，并结合随机化Q函数集成以提高样本效率。
ai_content.result: 在D4RL基准测试中达到离线到在线强化学习的最先进性能，代码已开源。
ai_content.conclusion: 自适应正则化策略有效平衡了稳定性与微调效率，为离线到在线强化学习提供了更优解决方案。

search_text: Adaptive Behavior Cloning Regularization for Stable Offline-to-Online Reinforcement Learning 自适应行为克隆正则化，实现稳定的离线到在线强化学习 Offline reinforcement learning, by learning from a fixed dataset, makes it possible to learn agent behaviors without interacting with the environment. However, depending on the quality of the offline dataset, such pre-trained agents may have limited performance and would further need to be fine-tuned online by interacting with the environment. During online fine-tuning, the performance of the pre-trained agent may collapse quickly due to the sudden distribution shift from offline to online data. While constraints enforced by offline RL methods such as a behaviour cloning loss prevent this to an extent, these constraints also significantly slow down online fine-tuning by forcing the agent to stay close to the behavior policy. We propose to adaptively weigh the behavior cloning loss during online fine-tuning based on the agent's performance and training stability. Moreover, we use a randomized ensemble of Q functions to further increase the sample efficiency of online fine-tuning by performing a large number of learning updates. Experiments show that the proposed method yields state-of-the-art offline-to-online reinforcement learning performance on the popular D4RL benchmark. Code is available: \url{https://github.com/zhaoyi11/adaptive_bc}. 离线强化学习通过从固定数据集中学习，可以在不与环境交互的情况下学习代理行为。然而，根据离线数据集的质量，此类预训练代理的性能可能有限，并且还需要通过与环境交互进行在线微调。在在线微调期间，由于分布从离线数据突然转移到在线数据，预训练代理的性能可能会迅速崩溃。虽然离线 RL 方法强制执行的约束（例如行为克隆损失）在一定程度上阻止了这种情况的发生，但这些约束也通过迫使代理保持接近行为策略而显着减慢了在线微调的速度。我们建议根据代理的性能和训练稳定性，在在线微调期间自适应地权衡行为克隆损失。此外，我们使用 Q 函数的随机集成，通过执行大量学习更新来进一步提高在线微调的样本效率。实验表明，所提出的方法在流行的 D4RL 基准上产生了最先进的离线到在线强化学习性能。代码可用：\url{https://github.com/zhaoyi11/adaptive_bc}。 该论文提出了一种自适应行为克隆正则化方法，旨在提升离线到在线强化学习的稳定性与性能。 Yi Zhao,Rinu Boney,Alexander Ilin,Juho Kannala,Joni Pajarinen cs.LG,cs.RO

title: Preference-Learning Emitters for Mixed-Initiative Quality-Diversity Algorithms
title_zh: 混合主动质量多样性算法的偏好学习发射器
abstract: In mixed-initiative co-creation tasks, wherein a human and a machine jointly create items, it is important to provide multiple relevant suggestions to the designer. Quality-diversity algorithms are commonly used for this purpose, as they can provide diverse suggestions that represent salient areas of the solution space, showcasing designs with high fitness and wide variety. Because generated suggestions drive the search process, it is important that they provide inspiration, but also stay aligned with the designer's intentions. Additionally, often many interactions with the system are required before the designer is content with a solution. In this work, we tackle these challenges with an interactive constrained MAP-Elites system that leverages emitters to learn the preferences of the designer and then use them in automated steps. By learning preferences, the generated designs remain aligned with the designer's intent, and by applying automatic steps, we generate more solutions per user interaction, giving a larger number of choices to the designer and thereby speeding up the search. We propose a general framework for preference-learning emitters (PLEs) and apply it to a procedural content generation task in the video game Space Engineers. We built an interactive application for our algorithm and performed a user study with players.

In this work, we tackle these challenges with an interactive constrained MAP-Elites system that leverages emitters to learn the preferences of the designer and then use them in automated steps. By learning preferences, the generated designs remain aligned with the designer's intent, and by applying automatic steps, we generate more solutions per user interaction, giving a larger number of choices to the designer and thereby speeding up the search. We propose a general framework for preference-learning emitters (PLEs) and apply it to a procedural content generation task in the video game Space Engineers. We built an interactive application for our algorithm and performed a user study with players.
abstract_zh: 在人类和机器共同创建物品的混合主动共同创造任务中，向设计师提供多种相关建议非常重要。质量多样性算法通常用于此目的，因为它们可以提供代表解决方案空间的显着区域的多样化建议，展示具有高适应性和多样性的设计。由于生成的建议驱动搜索过程，因此它们不仅能提供灵感，而且与设计师的意图保持一致，这一点很重要。此外，在设计人员对解决方案感到满意之前，通常需要与系统进行多次交互。在这项工作中，我们通过交互式约束 MAP-Elites 系统来应对这些挑战，该系统利用发射器来了解设计者的偏好，然后在自动化步骤中使用它们。通过学习偏好，生成的设计与设计师的意图保持一致，并且通过应用自动步骤，我们为每次用户交互生成更多解决方案，为设计师提供更多选择，从而加快搜索速度。我们提出了一个偏好学习发射器（PLE）的通用框架，并将其应用于视频游戏《太空工程师》中的程序内容生成任务。我们为我们的算法构建了一个交互式应用程序，并与玩家进行了用户研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于偏好学习的发射器（PLEs），用于改进混合主动质量多样性算法，在协作设计任务中生成符合设计师意图的多样化方案。
AI.motivation: 在人机协作设计中，传统方法生成的方案可能偏离设计师需求且交互效率低，需通过学习偏好并自动化生成更多方案来提升效率与契合度。
AI.method: 构建交互式约束MAP-Elites系统，利用发射器学习设计师偏好并应用于自动化步骤，通过用户研究验证其在游戏《Space Engineers》程序化内容生成中的效果。
AI.result: 用户研究显示，系统能生成更符合用户偏好的多样化方案，减少交互次数并加快搜索速度。
AI.conclusion: PLE框架有效结合了偏好学习与自动化生成，为混合主动协作设计提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Zhenyu Wu,Lin Wang,Wei Wang,Tengfei Shi,Chenglizhao Chen,Aimin Hao,Shuo Li
title: Synthetic Data Supervised Salient Object Detection
title_zh: 合成数据监督的显着目标检测
abstract: Although deep salient object detection (SOD) has achieved remarkable progress, deep SOD models are extremely data-hungry, requiring large-scale pixel-wise annotations to deliver such promising results. In this paper, we propose a novel yet effective method for SOD, coined SODGAN, which can generate infinite high-quality image-mask pairs requiring only a few labeled data, and these synthesized pairs can replace the human-labeled DUTS-TR to train any off-the-shelf SOD model. Its contribution is three-fold. 1) Our proposed diffusion embedding network can address the manifold mismatch and is tractable for the latent code generation, better matching with the ImageNet latent space. 2) For the first time, our proposed few-shot saliency mask generator can synthesize infinite accurate image synchronized saliency masks with a few labeled data. 3) Our proposed quality-aware discriminator can select highquality synthesized image-mask pairs from noisy synthetic data pool, improving the quality of synthetic data. For the first time, our SODGAN tackles SOD with synthetic data directly generated from the generative model, which opens up a new research paradigm for SOD. Extensive experimental results show that the saliency model trained on synthetic data can achieve $98.4\%$ F-measure of the saliency model trained on the DUTS-TR. Moreover, our approach achieves a new SOTA performance in semi/weakly-supervised methods, and even outperforms several fully-supervised SOTA methods. Code is available at https://github.com/wuzhenyubuaa/SODGAN
summary: Although deep salient object detection (SOD) has achieved remarkable progress, deep SOD models are extremely data-hungry, requiring large-scale pixel-wise annotations to deliver such promising results. In this paper, we propose a novel yet effective method for SOD, coined SODGAN, which can generate infinite high-quality image-mask pairs requiring only a few labeled data, and these synthesized pairs can replace the human-labeled DUTS-TR to train any off-the-shelf SOD model. Its contribution is three-fold. 1) Our proposed diffusion embedding network can address the manifold mismatch and is tractable for the latent code generation, better matching with the ImageNet latent space. 2) For the first time, our proposed few-shot saliency mask generator can synthesize infinite accurate image synchronized saliency masks with a few labeled data. 3) Our proposed quality-aware discriminator can select highquality synthesized image-mask pairs from noisy synthetic data pool, improving the quality of synthetic data. For the first time, our SODGAN tackles SOD with synthetic data directly generated from the generative model, which opens up a new research paradigm for SOD. Extensive experimental results show that the saliency model trained on synthetic data can achieve $98.4\%$ F-measure of the saliency model trained on the DUTS-TR. Moreover, our approach achieves a new SOTA performance in semi/weakly-supervised methods, and even outperforms several fully-supervised SOTA methods. Code is available at https://github.com/wuzhenyubuaa/SODGAN
abstract_zh: 尽管深度显着目标检测 (SOD) 已经取得了显着的进展，但深度 SOD 模型非常需要数据，需要大规模的像素级注释才能提供如此有希望的结果。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖而有效的 SOD 方法，即 SODGAN，它可以生成无限的高质量图像掩模对，仅需要少量标记数据，并且这些合成对可以取代人工标记的 DUTS-TR 来训练任何现成的 SOD 模型。它的贡献是三倍的。 1）我们提出的扩散嵌入网络可以解决流形不匹配问题，并且易于潜在代码生成，与 ImageNet 潜在空间更好地匹配。 2）我们提出的少样本显着性掩模生成器第一次可以用少量标记数据合成无限精确的图像同步显着性掩模。 3）我们提出的质量感知鉴别器可以从嘈杂的合成数据池中选择高质量的合成图像掩模对，从而提高合成数据的质量。我们的 SODGAN 首次使用生成模型直接生成的合成数据来处理 SOD，这为 SOD 开辟了新的研究范式。大量的实验结果表明，在合成数据上训练的显着性模型可以达到在 DUTS-TR 上训练的显着性模型的 $98.4\%$ F-measure。此外，我们的方法在半/弱监督方法中实现了新的 SOTA 性能，甚至优于几种完全监督的 SOTA 方法。代码可在 https://github.com/wuzhenyubuaa/SODGAN 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成对抗网络（SODGAN）的显著性目标检测方法，通过合成数据减少对大规模标注数据的依赖。
AI.motivation: 深度显著性目标检测模型需要大量像素级标注数据，而人工标注成本高昂且耗时，亟需减少对标注数据的依赖。
AI.method: 提出三重创新：1）扩散嵌入网络解决潜在空间不匹配问题；2）少样本显著性掩码生成器合成无限图像-掩码对；3）质量感知判别器筛选高质量合成数据。
AI.result: 合成数据训练的模型在DUTS-TR数据集上达到98.4% F-measure，半/弱监督方法中取得SOTA性能，超越部分全监督方法。
AI.conclusion: SODGAN通过直接生成合成数据解决标注数据瓶颈问题，为显著性检测开辟了新研究范式。

conclusion: SODGAN通过直接生成合成数据解决标注数据瓶颈问题，为显著性检测开辟了新研究范式。
search_text: Synthetic Data Supervised Salient Object Detection 合成数据监督的显着目标检测 Although deep salient object detection (SOD) has achieved remarkable progress, deep SOD models are extremely data-hungry, requiring large-scale pixel-wise annotations to deliver such promising results. In this paper, we propose a novel yet effective method for SOD, coined SODGAN, which can generate infinite high-quality image-mask pairs requiring only a few labeled data, and these synthesized pairs can replace the human-labeled DUTS-TR to train any off-the-shelf SOD model. Its contribution is three-fold. 1) Our proposed diffusion embedding network can address the manifold mismatch and is tractable for the latent code generation, better matching with the ImageNet latent space. 2) For the first time, our proposed few-shot saliency mask generator can synthesize infinite accurate image synchronized saliency masks with a few labeled data. 3) Our proposed quality-aware discriminator can select highquality synthesized image-mask pairs from noisy synthetic data pool, improving the quality of synthetic data. For the first time, our SODGAN tackles SOD with synthetic data directly generated from the generative model, which opens up a new research paradigm for SOD. Extensive experimental results show that the saliency model trained on synthetic data can achieve $98.4\%$ F-measure of the saliency model trained on the DUTS-TR. Moreover, our approach achieves a new SOTA performance in semi/weakly-supervised methods, and even outperforms several fully-supervised SOTA methods. Code is available at https://github.com/wuzhenyubuaa/SODGAN 尽管深度显着目标检测 (SOD) 已经取得了显着的进展，但深度 SOD 模型非常需要数据，需要大规模的像素级注释才能提供如此有希望的结果。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖而有效的 SOD 方法，即 SODGAN，它可以生成无限的高质量图像掩模对，仅需要少量标记数据，并且这些合成对可以取代人工标记的 DUTS-TR 来训练任何现成的 SOD 模型。它的贡献是三倍的。 1）我们提出的扩散嵌入网络可以解决流形不匹配问题，并且易于潜在代码生成，与 ImageNet 潜在空间更好地匹配。 2）我们提出的少样本显着性掩模生成器第一次可以用少量标记数据合成无限精确的图像同步显着性掩模。 3）我们提出的质量感知鉴别器可以从嘈杂的合成数据池中选择高质量的合成图像掩模对，从而提高合成数据的质量。我们的 SODGAN 首次使用生成模型直接生成的合成数据来处理 SOD，这为 SOD 开辟了新的研究范式。大量的实验结果表明，在合成数据上训练的显着性模型可以达到在 DUTS-TR 上训练的显着性模型的 $98.4\%$ F-measure。此外，我们的方法在半/弱监督方法中实现了新的 SOTA 性能，甚至优于几种完全监督的 SOTA 方法。代码可在 https://github.com/wuzhenyubuaa/SODGAN 获取 本文提出一种基于生成对抗网络（SODGAN）的显著性目标检测方法，通过合成数据减少对大规模标注数据的依赖。 Zhenyu Wu,Lin Wang,Wei Wang,Tengfei Shi,Chenglizhao Chen,Aimin Hao,Shuo Li cs.CV

title: Stable Deep MRI Reconstruction using Generative Priors
title_zh: 使用生成先验进行稳定的深度 MRI 重建
abstract: Data-driven approaches recently achieved remarkable success in magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) reconstruction, but integration into clinical routine remains challenging due to a lack of generalizability and interpretability. In this paper, we address these challenges in a unified framework based on generative image priors. We propose a novel deep neural network based regularizer which is trained in a generative setting on reference magnitude images only. After training, the regularizer encodes higher-level domain statistics which we demonstrate by synthesizing images without data. Embedding the trained model in a classical variational approach yields high-quality reconstructions irrespective of the sub-sampling pattern. In addition, the model shows stable behavior when confronted with out-of-distribution data in the form of contrast variation. Furthermore, a probabilistic interpretation provides a distribution of reconstructions and hence allows uncertainty quantification. To reconstruct parallel MRI, we propose a fast algorithm to jointly estimate the image and the sensitivity maps. The results demonstrate competitive performance, on par with state-of-the-art end-to-end deep learning methods, while preserving the flexibility with respect to sub-sampling patterns and allowing for uncertainty quantification.
summary: Data-driven approaches recently achieved remarkable success in magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) reconstruction, but integration into clinical routine remains challenging due to a lack of generalizability and interpretability. In this paper, we address these challenges in a unified framework based on generative image priors. We propose a novel deep neural network based regularizer which is trained in a generative setting on reference magnitude images only. After training, the regularizer encodes higher-level domain statistics which we demonstrate by synthesizing images without data. Embedding the trained model in a classical variational approach yields high-quality reconstructions irrespective of the sub-sampling pattern. In addition, the model shows stable behavior when confronted with out-of-distribution data in the form of contrast variation. Furthermore, a probabilistic interpretation provides a distribution of reconstructions and hence allows uncertainty quantification. To reconstruct parallel MRI, we propose a fast algorithm to jointly estimate the image and the sensitivity maps. The results demonstrate competitive performance, on par with state-of-the-art end-to-end deep learning methods, while preserving the flexibility with respect to sub-sampling patterns and allowing for uncertainty quantification.
abstract_zh: 数据驱动的方法最近在磁共振成像（MRI）重建方面取得了显着的成功，但由于缺乏普遍性和可解释性，融入临床常规仍然具有挑战性。在本文中，我们在基于生成图像先验的统一框架中解决了这些挑战。我们提出了一种新颖的基于深度神经网络的正则化器，它仅在参考幅度图像的生成设置中进行训练。训练后，正则化器对更高级别的域统计数据进行编码，我们通过合成没有数据的图像来演示这些统计数据。将经过训练的模型嵌入经典变分方法中，无论子采样模式如何，都可以产生高质量的重建。此外，当面对对比度变化形式的分布外数据时，该模型表现出稳定的行为。此外，概率解释提供了重建的分布，因此允许不确定性量化。为了重建并行 MRI，我们提出了一种快速算法来联合估计图像和灵敏度图。结果展示了与最先进的端到端深度学习方法相当的竞争性能，同时保留了子采样模式的灵活性并允许不确定性量化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成先验的深度MRI重建方法，解决临床应用中通用性与可解释性不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有数据驱动MRI重建方法缺乏通用性与可解释性，难以在临床环境中稳定应用。
AI.method: 设计基于生成模型的正则化器，仅使用幅度图像训练，结合变分方法实现稳定重建，并提出联合估计图像与敏感图的快速算法。
AI.result: 在多种子采样模式下重建质量与先进端到端方法相当，且具备对比度变化鲁棒性与不确定性量化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过生成先验实现稳定灵活的MRI重建，兼顾性能与临床可解释性需求。
